title: Reference-Limited Compositional Zero-Shot Learning
title_zh: 参考有限组合零样本学习
comment: ICMR 2023
comments: ICMR 2023
abstract: Compositional zero-shot learning (CZSL) refers to recognizing unseen compositions of known visual primitives, which is an essential ability for artificial intelligence systems to learn and understand the world. While considerable progress has been made on existing benchmarks, we suspect whether popular CZSL methods can address the challenges of few-shot and few referential compositions, which is common when learning in real-world unseen environments. To this end, we study the challenging reference-limited compositional zero-shot learning (RL-CZSL) problem in this paper, i.e., given limited seen compositions that contain only a few samples as reference, unseen compositions of observed primitives should be identified. We propose a novel Meta Compositional Graph Learner (MetaCGL) that can efficiently learn the compositionality from insufficient referential information and generalize to unseen compositions. Besides, we build a benchmark with two new large-scale datasets that consist of natural images with diverse compositional labels, providing more realistic environments for RL-CZSL. Extensive experiments in the benchmarks show that our method achieves state-of-the-art performance in recognizing unseen compositions when reference is limited for compositional learning.
summary: Compositional zero-shot learning (CZSL) refers to recognizing unseen compositions of known visual primitives, which is an essential ability for artificial intelligence systems to learn and understand the world. While considerable progress has been made on existing benchmarks, we suspect whether popular CZSL methods can address the challenges of few-shot and few referential compositions, which is common when learning in real-world unseen environments. To this end, we study the challenging reference-limited compositional zero-shot learning (RL-CZSL) problem in this paper, i.e., given limited seen compositions that contain only a few samples as reference, unseen compositions of observed primitives should be identified. We propose a novel Meta Compositional Graph Learner (MetaCGL) that can efficiently learn the compositionality from insufficient referential information and generalize to unseen compositions. Besides, we build a benchmark with two new large-scale datasets that consist of natural images with diverse compositional labels, providing more realistic environments for RL-CZSL. Extensive experiments in the benchmarks show that our method achieves state-of-the-art performance in recognizing unseen compositions when reference is limited for compositional learning.
abstract_zh: 组合零样本学习（CZSL）是指识别已知视觉基元的未见过的组合，这是人工智能系统学习和理解世界的基本能力。虽然现有基准已经取得了相当大的进展，但我们怀疑流行的 CZSL 方法是否可以解决少镜头和少参考组合的挑战，这在现实世界中不可见的环境中学习时很常见。为此，我们在本文中研究了具有挑战性的参考有限组合零样本学习（RL-CZSL）问题，即，鉴于仅包含少量样本作为参考的有限可见组合，应识别观察到的基元的未见过组合。我们提出了一种新颖的元组合图学习器（MetaCGL），它可以有效地从不足的参考信息中学习组合性，并泛化到未见过的组合。此外，我们还使用两个新的大型数据集构建了基准，这些数据集由具有不同成分标签的自然图像组成，为 RL-CZSL 提供了更真实的环境。基准测试中的大量实验表明，当构图学习的参考有限时，我们的方法在识别未见过的构图方面实现了最先进的性能。

AI.tldr: 研究在参考样本有限的情况下识别未见组合的挑战，提出新方法并构建基准数据集。
AI.motivation: 现有组合零样本学习方法在参考样本稀缺的真实场景中表现不足，需探索更鲁棒的解决方案以提升AI系统泛化能力。
AI.method: 提出元组合图学习器（MetaCGL），结合元学习与图结构建模，从有限参考样本中学习组合规律；构建包含自然图像的两个大规模数据集作为基准。
AI.result: 在基准测试中，MetaCGL在参考样本有限的场景下实现最先进的未见组合识别性能，显著优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: MetaCGL有效解决了参考受限的组合零样本学习问题，为真实环境下的视觉理解提供了新思路与基准支持。

authors_text: Lucas O. Lyra,Antonio Elias Fabris,Joao B. Florindo
title: Multilayer deep feature extraction for visual texture recognition
title_zh: 用于视觉纹理识别的多层深度特征提取
abstract: Convolutional neural networks have shown successful results in image classification achieving real-time results superior to the human level. However, texture images still pose some challenge to these models due, for example, to the limited availability of data for training in several problems where these images appear, high inter-class similarity, the absence of a global viewpoint of the object represented, and others. In this context, the present paper is focused on improving the accuracy of convolutional neural networks in texture classification. This is done by extracting features from multiple convolutional layers of a pretrained neural network and aggregating such features using Fisher vector. The reason for using features from earlier convolutional layers is obtaining information that is less domain specific. We verify the effectiveness of our method on texture classification of benchmark datasets, as well as on a practical task of Brazilian plant species identification. In both scenarios, Fisher vectors calculated on multiple layers outperform state-of-art methods, confirming that early convolutional layers provide important information about the texture image for classification.
summary: Convolutional neural networks have shown successful results in image classification achieving real-time results superior to the human level. However, texture images still pose some challenge to these models due, for example, to the limited availability of data for training in several problems where these images appear, high inter-class similarity, the absence of a global viewpoint of the object represented, and others. In this context, the present paper is focused on improving the accuracy of convolutional neural networks in texture classification. This is done by extracting features from multiple convolutional layers of a pretrained neural network and aggregating such features using Fisher vector. The reason for using features from earlier convolutional layers is obtaining information that is less domain specific. We verify the effectiveness of our method on texture classification of benchmark datasets, as well as on a practical task of Brazilian plant species identification. In both scenarios, Fisher vectors calculated on multiple layers outperform state-of-art methods, confirming that early convolutional layers provide important information about the texture image for classification.
abstract_zh: 卷积神经网络在图像分类方面取得了成功，实现了优于人类水平的实时结果。然而，纹理图像仍然对这些模型提出了一些挑战，例如，由于用于训练这些图像的几个问题的数据有限、类间相似度高、缺乏所表示的对象的全局视角等。在这种背景下，本文的重点是提高卷积神经网络在纹理分类中的准确性。这是通过从预训练神经网络的多个卷积层中提取特征并使用 Fisher 向量聚合这些特征来完成的。使用早期卷积层特征的原因是获得不太特定于领域的信息。我们验证了我们的方法在基准数据集的纹理分类以及巴西植物物种识别的实际任务上的有效性。在这两种情况下，在多层上计算的 Fisher 向量都优于最先进的方法，证实早期卷积层提供了有关纹理图像进行分类的重要信息。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种多层深度特征提取方法，通过结合卷积神经网络不同层的特征并利用Fisher向量聚合，提升纹理图像分类的准确性。
AI.motivation: 尽管卷积神经网络在图像分类中表现优异，但纹理图像因数据稀缺、类间相似度高及缺乏全局视角等问题，仍面临分类挑战。
AI.method: 从预训练神经网络的多层卷积层提取特征，使用Fisher向量进行聚合，特别关注早期卷积层以获取更通用的纹理信息。
AI.result: 在基准数据集和巴西植物物种识别任务中，多层特征方法均优于现有技术，验证了早期卷积层对纹理分类的重要性。
AI.conclusion: 早期卷积层包含关键纹理信息，结合多层特征与Fisher向量聚合能有效提升分类性能，为纹理识别提供新思路。

authors_text: Hualiang Wang,Siming Fu,Xiaoxuan He,Hangxiang Fang,Zuozhu Liu,Haoji Hu
title: Towards Calibrated Hyper-Sphere Representation via Distribution Overlap Coefficient for Long-tailed Learning
title_zh: 通过长尾学习的分布重叠系数实现校准的超球体表示
comment: ef:ECCV2022
comments: ef:ECCV2022
abstract: Long-tailed learning aims to tackle the crucial challenge that head classes dominate the training procedure under severe class imbalance in real-world scenarios. However, little attention has been given to how to quantify the dominance severity of head classes in the representation space. Motivated by this, we generalize the cosine-based classifiers to a von Mises-Fisher (vMF) mixture model, denoted as vMF classifier, which enables to quantitatively measure representation quality upon the hyper-sphere space via calculating distribution overlap coefficient. To our knowledge, this is the first work to measure representation quality of classifiers and features from the perspective of distribution overlap coefficient. On top of it, we formulate the inter-class discrepancy and class-feature consistency loss terms to alleviate the interference among the classifier weights and align features with classifier weights. Furthermore, a novel post-training calibration algorithm is devised to zero-costly boost the performance via inter-class overlap coefficients. Our method outperforms previous work with a large margin and achieves state-of-the-art performance on long-tailed image classification, semantic segmentation, and instance segmentation tasks (e.g., we achieve 55.0\% overall accuracy with ResNetXt-50 in ImageNet-LT). Our code is available at https://github.com/VipaiLab/vMF\_OP.
summary: Long-tailed learning aims to tackle the crucial challenge that head classes dominate the training procedure under severe class imbalance in real-world scenarios. However, little attention has been given to how to quantify the dominance severity of head classes in the representation space. Motivated by this, we generalize the cosine-based classifiers to a von Mises-Fisher (vMF) mixture model, denoted as vMF classifier, which enables to quantitatively measure representation quality upon the hyper-sphere space via calculating distribution overlap coefficient. To our knowledge, this is the first work to measure representation quality of classifiers and features from the perspective of distribution overlap coefficient. On top of it, we formulate the inter-class discrepancy and class-feature consistency loss terms to alleviate the interference among the classifier weights and align features with classifier weights. Furthermore, a novel post-training calibration algorithm is devised to zero-costly boost the performance via inter-class overlap coefficients. Our method outperforms previous work with a large margin and achieves state-of-the-art performance on long-tailed image classification, semantic segmentation, and instance segmentation tasks (e.g., we achieve 55.0\% overall accuracy with ResNetXt-50 in ImageNet-LT). Our code is available at https://github.com/VipaiLab/vMF\_OP.
abstract_zh: 长尾学习旨在解决现实场景中严重的类别不平衡情况下，头类在训练过程中占主导地位的关键挑战。然而，很少有人关注如何量化表征空间中头类的主导严重程度。受此启发，我们将基于余弦的分类器推广到 von Mises-Fisher (vMF) 混合模型，表示为 vMF 分类器，它能够通过计算分布重叠系数来定量测量超球空间上的表示质量。据我们所知，这是第一个从分布重叠系数的角度衡量分类器和特征的表示质量的工作。在此基础上，我们制定了类间差异和类特征一致性损失项，以减轻分类器权重之间的干扰并将特征与分类器权重对齐。此外，设计了一种新颖的训练后校准算法，通过类间重叠系数零成本地提高性能。我们的方法大幅优于之前的工作，并在长尾图像分类、语义分割和实例分割任务上实现了最先进的性能（例如，我们在 ImageNet-LT 中使用 ResNetXt-50 实现了 55.0% 的总体准确率）。我们的代码可在 https://github.com/VipaiLab/vMF\_OP 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于超球面表示的校准方法，通过分布重叠系数解决长尾学习中的类别不平衡问题。
AI.motivation: 现有方法未有效量化头部类别在表示空间中的主导程度，导致长尾学习中特征与分类器权重的对齐不足。
AI.method: 将余弦分类器扩展为vMF混合模型，通过计算分布重叠系数量化超球面表示质量，并设计类间差异与类-特征一致性损失项，结合后训练校准算法提升性能。
AI.result: 在ImageNet-LT等长尾任务中，使用ResNetXt-50达到55.0%的总体准确率，显著优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: 通过分布重叠系数建模与超球面表示校准，有效缓解长尾学习中的类别不平衡问题，取得SOTA性能。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出一种基于超球面表示的校准方法，通过分布重叠系数解决长尾学习中的类别不平衡问题。
ai_content.motivation: 现有方法未有效量化头部类别在表示空间中的主导程度，导致长尾学习中特征与分类器权重的对齐不足。

search_text: Towards Calibrated Hyper-Sphere Representation via Distribution Overlap Coefficient for Long-tailed Learning 通过长尾学习的分布重叠系数实现校准的超球体表示 Long-tailed learning aims to tackle the crucial challenge that head classes dominate the training procedure under severe class imbalance in real-world scenarios. However, little attention has been given to how to quantify the dominance severity of head classes in the representation space. Motivated by this, we generalize the cosine-based classifiers to a von Mises-Fisher (vMF) mixture model, denoted as vMF classifier, which enables to quantitatively measure representation quality upon the hyper-sphere space via calculating distribution overlap coefficient. To our knowledge, this is the first work to measure representation quality of classifiers and features from the perspective of distribution overlap coefficient. On top of it, we formulate the inter-class discrepancy and class-feature consistency loss terms to alleviate the interference among the classifier weights and align features with classifier weights. Furthermore, a novel post-training calibration algorithm is devised to zero-costly boost the performance via inter-class overlap coefficients. Our method outperforms previous work with a large margin and achieves state-of-the-art performance on long-tailed image classification, semantic segmentation, and instance segmentation tasks (e.g., we achieve 55.0\% overall accuracy with ResNetXt-50 in ImageNet-LT). Our code is available at https://github.com/VipaiLab/vMF\_OP. 长尾学习旨在解决现实场景中严重的类别不平衡情况下，头类在训练过程中占主导地位的关键挑战。然而，很少有人关注如何量化表征空间中头类的主导严重程度。受此启发，我们将基于余弦的分类器推广到 von Mises-Fisher (vMF) 混合模型，表示为 vMF 分类器，它能够通过计算分布重叠系数来定量测量超球空间上的表示质量。据我们所知，这是第一个从分布重叠系数的角度衡量分类器和特征的表示质量的工作。在此基础上，我们制定了类间差异和类特征一致性损失项，以减轻分类器权重之间的干扰并将特征与分类器权重对齐。此外，设计了一种新颖的训练后校准算法，通过类间重叠系数零成本地提高性能。我们的方法大幅优于之前的工作，并在长尾图像分类、语义分割和实例分割任务上实现了最先进的性能（例如，我们在 ImageNet-LT 中使用 ResNetXt-50 实现了 55.0% 的总体准确率）。我们的代码可在 https://github.com/VipaiLab/vMF\_OP 获取。 本文提出一种基于超球面表示的校准方法，通过分布重叠系数解决长尾学习中的类别不平衡问题。 Hualiang Wang,Siming Fu,Xiaoxuan He,Hangxiang Fang,Zuozhu Liu,Haoji Hu cs.CV

authors_text: Yunpeng Zhang,Wenzhao Zheng,Zheng Zhu,Guan Huang,Jie Zhou,Jiwen Lu
title: A Simple Baseline for Multi-Camera 3D Object Detection
title_zh: 多摄像头 3D 物体检测的简单基准
abstract: 3D object detection with surrounding cameras has been a promising direction for autonomous driving. In this paper, we present SimMOD, a Simple baseline for Multi-camera Object Detection, to solve the problem. To incorporate multi-view information as well as build upon previous efforts on monocular 3D object detection, the framework is built on sample-wise object proposals and designed to work in a two-stage manner. First, we extract multi-scale features and generate the perspective object proposals on each monocular image. Second, the multi-view proposals are aggregated and then iteratively refined with multi-view and multi-scale visual features in the DETR3D-style. The refined proposals are end-to-end decoded into the detection results. To further boost the performance, we incorporate the auxiliary branches alongside the proposal generation to enhance the feature learning. Also, we design the methods of target filtering and teacher forcing to promote the consistency of two-stage training. We conduct extensive experiments on the 3D object detection benchmark of nuScenes to demonstrate the effectiveness of SimMOD and achieve new state-of-the-art performance. Code will be available at https://github.com/zhangyp15/SimMOD.
summary: 3D object detection with surrounding cameras has been a promising direction for autonomous driving. In this paper, we present SimMOD, a Simple baseline for Multi-camera Object Detection, to solve the problem. To incorporate multi-view information as well as build upon previous efforts on monocular 3D object detection, the framework is built on sample-wise object proposals and designed to work in a two-stage manner. First, we extract multi-scale features and generate the perspective object proposals on each monocular image. Second, the multi-view proposals are aggregated and then iteratively refined with multi-view and multi-scale visual features in the DETR3D-style. The refined proposals are end-to-end decoded into the detection results. To further boost the performance, we incorporate the auxiliary branches alongside the proposal generation to enhance the feature learning. Also, we design the methods of target filtering and teacher forcing to promote the consistency of two-stage training. We conduct extensive experiments on the 3D object detection benchmark of nuScenes to demonstrate the effectiveness of SimMOD and achieve new state-of-the-art performance. Code will be available at https://github.com/zhangyp15/SimMOD.
abstract_zh: 利用周围摄像头进行 3D 物体检测一直是自动驾驶的一个有前途的方向。在本文中，我们提出了 SimMOD，一种用于多摄像头目标检测的简单基线来解决该问题。为了整合多视图信息以及建立在单目 3D 对象检测方面的先前成果的基础上，该框架建立在样本对象建议的基础上，并设计为以两阶段方式工作。首先，我们提取多尺度特征并在每个单目图像上生成透视对象建议。其次，聚合多视图提案，然后使用 DETR3D 风格的多视图和多尺度视觉特征进行迭代细化。改进后的提案被端到端解码为检测结果。为了进一步提高性能，我们将辅助分支与提案生成结合起来以增强特征学习。此外，我们还设计了目标过滤和教师强制的方法，以促进两阶段训练的一致性。我们在 nuScenes 的 3D 对象检测基准上进行了广泛的实验，以证明 SimMOD 的有效性并实现新的最先进的性能。代码可在 https://github.com/zhangyp15/SimMOD 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出SimMOD，一种用于多摄像头3D目标检测的简单基线方法，旨在提升自动驾驶场景下的检测性能。
AI.motivation: 多摄像头3D目标检测在自动驾驶中具有重要意义，但现有方法复杂且效果有限，需一种简单高效且能融合多视角信息的解决方案。
AI.method: 采用两阶段框架：首先从单目图像中提取多尺度特征并生成视角目标提案；其次通过多视角和多尺度特征聚合与迭代优化（类似DETR3D），结合辅助分支及目标过滤、教师强制策略提升训练一致性。
AI.result: 在nuScenes基准测试中，SimMOD达到新的最先进性能，验证了其有效性。
AI.conclusion: SimMOD通过简洁设计与多视角信息融合，为多摄像头3D目标检测提供了高效且性能优越的基线方案。

search_text: A Simple Baseline for Multi-Camera 3D Object Detection 多摄像头 3D 物体检测的简单基准 3D object detection with surrounding cameras has been a promising direction for autonomous driving. In this paper, we present SimMOD, a Simple baseline for Multi-camera Object Detection, to solve the problem. To incorporate multi-view information as well as build upon previous efforts on monocular 3D object detection, the framework is built on sample-wise object proposals and designed to work in a two-stage manner. First, we extract multi-scale features and generate the perspective object proposals on each monocular image. Second, the multi-view proposals are aggregated and then iteratively refined with multi-view and multi-scale visual features in the DETR3D-style. The refined proposals are end-to-end decoded into the detection results. To further boost the performance, we incorporate the auxiliary branches alongside the proposal generation to enhance the feature learning. Also, we design the methods of target filtering and teacher forcing to promote the consistency of two-stage training. We conduct extensive experiments on the 3D object detection benchmark of nuScenes to demonstrate the effectiveness of SimMOD and achieve new state-of-the-art performance. Code will be available at https://github.com/zhangyp15/SimMOD. 利用周围摄像头进行 3D 物体检测一直是自动驾驶的一个有前途的方向。在本文中，我们提出了 SimMOD，一种用于多摄像头目标检测的简单基线来解决该问题。为了整合多视图信息以及建立在单目 3D 对象检测方面的先前成果的基础上，该框架建立在样本对象建议的基础上，并设计为以两阶段方式工作。首先，我们提取多尺度特征并在每个单目图像上生成透视对象建议。其次，聚合多视图提案，然后使用 DETR3D 风格的多视图和多尺度视觉特征进行迭代细化。改进后的提案被端到端解码为检测结果。为了进一步提高性能，我们将辅助分支与提案生成结合起来以增强特征学习。此外，我们还设计了目标过滤和教师强制的方法，以促进两阶段训练的一致性。我们在 nuScenes 的 3D 对象检测基准上进行了广泛的实验，以证明 SimMOD 的有效性并实现新的最先进的性能。代码可在 https://github.com/zhangyp15/SimMOD 获取。 本文提出SimMOD，一种用于多摄像头3D目标检测的简单基线方法，旨在提升自动驾驶场景下的检测性能。 Yunpeng Zhang,Wenzhao Zheng,Zheng Zhu,Guan Huang,Jie Zhou,Jiwen Lu cs.CV

title: Simple and Optimal Stochastic Gradient Methods for Nonsmooth Nonconvex Optimization
title_zh: 非光滑非凸优化的简单最优随机梯度法
comment: 60 pages. To appear in JMLR. arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:1904.09265
comments: 60 pages. To appear in JMLR. arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:1904.09265
abstract: We propose and analyze several stochastic gradient algorithms for finding stationary points or local minimum in nonconvex, possibly with nonsmooth regularizer, finite-sum and online optimization problems. First, we propose a simple proximal stochastic gradient algorithm based on variance reduction called ProxSVRG+. We provide a clean and tight analysis of ProxSVRG+, which shows that it outperforms the deterministic proximal gradient descent (ProxGD) for a wide range of minibatch sizes, hence solves an open problem proposed in Reddi et al. (2016b). Also, ProxSVRG+ uses much less proximal oracle calls than ProxSVRG (Reddi et al., 2016b) and extends to the online setting by avoiding full gradient computations. Then, we further propose an optimal algorithm, called SSRGD, based on SARAH (Nguyen et al., 2017) and show that SSRGD further improves the gradient complexity of ProxSVRG+ and achieves the optimal upper bound, matching the known lower bound of (Fang et al., 2018; Li et al., 2021). Moreover, we show that both ProxSVRG+ and SSRGD enjoy automatic adaptation with local structure of the objective function such as the Polyak-Łojasiewicz (PL) condition for nonconvex functions in the finite-sum case, i.e., we prove that both of them can automatically switch to faster global linear convergence without any restart performed in prior work ProxSVRG (Reddi et al., 2016b). Finally, we focus on the more challenging problem of finding an $(ε, δ)$-local minimum instead of just finding an $ε$-approximate (first-order) stationary point (which may be some bad unstable saddle points). We show that SSRGD can find an $(ε, δ)$-local minimum by simply adding some random perturbations. Our algorithm is almost as simple as its counterpart for finding stationary points, and achieves similar optimal rates.
summary: We propose and analyze several stochastic gradient algorithms for finding stationary points or local minimum in nonconvex, possibly with nonsmooth regularizer, finite-sum and online optimization problems. First, we propose a simple proximal stochastic gradient algorithm based on variance reduction called ProxSVRG+. We provide a clean and tight analysis of ProxSVRG+, which shows that it outperforms the deterministic proximal gradient descent (ProxGD) for a wide range of minibatch sizes, hence solves an open problem proposed in Reddi et al. (2016b). Also, ProxSVRG+ uses much less proximal oracle calls than ProxSVRG (Reddi et al., 2016b) and extends to the online setting by avoiding full gradient computations. Then, we further propose an optimal algorithm, called SSRGD, based on SARAH (Nguyen et al., 2017) and show that SSRGD further improves the gradient complexity of ProxSVRG+ and achieves the optimal upper bound, matching the known lower bound of (Fang et al., 2018; Li et al., 2021). Moreover, we show that both ProxSVRG+ and SSRGD enjoy automatic adaptation with local structure of the objective function such as the Polyak-Łojasiewicz (PL) condition for nonconvex functions in the finite-sum case, i.e., we prove that both of them can automatically switch to faster global linear convergence without any restart performed in prior work ProxSVRG (Reddi et al., 2016b). Finally, we focus on the more challenging problem of finding an $(ε, δ)$-local minimum instead of just finding an $ε$-approximate (first-order) stationary point (which may be some bad unstable saddle points). We show that SSRGD can find an $(ε, δ)$-local minimum by simply adding some random perturbations. Our algorithm is almost as simple as its counterpart for finding stationary points, and achieves similar optimal rates.
abstract_zh: 我们提出并分析了几种用于在非凸中寻找驻点或局部最小值的随机梯度算法，可能涉及非平滑正则化器、有限和和在线优化问题。首先，我们提出了一种基于方差减少的简单近端随机梯度算法，称为 ProxSVRG+。我们对 ProxSVRG+ 进行了清晰而严格的分析，表明它对于各种小批量大小都优于确定性近端梯度下降 (ProxGD)，从而解决了 Reddi 等人提出的开放问题。 （2016b）。此外，ProxSVRG+ 使用比 ProxSVRG 少得多的近端预言机调用（Reddi 等人，2016b），并通过避免完整梯度计算扩展到在线设置。然后，我们进一步提出了一种基于 SARAH 的最优算法，称为 SSRGD（Nguyen et al., 2017），并表明 SSRGD 进一步提高了 ProxSVRG+ 的梯度复杂度并实现了最优上限，与已知的下限相匹配（Fang et al., 2018；Li et al., 2021）。此外，我们表明 ProxSVRG+ 和 SSRGD 都可以自动适应目标函数的局部结构，例如有限和情况下非凸函数的 Polyak-Łojasiewicz (PL) 条件，即，我们证明它们都可以自动切换到更快的全局线性收敛，而无需在先前的 ProxSVRG 工作中执行任何重启（Reddi 等人，2016b）。最后，我们关注更具挑战性的问题，即找到 $(ε, δ)$-局部最小值，而不是仅仅找到 $ε$-近似（一阶）驻点（这可能是一些不好的不稳定鞍点）。我们证明 SSRGD 可以通过简单地添加一些随机扰动来找到 $(ε, δ)$-局部最小值。我们的算法几乎与寻找驻点的算法一样简单，并且达到了类似的最佳速率。

AI.tldr: 本文提出并分析了用于非凸、可能包含非光滑正则项的有限和在线优化问题的随机梯度算法，旨在寻找平稳点或局部最小值。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在处理非光滑非凸优化问题时存在效率不足、无法自动适应目标函数局部结构等问题，需设计更优算法以解决这些挑战。
AI.method: 提出基于方差减少的近端随机梯度算法ProxSVRG+及基于SARAH的最优算法SSRGD，通过减少近端算子调用次数、匹配已知下界并自动适应PL条件等改进方法。
AI.result: ProxSVRG+在多种小批量规模下优于确定性近端梯度下降，SSRGD达到最优梯度复杂度并匹配下界；两者可自动适应PL条件实现线性收敛，且通过随机扰动可找到局部最小值。
AI.conclusion: 所提算法在效率、适应性及收敛性方面优于现有方法，为非光滑非凸优化提供了简单且最优的解决方案。

search_text: Simple and Optimal Stochastic Gradient Methods for Nonsmooth Nonconvex Optimization 非光滑非凸优化的简单最优随机梯度法 We propose and analyze several stochastic gradient algorithms for finding stationary points or local minimum in nonconvex, possibly with nonsmooth regularizer, finite-sum and online optimization problems. First, we propose a simple proximal stochastic gradient algorithm based on variance reduction called ProxSVRG+. We provide a clean and tight analysis of ProxSVRG+, which shows that it outperforms the deterministic proximal gradient descent (ProxGD) for a wide range of minibatch sizes, hence solves an open problem proposed in Reddi et al. (2016b). Also, ProxSVRG+ uses much less proximal oracle calls than ProxSVRG (Reddi et al., 2016b) and extends to the online setting by avoiding full gradient computations. Then, we further propose an optimal algorithm, called SSRGD, based on SARAH (Nguyen et al., 2017) and show that SSRGD further improves the gradient complexity of ProxSVRG+ and achieves the optimal upper bound, matching the known lower bound of (Fang et al., 2018; Li et al., 2021). Moreover, we show that both ProxSVRG+ and SSRGD enjoy automatic adaptation with local structure of the objective function such as the Polyak-Łojasiewicz (PL) condition for nonconvex functions in the finite-sum case, i.e., we prove that both of them can automatically switch to faster global linear convergence without any restart performed in prior work ProxSVRG (Reddi et al., 2016b). Finally, we focus on the more challenging problem of finding an $(ε, δ)$-local minimum instead of just finding an $ε$-approximate (first-order) stationary point (which may be some bad unstable saddle points). We show that SSRGD can find an $(ε, δ)$-local minimum by simply adding some random perturbations. Our algorithm is almost as simple as its counterpart for finding stationary points, and achieves similar optimal rates. 我们提出并分析了几种用于在非凸中寻找驻点或局部最小值的随机梯度算法，可能涉及非平滑正则化器、有限和和在线优化问题。首先，我们提出了一种基于方差减少的简单近端随机梯度算法，称为 ProxSVRG+。我们对 ProxSVRG+ 进行了清晰而严格的分析，表明它对于各种小批量大小都优于确定性近端梯度下降 (ProxGD)，从而解决了 Reddi 等人提出的开放问题。 （2016b）。此外，ProxSVRG+ 使用比 ProxSVRG 少得多的近端预言机调用（Reddi 等人，2016b），并通过避免完整梯度计算扩展到在线设置。然后，我们进一步提出了一种基于 SARAH 的最优算法，称为 SSRGD（Nguyen et al., 2017），并表明 SSRGD 进一步提高了 ProxSVRG+ 的梯度复杂度并实现了最优上限，与已知的下限相匹配（Fang et al., 2018；Li et al., 2021）。此外，我们表明 ProxSVRG+ 和 SSRGD 都可以自动适应目标函数的局部结构，例如有限和情况下非凸函数的 Polyak-Łojasiewicz (PL) 条件，即，我们证明它们都可以自动切换到更快的全局线性收敛，而无需在先前的 ProxSVRG 工作中执行任何重启（Reddi 等人，2016b）。最后，我们关注更具挑战性的问题，即找到 $(ε, δ)$-局部最小值，而不是仅仅找到 $ε$-近似（一阶）驻点（这可能是一些不好的不稳定鞍点）。我们证明 SSRGD 可以通过简单地添加一些随机扰动来找到 $(ε, δ)$-局部最小值。我们的算法几乎与寻找驻点的算法一样简单，并且达到了类似的最佳速率。 本文提出并分析了用于非凸、可能包含非光滑正则项的有限和在线优化问题的随机梯度算法，旨在寻找平稳点或局部最小值。 Zhize Li,Jian Li cs.LG,cs.DS,math.OC

title: GCISG: Guided Causal Invariant Learning for Improved Syn-to-real Generalization
title_zh: GCISG：引导因果不变学习以改进 Syn-to-real 泛化
comment: Accepted to ECCV 2022
comments: Accepted to ECCV 2022
abstract: Training a deep learning model with artificially generated data can be an alternative when training data are scarce, yet it suffers from poor generalization performance due to a large domain gap. In this paper, we characterize the domain gap by using a causal framework for data generation. We assume that the real and synthetic data have common content variables but different style variables. Thus, a model trained on synthetic dataset might have poor generalization as the model learns the nuisance style variables. To that end, we propose causal invariance learning which encourages the model to learn a style-invariant representation that enhances the syn-to-real generalization. Furthermore, we propose a simple yet effective feature distillation method that prevents catastrophic forgetting of semantic knowledge of the real domain. In sum, we refer to our method as Guided Causal Invariant Syn-to-real Generalization that effectively improves the performance of syn-to-real generalization. We empirically verify the validity of proposed methods, and especially, our method achieves state-of-the-art on visual syn-to-real domain generalization tasks such as image classification and semantic segmentation.
summary: Training a deep learning model with artificially generated data can be an alternative when training data are scarce, yet it suffers from poor generalization performance due to a large domain gap. In this paper, we characterize the domain gap by using a causal framework for data generation. We assume that the real and synthetic data have common content variables but different style variables. Thus, a model trained on synthetic dataset might have poor generalization as the model learns the nuisance style variables. To that end, we propose causal invariance learning which encourages the model to learn a style-invariant representation that enhances the syn-to-real generalization. Furthermore, we propose a simple yet effective feature distillation method that prevents catastrophic forgetting of semantic knowledge of the real domain. In sum, we refer to our method as Guided Causal Invariant Syn-to-real Generalization that effectively improves the performance of syn-to-real generalization. We empirically verify the validity of proposed methods, and especially, our method achieves state-of-the-art on visual syn-to-real domain generalization tasks such as image classification and semantic segmentation.
abstract_zh: 当训练数据稀缺时，使用人工生成的数据训练深度学习模型可能是一种替代方案，但由于域差距较大，它的泛化性能较差。在本文中，我们通过使用数据生成的因果框架来描述领域差距。我们假设真实数据和合成数据具有共同的内容变量但不同的风格变量。因此，在合成数据集上训练的模型可能具有较差的泛化能力，因为该模型学习的是令人讨厌的类型变量。为此，我们提出因果不变性学习，它鼓励模型学习风格不变的表示，从而增强同步到真实的泛化。此外，我们提出了一种简单而有效的特征蒸馏方法，可以防止真实领域语义知识的灾难性遗忘。总之，我们将我们的方法称为引导因果不变同步到真实泛化，它有效地提高了同步到真实泛化的性能。我们凭经验验证了所提出方法的有效性，特别是，我们的方法在视觉同步到真实域泛化任务（例如图像分类和语义分割）上实现了最先进的技术。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于因果不变学习的引导方法，以提升合成数据到真实数据的泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 合成数据训练在数据稀缺时具有替代价值，但因领域差异导致模型泛化性能不足，需解决风格变量干扰问题。
AI.method: 通过因果框架分离内容与风格变量，提出因果不变学习以学习风格不变表示，并结合特征蒸馏防止真实领域知识遗忘。
AI.result: 在图像分类和语义分割任务中，该方法达到视觉领域泛化任务的最先进水平。
AI.conclusion: 引导因果不变学习有效缓解领域差异，实验证明其在合成到真实数据泛化中的优越性。

authors_text: Siyi Du,Ben Hers,Nourhan Bayasi,Ghassan Hamarneh,Rafeef Garbi
title: FairDisCo: Fairer AI in Dermatology via Disentanglement Contrastive Learning
title_zh: FairDisCo：通过解开对比学习实现皮肤病学中更公平的人工智能
comment: 14 pages, 3 figures, accepted by European Conference on Computer Vision (ECCV) ISIC Workshops, 2022
comments: 14 pages, 3 figures, accepted by European Conference on Computer Vision (ECCV) ISIC Workshops, 2022
abstract: Deep learning models have achieved great success in automating skin lesion diagnosis. However, the ethnic disparity in these models' predictions, where lesions on darker skin types are usually underrepresented and have lower diagnosis accuracy, receives little attention. In this paper, we propose FairDisCo, a disentanglement deep learning framework with contrastive learning that utilizes an additional network branch to remove sensitive attributes, i.e. skin-type information from representations for fairness and another contrastive branch to enhance feature extraction. We compare FairDisCo to three fairness methods, namely, resampling, reweighting, and attribute-aware, on two newly released skin lesion datasets with different skin types: Fitzpatrick17k and Diverse Dermatology Images (DDI). We adapt two fairness-based metrics DPM and EOM for our multiple classes and sensitive attributes task, highlighting the skin-type bias in skin lesion classification. Extensive experimental evaluation demonstrates the effectiveness of FairDisCo, with fairer and superior performance on skin lesion classification tasks.
summary: Deep learning models have achieved great success in automating skin lesion diagnosis. However, the ethnic disparity in these models' predictions, where lesions on darker skin types are usually underrepresented and have lower diagnosis accuracy, receives little attention. In this paper, we propose FairDisCo, a disentanglement deep learning framework with contrastive learning that utilizes an additional network branch to remove sensitive attributes, i.e. skin-type information from representations for fairness and another contrastive branch to enhance feature extraction. We compare FairDisCo to three fairness methods, namely, resampling, reweighting, and attribute-aware, on two newly released skin lesion datasets with different skin types: Fitzpatrick17k and Diverse Dermatology Images (DDI). We adapt two fairness-based metrics DPM and EOM for our multiple classes and sensitive attributes task, highlighting the skin-type bias in skin lesion classification. Extensive experimental evaluation demonstrates the effectiveness of FairDisCo, with fairer and superior performance on skin lesion classification tasks.
abstract_zh: 深度学习模型在自动化皮肤病变诊断方面取得了巨大成功。然而，这些模型预测中的种族差异（即深色皮肤类型的病变通常代表性不足且诊断准确性较低）很少受到关注。在本文中，我们提出了 FairDisCo，一种具有对比学习的解纠缠深度学习框架，它利用额外的网络分支来删除敏感属性，即从表示中去除皮肤类型信息以实现公平性，并利用另一个对比分支来增强特征提取。我们在两个新发布的不同皮肤类型的皮肤病变数据集上将 FairDisCo 与三种公平方法（即重采样、重新加权和属性感知）进行比较：Fitzpatrick17k 和 Diverse Dermatology Images (DDI)。我们针对多类和敏感属性任务采用了两个基于公平性的指标 DPM 和 EOM，突出了皮肤病变分类中的皮肤类型偏差。大量的实验评估证明了FairDisCo的有效性，在皮肤病变分类任务上具有更公平和优越的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出FairDisCo框架，通过解耦对比学习解决皮肤科AI中的种族偏见问题，提升深色皮肤类型病变诊断的公平性与准确性。
AI.motivation: 现有皮肤病变诊断模型对深色皮肤类型存在诊断准确率偏低的种族偏见，但该问题未受到足够关注。
AI.method: 设计包含属性分离分支和对比学习分支的双分支网络，通过解耦敏感属性（皮肤类型）并增强特征表示，对比三种主流公平性方法（重采样/重加权/属性感知）。
AI.result: 在Fitzpatrick17k和DDI数据集上，FairDisCo在DPM和EOM指标下均优于对比方法，实现更公平且准确的多类别皮肤病变分类。
AI.conclusion: FairDisCo通过解耦对比学习有效缓解了医疗AI中的种族偏见问题，为公平性导向的医学影像分析提供了新思路。

We compare FairDisCo to three fairness methods, namely, resampling, reweighting, and attribute-aware, on two newly released skin lesion datasets with different skin types: Fitzpatrick17k and Diverse Dermatology Images (DDI). We adapt two fairness-based metrics DPM and EOM for our multiple classes and sensitive attributes task, highlighting the skin-type bias in skin lesion classification. Extensive experimental evaluation demonstrates the effectiveness of FairDisCo, with fairer and superior performance on skin lesion classification tasks. 深度学习模型在自动化皮肤病变诊断方面取得了巨大成功。然而，这些模型预测中的种族差异（即深色皮肤类型的病变通常代表性不足且诊断准确性较低）很少受到关注。在本文中，我们提出了 FairDisCo，一种具有对比学习的解纠缠深度学习框架，它利用额外的网络分支来删除敏感属性，即从表示中去除皮肤类型信息以实现公平性，并利用另一个对比分支来增强特征提取。我们在两个新发布的不同皮肤类型的皮肤病变数据集上将 FairDisCo 与三种公平方法（即重采样、重新加权和属性感知）进行比较：Fitzpatrick17k 和 Diverse Dermatology Images (DDI)。我们针对多类和敏感属性任务采用了两个基于公平性的指标 DPM 和 EOM，突出了皮肤病变分类中的皮肤类型偏差。大量的实验评估证明了FairDisCo的有效性，在皮肤病变分类任务上具有更公平和优越的性能。 本文提出FairDisCo框架，通过解耦对比学习解决皮肤科AI中的种族偏见问题，提升深色皮肤类型病变诊断的公平性与准确性。 Siyi Du,Ben Hers,Nourhan Bayasi,Ghassan Hamarneh,Rafeef Garbi cs.CV

title: A diverse large-scale building dataset and a novel plug-and-play domain generalization method for building extraction
title_zh: 多样化的大规模建筑数据集和用于建筑提取的新颖的即插即用域泛化方法
abstract: In this paper, we introduce a new building dataset and propose a novel domain generalization method to facilitate the development of building extraction from high-resolution remote sensing images. The problem with the current building datasets involves that they lack diversity, the quality of the labels is unsatisfactory, and they are hardly used to train a building extraction model with good generalization ability, so as to properly evaluate the real performance of a model in practical scenes. To address these issues, we built a diverse, large-scale, and high-quality building dataset named the WHU-Mix building dataset, which is more practice-oriented. The WHU-Mix building dataset consists of a training/validation set containing 43,727 diverse images collected from all over the world, and a test set containing 8402 images from five other cities on five continents. In addition, to further improve the generalization ability of a building extraction model, we propose a domain generalization method named batch style mixing (BSM), which can be embedded as an efficient plug-and-play module in the frond-end of a building extraction model, providing the model with a progressively larger data distribution to learn data-invariant knowledge. The experiments conducted in this study confirmed the potential of the WHU-Mix building dataset to improve the performance of a building extraction model, resulting in a 6-36% improvement in mIoU, compared to the other existing datasets. The adverse impact of the inaccurate labels in the other datasets can cause about 20% IoU decrease. The experiments also confirmed the high performance of the proposed BSM module in enhancing the generalization ability and robustness of a model, exceeding the baseline model without domain generalization by 13% and the recent domain generalization methods by 4-15% in mIoU.
summary: In this paper, we introduce a new building dataset and propose a novel domain generalization method to facilitate the development of building extraction from high-resolution remote sensing images. The problem with the current building datasets involves that they lack diversity, the quality of the labels is unsatisfactory, and they are hardly used to train a building extraction model with good generalization ability, so as to properly evaluate the real performance of a model in practical scenes. To address these issues, we built a diverse, large-scale, and high-quality building dataset named the WHU-Mix building dataset, which is more practice-oriented. The WHU-Mix building dataset consists of a training/validation set containing 43,727 diverse images collected from all over the world, and a test set containing 8402 images from five other cities on five continents. In addition, to further improve the generalization ability of a building extraction model, we propose a domain generalization method named batch style mixing (BSM), which can be embedded as an efficient plug-and-play module in the frond-end of a building extraction model, providing the model with a progressively larger data distribution to learn data-invariant knowledge. The experiments conducted in this study confirmed the potential of the WHU-Mix building dataset to improve the performance of a building extraction model, resulting in a 6-36% improvement in mIoU, compared to the other existing datasets. The adverse impact of the inaccurate labels in the other datasets can cause about 20% IoU decrease. The experiments also confirmed the high performance of the proposed BSM module in enhancing the generalization ability and robustness of a model, exceeding the baseline model without domain generalization by 13% and the recent domain generalization methods by 4-15% in mIoU.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们介绍了一种新的建筑数据集，并提出了一种新的领域泛化方法，以促进从高分辨率遥感图像中提取建筑物的发展。目前的建筑数据集存在的问题是缺乏多样性，标签质量不理想，很难用来训练具有良好泛化能力的建筑提取模型，从而正确评估模型在实际场景中的真实性能。为了解决这些问题，我们构建了一个多样化、大规模、高质量的建筑数据集，名为 WHU-Mix 建筑数据集，该数据集更加面向实践。 WHU-Mix 建筑数据集由一个包含从世界各地收集的 43,727 张不同图像的训练/验证集和一个包含来自五大洲其他五个城市的 8402 张图像的测试集组成。此外，为了进一步提高建筑物提取模型的泛化能力，我们提出了一种名为批量式混合（BSM）的领域泛化方法，该方法可以作为高效的即插即用模块嵌入到建筑物提取模型的前端，为模型提供逐渐更大的数据分布以学习数据不变知识。本研究中进行的实验证实了 WHU-Mix 建筑数据集在提高建筑提取模型性能方面的潜力，与其他现有数据集相比，mIoU 提高了 6-36%。其他数据集中不准确标签的不利影响可能导致 IoU 下降约 20%。实验还证实了所提出的 BSM 模块在增强模型的泛化能力和鲁棒性方面的高性能，以 mIoU 计算，比没有域泛化的基线模型高出 13%，比最近的域泛化方法高出 4-15%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一个多样化的大规模建筑数据集WHU-Mix和一种名为BSM的域泛化方法，以提升高分辨率遥感图像中建筑提取模型的泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 现有建筑数据集存在多样性不足、标签质量差等问题，导致模型难以在实际场景中有效泛化，亟需更实用的数据集和泛化方法。
AI.method: 构建包含全球43,727张训练/验证图像和5大洲8,402张测试图像的WHU-Mix数据集，并提出可嵌入模型前端的域泛化模块BSM，通过批量风格混合学习数据不变特征。
AI.result: WHU-Mix使模型mIoU提升6-36%，其他数据集标签不准确导致IoU下降20%；BSM模块相比基线模型提升13%，优于最新域泛化方法4-15%。
AI.conclusion: WHU-Mix数据集与BSM方法有效提升了建筑提取模型的泛化性能和鲁棒性，为遥感图像分析提供了实用工具。

title: Locally Defined Independence Systems on Graphs
title_zh: 图上局部定义的独立系统
abstract: The maximization for the independence systems defined on graphs is a generalization of combinatorial optimization problems such as the maximum $b$-matching, the unweighted MAX-SAT, the matchoid, and the maximum timed matching problems. In this paper, we consider the problem under the local oracle model to investigate the global approximability of the problem by using the local approximability. We first analyze two simple algorithms FixedOrder and Greedy for the maximization under the model, which shows that they have no constant approximation ratio. Here algorithms FixedOrder and Greedy apply local oracles with fixed and greedy orders of vertices, respectively. We then propose two approximation algorithms for the $k$-degenerate graphs, whose approximation ratios are $α+2k -2$ and $αk$, where $α$ is the approximation ratio of local oracles. The second one can be generalized to the hypergraph setting. We also propose an $(α+ k)$-approximation algorithm for bipartite graphs, in which the local independence systems in the one-side of vertices are $k$-systems with independence oracles.
summary: The maximization for the independence systems defined on graphs is a generalization of combinatorial optimization problems such as the maximum $b$-matching, the unweighted MAX-SAT, the matchoid, and the maximum timed matching problems. In this paper, we consider the problem under the local oracle model to investigate the global approximability of the problem by using the local approximability. We first analyze two simple algorithms FixedOrder and Greedy for the maximization under the model, which shows that they have no constant approximation ratio. Here algorithms FixedOrder and Greedy apply local oracles with fixed and greedy orders of vertices, respectively. We then propose two approximation algorithms for the $k$-degenerate graphs, whose approximation ratios are $α+2k -2$ and $αk$, where $α$ is the approximation ratio of local oracles. The second one can be generalized to the hypergraph setting. We also propose an $(α+ k)$-approximation algorithm for bipartite graphs, in which the local independence systems in the one-side of vertices are $k$-systems with independence oracles.
abstract_zh: 图上定义的独立系统的最大化是组合优化问题的推广，例如最大 $b$ 匹配、未加权 MAX-SAT、matchoid 和最大定时匹配问题。在本文中，我们考虑局部预言模型下的问题，利用局部逼近性来研究问题的全局逼近性。我们首先分析了模型下两个简单的最大化算法FixedOrder和Greedy，这表明它们没有恒定的逼近比。这里，FixedOrder 和 Greedy 算法分别应用具有固定顶点顺序和贪婪顺序的本地预言。然后，我们提出了$k$退化图的两种近似算法，其近似比率为$α+2k -2$和$αk$，其中$α$是本地预言机的近似比率。第二个可以推广到超图设置。我们还提出了一种二部图的 $(α+ k)$ 近似算法，其中顶点一侧的局部独立系统是具有独立预言机的 $k$ 系统。

AI.tldr: 本文研究在局部预言模型下图上的局部定义独立系统的最大化问题，分析现有算法并提出新的近似算法。
AI.motivation: 该研究旨在推广组合优化问题（如最大b-匹配、无权MAX-SAT等）的全局近似性，通过局部预言模型来探索其近似性。
AI.method: 通过分析FixedOrder和Greedy算法的局限性，提出针对k-退化图和二分图的两种近似算法，并推广到超图设置。
AI.result: 提出两种近似算法，分别具有α+2k-2和αk的近似比，其中第二个适用于超图，同时为二分图设计了α+k近似算法。
AI.conclusion: 在特定图结构（如k-退化图、二分图）下，通过局部预言模型有效解决独立系统最大化问题，展示了局部近似性对全局近似的影响。

authors_text: Huijie Zhang,Anthony Opipari,Xiaotong Chen,Jiyue Zhu,Zeren Yu,Odest Chadwicke Jenkins
title: TransNet: Category-Level Transparent Object Pose Estimation
title_zh: TransNet：类别级透明物体姿态估计
abstract: Transparent objects present multiple distinct challenges to visual perception systems. First, their lack of distinguishing visual features makes transparent objects harder to detect and localize than opaque objects. Even humans find certain transparent surfaces with little specular reflection or refraction, e.g. glass doors, difficult to perceive. A second challenge is that common depth sensors typically used for opaque object perception cannot obtain accurate depth measurements on transparent objects due to their unique reflective properties. Stemming from these challenges, we observe that transparent object instances within the same category (e.g. cups) look more similar to each other than to ordinary opaque objects of that same category. Given this observation, the present paper sets out to explore the possibility of category-level transparent object pose estimation rather than instance-level pose estimation. We propose TransNet, a two-stage pipeline that learns to estimate category-level transparent object pose using localized depth completion and surface normal estimation. TransNet is evaluated in terms of pose estimation accuracy on a recent, large-scale transparent object dataset and compared to a state-of-the-art category-level pose estimation approach. Results from this comparison demonstrate that TransNet achieves improved pose estimation accuracy on transparent objects and key findings from the included ablation studies suggest future directions for performance improvements.
summary: Transparent objects present multiple distinct challenges to visual perception systems. First, their lack of distinguishing visual features makes transparent objects harder to detect and localize than opaque objects. Even humans find certain transparent surfaces with little specular reflection or refraction, e.g. glass doors, difficult to perceive. A second challenge is that common depth sensors typically used for opaque object perception cannot obtain accurate depth measurements on transparent objects due to their unique reflective properties. Stemming from these challenges, we observe that transparent object instances within the same category (e.g. cups) look more similar to each other than to ordinary opaque objects of that same category. Given this observation, the present paper sets out to explore the possibility of category-level transparent object pose estimation rather than instance-level pose estimation. We propose TransNet, a two-stage pipeline that learns to estimate category-level transparent object pose using localized depth completion and surface normal estimation. TransNet is evaluated in terms of pose estimation accuracy on a recent, large-scale transparent object dataset and compared to a state-of-the-art category-level pose estimation approach. Results from this comparison demonstrate that TransNet achieves improved pose estimation accuracy on transparent objects and key findings from the included ablation studies suggest future directions for performance improvements.
abstract_zh: 透明物体给视觉感知系统带来了多种不同的挑战。首先，透明物体缺乏明显的视觉特征，使得透明物体比不透明物体更难检测和定位。甚至人类也发现某些透明表面几乎没有镜面反射或折射，例如玻璃门，不易察觉。第二个挑战是，通常用于不透明物体感知的普通深度传感器由于其独特的反射特性而无法获得透明物体的准确深度测量。由于这些挑战，我们观察到同一类别中的透明对象实例（例如杯子）看起来比同一类别的普通不透明对象更相似。鉴于这一观察，本文着手探索类别级透明物体姿态估计而不是实例级姿态估计的可能性。我们提出了 TransNet，这是一个两级管道，它学习使用局部深度完成和表面法线估计来估计类别级透明对象姿态。 TransNet 根据最近的大规模透明对象数据集的姿态估计精度进行评估，并与最先进的类别级姿态估计方法进行比较。比较结果表明，TransNet 在透明物体上实现了更高的姿态估计准确性，并且所包含的消融研究的主要发现表明了性能改进的未来方向。

AI.tldr: 本文提出TransNet，一种用于透明物体类别级姿态估计的两阶段方法，通过局部深度补全和表面法线估计解决透明物体检测与定位难题。
AI.motivation: 透明物体因缺乏显著视觉特征且深度传感器难以获取准确深度信息，导致检测与定位困难。同类透明物体（如杯子）外观相似性高于不透明物体，因此转向类别级姿态估计更具可行性。
AI.method: TransNet采用两阶段流程：首先通过局部深度补全网络修复透明物体深度信息，再结合表面法线估计网络实现类别级姿态估计，无需依赖实例级特征。
AI.result: 在大规模透明物体数据集上，TransNet相较现有类别级姿态估计方法在姿态估计精度上取得显著提升，消融实验验证了深度补全与法线估计模块的有效性。
AI.conclusion: TransNet为透明物体姿态估计提供了新思路，未来可通过优化深度补全算法和引入更多几何约束进一步提升性能。

authors_text: Rabab Abdelfattah,Xin Zhang,Zhenyao Wu,Xinyi Wu,Xiaofeng Wang,Song Wang
title: PLMCL: Partial-Label Momentum Curriculum Learning for Multi-Label Image Classification
title_zh: PLMCL：多标签图像分类的部分标签动量课程学习
comment: Accepted in ECCVw
comments: Accepted in ECCVw
abstract: Multi-label image classification aims to predict all possible labels in an image. It is usually formulated as a partial-label learning problem, given the fact that it could be expensive in practice to annotate all labels in every training image. Existing works on partial-label learning focus on the case where each training image is annotated with only a subset of its labels. A special case is to annotate only one positive label in each training image. To further relieve the annotation burden and enhance the performance of the classifier, this paper proposes a new partial-label setting in which only a subset of the training images are labeled, each with only one positive label, while the rest of the training images remain unlabeled. To handle this new setting, we propose an end-to-end deep network, PLMCL (Partial Label Momentum Curriculum Learning), that can learn to produce confident pseudo labels for both partially-labeled and unlabeled training images. The novel momentum-based law updates soft pseudo labels on each training image with the consideration of the updating velocity of pseudo labels, which help avoid trapping to low-confidence local minimum, especially at the early stage of training in lack of both observed labels and confidence on pseudo labels. In addition, we present a confidence-aware scheduler to adaptively perform easy-to-hard learning for different labels. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our proposed PLMCL outperforms many state-of-the-art multi-label classification methods under various partial-label settings on three different datasets.
summary: Multi-label image classification aims to predict all possible labels in an image. It is usually formulated as a partial-label learning problem, given the fact that it could be expensive in practice to annotate all labels in every training image. Existing works on partial-label learning focus on the case where each training image is annotated with only a subset of its labels. A special case is to annotate only one positive label in each training image. To further relieve the annotation burden and enhance the performance of the classifier, this paper proposes a new partial-label setting in which only a subset of the training images are labeled, each with only one positive label, while the rest of the training images remain unlabeled. To handle this new setting, we propose an end-to-end deep network, PLMCL (Partial Label Momentum Curriculum Learning), that can learn to produce confident pseudo labels for both partially-labeled and unlabeled training images. The novel momentum-based law updates soft pseudo labels on each training image with the consideration of the updating velocity of pseudo labels, which help avoid trapping to low-confidence local minimum, especially at the early stage of training in lack of both observed labels and confidence on pseudo labels. In addition, we present a confidence-aware scheduler to adaptively perform easy-to-hard learning for different labels. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our proposed PLMCL outperforms many state-of-the-art multi-label classification methods under various partial-label settings on three different datasets.
abstract_zh: 多标签图像分类旨在预测图像中所有可能的标签。考虑到在实践中注释每个训练图像中的所有标签可能会很昂贵，因此它通常被表述为部分标签学习问题。现有的部分标签学习工作重点关注每个训练图像仅用其标签的子集进行注释的情况。一种特殊情况是在每个训练图像中仅注释一个正标签。为了进一步减轻标注负担并提高分类器的性能，本文提出了一种新的部分标签设置，其中仅标记训练图像的子集，每个训练图像只有一个正标签，而其余训练图像保持未标记。为了处理这种新设置，我们提出了一种端到端深度网络 PLMCL（部分标签动量课程学习），它可以学习为部分标记和未标记的训练图像生成置信的伪标签。新颖的基于动量的定律在考虑伪标签更新速度的情况下更新每个训练图像上的软伪标签，这有助于避免陷入低置信度局部最小值，特别是在训练的早期阶段，因为缺乏观察到的标签和伪标签的置信度。此外，我们提出了一个置信感知调度器，可以针对不同标签自适应地执行从易到难的学习。大量实验表明，我们提出的 PLMCL 在三个不同数据集上的各种部分标签设置下优于许多最先进的多标签分类方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种新的多标签图像分类方法PLMCL，在部分标签设置下仅对部分训练图像标注单个正标签，其余图像保持无标签状态。
AI.motivation: 为减轻标注负担并提升分类性能，提出新的部分标签设置，通过动态生成伪标签解决标签稀疏问题。
AI.method: 设计端到端网络PLMCL，结合动量机制更新软伪标签，引入置信度感知调度器实现从易到难的课程学习。
AI.result: 在三个数据集上实验表明，PLMCL在多种部分标签设置下均优于现有最先进的多标签分类方法。
AI.conclusion: PLMCL通过动量伪标签更新和自适应课程学习有效解决了新部分标签设置下的分类挑战，显著提升了模型性能。

title: Antecedent Predictions Are More Important Than You Think: An Effective Method for Tree-Based Code Generation
title_zh: 先行预测比你想象的更重要：基于树的代码生成的有效方法
comment: Accepted to ECAI-23
comments: Accepted to ECAI-23
abstract: Code generation focuses on the automatic conversion of natural language (NL) utterances into code snippets. The sequence-to-tree (Seq2Tree) approaches are proposed for code generation, with the guarantee of the grammatical correctness of the generated code, which generate the subsequent Abstract Syntax Tree (AST) node relying on antecedent predictions of AST nodes. Existing Seq2Tree methods tend to treat both antecedent predictions and subsequent predictions equally. However, under the AST constraints, it is difficult for Seq2Tree models to produce the correct subsequent prediction based on incorrect antecedent predictions. Thus, antecedent predictions ought to receive more attention than subsequent predictions. To this end, in this paper, we propose an effective method, named Antecedent Prioritized (AP) Loss, that helps the model attach importance to antecedent predictions by exploiting the position information of the generated AST nodes. We design an AST-to-Vector (AST2Vec) method, that maps AST node positions to two-dimensional vectors, to model the position information of AST nodes. To evaluate the effectiveness of our proposed loss, we implement and train an Antecedent Prioritized Tree-based code generation model called APT. With better antecedent predictions and accompanying subsequent predictions, APT significantly improves the performance. We conduct extensive experiments on four benchmark datasets, and the experimental results demonstrate the superiority and generality of our proposed method.
summary: Code generation focuses on the automatic conversion of natural language (NL) utterances into code snippets. The sequence-to-tree (Seq2Tree) approaches are proposed for code generation, with the guarantee of the grammatical correctness of the generated code, which generate the subsequent Abstract Syntax Tree (AST) node relying on antecedent predictions of AST nodes. Existing Seq2Tree methods tend to treat both antecedent predictions and subsequent predictions equally. However, under the AST constraints, it is difficult for Seq2Tree models to produce the correct subsequent prediction based on incorrect antecedent predictions. Thus, antecedent predictions ought to receive more attention than subsequent predictions. To this end, in this paper, we propose an effective method, named Antecedent Prioritized (AP) Loss, that helps the model attach importance to antecedent predictions by exploiting the position information of the generated AST nodes. We design an AST-to-Vector (AST2Vec) method, that maps AST node positions to two-dimensional vectors, to model the position information of AST nodes. To evaluate the effectiveness of our proposed loss, we implement and train an Antecedent Prioritized Tree-based code generation model called APT. With better antecedent predictions and accompanying subsequent predictions, APT significantly improves the performance. We conduct extensive experiments on four benchmark datasets, and the experimental results demonstrate the superiority and generality of our proposed method.
abstract_zh: 代码生成侧重于将自然语言 (NL) 话语自动转换为代码片段。提出了序列到树（Seq2Tree）方法用于代码生成，在保证生成代码的语法正确性的情况下，该方法依赖于 AST 节点的先行预测来生成后续的抽象语法树（AST）节点。现有的 Seq2Tree 方法倾向于平等对待先行预测和后续预测。然而，在 AST 约束下，Seq2Tree 模型很难根据错误的先行预测产生正确的后续预测。因此，先前的预测应该比后续的预测受到更多的关注。为此，在本文中，我们提出了一种有效的方法，称为先行优先（AP）损失，该方法通过利用生成的 AST 节点的位置信息来帮助模型重视先行预测。我们设计了一种 AST 到向量（AST2Vec）方法，将 AST 节点位置映射到二维向量，以对 AST 节点的位置信息进行建模。为了评估我们提出的损失的有效性，我们实现并训练了一个基于先行优先树的代码生成模型，称为 APT。凭借更好的先行预测和伴随的后续预测，APT 显着提高了性能。我们在四个基准数据集上进行了广泛的实验，实验结果证明了我们提出的方法的优越性和通用性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为AP Loss的有效方法，用于改进基于树的代码生成模型，通过强调先验预测的重要性来提高生成代码的准确性。
AI.motivation: 现有的序列到树（Seq2Tree）方法在处理代码生成时，往往对先序预测和后续预测同等对待，但在AST约束下，错误的先序预测会导致后续预测难以正确生成，因此需要更加重视先序预测。
AI.method: 本文提出了一种名为Antecedent Prioritized（AP）Loss的方法，通过利用生成的AST节点的位置信息，设计了一种AST-to-Vector（AST2Vec）方法，将AST节点的位置映射为二维向量，以建模节点的位置信息，并基于此改进模型的先序预测。
AI.result: 通过在四个基准数据集上进行实验，APT模型显著提升了代码生成的性能，证明了所提方法的有效性和通用性。
AI.conclusion: 本文强调了先序预测在基于树的代码生成中的重要性，并通过AP Loss方法显著提升了模型性能，为未来研究提供了新的思路。

search_text: Antecedent Predictions Are More Important Than You Think: An Effective Method for Tree-Based Code Generation 先行预测比你想象的更重要：基于树的代码生成的有效方法 Code generation focuses on the automatic conversion of natural language (NL) utterances into code snippets. The sequence-to-tree (Seq2Tree) approaches are proposed for code generation, with the guarantee of the grammatical correctness of the generated code, which generate the subsequent Abstract Syntax Tree (AST) node relying on antecedent predictions of AST nodes. Existing Seq2Tree methods tend to treat both antecedent predictions and subsequent predictions equally. However, under the AST constraints, it is difficult for Seq2Tree models to produce the correct subsequent prediction based on incorrect antecedent predictions. Thus, antecedent predictions ought to receive more attention than subsequent predictions. To this end, in this paper, we propose an effective method, named Antecedent Prioritized (AP) Loss, that helps the model attach importance to antecedent predictions by exploiting the position information of the generated AST nodes. We design an AST-to-Vector (AST2Vec) method, that maps AST node positions to two-dimensional vectors, to model the position information of AST nodes. To evaluate the effectiveness of our proposed loss, we implement and train an Antecedent Prioritized Tree-based code generation model called APT. With better antecedent predictions and accompanying subsequent predictions, APT significantly improves the performance. We conduct extensive experiments on four benchmark datasets, and the experimental results demonstrate the superiority and generality of our proposed method. 代码生成侧重于将自然语言 (NL) 话语自动转换为代码片段。提出了序列到树（Seq2Tree）方法用于代码生成，在保证生成代码的语法正确性的情况下，该方法依赖于 AST 节点的先行预测来生成后续的抽象语法树（AST）节点。现有的 Seq2Tree 方法倾向于平等对待先行预测和后续预测。然而，在 AST 约束下，Seq2Tree 模型很难根据错误的先行预测产生正确的后续预测。因此，先前的预测应该比后续的预测受到更多的关注。为此，在本文中，我们提出了一种有效的方法，称为先行优先（AP）损失，该方法通过利用生成的 AST 节点的位置信息来帮助模型重视先行预测。我们设计了一种 AST 到向量（AST2Vec）方法，将 AST 节点位置映射到二维向量，以对 AST 节点的位置信息进行建模。为了评估我们提出的损失的有效性，我们实现并训练了一个基于先行优先树的代码生成模型，称为 APT。凭借更好的先行预测和伴随的后续预测，APT 显着提高了性能。我们在四个基准数据集上进行了广泛的实验，实验结果证明了我们提出的方法的优越性和通用性。 本文提出了一种名为AP Loss的有效方法，用于改进基于树的代码生成模型，通过强调先验预测的重要性来提高生成代码的准确性。 Yihong Dong,Ge Li,Xue Jiang,Zhi Jin cs.SE,cs.AI,cs.PL

title: Collaboration between parallel connected neural networks -- A possible criterion for distinguishing artificial neural networks from natural organs
title_zh: 并行连接的神经网络之间的协作——区分人工神经网络与自然器官的可能标准
comment: 9 pages, 8 figures, 3 tables
comments: 9 pages, 8 figures, 3 tables
abstract: We find experimentally that when artificial neural networks are connected in parallel and trained together, they display the following properties. (i) When the parallel-connected neural network (PNN) is optimized, each sub-network in the connection is not optimized. (ii) The contribution of an inferior sub-network to the whole PNN can be on par with that of the superior sub-network. (iii) The PNN can output the correct result even when all sub-networks give incorrect results. These properties are unlikely for natural biological sense organs. Therefore, they could serve as a simple yet effective criterion for measuring the bionic level of neural networks. With this criterion, we further show that when serving as the activation function, the ReLU function can make an artificial neural network more bionic than the sigmoid and Tanh functions do.
summary: We find experimentally that when artificial neural networks are connected in parallel and trained together, they display the following properties. (i) When the parallel-connected neural network (PNN) is optimized, each sub-network in the connection is not optimized. (ii) The contribution of an inferior sub-network to the whole PNN can be on par with that of the superior sub-network. (iii) The PNN can output the correct result even when all sub-networks give incorrect results. These properties are unlikely for natural biological sense organs. Therefore, they could serve as a simple yet effective criterion for measuring the bionic level of neural networks. With this criterion, we further show that when serving as the activation function, the ReLU function can make an artificial neural network more bionic than the sigmoid and Tanh functions do.
abstract_zh: 我们通过实验发现，当人工神经网络并行连接并一起训练时，它们显示出以下属性。 (i) 当并行连接的神经网络（PNN）被优化时，连接中的每个子网络都没有被优化。 (ii) 下级子网对整个 PNN 的贡献可以与上级子网的贡献相当。 (iii) 即使所有子网络给出错误结果，PNN 也能输出正确结果。这些特性对于天然生物感觉器官来说是不可能的。因此，它们可以作为衡量神经网络仿生水平的简单而有效的标准。有了这个标准，我们进一步表明，当ReLU函数作为激活函数时，可以使人工神经网络比sigmoid和Tanh函数更加仿生。

AI.tldr: 研究并行连接人工神经网络的特性，提出区分人工神经网络与自然器官的标准
AI.motivation: 现有人工神经网络可能缺乏生物器官特性，需寻找区分标准以评估其仿生水平
AI.method: 通过实验连接并行神经网络并训练，分析其子网络行为及输出特性
AI.result: 发现并行网络优化时子网络未优化；劣质子网络贡献可与优质相当；整体正确输出时子网络均错误；ReLU函数提升仿生性
AI.conclusion: 提出的新标准有效，ReLU函数提升神经网络仿生水平

title: Development of a CAV-based Intersection Control System and Corridor Level Impact Assessment
title_zh: 基于 CAV 的交叉口控制系统和走廊层面影响评估的开发
abstract: This paper presents a signal-free intersection control system for CAVs by combination of a pixel reservation algorithm and a Deep Reinforcement Learning (DRL) decision-making logic, followed by a corridor-level impact assessment of the proposed model. The pixel reservation algorithm detects potential colliding maneuvers and the DRL logic optimizes vehicles' movements to avoid collision and minimize the overall delay at the intersection. The proposed control system is called Decentralized Sparse Coordination System (DSCLS) since each vehicle has its own control logic and interacts with other vehicles in coordinated states only. Due to the chain impact of taking random actions in the DRL's training course, the trained model can deal with unprecedented volume conditions, which poses the main challenge in intersection management. The performance of the developed model is compared with conventional and CAV-based control systems, including fixed traffic lights, actuated traffic lights, and the Longest Queue First (LQF) control system under three volume regimes in a corridor of four intersections in VISSIM software. The simulation result revealed that the proposed model reduces delay by 50%, 29%, and 23% in moderate, high, and extreme volume regimes compared to the other CAV-based control system. Improvements in travel time, fuel consumption, emission, and Surrogate Safety Measures (SSM) are also noticeable.
summary: This paper presents a signal-free intersection control system for CAVs by combination of a pixel reservation algorithm and a Deep Reinforcement Learning (DRL) decision-making logic, followed by a corridor-level impact assessment of the proposed model. The pixel reservation algorithm detects potential colliding maneuvers and the DRL logic optimizes vehicles' movements to avoid collision and minimize the overall delay at the intersection. The proposed control system is called Decentralized Sparse Coordination System (DSCLS) since each vehicle has its own control logic and interacts with other vehicles in coordinated states only. Due to the chain impact of taking random actions in the DRL's training course, the trained model can deal with unprecedented volume conditions, which poses the main challenge in intersection management. The performance of the developed model is compared with conventional and CAV-based control systems, including fixed traffic lights, actuated traffic lights, and the Longest Queue First (LQF) control system under three volume regimes in a corridor of four intersections in VISSIM software. The simulation result revealed that the proposed model reduces delay by 50%, 29%, and 23% in moderate, high, and extreme volume regimes compared to the other CAV-based control system. Improvements in travel time, fuel consumption, emission, and Surrogate Safety Measures (SSM) are also noticeable.
abstract_zh: 本文提出了一种 CAV 无信号交叉口控制系统，该系统结合了像素保留算法和深度强化学习 (DRL) 决策逻辑，并对所提出的模型进行了走廊级影响评估。像素保留算法可检测潜在的碰撞操作，DRL 逻辑可优化车辆的运动以避免碰撞并最大限度地减少交叉路口的总体延误。所提出的控制系统被称为分散稀疏协调系统（DSCLS），因为每辆车都有自己的控制逻辑，并且仅在协调状态下与其他车辆交互。由于 DRL 训练过程中采取随机动作的连锁影响，训练后的模型可以处理前所未有的交通量条件，这对交叉口管理提出了主要挑战。在 VISSIM 软件中，将所开发模型的性能与传统和基于 CAV 的控制系统进行了比较，包括固定交通灯、驱动交通灯和最长队列优先 (LQF) 控制系统，在 VISSIM 软件中的四个交叉口的走廊中的三种容量状态下。仿真结果表明，与其他基于 CAV 的控制系统相比，所提出的模型在中等、高和极端音量状态下的延迟减少了 50%、29% 和 23%。出行时间、油耗、排放和替代安全措施 (SSM) 方面的改善也很明显。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于自动驾驶车辆（CAV）的无信号交叉口控制系统DSCLS，并对其在走廊级别的影响进行了评估。
AI.motivation: 传统的交通信号控制在高流量情况下效率低下，且难以应对自动驾驶车辆的随机行为。因此，需要一种更高效的基于CAV的交叉口控制系统。
AI.method: 结合像素保留算法和深度强化学习（DRL）决策逻辑，开发了一种名为DSCLS的去中心化稀疏协调系统，用于优化车辆运动并减少碰撞和延迟。
AI.result: 与传统和基于CAV的控制系统相比，DSCLS在中等、高和极端流量条件下分别减少了50%、29%和23%的延迟，同时在旅行时间、燃油消耗、排放和替代安全指标方面也有显著改善。
AI.conclusion: DSCLS系统在处理高流量和随机行为方面表现优异，为未来基于CAV的交通管理提供了有效的解决方案。

ai_content_json.method: 结合像素保留算法和深度强化学习（DRL）决策逻辑，开发了一种名为DSCLS的去中心化稀疏协调系统，用于优化车辆运动并减少碰撞和延迟。
ai_content_json.result: 与传统和基于CAV的控制系统相比，DSCLS在中等、高和极端流量条件下分别减少了50%、29%和23%的延迟，同时在旅行时间、燃油消耗、排放和替代安全指标方面也有显著改善。
ai_content_json.conclusion: DSCLS系统在处理高流量和随机行为方面表现优异，为未来基于CAV的交通管理提供了有效的解决方案。

search_text: Development of a CAV-based Intersection Control System and Corridor Level Impact Assessment 基于 CAV 的交叉口控制系统和走廊层面影响评估的开发 This paper presents a signal-free intersection control system for CAVs by combination of a pixel reservation algorithm and a Deep Reinforcement Learning (DRL) decision-making logic, followed by a corridor-level impact assessment of the proposed model. The pixel reservation algorithm detects potential colliding maneuvers and the DRL logic optimizes vehicles' movements to avoid collision and minimize the overall delay at the intersection. The proposed control system is called Decentralized Sparse Coordination System (DSCLS) since each vehicle has its own control logic and interacts with other vehicles in coordinated states only. Due to the chain impact of taking random actions in the DRL's training course, the trained model can deal with unprecedented volume conditions, which poses the main challenge in intersection management. The performance of the developed model is compared with conventional and CAV-based control systems, including fixed traffic lights, actuated traffic lights, and the Longest Queue First (LQF) control system under three volume regimes in a corridor of four intersections in VISSIM software. The simulation result revealed that the proposed model reduces delay by 50%, 29%, and 23% in moderate, high, and extreme volume regimes compared to the other CAV-based control system. Improvements in travel time, fuel consumption, emission, and Surrogate Safety Measures (SSM) are also noticeable. 本文提出了一种 CAV 无信号交叉口控制系统，该系统结合了像素保留算法和深度强化学习 (DRL) 决策逻辑，并对所提出的模型进行了走廊级影响评估。像素保留算法可检测潜在的碰撞操作，DRL 逻辑可优化车辆的运动以避免碰撞并最大限度地减少交叉路口的总体延误。所提出的控制系统被称为分散稀疏协调系统（DSCLS），因为每辆车都有自己的控制逻辑，并且仅在协调状态下与其他车辆交互。由于 DRL 训练过程中采取随机动作的连锁影响，训练后的模型可以处理前所未有的交通量条件，这对交叉口管理提出了主要挑战。在 VISSIM 软件中，将所开发模型的性能与传统和基于 CAV 的控制系统进行了比较，包括固定交通灯、驱动交通灯和最长队列优先 (LQF) 控制系统，在 VISSIM 软件中的四个交叉口的走廊中的三种容量状态下。仿真结果表明，与其他基于 CAV 的控制系统相比，所提出的模型在中等、高和极端音量状态下的延迟减少了 50%、29% 和 23%。出行时间、油耗、排放和替代安全措施 (SSM) 方面的改善也很明显。 本文提出了一种基于自动驾驶车辆（CAV）的无信号交叉口控制系统DSCLS，并对其在走廊级别的影响进行了评估。 Ardeshir Mirbakhsh,Joyoung Lee,Dejan Besenski cs.AI

title: Performance, Opaqueness, Consequences, and Assumptions: Simple questions for responsible planning of machine learning solutions
title_zh: 性能、不透明性、后果和假设：负责任地规划机器学习解决方案的简单问题
abstract: The data revolution has generated a huge demand for data-driven solutions. This demand propels a growing number of easy-to-use tools and training for aspiring data scientists that enable the rapid building of predictive models. Today, weapons of math destruction can be easily built and deployed without detailed planning and validation. This rapidly extends the list of AI failures, i.e. deployments that lead to financial losses or even violate democratic values such as equality, freedom and justice. The lack of planning, rules and standards around the model development leads to the ,,anarchisation of AI". This problem is reported under different names such as validation debt, reproducibility crisis, and lack of explainability. Post-mortem analysis of AI failures often reveals mistakes made in the early phase of model development or data acquisition. Thus, instead of curing the consequences of deploying harmful models, we shall prevent them as early as possible by putting more attention to the initial planning stage. In this paper, we propose a quick and simple framework to support planning of AI solutions. The POCA framework is based on four pillars: Performance, Opaqueness, Consequences, and Assumptions. It helps to set the expectations and plan the constraints for the AI solution before any model is built and any data is collected. With the help of the POCA method, preliminary requirements can be defined for the model-building process, so that costly model misspecification errors can be identified as soon as possible or even avoided. AI researchers, product owners and business analysts can use this framework in the initial stages of building AI solutions.

abstract_zh: 数据革命产生了对数据驱动解决方案的巨大需求。这种需求推动了越来越多的易于使用的工具和针对有抱负的数据科学家的培训，以实现快速构建预测模型。如今，无需详细规划和验证，数学毁灭性武器就可以轻松制造和部署。这迅速扩大了人工智能失败的范围，即导致经济损失甚至违反平等、自由和正义等民主价值观的部署。围绕模型开发缺乏规划、规则和标准导致人工智能“无政府化”。这个问题有不同的名称，例如验证债务、可重复性危机和缺乏可解释性。人工智能故障的事后分析通常会揭示模型开发或数据采集早期阶段所犯的错误。因此，我们不是要解决部署有害模型的后果，而是应该通过更多地关注初始规划阶段来尽早预防它们。在本文中，我们提出了一个快速而简单的框架来支持规划POCA 框架基于四个支柱：性能、不透明性、后果和假设。借助 POCA 方法，可以在构建任何模型和收集任何数据之前，为模型构建过程定义初步要求，以便尽快识别甚至避免代价高昂的模型错误指定错误。

AI.tldr: 本文提出POCA框架，通过性能、不透明性、后果和假设四个支柱，为机器学习解决方案的负责任规划提供简单问题指导。
AI.motivation: 数据革命导致AI工具普及，但缺乏规划和验证引发诸多AI失败案例，如金融损失和民主价值观损害，亟需在早期规划阶段预防问题。
AI.method: 基于POCA框架，通过四个核心问题（性能、不透明性、后果、假设）在模型构建前设定约束条件和预期目标。
AI.result: 该框架帮助定义模型开发的初步需求，提前识别或避免代价高昂的模型误设错误。
AI.conclusion: 通过POCA框架的早期规划干预，可有效预防AI部署风险，推动更负责任的机器学习解决方案开发。

authors_text: Yuanyuan Feng,Abhilasha Ravichander,Yaxing Yao,Shikun Zhang,Norman Sadeh
title: Exploring and Improving the Accessibility of Data Privacy-related Information for People Who Are Blind or Low-vision
title_zh: 探索和提高盲人或弱视人士对数据隐私相关信息的可访问性
comment: Peer-reviewed short article at the 7th Workshop on Inclusive Privacy and Security (WIPS2022)
comments: Peer-reviewed short article at the 7th Workshop on Inclusive Privacy and Security (WIPS2022)
abstract: We present a study of privacy attitudes and behaviors of people who are blind or low vision. Our study involved in-depth interviews with 21 US participants. The study explores their risk perceptions and also whether and how they go about obtaining information about the data practices of digital technologies with which they interact. One objective of the study is to better understand this user group's needs for more accessible privacy tools. We also share some reflections on the challenge of recruiting an inclusive sample of participants from an already underrepresented user group in computing and how we were able to overcome this challenge.
summary: We present a study of privacy attitudes and behaviors of people who are blind or low vision. Our study involved in-depth interviews with 21 US participants. The study explores their risk perceptions and also whether and how they go about obtaining information about the data practices of digital technologies with which they interact. One objective of the study is to better understand this user group's needs for more accessible privacy tools. We also share some reflections on the challenge of recruiting an inclusive sample of participants from an already underrepresented user group in computing and how we were able to overcome this challenge.
abstract_zh: 我们对盲人或弱视人士的隐私态度和行为进行了研究。我们的研究涉及对 21 名美国参与者的深入访谈。该研究探讨了他们的风险认知，以及他们是否以及如何获取有关他们与之交互的数字技术的数据实践的信息。该研究的目的之一是更好地了解该用户群体对更易于访问的隐私工具的需求。我们还分享了一些关于从计算机领域代表性不足的用户群体中招募包容性参与者样本的挑战以及我们如何克服这一挑战的思考。

AI.tldr: 本研究通过深度访谈探讨盲人及低视力人群在数据隐私信息获取方面的可访问性问题，并分析其隐私态度与行为特征。
AI.motivation: 现有数字隐私工具缺乏对视障群体的适配性，而该群体在计算领域长期处于被忽视状态，需针对性设计更易用的隐私保护方案。
AI.method: 采用深度访谈法，对21名美国盲人及低视力用户进行定性研究，分析其隐私风险认知、信息获取方式及工具需求。
AI.result: 发现受访者普遍缺乏对数据实践的了解，依赖非视觉化信息获取途径，且现有隐私工具难以满足其特殊需求；研究者通过社区合作与多渠道招募成功克服样本获取难题。
AI.conclusion: 需开发支持语音交互、触觉反馈等无障碍功能的隐私工具，并建议在隐私设计中纳入视障用户需求，同时为包容性研究提供样本招募方法参考。

conclusion: 需开发支持语音交互、触觉反馈等无障碍功能的隐私工具，并建议在隐私设计中纳入视障用户需求，同时为包容性研究提供样本招募方法参考。
search_text: Exploring and Improving the Accessibility of Data Privacy-related Information for People Who Are Blind or Low-vision 探索和提高盲人或弱视人士对数据隐私相关信息的可访问性 We present a study of privacy attitudes and behaviors of people who are blind or low vision. Our study involved in-depth interviews with 21 US participants. The study explores their risk perceptions and also whether and how they go about obtaining information about the data practices of digital technologies with which they interact. One objective of the study is to better understand this user group's needs for more accessible privacy tools. We also share some reflections on the challenge of recruiting an inclusive sample of participants from an already underrepresented user group in computing and how we were able to overcome this challenge. 我们对盲人或弱视人士的隐私态度和行为进行了研究。我们的研究涉及对 21 名美国参与者的深入访谈。该研究探讨了他们的风险认知，以及他们是否以及如何获取有关他们与之交互的数字技术的数据实践的信息。该研究的目的之一是更好地了解该用户群体对更易于访问的隐私工具的需求。我们还分享了一些关于从计算机领域代表性不足的用户群体中招募包容性参与者样本的挑战以及我们如何克服这一挑战的思考。 本研究通过深度访谈探讨盲人及低视力人群在数据隐私信息获取方面的可访问性问题，并分析其隐私态度与行为特征。 Yuanyuan Feng,Abhilasha Ravichander,Yaxing Yao,Shikun Zhang,Norman Sadeh cs.HC,cs.CY

title: Individual Fairness under Varied Notions of Group Fairness in Bipartite Matching - One Framework to Approximate Them All
title_zh: 双边匹配中群体公平的不同概念下的个人公平——一个近似所有这些概念的框架
comment: 31 pages. To appear in IJCAI'24
comments: 31 pages. To appear in IJCAI'24
abstract: We study the probabilistic assignment of items to platforms that satisfies both group and individual fairness constraints. Each item belongs to specific groups and has a preference ordering over platforms. Each platform enforces group fairness by limiting the number of items per group that can be assigned to it. There could be multiple optimal solutions that satisfy the group fairness constraints, but this alone ignores item preferences. Our approach explores a `best of both worlds fairness' solution to get a randomized matching, which is ex-ante individually fair and ex-post group-fair. Thus, we seek a `probabilistic individually fair' distribution over `group-fair' matchings where each item has a `high' probability of matching to one of its top choices. This distribution is also ex-ante group-fair. Users can customize fairness constraints to suit their requirements. Our first result is a polynomial-time algorithm that computes a distribution over `group-fair' matchings such that the individual fairness constraints are approximately satisfied and the expected size of a matching is close to OPT. We empirically test this on real-world datasets. We present two additional polynomial-time bi-criteria approximation algorithms that users can choose from to balance group fairness and individual fairness trade-offs. For disjoint groups, we provide an exact polynomial-time algorithm adaptable to additional lower `group fairness' bounds. Extending our model, we encompass `maxmin group fairness,' amplifying underrepresented groups, and `mindom group fairness,' reducing the representation of dominant groups.'

abstract_zh: 我们研究满足群体和个人公平约束的项目到平台的概率分配。每个项目都属于特定的组，并且在平台上具有优先顺序。每个平台都通过限制每个组可以分配给它的项目数量来强制执行组公平性。可能有多个满足群体公平约束的最优解决方案，但这本身就忽略了项目偏好。我们的方法探索了一种“两全其美的公平性”解决方案来获得随机匹配，即事前个人公平和事后团体公平。因此，我们在“群体公平”匹配上寻求“概率个体公平”分布，其中每个项目都有“高”概率与其最佳选择之一匹配。这种分配也是事前团体公平的。用户可以自定义公平约束以满足他们的要求。我们的第一个结果是一个多项式时间算法，它计算“群体公平”匹配的分布，从而近似满足个体公平约束，并且匹配的预期大小接近 OPT。我们在现实世界的数据集上进行了实证测试。我们提出了两种额外的多项式时间双标准近似算法，用户可以选择它们来平衡群体公平性和个体公平性权衡。对于不相交的组，我们提供了一种精确的多项式时间算法，可适应额外的较低“组公平性”界限。扩展我们的模型，我们包括“最大最小群体公平”，扩大代表性不足的群体，以及“思想群体公平”，减少主导群体的代表性。

AI.tldr: 本文研究在二分图匹配中同时满足群体公平性和个体公平性的概率分配方法，提出一种统一框架以近似实现多种公平性约束。
AI.motivation: 现有群体公平性方法忽视了个体偏好，而单纯满足群体公平可能导致个体选择与其偏好严重偏离，需在两者间寻求平衡。
AI.method: 设计多项式时间算法生成满足群体公平的匹配分布，确保个体高概率匹配至其首选平台，并引入两种双标准近似算法及精确算法处理离散群体和扩展公平性需求。
AI.result: 算法在真实数据集上验证有效，匹配规模接近最优解，支持用户自定义公平性约束，并可扩展至最大最小群体公平和最小主导群体公平场景。
AI.conclusion: 该框架首次统一处理多类公平性约束，在保证群体公平性的同时兼顾个体偏好，为实际应用场景提供灵活高效的解决方案。

title: Equalization and Brightness Mapping Modes of Color-to-Gray Projection Operators
title_zh: 彩色到灰度投影算子的均衡和亮度映射模式
abstract: In this article, the conversion of color RGB images to grayscale is covered by characterizing the mathematical operators used to project 3 color channels to a single one. Based on the fact that most operators assign each of the $256^3$ colors a single gray level, ranging from 0 to 255, they are clustering algorithms that distribute the color population into 256 clusters of increasing brightness. To visualize the way operators work the sizes of the clusters and the average brightness of each cluster are plotted. The equalization mode (EQ) introduced in this work focuses on cluster sizes, while the brightness mapping (BM) mode describes the CIE L* luminance distribution per cluster. Three classes of EQ modes and two classes of BM modes were found in linear operators, defining a 6-class taxonomy. The theoretical/methodological framework introduced was applied in a case study considering the equal-weights uniform operator, the NTSC standard operator, and an operator chosen as ideal to lighten the faces of black people to improve facial recognition in current biased classifiers. It was found that most current metrics used to assess the quality of color-to-gray conversions better assess one of the two BM mode classes, but the ideal operator chosen by a human team belongs to the other class. Therefore, this cautions against using these general metrics for specific purpose color-to-gray conversions. It should be noted that eventual applications of this framework to non-linear operators can give rise to new classes of EQ and BM modes. The main contribution of this article is to provide a tool to better understand color to gray converters in general, even those based on machine learning, within the current trend of better explainability of models.

Based on the fact that most operators assign each of the $256^3$ colors a single gray level, ranging from 0 to 255, they are clustering algorithms that distribute the color population into 256 clusters of increasing brightness. To visualize the way operators work the sizes of the clusters and the average brightness of each cluster are plotted. The equalization mode (EQ) introduced in this work focuses on cluster sizes, while the brightness mapping (BM) mode describes the CIE L* luminance distribution per cluster. Three classes of EQ modes and two classes of BM modes were found in linear operators, defining a 6-class taxonomy. The theoretical/methodological framework introduced was applied in a case study considering the equal-weights uniform operator, the NTSC standard operator, and an operator chosen as ideal to lighten the faces of black people to improve facial recognition in current biased classifiers. It was found that most current metrics used to assess the quality of color-to-gray conversions better assess one of the two BM mode classes, but the ideal operator chosen by a human team belongs to the other class. Therefore, this cautions against using these general metrics for specific purpose color-to-gray conversions. It should be noted that eventual applications of this framework to non-linear operators can give rise to new classes of EQ and BM modes. The main contribution of this article is to provide a tool to better understand color to gray converters in general, even those based on machine learning, within the current trend of better explainability of models.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，通过描述用于将 3 个颜色通道投影到单个颜色通道的数学运算符，介绍了彩色 RGB 图像到灰度的转换。基于大多数运算符为每种 256^3$ 颜色分配一个灰度级（范围从 0 到 255）的事实，它们是聚类算法，将颜色群体分布到 256 个亮度递增的簇中。为了可视化操作员的工作方式，绘制了簇的大小和每个簇的平均亮度。本工作中引入的均衡模式 (EQ) 重点关注簇大小，而亮度映射 (BM) 模式则描述每个簇的 CIE L* 亮度分布。在线性算子中发现了三类 EQ 模式和两类 BM 模式，定义了 6 类分类法。所介绍的理论/方法框架应用于案例研究，考虑了等权均匀算子、NTSC 标准算子以及选择理想的算子来照亮黑人的脸部，以提高当前有偏差的分类器中的面部识别。研究发现，当前大多数用于评估彩色到灰色转换质量的指标可以更好地评估两个 BM 模式类别中的一个，但人类团队选择的理想运算符属于另一类别。因此，这警告不要将这些通用指标用于特定目的的颜色到灰色的转换。应该指出的是，该框架最终应用于非线性算子可能会产生新类别的 EQ 和 BM 模式。本文的主要贡献是提供了一种工具，可以在当前模型更好解释性的趋势下，更好地理解一般的颜色到灰色转换器，甚至是基于机器学习的转换器。

AI.tldr: 本文研究彩色图像转灰度的数学运算符，提出等化模式(EQ)和亮度映射模式(BM)两种分析框架，建立6类分类体系，并探讨其在人脸识别等场景的应用。
AI.motivation: 现有灰度转换指标无法满足特定应用场景需求，需建立更系统的分析工具以解释转换算法的工作机制及优化方向。
AI.method: 将颜色聚类为256个亮度层级，通过分析聚类规模(EQ)和CIE L*亮度分布(BM)构建理论框架，结合NTSC标准及定制化算子进行案例验证。
AI.result: 发现6类线性运算符分类体系，证实当前评估指标偏向某一BM类别而理想算子属于另一类别，揭示通用指标与特定需求间的矛盾。
AI.conclusion: 该框架为理解包括机器学习模型在内的灰度转换器提供工具，强调需根据应用目标重新评估转换算法的优劣标准。
