search_text: Multi-task Learning for Monocular Depth and Defocus Estimations with Real Images 使用真实图像进行单眼深度和散焦估计的多任务学习 Monocular depth estimation and defocus estimation are two fundamental tasks in computer vision. Most existing methods treat depth estimation and defocus estimation as two separate tasks, ignoring the strong connection between them. In this work, we propose a multi-task learning network consisting of an encoder with two decoders to estimate the depth and defocus map from a single focused image. Through the multi-task network, the depth estimation facilitates the defocus estimation to get better results in the weak texture region and the defocus estimation facilitates the depth estimation by the strong physical connection between the two maps. We set up a dataset (named ALL-in-3D dataset) which is the first all-real image dataset consisting of 100K sets of all-in-focus images, focused images with focus depth, depth maps, and defocus maps. It enables the network to learn features and solid physical connections between the depth and real defocus images. Experiments demonstrate that the network learns more solid features from the real focused images than the synthetic focused images. Benefiting from this multi-task structure where different tasks facilitate each other, our depth and defocus estimations achieve significantly better performance than other state-of-art algorithms. The code and dataset will be publicly available at https://github.com/cubhe/MDDNet. 单目深度估计和散焦估计是计算机视觉中的两个基本任务。大多数现有方法将深度估计和散焦估计视为两个独立的任务，忽略了它们之间的紧密联系。在这项工作中，我们提出了一个多任务学习网络，由一个编码器和两个解码器组成，用于估计单个聚焦图像的深度和散焦图。通过多任务网络，深度估计有利于散焦估计在弱纹理区域获得更好的结果，并且散焦估计有利于通过两个图之间的强物理连接进行深度估计。我们建立了一个数据集（名为 ALL-in-3D 数据集），这是第一个全真实图像数据集，由 100K 组全焦点图像、具有焦点深度的聚焦图像、深度图和散焦图组成。它使网络能够学习深度图像和真实散焦图像之间的特征和牢固的物理联系。实验表明，与合成的聚焦图像相比，网络从真实的聚焦图像中学到了更多的实体特征。受益于这种不同任务相互促进的多任务结构，我们的深度和散焦估计实现了比其他最先进算法更好的性能。代码和数据集将在 https://github.com/cubhe/MDDNet 上公开提供。 本文提出一种基于真实图像的多任务学习网络，同时估计单目深度和失焦图，并构建了首个全真实图像数据集ALL-in-3D。 Renzhi He,Hualin Hong,Boya Fu,Fei Liu cs.CV,eess.IV

authors_text: Qiong Wu,Jiaer Xia,Pingyang Dai,Yiyi Zhou,Yongjian Wu,Rongrong Ji
title: CycleTrans: Learning Neutral yet Discriminative Features for Visible-Infrared Person Re-Identification
title_zh: CycleTrans：学习中性但有区别的特征以进行可见红外人员重新识别
abstract: Visible-infrared person re-identification (VI-ReID) is a task of matching the same individuals across the visible and infrared modalities. Its main challenge lies in the modality gap caused by cameras operating on different spectra. Existing VI-ReID methods mainly focus on learning general features across modalities, often at the expense of feature discriminability. To address this issue, we present a novel cycle-construction-based network for neutral yet discriminative feature learning, termed CycleTrans. Specifically, CycleTrans uses a lightweight Knowledge Capturing Module (KCM) to capture rich semantics from the modality-relevant feature maps according to pseudo queries. Afterwards, a Discrepancy Modeling Module (DMM) is deployed to transform these features into neutral ones according to the modality-irrelevant prototypes. To ensure feature discriminability, another two KCMs are further deployed for feature cycle constructions. With cycle construction, our method can learn effective neutral features for visible and infrared images while preserving their salient semantics. Extensive experiments on SYSU-MM01 and RegDB datasets validate the merits of CycleTrans against a flurry of state-of-the-art methods, +4.57% on rank-1 in SYSU-MM01 and +2.2% on rank-1 in RegDB.
summary: Visible-infrared person re-identification (VI-ReID) is a task of matching the same individuals across the visible and infrared modalities. Its main challenge lies in the modality gap caused by cameras operating on different spectra. Existing VI-ReID methods mainly focus on learning general features across modalities, often at the expense of feature discriminability. To address this issue, we present a novel cycle-construction-based network for neutral yet discriminative feature learning, termed CycleTrans. Specifically, CycleTrans uses a lightweight Knowledge Capturing Module (KCM) to capture rich semantics from the modality-relevant feature maps according to pseudo queries. Afterwards, a Discrepancy Modeling Module (DMM) is deployed to transform these features into neutral ones according to the modality-irrelevant prototypes. To ensure feature discriminability, another two KCMs are further deployed for feature cycle constructions. With cycle construction, our method can learn effective neutral features for visible and infrared images while preserving their salient semantics. Extensive experiments on SYSU-MM01 and RegDB datasets validate the merits of CycleTrans against a flurry of state-of-the-art methods, +4.57% on rank-1 in SYSU-MM01 and +2.2% on rank-1 in RegDB.
abstract_zh: 可见光-红外人员重新识别（VI-ReID）是一项在可见光和红外模式下匹配相同个体的任务。它的主要挑战在于在不同光谱上运行的相机造成的模态差距。现有的 VI-ReID 方法主要侧重于学习跨模态的一般特征，通常以牺牲特征可辨别性为代价。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种新颖的基于循环构建的网络，用于中性但有区别的特征学习，称为 CycleTrans。具体来说，CycleTrans 使用轻量级知识捕获模块（KCM）根据伪查询从模态相关特征图中捕获丰富的语义。然后，部署差异建模模块（DMM），根据与模态无关的原型将这些特征转换为中性特征。为了确保特征可区分性，进一步部署了另外两个 KCM 来构建特征周期。通过循环构造，我们的方法可以学习可见光和红外图像的有效中性特征，同时保留其显着语义。在 SYSU-MM01 和 RegDB 数据集上进行的大量实验验证了 CycleTrans 相对于一系列最先进方法的优点，在 SYSU-MM01 中的排名 1 上提高了 4.57%，在 RegDB 中的排名 1 上提高了 2.2%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出CycleTrans方法，通过学习中立且具有判别性的特征，解决可见光与红外图像跨模态行人重识别（VI-ReID）中的模态差异问题。
AI.motivation: 现有VI-ReID方法在跨模态特征学习中过度追求通用性，导致特征判别性不足，难以有效匹配不同模态下的同一行人。
AI.method: CycleTrans包含知识捕获模块（KCM）和差异建模模块（DMM）。KCM通过伪查询提取模态相关语义特征，DMM将特征转换为模态无关的中立特征，再通过两次KCM构建特征循环结构以增强判别性。
AI.result: 在SYSU-MM01和RegDB数据集上，CycleTrans分别达到+4.57%和+2.2%的Rank-1准确率提升，优于现有先进方法。
AI.conclusion: CycleTrans通过循环结构有效平衡了特征的中立性与判别性，在跨模态行人重识别任务中表现出显著优势。

authors_text: Haoran Wang,Dongliang He,Wenhao Wu,Boyang Xia,Min Yang,Fu Li,Yunlong Yu,Zhong Ji,Errui Ding,Jingdong Wang
title: CODER: Coupled Diversity-Sensitive Momentum Contrastive Learning for Image-Text Retrieval
title_zh: CODER：用于图像文本检索的耦合多样性敏感动量对比学习
comment: Accepted by ECCV 2022
comments: Accepted by ECCV 2022
abstract: Image-Text Retrieval (ITR) is challenging in bridging visual and lingual modalities. Contrastive learning has been adopted by most prior arts. Except for limited amount of negative image-text pairs, the capability of constrastive learning is restricted by manually weighting negative pairs as well as unawareness of external knowledge. In this paper, we propose our novel Coupled Diversity-Sensitive Momentum Constrastive Learning (CODER) for improving cross-modal representation. Firstly, a novel diversity-sensitive contrastive learning (DCL) architecture is invented. We introduce dynamic dictionaries for both modalities to enlarge the scale of image-text pairs, and diversity-sensitiveness is achieved by adaptive negative pair weighting. Furthermore, two branches are designed in CODER. One learns instance-level embeddings from image/text, and it also generates pseudo online clustering labels for its input image/text based on their embeddings. Meanwhile, the other branch learns to query from commonsense knowledge graph to form concept-level descriptors for both modalities. Afterwards, both branches leverage DCL to align the cross-modal embedding spaces while an extra pseudo clustering label prediction loss is utilized to promote concept-level representation learning for the second branch. Extensive experiments conducted on two popular benchmarks, i.e. MSCOCO and Flicker30K, validate CODER remarkably outperforms the state-of-the-art approaches. Our code is available at: https://github.com/BruceW91/CODER.

Extensive experiments conducted on two popular benchmarks, i.e. MSCOCO and Flicker30K, validate CODER remarkably outperforms the state-of-the-art approaches. Our code is available at: https://github.com/BruceW91/CODER.
abstract_zh: 图像文本检索（ITR）在连接视觉和语言模式方面具有挑战性。大多数现有技术已采用对比学习。除了数量有限的负图文对之外，对比学习的能力还受到手动加权负图对以及对外部知识的不了解的限制。在本文中，我们提出了新颖的耦合多样性敏感动量对比学习（CODER）来改进跨模态表示。首先，发明了一种新颖的多样性敏感对比学习（DCL）架构。我们为两种模态引入动态字典来扩大图像文本对的规模，并通过自适应负对加权来实现多样性敏感性。此外，在CODER中设计了两个分支。人们从图像/文本中学习实例级嵌入，并且还根据其嵌入为其输入图像/文本生成伪在线聚类标签。与此同时，另一个分支学习从常识知识图谱中进行查询，以形成两种模式的概念级描述符。随后，两个分支都利用 DCL 来对齐跨模态嵌入空间，同时利用额外的伪聚类标签预测损失来促进第二个分支的概念级表示学习。在两个流行的基准（即 MSCOCO 和 Flicker30K）上进行的大量实验验证了 CODER 的性能明显优于最先进的方法。我们的代码位于：https://github.com/BruceW91/CODER。

AI.tldr: 本文提出CODER方法，通过耦合多样性敏感的动量对比学习框架，提升图像-文本检索任务中的跨模态表示能力。
AI.motivation: 传统对比学习在图像-文本检索中受限于负样本手动加权和外部知识利用不足，导致跨模态对齐效果不佳。
AI.method: 设计多样性敏感对比学习架构（DCL），引入动态字典扩大样本规模并自适应加权负样本；构建双分支网络，分别学习实例级嵌入（生成伪聚类标签）和概念级描述（利用常识知识图谱），通过DCL对齐跨模态空间并引入聚类预测损失。
AI.result: 在MSCOCO和Flickr30K基准测试中，CODER显著优于现有最先进方法。
AI.conclusion: CODER通过结合多样性敏感学习与外部知识，有效提升了图像-文本检索的跨模态表示学习效果。

search_text: CODER: Coupled Diversity-Sensitive Momentum Contrastive Learning for Image-Text Retrieval CODER：用于图像文本检索的耦合多样性敏感动量对比学习 Image-Text Retrieval (ITR) is challenging in bridging visual and lingual modalities. Contrastive learning has been adopted by most prior arts. Except for limited amount of negative image-text pairs, the capability of constrastive learning is restricted by manually weighting negative pairs as well as unawareness of external knowledge. In this paper, we propose our novel Coupled Diversity-Sensitive Momentum Constrastive Learning (CODER) for improving cross-modal representation. Firstly, a novel diversity-sensitive contrastive learning (DCL) architecture is invented. We introduce dynamic dictionaries for both modalities to enlarge the scale of image-text pairs, and diversity-sensitiveness is achieved by adaptive negative pair weighting. Furthermore, two branches are designed in CODER. One learns instance-level embeddings from image/text, and it also generates pseudo online clustering labels for its input image/text based on their embeddings. Meanwhile, the other branch learns to query from commonsense knowledge graph to form concept-level descriptors for both modalities. Afterwards, both branches leverage DCL to align the cross-modal embedding spaces while an extra pseudo clustering label prediction loss is utilized to promote concept-level representation learning for the second branch. Extensive experiments conducted on two popular benchmarks, i.e. MSCOCO and Flicker30K, validate CODER remarkably outperforms the state-of-the-art approaches. Our code is available at: https://github.com/BruceW91/CODER. 图像文本检索（ITR）在连接视觉和语言模式方面具有挑战性。大多数现有技术已采用对比学习。除了数量有限的负图文对之外，对比学习的能力还受到手动加权负图对以及对外部知识的不了解的限制。在本文中，我们提出了新颖的耦合多样性敏感动量对比学习（CODER）来改进跨模态表示。首先，发明了一种新颖的多样性敏感对比学习（DCL）架构。我们为两种模态引入动态字典来扩大图像文本对的规模，并通过自适应负对加权来实现多样性敏感性。此外，在CODER中设计了两个分支。人们从图像/文本中学习实例级嵌入，并且还根据其嵌入为其输入图像/文本生成伪在线聚类标签。与此同时，另一个分支学习从常识知识图谱中进行查询，以形成两种模式的概念级描述符。随后，两个分支都利用 DCL 来对齐跨模态嵌入空间，同时利用额外的伪聚类标签预测损失来促进第二个分支的概念级表示学习。在两个流行的基准（即 MSCOCO 和 Flicker30K）上进行的大量实验验证了 CODER 的性能明显优于最先进的方法。我们的代码位于：https://github.com/BruceW91/CODER。 本文提出CODER方法，通过耦合多样性敏感的动量对比学习框架，提升图像-文本检索任务中的跨模态表示能力。 Haoran Wang,Dongliang He,Wenhao Wu,Boyang Xia,Min Yang,Fu Li,Yunlong Yu,Zhong Ji,Errui Ding,Jingdong Wang cs.CV

title: Teaching the Burrows-Wheeler Transform via the Positional Burrows-Wheeler Transform
title_zh: 通过位置 Burrows-Wheeler 变换教授 Burrows-Wheeler 变换
abstract: The Burrows-Wheeler Transform (BWT) is often taught in undergraduate courses on algorithmic bioinformatics, because it underlies the FM-index and thus important tools such as Bowtie and BWA. Its admirers consider the BWT a thing of beauty but, despite thousands of pages being written about it over nearly thirty years, to undergraduates seeing it for the first time it still often seems like magic. Some who persevere are later shown the Positional BWT (PBWT), which was published twenty years after the BWT. In this paper we argue that the PBWT should be taught {\em before} the BWT. We first use the PBWT's close relation to a right-to-left radix sort to explain how to use it as a fast and space-efficient index for {\em positional search} on a set of strings (that is, given a pattern and a position, quickly list the strings containing that pattern starting in that position). We then observe that {\em prefix search} (listing all the strings that start with the pattern) is an easy special case of positional search, and that prefix search on the suffixes of a single string is equivalent to {\em substring search} in that string (listing all the starting positions of occurrences of the pattern in the string). Storing naïvely a PBWT of the suffixes of a string is space-{\em inefficient} but, in even reasonably small examples, most of its columns are nearly the same. It is not difficult to show that if we store a PBWT of the cyclic shifts of the string, instead of its suffixes, then all the columns are exactly the same -- and equal to the BWT of the string. Thus we can teach the BWT and the FM-index via the PBWT.
summary: The Burrows-Wheeler Transform (BWT) is often taught in undergraduate courses on algorithmic bioinformatics, because it underlies the FM-index and thus important tools such as Bowtie and BWA. Its admirers consider the BWT a thing of beauty but, despite thousands of pages being written about it over nearly thirty years, to undergraduates seeing it for the first time it still often seems like magic. Some who persevere are later shown the Positional BWT (PBWT), which was published twenty years after the BWT. In this paper we argue that the PBWT should be taught {\em before} the BWT. We first use the PBWT's close relation to a right-to-left radix sort to explain how to use it as a fast and space-efficient index for {\em positional search} on a set of strings (that is, given a pattern and a position, quickly list the strings containing that pattern starting in that position). We then observe that {\em prefix search} (listing all the strings that start with the pattern) is an easy special case of positional search, and that prefix search on the suffixes of a single string is equivalent to {\em substring search} in that string (listing all the starting positions of occurrences of the pattern in the string). Storing naïvely a PBWT of the suffixes of a string is space-{\em inefficient} but, in even reasonably small examples, most of its columns are nearly the same. It is not difficult to show that if we store a PBWT of the cyclic shifts of the string, instead of its suffixes, then all the columns are exactly the same -- and equal to the BWT of the string. Thus we can teach the BWT and the FM-index via the PBWT.
abstract_zh: Burrows-Wheeler 变换 (BWT) 通常在算法生物信息学本科课程中教授，因为它是 FM 索引以及 Bowtie 和 BWA 等重要工具的基础。它的崇拜者认为 BWT 是一件美丽的事情，但尽管近三十年来关于它的文章有数千页，但对于第一次看到它的本科生来说，它仍然常常看起来像魔法。一些坚持下来的人后来看到了位置 BWT (PBWT)，它是在 BWT 二十年后发布的。在本文中，我们认为应该在 BWT 之前教授 PBWT。我们首先使用 PBWT 与从右到左基数排序的密切关系来解释如何将其用作一组字符串上的位置搜索的快速且节省空间的索引（即，给定模式和位置​​，快速列出从该位置开始包含该模式的字符串）。然后我们观察到，{\em 前缀搜索}（列出以该模式开头的所有字符串）是位置搜索的一个简单特例，并且对单个字符串的后缀进行前缀搜索相当于该字符串中的 {\em 子字符串搜索}（列出该模式在字符串中出现的所有起始位置）。简单地存储字符串后缀的 PBWT 是空间效率低下的，但是，即使在相当小的示例中，它的大多数列也几乎相同。不难证明，如果我们存储字符串循环移位的 PBWT，而不是其后缀，那么所有列都完全相同，并且等于字符串的 BWT。因此，我们可以通过 PBWT 教授 BWT 和 FM-index。

AI.tldr: 本文提出应通过位置Burrows-Wheeler变换（PBWT）来教授传统的Burrows-Wheeler变换（BWT），以帮助本科生更直观地理解其原理。
AI.motivation: BWT作为生物信息学算法的基础，其复杂性常使初学者感到困惑。PBWT作为BWT的扩展，能更清晰地解释其核心思想，且教学顺序调整可降低学习门槛。
AI.method: 通过PBWT与右到左基数排序的关联，展示其在位置搜索中的高效性；将前缀搜索与子串搜索关联，并证明使用循环移位构建PBWT可等价于BWT。
AI.result: 证明PBWT能作为BWT的教学桥梁，通过简化概念和空间效率优化，使学生更易掌握BWT及FM索引的原理。
AI.conclusion: 教学顺序应优先采用PBWT，再过渡到BWT，从而提升学生对复杂算法的理解效率与深度。

title: Tyche: A library for probabilistic reasoning and belief modelling in Python
title_zh: Tyche：Python 中的概率推理和信念建模库
comment: 21 pages, submitted to AJCAI2022
comments: 21 pages, submitted to AJCAI2022
abstract: This paper presents Tyche, a Python library to facilitate probabilistic reasoning in uncertain worlds through the construction, querying, and learning of belief models. Tyche uses aleatoric description logic (ADL), which provides computational advantages in its evaluation over other description logics. Tyche belief models can be succinctly created by defining classes of individuals, the probabilistic beliefs about them (concepts), and the probabilistic relationships between them (roles). We also introduce a method of observation propagation to facilitate learning from complex ADL observations. A demonstration of Tyche to predict the author of anonymised messages, and to extract author writing tendencies from anonymised messages, is provided. Tyche has the potential to assist in the development of expert systems, knowledge extraction systems, and agents to play games with incomplete and probabilistic information.
summary: This paper presents Tyche, a Python library to facilitate probabilistic reasoning in uncertain worlds through the construction, querying, and learning of belief models. Tyche uses aleatoric description logic (ADL), which provides computational advantages in its evaluation over other description logics. Tyche belief models can be succinctly created by defining classes of individuals, the probabilistic beliefs about them (concepts), and the probabilistic relationships between them (roles). We also introduce a method of observation propagation to facilitate learning from complex ADL observations. A demonstration of Tyche to predict the author of anonymised messages, and to extract author writing tendencies from anonymised messages, is provided. Tyche has the potential to assist in the development of expert systems, knowledge extraction systems, and agents to play games with incomplete and probabilistic information.
abstract_zh: 本文介绍了 Tyche，一个 Python 库，通过构建、查询和学习信念模型来促进不确定世界中的概率推理。 Tyche 使用任意描述逻辑 (ADL)，与其他描述逻辑相比，它在评估方面具有计算优势。 Tyche 信念模型可以通过定义个体类别、关于他们的概率信念（概念）以及他们之间的概率关系（角色）来简洁地创建。我们还引入了一种观察传播方法，以促进从复杂的 ADL 观察中学习。提供了 Tyche 的演示，以预测匿名消息的作者，并从匿名消息中提取作者的写作倾向。 Tyche 有潜力协助开发专家系统、知识提取系统和代理来玩不完整和概率信息的游戏。

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了一个名为Tyche的Python库，用于通过构建、查询和学习信念模型来实现不确定环境下的概率推理。
AI.motivation: 在存在不确定性的复杂场景中，传统方法难以高效处理概率推理和信念建模需求，亟需一种计算效率更高的解决方案。
AI.method: 基于aleatoric描述逻辑（ADL）设计信念模型，通过定义个体类、概率概念及角色关系构建模型，并引入观察传播方法处理复杂ADL观测数据。
AI.result: 实现了Tyche库并演示了其在匿名消息作者预测及写作风格提取中的应用，验证了其在专家系统和博弈场景中的潜力。
AI.conclusion: Tyche通过ADL的计算优势和观察传播方法，为处理不确定信息的系统开发提供了高效的概率推理工具。

search_text: Tyche: A library for probabilistic reasoning and belief modelling in Python Tyche：Python 中的概率推理和信念建模库 This paper presents Tyche, a Python library to facilitate probabilistic reasoning in uncertain worlds through the construction, querying, and learning of belief models. Tyche uses aleatoric description logic (ADL), which provides computational advantages in its evaluation over other description logics. Tyche belief models can be succinctly created by defining classes of individuals, the probabilistic beliefs about them (concepts), and the probabilistic relationships between them (roles). We also introduce a method of observation propagation to facilitate learning from complex ADL observations. A demonstration of Tyche to predict the author of anonymised messages, and to extract author writing tendencies from anonymised messages, is provided. Tyche has the potential to assist in the development of expert systems, knowledge extraction systems, and agents to play games with incomplete and probabilistic information. 本文介绍了 Tyche，一个 Python 库，通过构建、查询和学习信念模型来促进不确定世界中的概率推理。 Tyche 使用任意描述逻辑 (ADL)，与其他描述逻辑相比，它在评估方面具有计算优势。 Tyche 信念模型可以通过定义个体类别、关于他们的概率信念（概念）以及他们之间的概率关系（角色）来简洁地创建。我们还引入了一种观察传播方法，以促进从复杂的 ADL 观察中学习。提供了 Tyche 的演示，以预测匿名消息的作者，并从匿名消息中提取作者的写作倾向。 Tyche 有潜力协助开发专家系统、知识提取系统和代理来玩不完整和概率信息的游戏。 本文介绍了一个名为Tyche的Python库，用于通过构建、查询和学习信念模型来实现不确定环境下的概率推理。 Padraig X. Lamont cs.AI,cs.LO

authors_text: Yael Zaffrani-Reznikov,Onur Afacan,Sila Kurugol,Simon Warfield,Moti Freiman
title: qDWI-Morph: Motion-compensated quantitative Diffusion-Weighted MRI analysis for fetal lung maturity assessment
title_zh: qDWI-Morph：用于评估胎肺成熟度的运动补偿定量扩散加权 MRI 分析
comment: Accepted to ECCV-MCV: https://mcv-workshop.github.io/
comments: Accepted to ECCV-MCV: https://mcv-workshop.github.io/
abstract: Quantitative analysis of fetal lung Diffusion-Weighted MRI (DWI) data shows potential in providing quantitative imaging biomarkers that indirectly reflect fetal lung maturation. However, fetal motion during the acquisition hampered quantitative analysis of the acquired DWI data and, consequently, reliable clinical utilization. We introduce qDWI-morph, an unsupervised deep-neural-network architecture for motion compensated quantitative DWI (qDWI) analysis. Our approach couples a registration sub-network with a quantitative DWI model fitting sub-network. We simultaneously estimate the qDWI parameters and the motion model by minimizing a bio-physically-informed loss function integrating a registration loss and a model fitting quality loss. We demonstrated the added-value of qDWI-morph over: 1) a baseline qDWI analysis without motion compensation and 2) a baseline deep-learning model incorporating registration loss solely. The qDWI-morph achieved a substantially improved correlation with the gestational age through in-vivo qDWI analysis of fetal lung DWI data (R-squared=0.32 vs. 0.13, 0.28). Our qDWI-morph has the potential to enable motion-compensated quantitative analysis of DWI data and to provide clinically feasible bio-markers for non-invasive fetal lung maturity assessment. Our code is available at: https://github.com/TechnionComputationalMRILab/qDWI-Morph.
summary: Quantitative analysis of fetal lung Diffusion-Weighted MRI (DWI) data shows potential in providing quantitative imaging biomarkers that indirectly reflect fetal lung maturation. However, fetal motion during the acquisition hampered quantitative analysis of the acquired DWI data and, consequently, reliable clinical utilization. Our approach couples a registration sub-network with a quantitative DWI model fitting sub-network. We simultaneously estimate the qDWI parameters and the motion model by minimizing a bio-physically-informed loss function integrating a registration loss and a model fitting quality loss. We demonstrated the added-value of qDWI-morph over: 1) a baseline qDWI analysis without motion compensation and 2) a baseline deep-learning model incorporating registration loss solely. The qDWI-morph achieved a substantially improved correlation with the gestational age through in-vivo qDWI analysis of fetal lung DWI data (R-squared=0.32 vs. 0.13, 0.28). Our qDWI-morph has the potential to enable motion-compensated quantitative analysis of DWI data and to provide clinically feasible bio-markers for non-invasive fetal lung maturity assessment. Our code is available at: https://github.com/TechnionComputationalMRILab/qDWI-Morph.
abstract_zh: 胎儿肺弥散加权 MRI (DWI) 数据的定量分析显示了提供间接反映胎儿肺成熟度的定量成像生物标志物的潜力。然而，采集过程中的胎儿运动阻碍了对采集的 DWI 数据的定量分析，从而阻碍了可靠的临床应用。我们引入了 qDWI-morph，这是一种用于运动补偿定量 DWI (qDWI) 分析的无监督深度神经网络架构。我们的方法将配准子网络与定量 DWI 模型拟合子网络结合起来。我们通过最小化集成配准损失和模型拟合质量损失的生物物理信息损失函数来同时估计 qDWI 参数和运动模型。我们展示了 qDWI-morph 的附加值：1）没有运动补偿的基线 qDWI 分析，2）仅包含配准损失的基线深度学习模型。通过对胎儿肺 DWI 数据进行体内 qDWI 分析，qDWI-morph 与胎龄的相关性得到显着改善（R 平方=0.32 与 0.13、0.28）。我们的 qDWI-morph 有潜力对 DWI 数据进行运动补偿定量分析，并为无创胎肺成熟度评估提供临床上可行的生物标志物。我们的代码位于：https://github.com/TechnionComputationalMRILab/qDWI-Morph。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为qDWI-Morph的无监督深度神经网络架构，用于运动补偿的定量弥散加权MRI（DWI）分析，以评估胎儿肺部成熟度。
AI.motivation: 胎儿在DWI数据采集过程中的运动影响了定量分析的可靠性，现有方法无法有效补偿运动导致的偏差，限制了临床应用。
AI.method: 结合配准子网络与定量DWI模型拟合子网络，通过生物物理约束的损失函数（包含配准损失和模型拟合质量损失）同时估计运动模型和qDWI参数。
AI.result: qDWI-Morph在胎儿肺部DWI数据的孕周相关性分析中表现更优（R²=0.32），显著优于无运动补偿方法（R²=0.13）和仅使用配准损失的深度学习模型（R²=0.28）。
AI.conclusion: 该方法可实现运动补偿的DWI定量分析，为无创胎儿肺部成熟度评估提供临床可行的生物标志物。

title: Representation Learning with Graph Neural Networks for Speech Emotion Recognition
title_zh: 用于语音情感识别的图神经网络表示学习
comment: AAAI 2022 Workshop on Graphs and More Complex Structures for Learning and Reasoning (GCLR)
comments: AAAI 2022 Workshop on Graphs and More Complex Structures for Learning and Reasoning (GCLR)
abstract: Learning expressive representation is crucial in deep learning. In speech emotion recognition (SER), vacuum regions or noises in the speech interfere with expressive representation learning. However, traditional RNN-based models are susceptible to such noise. Recently, Graph Neural Network (GNN) has demonstrated its effectiveness for representation learning, and we adopt this framework for SER. In particular, we propose a cosine similarity-based graph as an ideal graph structure for representation learning in SER. We present a Cosine similarity-based Graph Convolutional Network (CoGCN) that is robust to perturbation and noise. Experimental results show that our method outperforms state-of-the-art methods or provides competitive results with a significant model size reduction with only 1/30 parameters.
summary: Learning expressive representation is crucial in deep learning. In speech emotion recognition (SER), vacuum regions or noises in the speech interfere with expressive representation learning. However, traditional RNN-based models are susceptible to such noise. Recently, Graph Neural Network (GNN) has demonstrated its effectiveness for representation learning, and we adopt this framework for SER. In particular, we propose a cosine similarity-based graph as an ideal graph structure for representation learning in SER. We present a Cosine similarity-based Graph Convolutional Network (CoGCN) that is robust to perturbation and noise. Experimental results show that our method outperforms state-of-the-art methods or provides competitive results with a significant model size reduction with only 1/30 parameters.
abstract_zh: 学习表达表示对于深度学习至关重要。在语音情感识别（SER）中，语音中的真空区域或噪声会干扰表达表征学习。然而，传统的基于 RNN 的模型很容易受到此类噪声的影响。最近，图神经网络（GNN）已经证明了其对于表示学习的有效性，我们在 SER 中采用了这个框架。特别是，我们提出了一种基于余弦相似度的图作为 SER 中表示学习的理想图结构。我们提出了一种基于余弦相似度的图卷积网络（CoGCN），它对扰动和噪声具有鲁棒性。实验结果表明，我们的方法优于最先进的方法，或者提供了具有竞争力的结果，仅用 1/30 的参数即可显着减小模型大小。

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于图神经网络的语音情感识别表示学习方法，通过构建余弦相似度图结构解决传统RNN模型对噪声敏感的问题。
AI.motivation: 传统RNN模型在语音情感识别中易受噪声和真空区域干扰，而图神经网络在表示学习中表现出更强的鲁棒性。
AI.method: 设计基于余弦相似度的图卷积网络（CoGCN），构建理想图结构以增强表示学习的抗扰动能力。
AI.result: 实验表明CoGCN在保持竞争力的同时将模型参数缩减至原有规模的1/30。
AI.conclusion: CoGCN通过图结构创新有效提升了语音情感识别的鲁棒性，为轻量化模型设计提供了新思路。

search_text: Representation Learning with Graph Neural Networks for Speech Emotion Recognition 用于语音情感识别的图神经网络表示学习 Learning expressive representation is crucial in deep learning. In speech emotion recognition (SER), vacuum regions or noises in the speech interfere with expressive representation learning. However, traditional RNN-based models are susceptible to such noise. Recently, Graph Neural Network (GNN) has demonstrated its effectiveness for representation learning, and we adopt this framework for SER. In particular, we propose a cosine similarity-based graph as an ideal graph structure for representation learning in SER. We present a Cosine similarity-based Graph Convolutional Network (CoGCN) that is robust to perturbation and noise. Experimental results show that our method outperforms state-of-the-art methods or provides competitive results with a significant model size reduction with only 1/30 parameters. 学习表达表示对于深度学习至关重要。在语音情感识别（SER）中，语音中的真空区域或噪声会干扰表达表征学习。然而，传统的基于 RNN 的模型很容易受到此类噪声的影响。最近，图神经网络（GNN）已经证明了其对于表示学习的有效性，我们在 SER 中采用了这个框架。特别是，我们提出了一种基于余弦相似度的图作为 SER 中表示学习的理想图结构。我们提出了一种基于余弦相似度的图卷积网络（CoGCN），它对扰动和噪声具有鲁棒性。实验结果表明，我们的方法优于最先进的方法，或者提供了具有竞争力的结果，仅用 1/30 的参数即可显着减小模型大小。 本文提出基于图神经网络的语音情感识别表示学习方法，通过构建余弦相似度图结构解决传统RNN模型对噪声敏感的问题。 Junghun Kim,Jihie Kim cs.SD,cs.LG,eess.AS

authors_text: Peter De Roovere,Rembert Daems,Jonathan Croenen,Taoufik Bourgana,Joris de Hoog,Francis Wyffels
title: CenDerNet: Center and Curvature Representations for Render-and-Compare 6D Pose Estimation
title_zh: CenDerNet：用于渲染和比较 6D 姿态估计的中心和曲率表示
comment: 19 pages, 14 figures
comments: 19 pages, 14 figures
abstract: We introduce CenDerNet, a framework for 6D pose estimation from multi-view images based on center and curvature representations. Finding precise poses for reflective, textureless objects is a key challenge for industrial robotics. Our approach consists of three stages: First, a fully convolutional neural network predicts center and curvature heatmaps for each view; Second, center heatmaps are used to detect object instances and find their 3D centers; Third, 6D object poses are estimated using 3D centers and curvature heatmaps. By jointly optimizing poses across views using a render-and-compare approach, our method naturally handles occlusions and object symmetries. We show that CenDerNet outperforms previous methods on two industry-relevant datasets: DIMO and T-LESS.
summary: We introduce CenDerNet, a framework for 6D pose estimation from multi-view images based on center and curvature representations. Finding precise poses for reflective, textureless objects is a key challenge for industrial robotics. Our approach consists of three stages: First, a fully convolutional neural network predicts center and curvature heatmaps for each view; Second, center heatmaps are used to detect object instances and find their 3D centers; Third, 6D object poses are estimated using 3D centers and curvature heatmaps. By jointly optimizing poses across views using a render-and-compare approach, our method naturally handles occlusions and object symmetries. We show that CenDerNet outperforms previous methods on two industry-relevant datasets: DIMO and T-LESS.
abstract_zh: 我们介绍了 CenDerNet，这是一个基于中心和曲率表示的多视图图像 6D 姿态估计框架。找到反光、无纹理物体的精确姿势是工业机器人面临的主要挑战。我们的方法由三个阶段组成：首先，全卷积神经网络预测每个视图的中心和曲率热图；其次，中心热图用于检测对象实例并找到其 3D 中心；第三，使用 3D 中心和曲率热图来估计 6D 物体姿态。通过使用渲染和比较方法联合优化跨视图的姿势，我们的方法自然地处理遮挡和对象对称性。我们表明，CenDerNet 在两个行业相关数据集：DIMO 和 T-LESS 上优于以前的方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出CenDerNet框架，通过中心和曲率表示解决工业机器人中反光、无纹理物体的6D位姿估计问题。
AI.motivation: 工业场景中反光、无纹理物体的6D位姿估计存在挑战，传统方法难以准确处理遮挡和对称性问题。
AI.method: 分三阶段：1）全卷积网络预测多视角中心和曲率热图；2）通过中心热图检测实例并获取3D中心；3）结合3D中心和曲率热图估计6D位姿，采用渲染比较方法跨视角联合优化。
AI.result: 在DIMO和T-LESS数据集上优于现有方法，有效处理遮挡和对称性问题。
AI.conclusion: CenDerNet通过中心-曲率联合表示和跨视角优化，为工业场景中复杂物体的位姿估计提供了有效解决方案。

title: I Know What You Do Not Know: Knowledge Graph Embedding via Co-distillation Learning
title_zh: 我知道你不知道的：通过共蒸馏学习嵌入知识图
comment: Accepted in the 31st ACM International Conference on Information and Knowledge Management (CIKM 2022)
comments: Accepted in the 31st ACM International Conference on Information and Knowledge Management (CIKM 2022)
abstract: Knowledge graph (KG) embedding seeks to learn vector representations for entities and relations. Conventional models reason over graph structures, but they suffer from the issues of graph incompleteness and long-tail entities. Recent studies have used pre-trained language models to learn embeddings based on the textual information of entities and relations, but they cannot take advantage of graph structures. In the paper, we show empirically that these two kinds of features are complementary for KG embedding. To this end, we propose CoLE, a Co-distillation Learning method for KG Embedding that exploits the complementarity of graph structures and text information. Its graph embedding model employs Transformer to reconstruct the representation of an entity from its neighborhood subgraph. Its text embedding model uses a pre-trained language model to generate entity representations from the soft prompts of their names, descriptions, and relational neighbors. To let the two model promote each other, we propose co-distillation learning that allows them to distill selective knowledge from each other's prediction logits. In our co-distillation learning, each model serves as both a teacher and a student. Experiments on benchmark datasets demonstrate that the two models outperform their related baselines, and the ensemble method CoLE with co-distillation learning advances the state-of-the-art of KG embedding.
summary: Knowledge graph (KG) embedding seeks to learn vector representations for entities and relations. Conventional models reason over graph structures, but they suffer from the issues of graph incompleteness and long-tail entities. Recent studies have used pre-trained language models to learn embeddings based on the textual information of entities and relations, but they cannot take advantage of graph structures. In the paper, we show empirically that these two kinds of features are complementary for KG embedding. To this end, we propose CoLE, a Co-distillation Learning method for KG Embedding that exploits the complementarity of graph structures and text information. Its graph embedding model employs Transformer to reconstruct the representation of an entity from its neighborhood subgraph. Its text embedding model uses a pre-trained language model to generate entity representations from the soft prompts of their names, descriptions, and relational neighbors. To let the two model promote each other, we propose co-distillation learning that allows them to distill selective knowledge from each other's prediction logits. In our co-distillation learning, each model serves as both a teacher and a student. Experiments on benchmark datasets demonstrate that the two models outperform their related baselines, and the ensemble method CoLE with co-distillation learning advances the state-of-the-art of KG embedding.
abstract_zh: 知识图（KG）嵌入旨在学习实体和关系的向量表示。传统模型对图结构进行推理，但它们存在图不完整性和长尾实体的问题。最近的研究使用预训练的语言模型来学习基于实体和关系的文本信息的嵌入，但它们无法利用图结构。在本文中，我们凭经验证明这两种特征对于 KG 嵌入是互补的。为此，我们提出了 CoLE，一种用于 KG 嵌入的协同蒸馏学习方法，它利用了图结构和文本信息的互补性。其图嵌入模型使用 Transformer 从其邻域子图中重建实体的表示。其文本嵌入模型使用预先训练的语言模型，根据名称、描述和关系邻居的软提示生成实体表示。为了让这两个模型相互促进，我们提出了共同蒸馏学习，使它们能够从彼此的预测逻辑中提取选择性知识。在我们的共同蒸馏学习中，每个模型既充当老师又充当学生。基准数据集上的实验表明，这两个模型优于其相关基线，并且具有共蒸馏学习的集成方法 CoLE 推进了 KG 嵌入的最新技术。

AI.tldr: 提出CoLE方法，通过协同蒸馏学习结合知识图谱的图结构与文本信息进行嵌入表示。
AI.motivation: 传统知识图谱嵌入方法依赖图结构但存在图不完整和长尾实体问题，文本方法虽利用预训练语言模型却无法利用图结构，两者特征互补但未被有效结合。
AI.method: CoLE方法包含图嵌入模型（基于Transformer重构实体邻居子图）和文本嵌入模型（基于预训练语言模型生成实体表示），通过协同蒸馏学习使两者互相提炼预测逻辑知识。
AI.result: 在基准数据集上优于相关基线方法，CoLE的集成方法提升了知识图谱嵌入的最先进水平。
AI.conclusion: 协同蒸馏学习有效融合图结构与文本信息，证明两者互补性，为知识图谱嵌入提供新方向。

authors_text: Lintong Zhang,Michael Helmberger,Lanke Frank Tarimo Fu,David Wisth,Marco Camurri,Davide Scaramuzza,Maurice Fallon
title: Hilti-Oxford Dataset: A Millimetre-Accurate Benchmark for Simultaneous Localization and Mapping
title_zh: Hilti-Oxford 数据集：同步定位和测绘的毫米级精度基准
comment: Presented at IEEE Robotics and Automation (ICRA), 2023
comments: Presented at IEEE Robotics and Automation (ICRA), 2023
abstract: Simultaneous Localization and Mapping (SLAM) is being deployed in real-world applications, however many state-of-the-art solutions still struggle in many common scenarios. A key necessity in progressing SLAM research is the availability of high-quality datasets and fair and transparent benchmarking. To this end, we have created the Hilti-Oxford Dataset, to push state-of-the-art SLAM systems to their limits. The dataset has a variety of challenges ranging from sparse and regular construction sites to a 17th century neoclassical building with fine details and curved surfaces. To encourage multi-modal SLAM approaches, we designed a data collection platform featuring a lidar, five cameras, and an IMU (Inertial Measurement Unit). With the goal of benchmarking SLAM algorithms for tasks where accuracy and robustness are paramount, we implemented a novel ground truth collection method that enables our dataset to accurately measure SLAM pose errors with millimeter accuracy. To further ensure accuracy, the extrinsics of our platform were verified with a micrometer-accurate scanner, and temporal calibration was managed online using hardware time synchronization. The multi-modality and diversity of our dataset attracted a large field of academic and industrial researchers to enter the second edition of the Hilti SLAM challenge, which concluded in June 2022. The results of the challenge show that while the top three teams could achieve an accuracy of 2cm or better for some sequences, the performance dropped off in more difficult sequences.
summary: Simultaneous Localization and Mapping (SLAM) is being deployed in real-world applications, however many state-of-the-art solutions still struggle in many common scenarios. A key necessity in progressing SLAM research is the availability of high-quality datasets and fair and transparent benchmarking. To this end, we have created the Hilti-Oxford Dataset, to push state-of-the-art SLAM systems to their limits. The dataset has a variety of challenges ranging from sparse and regular construction sites to a 17th century neoclassical building with fine details and curved surfaces. To encourage multi-modal SLAM approaches, we designed a data collection platform featuring a lidar, five cameras, and an IMU (Inertial Measurement Unit). With the goal of benchmarking SLAM algorithms for tasks where accuracy and robustness are paramount, we implemented a novel ground truth collection method that enables our dataset to accurately measure SLAM pose errors with millimeter accuracy. To further ensure accuracy, the extrinsics of our platform were verified with a micrometer-accurate scanner, and temporal calibration was managed online using hardware time synchronization. The multi-modality and diversity of our dataset attracted a large field of academic and industrial researchers to enter the second edition of the Hilti SLAM challenge, which concluded in June 2022. The results of the challenge show that while the top three teams could achieve an accuracy of 2cm or better for some sequences, the performance dropped off in more difficult sequences.
abstract_zh: 同步定位和建图 (SLAM) 正在实际应用中部署，但许多最先进的解决方案在许多常见场景中仍然举步维艰。 SLAM 研究进展的一个关键必要条件是高质量数据集和公平透明的基准测试的可用性。为此，我们创建了 Hilti-Oxford 数据集，将最先进的 SLAM 系统推向极限。该数据集面临各种挑战，从稀疏且规则的建筑工地到具有精细细节和曲面的 17 世纪新古典主义建筑。为了鼓励多模态 SLAM 方法，我们设计了一个数据收集平台，配有激光雷达、五个摄像头和一个 IMU（惯性测量单元）。为了针对准确性和鲁棒性至关重要的任务对 SLAM 算法进行基准测试，我们实施了一种新颖的地面实况收集方法，使我们的数据集能够以毫米精度准确测量 SLAM 姿态误差。为了进一步确保准确性，我们平台的外部参数通过微米级精度的扫描仪进行了验证，并使用硬件时间同步在线管理时间校准。我们数据集的多模态和多样性吸引了大量学术和工业研究人员参加于 2022 年 6 月结束的第二版 Hilti SLAM 挑战赛。挑战结果表明，虽然前三名团队可以在某些序列上达到 2 厘米或更好的精度，但在更困难的序列中表现会下降。

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了Hilti-Oxford数据集，旨在为同时定位与建图（SLAM）系统提供毫米级精度的基准测试。
AI.motivation: 现有SLAM解决方案在复杂真实场景中表现不足，亟需高质量数据集和公平的基准测试以推动研究进展。
AI.method: 构建包含多种挑战场景的数据集，采用激光雷达、五台相机和IMU多模态传感器，并通过微米级扫描仪校准外参及硬件时间同步实现毫米级精度的真值采集。
AI.result: 第二届Hilti SLAM挑战赛显示，顶尖团队在部分序列中达到2厘米精度，但在更复杂场景中性能显著下降。
AI.conclusion: 数据集有效推动了SLAM算法研究，但现有方法在复杂环境下的鲁棒性仍需提升。

title: Depth-Assisted ResiDualGAN for Cross-Domain Aerial Images Semantic Segmentation
title_zh: 用于跨域航空图像语义分割的深度辅助 ResiDualGAN
abstract: Unsupervised domain adaptation (UDA) is an approach to minimizing domain gap. Generative methods are common approaches to minimizing the domain gap of aerial images which improves the performance of the downstream tasks, e.g., cross-domain semantic segmentation. For aerial images, the digital surface model (DSM) is usually available in both the source domain and the target domain. Depth information in DSM brings external information to generative models. However, little research utilizes it. In this paper, depth-assisted ResiDualGAN (DRDG) is proposed where depth supervised loss (DSL), and depth cycle consistency loss (DCCL) are used to bring depth information into the generative model. Experimental results show that DRDG reaches state-of-the-art accuracy between generative methods in cross-domain semantic segmentation tasks.
summary: Unsupervised domain adaptation (UDA) is an approach to minimizing domain gap. Generative methods are common approaches to minimizing the domain gap of aerial images which improves the performance of the downstream tasks, e.g., cross-domain semantic segmentation. For aerial images, the digital surface model (DSM) is usually available in both the source domain and the target domain. Depth information in DSM brings external information to generative models. However, little research utilizes it. In this paper, depth-assisted ResiDualGAN (DRDG) is proposed where depth supervised loss (DSL), and depth cycle consistency loss (DCCL) are used to bring depth information into the generative model. Experimental results show that DRDG reaches state-of-the-art accuracy between generative methods in cross-domain semantic segmentation tasks.
abstract_zh: 无监督域适应（UDA）是一种最小化域间隙的方法。生成方法是最小化航空图像域间隙的常用方法，可以提高下游任务的性能，例如跨域语义分割。对于航拍图像，数字表面模型（DSM）通常在源域和目标域中都可用。 DSM 中的深度信息将外部信息引入生成模型。然而，很少有研究利用它。本文提出了深度辅助 ResiDualGAN (DRDG)，其中深度监督损失 (DSL) 和深度循环一致性损失 (DCCL) 用于将深度信息带入生成模型。实验结果表明，DRDG 在跨域语义分割任务中达到了生成方法之间最先进的精度。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合深度信息的生成对抗网络（DRDG），用于解决跨域航空图像语义分割中的领域差异问题。
AI.motivation: 现有生成方法未充分利用数字表面模型（DSM）中的深度信息，而DSM在源域和目标域均可用，可为模型提供外部信息以缩小领域差距。
AI.method: 设计深度监督损失（DSL）和深度循环一致性损失（DCCL），将DSM的深度信息融入生成模型，构建深度辅助的ResiDualGAN框架。
AI.result: 实验表明，DRDG在跨域语义分割任务中达到生成方法的最先进水平。
AI.conclusion: 通过引入深度信息，DRDG有效提升了跨域航空图像语义分割的性能，验证了深度信息在领域适应中的重要性。

title: LWA-HAND: Lightweight Attention Hand for Interacting Hand Reconstruction
title_zh: LWA-HAND：用于交互手部重建的轻量级注意力手
comment: Accepted by ECCV 2022 Computer Vision for Metaverse Workshop (16 pages, 6 figures, 1 table)
comments: Accepted by ECCV 2022 Computer Vision for Metaverse Workshop (16 pages, 6 figures, 1 table)
abstract: Recent years have witnessed great success for hand reconstruction in real-time applications such as visual reality and augmented reality while interacting with two-hand reconstruction through efficient transformers is left unexplored. In this paper, we propose a method called lightweight attention hand (LWA-HAND) to reconstruct hands in low flops from a single RGB image. To solve the occlusion and interaction problem in efficient attention architectures, we propose three mobile attention modules in this paper. The first module is a lightweight feature attention module that extracts both local occlusion representation and global image patch representation in a coarse-to-fine manner. The second module is a cross image and graph bridge module which fuses image context and hand vertex. The third module is a lightweight cross-attention mechanism that uses element-wise operation for the cross-attention of two hands in linear complexity. The resulting model achieves comparable performance on the InterHand2.6M benchmark in comparison with the state-of-the-art models. Simultaneously, it reduces the flops to $0.47GFlops$ while the state-of-the-art models have heavy computations between $10GFlops$ and $20GFlops$.
summary: Recent years have witnessed great success for hand reconstruction in real-time applications such as visual reality and augmented reality while interacting with two-hand reconstruction through efficient transformers is left unexplored. In this paper, we propose a method called lightweight attention hand (LWA-HAND) to reconstruct hands in low flops from a single RGB image. To solve the occlusion and interaction problem in efficient attention architectures, we propose three mobile attention modules in this paper. The first module is a lightweight feature attention module that extracts both local occlusion representation and global image patch representation in a coarse-to-fine manner. The second module is a cross image and graph bridge module which fuses image context and hand vertex. The third module is a lightweight cross-attention mechanism that uses element-wise operation for the cross-attention of two hands in linear complexity. The resulting model achieves comparable performance on the InterHand2.6M benchmark in comparison with the state-of-the-art models. Simultaneously, it reduces the flops to $0.47GFlops$ while the state-of-the-art models have heavy computations between $10GFlops$ and $20GFlops$.
abstract_zh: 近年来，手重建在视觉现实和增强现实等实时应用中取得了巨大成功，但通过高效变压器与两只手重建进行交互尚未得到探索。在本文中，我们提出了一种称为轻量级注意力手（LWA-HAND）的方法，用于从单个 RGB 图像中以低失败率重建手。为了解决高效注意力架构中的遮挡和交互问题，我们在本文中提出了三个移动注意力模块。第一个模块是一个轻量级特征注意模块，以从粗到细的方式提取局部遮挡表示和全局图像块表示。第二个模块是跨图像和图形桥接模块，融合图像上下文和手顶点。第三个模块是一个轻量级的交叉注意力机制，它使用逐元素操作来实现线性复杂度下两只手的交叉注意力。与最先进的模型相比，所得模型在 InterHand2.6M 基准测试中实现了可比的性能。同时，它将 flops 降低至 $0.47GFlops$，而最先进的模型的计算量在 $10GFlops$ 到 $20GFlops$ 之间。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种轻量级注意机制手部重建方法LWA-HAND，用于从单张RGB图像中高效重建交互手。
AI.motivation: 尽管近年来在实时应用中手部重建取得了显著进展，但通过高效Transformer进行双手法重建尚未被充分探索，因此需要一种计算量低且能处理遮挡和交互问题的方法。
AI.method: 本文提出了三种移动注意模块：轻量级特征注意模块、跨图像和图桥模块以及轻量级交叉注意机制，以解决遮挡和交互问题。
AI.result: 该模型在InterHand2.6M基准测试中表现与现有最佳模型相当，同时将计算量降低至0.47GFlops，远低于现有模型的10GFlops到20GFlops。
AI.conclusion: LWA-HAND是一种高效的双手法重建方法，能够在保持性能的同时显著降低计算成本。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出了一种轻量级注意机制手部重建方法LWA-HAND，用于从单张RGB图像中高效重建交互手。
ai_content.motivation: 尽管近年来在实时应用中手部重建取得了显著进展，但通过高效Transformer进行双手法重建尚未被充分探索，因此需要一种计算量低且能处理遮挡和交互问题的方法。

search_text: LWA-HAND: Lightweight Attention Hand for Interacting Hand Reconstruction LWA-HAND：用于交互手部重建的轻量级注意力手 Recent years have witnessed great success for hand reconstruction in real-time applications such as visual reality and augmented reality while interacting with two-hand reconstruction through efficient transformers is left unexplored. In this paper, we propose a method called lightweight attention hand (LWA-HAND) to reconstruct hands in low flops from a single RGB image. To solve the occlusion and interaction problem in efficient attention architectures, we propose three mobile attention modules in this paper. The first module is a lightweight feature attention module that extracts both local occlusion representation and global image patch representation in a coarse-to-fine manner. The second module is a cross image and graph bridge module which fuses image context and hand vertex. The third module is a lightweight cross-attention mechanism that uses element-wise operation for the cross-attention of two hands in linear complexity. The resulting model achieves comparable performance on the InterHand2.6M benchmark in comparison with the state-of-the-art models. Simultaneously, it reduces the flops to $0.47GFlops$ while the state-of-the-art models have heavy computations between $10GFlops$ and $20GFlops$. 近年来，手重建在视觉现实和增强现实等实时应用中取得了巨大成功，但通过高效变压器与两只手重建进行交互尚未得到探索。在本文中，我们提出了一种称为轻量级注意力手（LWA-HAND）的方法，用于从单个 RGB 图像中以低失败率重建手。为了解决高效注意力架构中的遮挡和交互问题，我们在本文中提出了三个移动注意力模块。第一个模块是一个轻量级特征注意模块，以从粗到细的方式提取局部遮挡表示和全局图像块表示。第二个模块是跨图像和图形桥接模块，融合图像上下文和手顶点。第三个模块是一个轻量级的交叉注意力机制，它使用逐元素操作来实现线性复杂度下两只手的交叉注意力。与最先进的模型相比，所得模型在 InterHand2.6M 基准测试中实现了可比的性能。同时，它将 flops 降低至 $0.47GFlops$，而最先进的模型的计算量在 $10GFlops$ 到 $20GFlops$ 之间。 本文提出了一种轻量级注意机制手部重建方法LWA-HAND，用于从单张RGB图像中高效重建交互手。 Xinhan Di,Pengqian Yu cs.CV

authors_text: Yan Gu,Ziyang Men,Zheqi Shen,Yihan Sun,Zijin Wan
title: Parallel Longest Increasing Subsequence and van Emde Boas Trees
title_zh: 并行最长递增子序列和 van Emde Boas 树
comment: to be published in Proceedings of the 35th ACM Symposium on Parallelism in Algorithms and Architectures (SPAA '23)
comments: to be published in Proceedings of the 35th ACM Symposium on Parallelism in Algorithms and Architectures (SPAA '23)
abstract: This paper studies parallel algorithms for the longest increasing subsequence (LIS) problem. Let $n$ be the input size and $k$ be the LIS length of the input. Sequentially, LIS is a simple problem that can be solved using dynamic programming (DP) in $O(n\log n)$ work. However, parallelizing LIS is a long-standing challenge. We are unaware of any parallel LIS algorithm that has optimal $O(n\log n)$ work and non-trivial parallelism (i.e., $\tilde{O}(k)$ or $o(n)$ span). This paper proposes a parallel LIS algorithm that costs $O(n\log k)$ work, $\tilde{O}(k)$ span, and $O(n)$ space, and is much simpler than the previous parallel LIS algorithms. We also generalize the algorithm to a weighted version of LIS, which maximizes the weighted sum for all objects in an increasing subsequence. To achieve a better work bound for the weighted LIS algorithm, we designed parallel algorithms for the van Emde Boas (vEB) tree, which has the same structure as the sequential vEB tree, and supports work-efficient parallel batch insertion, deletion, and range queries. We also implemented our parallel LIS algorithms. Our implementation is light-weighted, efficient, and scalable. On input size $10^9$, our LIS algorithm outperforms a highly-optimized sequential algorithm (with $O(n\log k)$ cost) on inputs with $k\le 3\times 10^5$. Our algorithm is also much faster than the best existing parallel implementation by Shen et al. (2022) on all input instances.
summary: This paper studies parallel algorithms for the longest increasing subsequence (LIS) problem. Let $n$ be the input size and $k$ be the LIS length of the input. Sequentially, LIS is a simple problem that can be solved using dynamic programming (DP) in $O(n\log n)$ work. However, parallelizing LIS is a long-standing challenge. We are unaware of any parallel LIS algorithm that has optimal $O(n\log n)$ work and non-trivial parallelism (i.e., $\tilde{O}(k)$ or $o(n)$ span). This paper proposes a parallel LIS algorithm that costs $O(n\log k)$ work, $\tilde{O}(k)$ span, and $O(n)$ space, and is much simpler than the previous parallel LIS algorithms. We also generalize the algorithm to a weighted version of LIS, which maximizes the weighted sum for all objects in an increasing subsequence. To achieve a better work bound for the weighted LIS algorithm, we designed parallel algorithms for the van Emde Boas (vEB) tree, which has the same structure as the sequential vEB tree, and supports work-efficient parallel batch insertion, deletion, and range queries. We also implemented our parallel LIS algorithms. Our implementation is light-weighted, efficient, and scalable. On input size $10^9$, our LIS algorithm outperforms a highly-optimized sequential algorithm (with $O(n\log k)$ cost) on inputs with $k\le 3\times 10^5$. Our algorithm is also much faster than the best existing parallel implementation by Shen et al. (2022) on all input instances.
abstract_zh: 本文研究最长递增子序列（LIS）问题的并行算法。令 $n$ 为输入大小，$k$ 为输入的 LIS 长度。因此，LIS 是一个简单的问题，可以使用动态规划 (DP) 在 $O(n\log n)$ 工作中解决。然而，并行化 LIS 是一个长期存在的挑战。我们不知道有任何并行 LIS 算法具有最佳的 $O(n\log n)$ 工作量和非平凡的并行性（即 $\tilde{O}(k)$ 或 $o(n)$ 跨度）。本文提出了一种并行 LIS 算法，其成本为 $O(n\log k)$ 工作量、$\tilde{O}(k)$ 跨度和 $O(n)$ 空间，并且比以前的并行 LIS 算法简单得多。我们还将该算法推广到 LIS 的加权版本，它最大化递增子序列中所有对象的加权和。为了实现加权LIS算法更好的工作界限，我们设计了van Emde Boas (vEB)树的并行算法，它与顺序vEB树具有相同的结构，并且支持高效的并行批量插入、删除和范围查询。我们还实现了并行 LIS 算法。我们的实施是轻量级、高效且可扩展的。对于输入大小为 $10^9$ 的情况，我们的 LIS 算法在输入为 $k\le 3\times 10^5$ 时优于高度优化的顺序算法（成本为 $O(n\log k)$）。我们的算法也比 Shen 等人现有的最佳并行实现快得多。 (2022) 在所有输入实例上。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种高效的并行最长递增子序列（LIS）算法，并基于van Emde Boas树设计了并行操作，以优化工作量和扩展性。
AI.motivation: 尽管LIS问题有高效的顺序算法，但现有并行算法未能同时实现最优工作量（O(n log n)）和非平凡并行度（如O(k)或o(n)跨度），因此需要改进。
AI.method: 设计了一种工作量为O(n log k)、跨度为O(k)的并行LIS算法，并扩展至加权LIS问题；通过并行van Emde Boas树实现批量插入、删除和范围查询的高效操作。
AI.result: 在输入规模10^9的测试中，算法优于高度优化的顺序算法（当k≤3×10^5时）和现有最佳并行实现（Shen等，2022）。
AI.conclusion: 该算法为并行LIS和加权LIS提供了更优的理论界和实际性能，具有轻量级、高效和可扩展的特点。

authors_text: Jiachen Sun,Weili Nie,Zhiding Yu,Z. Morley Mao,Chaowei Xiao
title: PointDP: Diffusion-driven Purification against Adversarial Attacks on 3D Point Cloud Recognition
title_zh: PointDP：针对 3D 点云识别的对抗性攻击的扩散驱动净化
abstract: 3D Point cloud is becoming a critical data representation in many real-world applications like autonomous driving, robotics, and medical imaging. Although the success of deep learning further accelerates the adoption of 3D point clouds in the physical world, deep learning is notorious for its vulnerability to adversarial attacks. In this work, we first identify that the state-of-the-art empirical defense, adversarial training, has a major limitation in applying to 3D point cloud models due to gradient obfuscation. We further propose PointDP, a purification strategy that leverages diffusion models to defend against 3D adversarial attacks. We extensively evaluate PointDP on six representative 3D point cloud architectures, and leverage 10+ strong and adaptive attacks to demonstrate its lower-bound robustness. Our evaluation shows that PointDP achieves significantly better robustness than state-of-the-art purification methods under strong attacks. Results of certified defenses on randomized smoothing combined with PointDP will be included in the near future.
summary: 3D Point cloud is becoming a critical data representation in many real-world applications like autonomous driving, robotics, and medical imaging. Although the success of deep learning further accelerates the adoption of 3D point clouds in the physical world, deep learning is notorious for its vulnerability to adversarial attacks. In this work, we first identify that the state-of-the-art empirical defense, adversarial training, has a major limitation in applying to 3D point cloud models due to gradient obfuscation. We further propose PointDP, a purification strategy that leverages diffusion models to defend against 3D adversarial attacks. We extensively evaluate PointDP on six representative 3D point cloud architectures, and leverage 10+ strong and adaptive attacks to demonstrate its lower-bound robustness. Our evaluation shows that PointDP achieves significantly better robustness than state-of-the-art purification methods under strong attacks. Results of certified defenses on randomized smoothing combined with PointDP will be included in the near future.
abstract_zh: 3D 点云正在成为自动驾驶、机器人和医学成像等许多现实应用中的关键数据表示。尽管深度学习的成功进一步加速了 3D 点云在物理世界中的采用，但深度学习因其容易受到对抗性攻击而臭名昭著。在这项工作中，我们首先发现，由于梯度混淆，最先进的经验防御（对抗性训练）在应用于 3D 点云模型时存在主要限制。我们进一步提出了 PointDP，一种利用扩散模型来防御 3D 对抗性攻击的净化策略。我们在六种代表性的 3D 点云架构上广泛评估了 PointDP，并利用 10 多种强大的自适应攻击来证明其下界鲁棒性。我们的评估表明，PointDP 在强攻击下比最先进的净化方法具有明显更好的鲁棒性。随机平滑结合 PointDP 的认证防御结果将在不久的将来包含在内。

AI.tldr: 本文提出PointDP方法，利用扩散模型净化对抗样本，提升3D点云识别模型的鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 现有对抗训练方法因梯度混淆难以有效防御3D点云模型的对抗攻击，需探索新净化策略。
AI.method: 设计基于扩散模型的PointDP净化框架，通过生成对抗样本的扩散过程实现特征修复。
AI.result: 在6种3D架构和10+攻击方法测试中，PointDP的鲁棒性显著优于现有净化方法。
AI.conclusion: PointDP有效缓解对抗攻击问题，未来将结合随机平滑实现认证防御。

We extensively evaluate PointDP on six representative 3D point cloud architectures, and leverage 10+ strong and adaptive attacks to demonstrate its lower-bound robustness. Our evaluation shows that PointDP achieves significantly better robustness than state-of-the-art purification methods under strong attacks. Results of certified defenses on randomized smoothing combined with PointDP will be included in the near future. 3D 点云正在成为自动驾驶、机器人和医学成像等许多现实应用中的关键数据表示。尽管深度学习的成功进一步加速了 3D 点云在物理世界中的采用，但深度学习因其容易受到对抗性攻击而臭名昭著。在这项工作中，我们首先发现，由于梯度混淆，最先进的经验防御（对抗性训练）在应用于 3D 点云模型时存在主要限制。我们进一步提出了 PointDP，一种利用扩散模型来防御 3D 对抗性攻击的净化策略。我们在六种代表性的 3D 点云架构上广泛评估了 PointDP，并利用 10 多种强大的自适应攻击来证明其下界鲁棒性。我们的评估表明，PointDP 在强攻击下比最先进的净化方法具有明显更好的鲁棒性。随机平滑结合 PointDP 的认证防御结果将在不久的将来包含在内。 本文提出PointDP方法，利用扩散模型净化对抗样本，提升3D点云识别模型的鲁棒性。 Jiachen Sun,Weili Nie,Zhiding Yu,Z. Morley Mao,Chaowei Xiao cs.CV,cs.CR,cs.LG

title: Forensic Dental Age Estimation Using Modified Deep Learning Neural Network
title_zh: 使用改进的深度学习神经网络进行法医牙齿年龄估计
comment: 18 pages, 10 figures, 3 tables
comments: 18 pages, 10 figures, 3 tables
abstract: Dental age is one of the most reliable methods to identify an individual's age. By using dental panoramic radiography (DPR) images, physicians and pathologists in forensic sciences try to establish the chronological age of individuals with no valid legal records or registered patients. The current methods in practice demand intensive labor, time, and qualified experts. The development of deep learning algorithms in the field of medical image processing has improved the sensitivity of predicting truth values while reducing the processing speed of imaging time. This study proposed an automated approach to estimate the forensic ages of individuals ranging in age from 8 to 68 using 1,332 DPR images. Initially, experimental analyses were performed with the transfer learning-based models, including InceptionV3, DenseNet201, EfficientNetB4, MobileNetV2, VGG16, and ResNet50V2; and accordingly, the best-performing model, InceptionV3, was modified, and a new neural network model was developed. Reducing the number of the parameters already available in the developed model architecture resulted in a faster and more accurate dental age estimation. The performance metrics of the results attained were as follows: mean absolute error (MAE) was 3.13, root mean square error (RMSE) was 4.77, and correlation coefficient R$^2$ was 87%. It is conceivable to propose the new model as potentially dependable and practical ancillary equipment in forensic sciences and dental medicine.

Reducing the number of the parameters already available in the developed model architecture resulted in a faster and more accurate dental age estimation. abstract_zh: 牙龄是确定个人年龄的最可靠方法之一。通过使用牙科全景放射成像 (DPR) 图像，法医学领域的医生和病理学家尝试确定没有有效法律记录或注册患者的个人的实际年龄。目前的实践方法需要大量的劳动力、时间和合格的专家。深度学习算法在医学图像处理领域的发展，提高了预测真值的灵敏度，同时降低了成像时间的处理速度。这项研究提出了一种使用 1,332 张 DPR 图像来估计 8 岁至 68 岁个体法医年龄的自动化方法。最初，使用基于迁移学习的模型进行实验分析，包括InceptionV3、DenseNet201、EfficientNetB4、MobileNetV2、VGG16和ResNet50V2；因此，对性能最好的模型InceptionV3进行了修改，并开发了新的神经网络模型。减少开发的模型架构中已有的参数数量可以更快、更准确地估计牙龄。所获得结果的性能指标如下：平均绝对误差（MAE）为3.13，均方根误差（RMSE）为4.77，相关系数R$^2$为87%。可以想象，将新模型作为法医学和牙科医学中潜在可靠且实用的辅助设备提出。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于改进深度学习神经网络的法医牙齿年龄估计方法。
AI.motivation: 传统的牙齿年龄估计方法需要大量的人力、时间和专业人员，效率较低。深度学习在医学图像处理中的发展为提高预测敏感性和减少处理时间提供了可能。
AI.method: 研究使用了1332张牙齿全景X光图像，基于迁移学习模型（如InceptionV3、DenseNet201等）进行实验分析，并对表现最佳的InceptionV3模型进行了改进，开发了一个新的神经网络模型。
AI.result: 改进后的模型在年龄估计中表现出良好的性能，均方误差（MAE）为3.13，均方根误差（RMSE）为4.77，相关系数R²为87%。
AI.conclusion: 新模型有望成为法医科学和牙科医学中可靠且实用的辅助工具。

authors_text: Aditya Agarwal,Bipasha Sen,Rudrabha Mukhopadhyay,Vinay Namboodiri,C. V Jawahar
title: Towards MOOCs for Lipreading: Using Synthetic Talking Heads to Train Humans in Lipreading at Scale
title_zh: 走向唇读 MOOC：使用合成说话头大规模训练人类唇读
comment: Accepted at WACV 2023
comments: Accepted at WACV 2023
abstract: Many people with some form of hearing loss consider lipreading as their primary mode of day-to-day communication. However, finding resources to learn or improve one's lipreading skills can be challenging. This is further exacerbated in the COVID19 pandemic due to restrictions on direct interactions with peers and speech therapists. Today, online MOOCs platforms like Coursera and Udemy have become the most effective form of training for many types of skill development. However, online lipreading resources are scarce as creating such resources is an extensive process needing months of manual effort to record hired actors. Because of the manual pipeline, such platforms are also limited in vocabulary, supported languages, accents, and speakers and have a high usage cost. In this work, we investigate the possibility of replacing real human talking videos with synthetically generated videos. Synthetic data can easily incorporate larger vocabularies, variations in accent, and even local languages and many speakers. We propose an end-to-end automated pipeline to develop such a platform using state-of-the-art talking head video generator networks, text-to-speech models, and computer vision techniques. We then perform an extensive human evaluation using carefully thought out lipreading exercises to validate the quality of our designed platform against the existing lipreading platforms. Our studies concretely point toward the potential of our approach in developing a large-scale lipreading MOOC platform that can impact millions of people with hearing loss.

We then perform an extensive human evaluation using carefully thought out lipreading exercises to validate the quality of our designed platform against the existing lipreading platforms. Our studies concretely point toward the potential of our approach in developing a large-scale lipreading MOOC platform that can impact millions of people with hearing loss.
abstract_zh: 许多患有某种形式听力损失的人将唇读视为日常交流的主要方式。然而，寻找资源来学习或提高唇读技能可能具有挑战性。由于与同龄人和言语治疗师的直接互动受到限制，这种情况在新冠病毒大流行中进一步加剧。如今，Coursera 和 Udemy 等在线 MOOC 平台已成为多种技能发展最有效的培训形式。然而，在线唇读资源稀缺，因为创建此类资源是一个广泛的过程，需要数月的手动工作来记录雇用的演员。由于采用人工流程，此类平台在词汇量、支持的语言、口音和说话人方面也受到限制，使用成本较高。在这项工作中，我们研究了用合成生成的视频替换真实人类谈话视频的可能性。合成数据可以轻松包含更大的词汇量、口音变化，甚至本地语言和许多说话者。我们提出了一个端到端的自动化管道，使用最先进的头部说话视频生成器网络、文本到语音模型和计算机视觉技术来开发这样的平台。然后，我们使用经过深思熟虑的唇读练习进行广泛的人类评估，以根据现有唇读平台验证我们设计的平台的质量。我们的研究具体表明了我们的方法在开发大规模唇读 MOOC 平台方面的潜力，该平台可以影响数百万听力损失者。

AI.tldr: 开发一个利用合成虚拟人视频的大规模唇读MOOC平台，以解决现有资源不足的问题
AI.motivation: 听力障碍者缺乏有效唇读学习资源，传统方法制作成本高且内容受限，需通过合成数据解决这些问题
AI.method: 采用端到端自动化流程，结合先进虚拟人生成技术、文本转语音模型及计算机视觉技术生成合成视频
AI.result: 人类评估证实合成平台在质量上可与现有平台媲美，具备大规模推广潜力
AI.conclusion: 该方法能有效构建大规模唇读教育平台，为听力障碍者提供可扩展、低成本的学习资源

authors_text: Xuelin Yang,Louis Abraham,Sejin Kim,Petr Smirnov,Feng Ruan,Benjamin Haibe-Kains,Robert Tibshirani
title: FastCPH: Efficient Survival Analysis for Neural Networks
title_zh: FastCPH：神经网络的高效生存分析
abstract: The Cox proportional hazards model is a canonical method in survival analysis for prediction of the life expectancy of a patient given clinical or genetic covariates -- it is a linear model in its original form. In recent years, several methods have been proposed to generalize the Cox model to neural networks, but none of these are both numerically correct and computationally efficient. We propose FastCPH, a new method that runs in linear time and supports both the standard Breslow and Efron methods for tied events. We also demonstrate the performance of FastCPH combined with LassoNet, a neural network that provides interpretability through feature sparsity, on survival datasets. The final procedure is efficient, selects useful covariates and outperforms existing CoxPH approaches.
summary: The Cox proportional hazards model is a canonical method in survival analysis for prediction of the life expectancy of a patient given clinical or genetic covariates -- it is a linear model in its original form. In recent years, several methods have been proposed to generalize the Cox model to neural networks, but none of these are both numerically correct and computationally efficient. We propose FastCPH, a new method that runs in linear time and supports both the standard Breslow and Efron methods for tied events. We also demonstrate the performance of FastCPH combined with LassoNet, a neural network that provides interpretability through feature sparsity, on survival datasets. The final procedure is efficient, selects useful covariates and outperforms existing CoxPH approaches.
abstract_zh: Cox 比例风险模型是生存分析中的一种规范方法，用于在给定临床或遗传协变量的情况下预测患者的预期寿命 - 它的原始形式是线性模型。近年来，人们提出了几种将 Cox 模型推广到神经网络的方法，但这些方法都无法在数值上正确且计算高效。我们提出了 FastCPH，这是一种以线性时间运行的新方法，支持用于并列事件的标准 Breslow 和 Efron 方法。我们还在生存数据集上展示了 FastCPH 与 LassoNet（一种通过特征稀疏性提供可解释性的神经网络）相结合的性能。最终程序非常高效，选择有用的协变量并且优于现有的 CoxPH 方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为FastCPH的高效神经网络生存分析方法，解决了传统Cox模型在神经网络中的数值正确性和计算效率问题。
AI.motivation: 传统Cox比例风险模型虽经典但为线性形式，现有神经网络扩展方法存在数值不准确和计算低效问题，需更优解决方案。
AI.method: 开发FastCPH方法，实现线性时间复杂度并兼容Breslow/Efron处理平局事件的方式，结合LassoNet实现特征稀疏性与可解释性。
AI.result: 实验显示FastCPH在生存数据集上效率更高，能有效选择关键协变量，且性能优于现有CoxPH方法。
AI.conclusion: FastCPH通过线性计算与特征选择机制，为神经网络生存分析提供了数值正确且高效的新型解决方案。

authors_text: Aditya Agarwal,Bipasha Sen,Rudrabha Mukhopadhyay,Vinay Namboodiri,C. V. Jawahar
title: FaceOff: A Video-to-Video Face Swapping System
title_zh: FaceOff：视频到视频换脸系统
comment: Accepted at WACV 2023
comments: Accepted at WACV 2023
abstract: Doubles play an indispensable role in the movie industry. They take the place of the actors in dangerous stunt scenes or scenes where the same actor plays multiple characters. The double's face is later replaced with the actor's face and expressions manually using expensive CGI technology, costing millions of dollars and taking months to complete. An automated, inexpensive, and fast way can be to use face-swapping techniques that aim to swap an identity from a source face video (or an image) to a target face video. However, such methods cannot preserve the source expressions of the actor important for the scene's context. To tackle this challenge, we introduce video-to-video (V2V) face-swapping, a novel task of face-swapping that can preserve (1) the identity and expressions of the source (actor) face video and (2) the background and pose of the target (double) video. We propose FaceOff, a V2V face-swapping system that operates by learning a robust blending operation to merge two face videos following the constraints above. It reduces the videos to a quantized latent space and then blends them in the reduced space. FaceOff is trained in a self-supervised manner and robustly tackles the non-trivial challenges of V2V face-swapping. As shown in the experimental section, FaceOff significantly outperforms alternate approaches qualitatively and quantitatively.
summary: Doubles play an indispensable role in the movie industry. They take the place of the actors in dangerous stunt scenes or scenes where the same actor plays multiple characters. The double's face is later replaced with the actor's face and expressions manually using expensive CGI technology, costing millions of dollars and taking months to complete. An automated, inexpensive, and fast way can be to use face-swapping techniques that aim to swap an identity from a source face video (or an image) to a target face video. However, such methods cannot preserve the source expressions of the actor important for the scene's context. To tackle this challenge, we introduce video-to-video (V2V) face-swapping, a novel task of face-swapping that can preserve (1) the identity and expressions of the source (actor) face video and (2) the background and pose of the target (double) video. We propose FaceOff, a V2V face-swapping system that operates by learning a robust blending operation to merge two face videos following the constraints above. It reduces the videos to a quantized latent space and then blends them in the reduced space. FaceOff is trained in a self-supervised manner and robustly tackles the non-trivial challenges of V2V face-swapping. As shown in the experimental section, FaceOff significantly outperforms alternate approaches qualitatively and quantitatively.
abstract_zh: 双打在电影界扮演着不可或缺的角色。他们在危险的特技场景或同一演员扮演多个角色的场景中代替演员。随后，利用昂贵的 CGI 技术，将替身的脸部和表情手动替换为演员的脸部和表情，耗资数百万美元，耗时数月才能完成。一种自动化、廉价且快速的方法可以是使用面部交换技术，该技术旨在将身份从源面部视频（或图像）交换到目标面部视频。然而，此类方法无法保留对场景上下文很重要的演员的源表达。为了应对这一挑战，我们引入了视频到视频（V2V）面部交换，这是一种新颖的面部交换任务，可以保留（1）源（演员）面部视频的身份和表情以及（2）目标（双）视频的背景和姿势。我们提出了 FaceOff，这是一种 V2V 面部交换系统，它通过学习鲁棒的混合操作来按照上述约束合并两个面部视频。它将视频减少到量化的潜在空间，然后将它们混合在减少的空间中。 FaceOff 以自我监督的方式进行训练，能够稳健地解决 V2V 换脸的重大挑战。如实验部分所示，FaceOff 在质量和数量上都显着优于其他方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为FaceOff的视频到视频（V2V）换脸系统，能够在保留源视频身份和表情以及目标视频背景和姿态的前提下，实现高质量的换脸。
AI.motivation: 传统电影行业中使用CGI技术进行换脸成本高昂且耗时，而现有换脸方法无法有效保留源视频的表情信息，因此需要一种自动化、低成本且高效的解决方案。
AI.method: FaceOff通过将视频映射到量化后的潜在空间，并在该空间中学习鲁棒的融合操作，结合自监督训练方式实现源身份与目标姿态的融合。
AI.result: 实验表明，FaceOff在定性和定量评估中均显著优于现有方法，能够生成更自然且符合场景语义的换脸结果。
AI.conclusion: FaceOff为视频换脸任务提供了新颖且高效的解决方案，有效平衡了身份保留、表情保真与目标姿态适配的挑战。

authors_text: Xue-Feng Zhu,Tianyang Xu,Zhangyong Tang,Zucheng Wu,Haodong Liu,Xiao Yang,Xiao-Jun Wu,Josef Kittler
title: RGBD1K: A Large-scale Dataset and Benchmark for RGB-D Object Tracking
title_zh: RGBD1K：RGB-D 对象跟踪的大规模数据集和基准
abstract: RGB-D object tracking has attracted considerable attention recently, achieving promising performance thanks to the symbiosis between visual and depth channels. However, given a limited amount of annotated RGB-D tracking data, most state-of-the-art RGB-D trackers are simple extensions of high-performance RGB-only trackers, without fully exploiting the underlying potential of the depth channel in the offline training stage. To address the dataset deficiency issue, a new RGB-D dataset named RGBD1K is released in this paper. The RGBD1K contains 1,050 sequences with about 2.5M frames in total. To demonstrate the benefits of training on a larger RGB-D data set in general, and RGBD1K in particular, we develop a transformer-based RGB-D tracker, named SPT, as a baseline for future visual object tracking studies using the new dataset. The results, of extensive experiments using the SPT tracker emonstrate the potential of the RGBD1K dataset to improve the performance of RGB-D tracking, inspiring future developments of effective tracker designs. The dataset and codes will be available on the project homepage: https://github.com/xuefeng-zhu5/RGBD1K.
summary: RGB-D object tracking has attracted considerable attention recently, achieving promising performance thanks to the symbiosis between visual and depth channels. However, given a limited amount of annotated RGB-D tracking data, most state-of-the-art RGB-D trackers are simple extensions of high-performance RGB-only trackers, without fully exploiting the underlying potential of the depth channel in the offline training stage. To address the dataset deficiency issue, a new RGB-D dataset named RGBD1K is released in this paper. The RGBD1K contains 1,050 sequences with about 2.5M frames in total. To demonstrate the benefits of training on a larger RGB-D data set in general, and RGBD1K in particular, we develop a transformer-based RGB-D tracker, named SPT, as a baseline for future visual object tracking studies using the new dataset. The results, of extensive experiments using the SPT tracker emonstrate the potential of the RGBD1K dataset to improve the performance of RGB-D tracking, inspiring future developments of effective tracker designs. The dataset and codes will be available on the project homepage: https://github.com/xuefeng-zhu5/RGBD1K.
abstract_zh: RGB-D 对象跟踪最近引起了相当大的关注，由于视觉通道和深度通道之间的共生，取得了可喜的性能。然而，鉴于带注释的 RGB-D 跟踪数据数量有限，大多数最先进的 RGB-D 跟踪器都是高性能 RGB 跟踪器的简单扩展，而没有充分利用离线训练阶段深度通道的潜在潜力。为了解决数据集不足的问题，本文发布了一个名为 RGBD1K 的新 RGB-D 数据集。 RGBD1K 包含 1,050 个序列，总共约 250 万帧。为了展示在更大的 RGB-D 数据集（特别是 RGBD1K）上进行训练的好处，我们开发了一种基于 Transformer 的 RGB-D 跟踪器，名为 SPT，作为未来使用新数据集的视觉对象跟踪研究的基线。使用 SPT 跟踪器进行的大量实验的结果证明了 RGBD1K 数据集在提高 RGB-D 跟踪性能方面的潜力，激发了有效跟踪器设计的未来发展。数据集和代码将在项目主页上提供：https://github.com/xuefeng-zhu5/RGBD1K。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一个大规模RGB-D对象跟踪数据集RGBD1K，并开发基于Transformer的基准跟踪器SPT，以推动RGB-D跟踪研究。
AI.motivation: 现有RGB-D跟踪方法未充分挖掘深度信息潜力，且缺乏高质量标注数据集制约算法发展。
AI.method: 构建包含1050个序列的RGBD1K数据集，设计基于Transformer架构的SPT跟踪器作为基准模型。
AI.result: 实验表明RGBD1K数据集能有效提升跟踪性能，验证了深度信息与大规模数据的重要性。
AI.conclusion: RGBD1K数据集和SPT基准为未来RGB-D跟踪算法研究提供了重要资源和评价标准。

search_text: RGBD1K: A Large-scale Dataset and Benchmark for RGB-D Object Tracking RGBD1K：RGB-D 对象跟踪的大规模数据集和基准 RGB-D object tracking has attracted considerable attention recently, achieving promising performance thanks to the symbiosis between visual and depth channels. However, given a limited amount of annotated RGB-D tracking data, most state-of-the-art RGB-D trackers are simple extensions of high-performance RGB-only trackers, without fully exploiting the underlying potential of the depth channel in the offline training stage. To address the dataset deficiency issue, a new RGB-D dataset named RGBD1K is released in this paper. The RGBD1K contains 1,050 sequences with about 2.5M frames in total. To demonstrate the benefits of training on a larger RGB-D data set in general, and RGBD1K in particular, we develop a transformer-based RGB-D tracker, named SPT, as a baseline for future visual object tracking studies using the new dataset. The results, of extensive experiments using the SPT tracker emonstrate the potential of the RGBD1K dataset to improve the performance of RGB-D tracking, inspiring future developments of effective tracker designs. The dataset and codes will be available on the project homepage: https://github.com/xuefeng-zhu5/RGBD1K. RGB-D 对象跟踪最近引起了相当大的关注，由于视觉通道和深度通道之间的共生，取得了可喜的性能。然而，鉴于带注释的 RGB-D 跟踪数据数量有限，大多数最先进的 RGB-D 跟踪器都是高性能 RGB 跟踪器的简单扩展，而没有充分利用离线训练阶段深度通道的潜在潜力。为了解决数据集不足的问题，本文发布了一个名为 RGBD1K 的新 RGB-D 数据集。 RGBD1K 包含 1,050 个序列，总共约 250 万帧。为了展示在更大的 RGB-D 数据集（特别是 RGBD1K）上进行训练的好处，我们开发了一种基于 Transformer 的 RGB-D 跟踪器，名为 SPT，作为未来使用新数据集的视觉对象跟踪研究的基线。使用 SPT 跟踪器进行的大量实验的结果证明了 RGBD1K 数据集在提高 RGB-D 跟踪性能方面的潜力，激发了有效跟踪器设计的未来发展。数据集和代码将在项目主页上提供：https://github.com/xuefeng-zhu5/RGBD1K。 本文提出一个大规模RGB-D对象跟踪数据集RGBD1K，并开发基于Transformer的基准跟踪器SPT，以推动RGB-D跟踪研究。 Xue-Feng Zhu,Tianyang Xu,Zhangyong Tang,Zucheng Wu,Haodong Liu,Xiao Yang,Xiao-Jun Wu,Josef Kittler cs.CV

title: JVLDLoc: a Joint Optimization of Visual-LiDAR Constraints and Direction Priors for Localization in Driving Scenario
title_zh: JVLDLoc：视觉激光雷达约束和方向先验的联合优化，用于驾驶场景中的定位
comment: 28 pages (including supplementary material), accepted by PRCV 2022
comments: 28 pages (including supplementary material), accepted by PRCV 2022
abstract: The ability for a moving agent to localize itself in environment is the basic demand for emerging applications, such as autonomous driving, etc. Many existing methods based on multiple sensors still suffer from drift. We propose a scheme that fuses map prior and vanishing points from images, which can establish an energy term that is only constrained on rotation, called the direction projection error. Then we embed these direction priors into a visual-LiDAR SLAM system that integrates camera and LiDAR measurements in a tightly-coupled way at backend. Specifically, our method generates visual reprojection error and point to Implicit Moving Least Square(IMLS) surface of scan constraints, and solves them jointly along with direction projection error at global optimization. Experiments on KITTI, KITTI-360 and Oxford Radar Robotcar show that we achieve lower localization error or Absolute Pose Error (APE) than prior map, which validates our method is effective.
summary: The ability for a moving agent to localize itself in environment is the basic demand for emerging applications, such as autonomous driving, etc. Many existing methods based on multiple sensors still suffer from drift. We propose a scheme that fuses map prior and vanishing points from images, which can establish an energy term that is only constrained on rotation, called the direction projection error. Then we embed these direction priors into a visual-LiDAR SLAM system that integrates camera and LiDAR measurements in a tightly-coupled way at backend. Specifically, our method generates visual reprojection error and point to Implicit Moving Least Square(IMLS) surface of scan constraints, and solves them jointly along with direction projection error at global optimization. Experiments on KITTI, KITTI-360 and Oxford Radar Robotcar show that we achieve lower localization error or Absolute Pose Error (APE) than prior map, which validates our method is effective.
abstract_zh: 移动代理在环境中定位自身的能力是自动驾驶等新兴应用的基本需求。许多基于多个传感器的现有方法仍然存在漂移问题。我们提出了一种融合图像中的地图先验点和消失点的方案，该方案可以建立仅受旋转约束的能量项，称为方向投影误差。然后，我们将这些方向先验嵌入到视觉 LiDAR SLAM 系统中，该系统在后端以紧密耦合的方式集成相机和 LiDAR 测量。具体来说，我们的方法生成视觉重投影误差并指向扫描约束的隐式移动最小二乘（IMLS）表面，并在全局优化时与方向投影误差一起解决它们。在 KITTI、KITTI-360 和 Oxford Radar Robotcar 上的实验表明，我们实现了比先前地图更低的定位误差或绝对位姿误差（APE），这验证了我们的方法是有效的。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种融合视觉-激光雷达约束和方向先验的联合优化方法，用于提升驾驶场景中的定位精度。
AI.motivation: 现有基于多传感器的定位方法仍存在漂移问题，需通过引入方向先验（如地图先验和图像消失点）来增强鲁棒性。
AI.method: 构建仅约束旋转的方向投影误差项，将其嵌入紧耦合的视觉-激光雷达SLAM系统，在后端联合优化视觉重投影误差、点到IMLS曲面约束及方向投影误差。
AI.result: 在KITTI、KITTI-360和Oxford Radar Robotcar数据集上，定位误差和绝对位姿误差（APE）均低于传统方法。
AI.conclusion: 联合优化方向先验与传感器约束能有效提升定位精度，验证了方法的有效性。

authors_text: Binu Abeysinghe,Jesin James,Catherine I. Watson,Felix Marattukalam
title: Visualising Model Training via Vowel Space for Text-To-Speech Systems
title_zh: 通过文本转语音系统的元音空间可视化模型训练
comment: Accepted to Interspeech 2022
comments: Accepted to Interspeech 2022
abstract: With the recent developments in speech synthesis via machine learning, this study explores incorporating linguistics knowledge to visualise and evaluate synthetic speech model training. If changes to the first and second formant (in turn, the vowel space) can be seen and heard in synthetic speech, this knowledge can inform speech synthesis technology developers. A speech synthesis model trained on a large General American English database was fine-tuned into a New Zealand English voice to identify if the changes in the vowel space of synthetic speech could be seen and heard. The vowel spaces at different intervals during the fine-tuning were analysed to determine if the model learned the New Zealand English vowel space. Our findings based on vowel space analysis show that we can visualise how a speech synthesis model learns the vowel space of the database it is trained on. Perception tests confirmed that humans could perceive when a speech synthesis model has learned characteristics of the speech database it is training on. Using the vowel space as an intermediary evaluation helps understand what sounds are to be added to the training database and build speech synthesis models based on linguistics knowledge.
summary: With the recent developments in speech synthesis via machine learning, this study explores incorporating linguistics knowledge to visualise and evaluate synthetic speech model training. If changes to the first and second formant (in turn, the vowel space) can be seen and heard in synthetic speech, this knowledge can inform speech synthesis technology developers. A speech synthesis model trained on a large General American English database was fine-tuned into a New Zealand English voice to identify if the changes in the vowel space of synthetic speech could be seen and heard. The vowel spaces at different intervals during the fine-tuning were analysed to determine if the model learned the New Zealand English vowel space. Our findings based on vowel space analysis show that we can visualise how a speech synthesis model learns the vowel space of the database it is trained on. Perception tests confirmed that humans could perceive when a speech synthesis model has learned characteristics of the speech database it is training on. Using the vowel space as an intermediary evaluation helps understand what sounds are to be added to the training database and build speech synthesis models based on linguistics knowledge.
abstract_zh: 随着机器学习语音合成的最新发展，本研究探索结合语言学知识来可视化和评估合成语音模型训练。如果可以在合成语音中看到和听到第一和第二共振峰（进而元音空间）的变化，则这些知识可以为语音合成技术开发人员提供信息。在大型通用美国英语数据库上训练的语音合成模型被微调为新西兰英语语音，以确定是否可以看到和听到合成语音的元音空间的变化。分析微调期间不同间隔的元音空间，以确定模型是否学习了新西兰英语元音空间。我们基于元音空间分析的发现表明，我们可以可视化语音合成模型如何学习其所训练的数据库的元音空间。感知测试证实，当语音合成模型了解其正在训练的语音数据库的特征时，人类可以感知。使用元音空间作为中介评估有助于理解哪些声音需要添加到训练数据库中，并基于语言学知识构建语音合成模型。

AI.tldr: 本论文通过元音空间可视化分析文本到语音（TTS）系统的模型训练过程，探索语言学知识在合成语音评估中的应用。
AI.motivation: 随着机器学习在语音合成中的发展，需结合语言学知识直观评估模型训练效果，尤其关注元音空间（由第一、第二共振峰定义）的变化是否可被观察和感知。
AI.method: 基于大规模美式英语数据库训练语音合成模型，并微调为新西兰英语语音。通过分析微调过程中不同阶段的元音空间，判断模型是否学习到目标语言的元音特征，并通过人类感知测试验证结果。
AI.result: 元音空间分析显示模型训练过程中能可视化学习目标数据库的元音特征，且人类听者可感知模型是否已习得目标语音数据库的特性。
AI.conclusion: 元音空间可作为中介评估工具，帮助理解训练数据需求并基于语言学知识构建更精准的语音合成模型。
