Cichy,Gemma Roig cs.CV,cs.AI,q-bio.NC

authors_text: Jiawei Liu,Jing Zhang,Ruikai Cui,Kaihao Zhang,Weihao Li,Nick Barnes
title: Generalised Co-Salient Object Detection
title_zh: 广义共显着物体检测
abstract: We propose a new setting that relaxes an assumption in the conventional Co-Salient Object Detection (CoSOD) setting by allowing the presence of "noisy images" which do not show the shared co-salient object. We call this new setting Generalised Co-Salient Object Detection (GCoSOD). We propose a novel random sampling based Generalised CoSOD Training (GCT) strategy to distill the awareness of inter-image absence of co-salient objects into CoSOD models. It employs a Diverse Sampling Self-Supervised Learning (DS3L) that, in addition to the provided supervised co-salient label, introduces additional self-supervised labels for noisy images (being null, that no co-salient object is present). Further, the random sampling process inherent in GCT enables the generation of a high-quality uncertainty map highlighting potential false-positive predictions at instance level. To evaluate the performance of CoSOD models under the GCoSOD setting, we propose two new testing datasets, namely CoCA-Common and CoCA-Zero, where a common salient object is partially present in the former and completely absent in the latter. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our proposed method significantly improves the performance of CoSOD models in terms of the performance under the GCoSOD setting as well as the model calibration degrees.
summary: We propose a new setting that relaxes an assumption in the conventional Co-Salient Object Detection (CoSOD) setting by allowing the presence of "noisy images" which do not show the shared co-salient object. We call this new setting Generalised Co-Salient Object Detection (GCoSOD). We propose a novel random sampling based Generalised CoSOD Training (GCT) strategy to distill the awareness of inter-image absence of co-salient objects into CoSOD models. It employs a Diverse Sampling Self-Supervised Learning (DS3L) that, in addition to the provided supervised co-salient label, introduces additional self-supervised labels for noisy images (being null, that no co-salient object is present). Further, the random sampling process inherent in GCT enables the generation of a high-quality uncertainty map highlighting potential false-positive predictions at instance level. To evaluate the performance of CoSOD models under the GCoSOD setting, we propose two new testing datasets, namely CoCA-Common and CoCA-Zero, where a common salient object is partially present in the former and completely absent in the latter. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our proposed method significantly improves the performance of CoSOD models in terms of the performance under the GCoSOD setting as well as the model calibration degrees.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种新的设置，通过允许不显示共享协同显着对象的“噪声图像”的存在，放宽了传统协同显着对象检测（CoSOD）设置中的假设。我们将这种新设置称为广义共同显着对象检测 (GCoSOD)。我们提出了一种新颖的基于随机采样的广义 CoSOD 训练（GCT）策略，将图像间缺乏共同显着对象的意识提炼到 CoSOD 模型中。它采用了多样化采样自监督学习（DS3L），除了提供的监督共同显着标签之外，还为噪声图像引入了额外的自监督标签（为空，表示不存在共同显着对象）。此外，GCT 固有的随机采样过程能够生成高质量的不确定性图，突出显示实例级别潜在的误报预测。为了评估 CoSOD 模型在 GCoSOD 设置下的性能，我们提出了两个新的测试数据集，即 CoCA-Common 和 CoCA-Zero，其中共同显着对象部分存在于前者中，而完全不存在于后者中。大量实验表明，我们提出的方法在 GCoSOD 设置下的性能以及模型校准度方面显着提高了 CoSOD 模型的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种新的通用共显著目标检测（GCoSOD）框架，通过引入噪声图像处理机制提升模型鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 传统共显著目标检测（CoSOD）假设所有图像均包含共享目标，但实际场景中可能存在不包含共显著对象的噪声图像，导致模型性能下降。
AI.method: 提出基于随机采样的通用训练策略（GCT），结合自监督学习（DS3L）为噪声图像生成伪标签，并通过随机采样生成实例级不确定性图以优化模型。
AI.result: 在新构建的CoCA-Common和CoCA-Zero数据集上验证，模型在GCoSOD场景下的性能及校准度显著提升。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效增强了CoSOD模型对噪声图像的适应能力，为现实场景中的共显著目标检测提供了更鲁棒的解决方案。

search_text: Generalised Co-Salient Object Detection 广义共显着物体检测 We propose a new setting that relaxes an assumption in the conventional Co-Salient Object Detection (CoSOD) setting by allowing the presence of "noisy images" which do not show the shared co-salient object. We call this new setting Generalised Co-Salient Object Detection (GCoSOD). We propose a novel random sampling based Generalised CoSOD Training (GCT) strategy to distill the awareness of inter-image absence of co-salient objects into CoSOD models. It employs a Diverse Sampling Self-Supervised Learning (DS3L) that, in addition to the provided supervised co-salient label, introduces additional self-supervised labels for noisy images (being null, that no co-salient object is present). Further, the random sampling process inherent in GCT enables the generation of a high-quality uncertainty map highlighting potential false-positive predictions at instance level. To evaluate the performance of CoSOD models under the GCoSOD setting, we propose two new testing datasets, namely CoCA-Common and CoCA-Zero, where a common salient object is partially present in the former and completely absent in the latter. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our proposed method significantly improves the performance of CoSOD models in terms of the performance under the GCoSOD setting as well as the model calibration degrees. 我们提出了一种新的设置，通过允许不显示共享协同显着对象的“噪声图像”的存在，放宽了传统协同显着对象检测（CoSOD）设置中的假设。我们将这种新设置称为广义共同显着对象检测 (GCoSOD)。我们提出了一种新颖的基于随机采样的广义 CoSOD 训练（GCT）策略，将图像间缺乏共同显着对象的意识提炼到 CoSOD 模型中。它采用了多样化采样自监督学习（DS3L），除了提供的监督共同显着标签之外，还为噪声图像引入了额外的自监督标签（为空，表示不存在共同显着对象）。此外，GCT 固有的随机采样过程能够生成高质量的不确定性图，突出显示实例级别潜在的误报预测。为了评估 CoSOD 模型在 GCoSOD 设置下的性能，我们提出了两个新的测试数据集，即 CoCA-Common 和 CoCA-Zero，其中共同显着对象部分存在于前者中，而完全不存在于后者中。大量实验表明，我们提出的方法在 GCoSOD 设置下的性能以及模型校准度方面显着提高了 CoSOD 模型的性能。 本文提出了一种新的通用共显著目标检测（GCoSOD）框架，通过引入噪声图像处理机制提升模型鲁棒性。 Jiawei Liu,Jing Zhang,Ruikai Cui,Kaihao Zhang,Weihao Li,Nick Barnes cs.CV

title: Modeling, Quantifying, and Predicting Subjectivity of Image Aesthetics
title_zh: 图像美学主观性的建模、量化和预测
comment: 8 pages, 6 figures
comments: 8 pages, 6 figures
abstract: Assessing image aesthetics is a challenging computer vision task. One reason is that aesthetic preference is highly subjective and may vary significantly among people for certain images. Thus, it is important to properly model and quantify such \textit{subjectivity}, but there has not been much effort to resolve this issue. In this paper, we propose a novel unified probabilistic framework that can model and quantify subjective aesthetic preference based on the subjective logic. In this framework, the rating distribution is modeled as a beta distribution, from which the probabilities of being definitely pleasing, being definitely unpleasing, and being uncertain can be obtained. We use the probability of being uncertain to define an intuitive metric of subjectivity. Furthermore, we present a method to learn deep neural networks for prediction of image aesthetics, which is shown to be effective in improving the performance of subjectivity prediction via experiments. We also present an application scenario where the framework is beneficial for aesthetics-based image recommendation.
summary: Assessing image aesthetics is a challenging computer vision task. One reason is that aesthetic preference is highly subjective and may vary significantly among people for certain images. Thus, it is important to properly model and quantify such \textit{subjectivity}, but there has not been much effort to resolve this issue. In this paper, we propose a novel unified probabilistic framework that can model and quantify subjective aesthetic preference based on the subjective logic. In this framework, the rating distribution is modeled as a beta distribution, from which the probabilities of being definitely pleasing, being definitely unpleasing, and being uncertain can be obtained. We use the probability of being uncertain to define an intuitive metric of subjectivity. Furthermore, we present a method to learn deep neural networks for prediction of image aesthetics, which is shown to be effective in improving the performance of subjectivity prediction via experiments. We also present an application scenario where the framework is beneficial for aesthetics-based image recommendation.
abstract_zh: 评估图像美学是一项具有挑战性的计算机视觉任务。原因之一是审美偏好是高度主观的，并且人们对某些图像的审美偏好可能存在很大差异。因此，正确地建模和量化这种\textit{主观性}很重要，但还没有做出太多努力来解决这个问题。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的统一概率框架，可以基于主观逻辑对主观审美偏好进行建模和量化。在这个框架中，评级分布被建模为贝塔分布，从中可以获得绝对令人满意、绝对不愉快和不确定的概率。我们使用不确定的概率来定义主观性的直观度量。此外，我们提出了一种学习深度神经网络来预测图像美学的方法，通过实验证明该方法可以有效提高主观性预测的性能。我们还提出了一个应用场景，该框架有利于基于美学的图像推荐。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种统一的概率框架，用于建模、量化和预测图像美学的主观性，并通过深度神经网络提升预测性能。
AI.motivation: 图像美学评估因主观性强而具有挑战性，现有研究缺乏对主观性建模和量化的方法，需提出有效框架以解决这一问题。
AI.method: 基于主观逻辑的统一概率框架，采用贝塔分布建模评分分布，利用不确定概率定义主观性度量，并结合深度神经网络进行美学预测。
AI.result: 实验验证了该方法在提升主观性预测性能上的有效性，并展示了其在美学图像推荐中的应用价值。
AI.conclusion: 本文提出的框架有效解决了图像美学主观性建模与量化问题，为美学评估和推荐系统提供了新方法。

title: Visual Analysis of Neural Architecture Spaces for Summarizing Design Principles
title_zh: 神经建筑空间的可视化分析，总结设计原则
comment: 11 pages, 11 figures; accepted for IEEE VIS 2022
comments: 11 pages, 11 figures; accepted for IEEE VIS 2022
abstract: Recent advances in artificial intelligence largely benefit from better neural network architectures. These architectures are a product of a costly process of trial-and-error. To ease this process, we develop ArchExplorer, a visual analysis method for understanding a neural architecture space and summarizing design principles. The key idea behind our method is to make the architecture space explainable by exploiting structural distances between architectures. We formulate the pairwise distance calculation as solving an all-pairs shortest path problem. To improve efficiency, we decompose this problem into a set of single-source shortest path problems. The time complexity is reduced from O(kn^2N) to O(knN). Architectures are hierarchically clustered according to the distances between them. A circle-packing-based architecture visualization has been developed to convey both the global relationships between clusters and local neighborhoods of the architectures in each cluster. Two case studies and a post-analysis are presented to demonstrate the effectiveness of ArchExplorer in summarizing design principles and selecting better-performing architectures.
summary: Recent advances in artificial intelligence largely benefit from better neural network architectures. These architectures are a product of a costly process of trial-and-error. To ease this process, we develop ArchExplorer, a visual analysis method for understanding a neural architecture space and summarizing design principles. The key idea behind our method is to make the architecture space explainable by exploiting structural distances between architectures. We formulate the pairwise distance calculation as solving an all-pairs shortest path problem. To improve efficiency, we decompose this problem into a set of single-source shortest path problems. The time complexity is reduced from O(kn^2N) to O(knN). Architectures are hierarchically clustered according to the distances between them. A circle-packing-based architecture visualization has been developed to convey both the global relationships between clusters and local neighborhoods of the architectures in each cluster. Two case studies and a post-analysis are presented to demonstrate the effectiveness of ArchExplorer in summarizing design principles and selecting better-performing architectures.
abstract_zh: 人工智能的最新进展很大程度上受益于更好的神经网络架构。这些架构是代价高昂的试错过程的产物。为了简化这个过程，我们开发了 ArchExplorer，一种用于理解神经架构空间并总结设计原则的可视化分析方法。我们的方法背后的关键思想是通过利用架构之间的结构距离来使架构空间可解释。我们将成对距离计算公式化为解决全对最短路径问题。为了提高效率，我们将这个问题分解为一组单源最短路径问题。时间复杂度从O(kn^2N)降低到O(knN)。架构根据它们之间的距离进行分层聚类。基于循环封装的架构可视化已经被开发出来，以传达集群之间的全局关系和每个集群中架构的局部邻域。通过两个案例研究和事后分析来证明 ArchExplorer 在总结设计原则和选择性能更好的架构方面的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为ArchExplorer的可视化分析方法，用于理解神经网络架构空间并总结设计原则。
AI.motivation: 设计高效的神经网络架构通常依赖耗时的试错过程，需要更直观的方法来分析架构空间并提炼设计原则。
AI.method: 通过计算架构间的结构距离，将成对距离问题转化为单源最短路径问题以提高效率，结合层次聚类和圆填充可视化技术展示架构关系。
AI.result: 两个案例研究和后分析验证了ArchExplorer在总结设计原则及筛选高性能架构方面的有效性。
AI.conclusion: ArchExplorer通过可视化分析帮助研究人员更高效地理解神经架构空间，提炼设计规律并指导架构选择。

tldr: 本文提出了一种名为ArchExplorer的可视化分析方法，用于理解神经网络架构空间并总结设计原则。
motivation: 设计高效的神经网络架构通常依赖耗时的试错过程，需要更直观的方法来分析架构空间并提炼设计原则。
method: 通过计算架构间的结构距离，将成对距离问题转化为单源最短路径问题以提高效率，结合层次聚类和圆填充可视化技术展示架构关系。
result: 两个案例研究和后分析验证了ArchExplorer在总结设计原则及筛选高性能架构方面的有效性。
conclusion: ArchExplorer通过可视化分析帮助研究人员更高效地理解神经架构空间，提炼设计规律并指导架构选择。
search_text: Visual Analysis of Neural Architecture Spaces for Summarizing Design Principles 神经建筑空间的可视化分析，总结设计原则 Recent advances in artificial intelligence largely benefit from better neural network architectures. These architectures are a product of a costly process of trial-and-error. To ease this process, we develop ArchExplorer, a visual analysis method for understanding a neural architecture space and summarizing design principles. The key idea behind our method is to make the architecture space explainable by exploiting structural distances between architectures. We formulate the pairwise distance calculation as solving an all-pairs shortest path problem. To improve efficiency, we decompose this problem into a set of single-source shortest path problems. The time complexity is reduced from O(kn^2N) to O(knN). Architectures are hierarchically clustered according to the distances between them. A circle-packing-based architecture visualization has been developed to convey both the global relationships between clusters and local neighborhoods of the architectures in each cluster. Two case studies and a post-analysis are presented to demonstrate the effectiveness of ArchExplorer in summarizing design principles and selecting better-performing architectures. 人工智能的最新进展很大程度上受益于更好的神经网络架构。这些架构是代价高昂的试错过程的产物。为了简化这个过程，我们开发了 ArchExplorer，一种用于理解神经架构空间并总结设计原则的可视化分析方法。我们的方法背后的关键思想是通过利用架构之间的结构距离来使架构空间可解释。我们将成对距离计算公式化为解决全对最短路径问题。为了提高效率，我们将这个问题分解为一组单源最短路径问题。时间复杂度从O(kn^2N)降低到O(knN)。架构根据它们之间的距离进行分层聚类。基于循环封装的架构可视化已经被开发出来，以传达集群之间的全局关系和每个集群中架构的局部邻域。通过两个案例研究和事后分析来证明 ArchExplorer 在总结设计原则和选择性能更好的架构方面的有效性。 本文提出了一种名为ArchExplorer的可视化分析方法，用于理解神经网络架构空间并总结设计原则。 Jun Yuan,Mengchen Liu,Fengyuan Tian,Shixia Liu cs.HC,cs.LG

title: Offline Handwritten Mathematical Recognition using Adversarial Learning and Transformers
title_zh: 使用对抗性学习和 Transformers 进行离线手写数学识别
abstract: Offline Handwritten Mathematical Expression Recognition (HMER) is a major area in the field of mathematical expression recognition. Offline HMER is often viewed as a much harder problem as compared to online HMER due to a lack of temporal information and variability in writing style. In this paper, we purpose a encoder-decoder model that uses paired adversarial learning. Semantic-invariant features are extracted from handwritten mathematical expression images and their printed mathematical expression counterpart in the encoder. Learning of semantic-invariant features combined with the DenseNet encoder and transformer decoder, helped us to improve the expression rate from previous studies. Evaluated on the CROHME dataset, we have been able to improve latest CROHME 2019 test set results by 4% approx.
summary: Offline Handwritten Mathematical Expression Recognition (HMER) is a major area in the field of mathematical expression recognition. Offline HMER is often viewed as a much harder problem as compared to online HMER due to a lack of temporal information and variability in writing style. In this paper, we purpose a encoder-decoder model that uses paired adversarial learning. Semantic-invariant features are extracted from handwritten mathematical expression images and their printed mathematical expression counterpart in the encoder. Learning of semantic-invariant features combined with the DenseNet encoder and transformer decoder, helped us to improve the expression rate from previous studies. Evaluated on the CROHME dataset, we have been able to improve latest CROHME 2019 test set results by 4% approx.
abstract_zh: 离线手写数学表达式识别（HMER）是数学表达式识别领域的一个主要领域。由于缺乏时间信息和写作风格的变化，与在线 HMER 相比，离线 HMER 通常被认为是一个更难的问题。在本文中，我们的目标是使用配对对抗学习的编码器-解码器模型。语义不变特征是从编码器中的手写数学表达式图像及其打印的数学表达式对应物中提取的。语义不变特征的学习与 DenseNet 编码器和 Transformer 解码器相结合，帮助我们提高了之前研究的表达率。在 CROHME 数据集上进行评估，我们已经能够将最新的 CROHME 2019 测试集结果提高约 4%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于对抗学习和Transformer的离线手写数学表达式识别方法。
AI.motivation: 离线手写数学表达式识别因缺乏时间信息和书写风格多样性而更具挑战性，现有方法在准确率上仍有提升空间。
AI.method: 设计编码器-解码器模型，通过配对对抗学习提取手写与印刷数学表达式的语义不变特征，结合DenseNet编码器和Transformer解码器进行表达式生成。
AI.result: 在CROHME数据集上将最新测试集结果提升了约4%。
AI.conclusion: 对抗学习与Transformer的结合有效提升了离线手写数学表达式的识别性能，验证了语义不变特征学习的重要性。

title: Trigger-free Event Detection via Derangement Reading Comprehension
title_zh: 通过混乱阅读理解进行无触发事件检测
abstract: Event detection (ED), aiming to detect events from texts and categorize them, is vital to understanding actual happenings in real life. However, mainstream event detection models require high-quality expert human annotations of triggers, which are often costly and thus deter the application of ED to new domains. Therefore, in this paper, we focus on low-resource ED without triggers and aim to tackle the following formidable challenges: multi-label classification, insufficient clues, and imbalanced events distribution. We propose a novel trigger-free ED method via Derangement mechanism on a machine Reading Comprehension (DRC) framework. More specifically, we treat the input text as Context and concatenate it with all event type tokens that are deemed as Answers with an omitted default question. So we can leverage the self-attention in pre-trained language models to absorb semantic relations between input text and the event types. Moreover, we design a simple yet effective event derangement module (EDM) to prevent major events from being excessively learned so as to yield a more balanced training process. The experiment results show that our proposed trigger-free ED model is remarkably competitive to mainstream trigger-based models, showing its strong performance on low-source event detection.
summary: Event detection (ED), aiming to detect events from texts and categorize them, is vital to understanding actual happenings in real life. However, mainstream event detection models require high-quality expert human annotations of triggers, which are often costly and thus deter the application of ED to new domains. Therefore, in this paper, we focus on low-resource ED without triggers and aim to tackle the following formidable challenges: multi-label classification, insufficient clues, and imbalanced events distribution. We propose a novel trigger-free ED method via Derangement mechanism on a machine Reading Comprehension (DRC) framework. More specifically, we treat the input text as Context and concatenate it with all event type tokens that are deemed as Answers with an omitted default question. So we can leverage the self-attention in pre-trained language models to absorb semantic relations between input text and the event types. Moreover, we design a simple yet effective event derangement module (EDM) to prevent major events from being excessively learned so as to yield a more balanced training process. The experiment results show that our proposed trigger-free ED model is remarkably competitive to mainstream trigger-based models, showing its strong performance on low-source event detection.
abstract_zh: 事件检测（ED）旨在从文本中检测事件并对它们进行分类，对于理解现实生活中的实际事件至关重要。然而，主流事件检测模型需要高质量的专家对触发器进行人工注释，这通常成本高昂，因此阻碍了 ED 在新领域的应用。因此，在本文中，我们关注没有触发因素的低资源ED，旨在解决以下艰巨的挑战：多标签分类、线索不足和事件分布不平衡。我们通过机器阅读理解（DRC）框架上的混乱机制提出了一种新颖的无触发 ED 方法。更具体地说，我们将输入文本视为上下文，并将其与所有被视为答案的事件类型标记连接起来，并省略了默认问题。因此，我们可以利用预训练语言模型中的自注意力来吸收输入文本和事件类型之间的语义关系。此外，我们设计了一个简单而有效的事件混乱模块（EDM）来防止重大事件被过度学习，从而产生更加平衡的训练过程。实验结果表明，我们提出的无触发 ED 模型与主流的基于触发的模型相比具有显着的竞争力，显示出其在低源事件检测方面的强大性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种无需触发词的事件检测方法，通过扰乱机制和阅读理解框架实现低资源场景下的事件分类。
AI.motivation: 传统事件检测依赖人工标注的触发词，成本高昂且限制新领域应用，需解决多标签分类、线索不足和事件分布不平衡等挑战。
AI.method: 构建基于阅读理解的框架，将文本作为上下文与事件类型标记结合，利用预训练模型的自注意力机制捕捉语义关系，并设计事件扰乱模块（EDM）平衡训练过程。
AI.result: 实验表明该模型在低资源场景下性能接近主流触发词依赖模型，验证了方法的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 通过扰乱机制和阅读理解框架，本文实现了无需触发词的事件检测，有效缓解了数据不平衡问题。

authors_text: Elizaveta Vinogradova,Abay Artykbayev,Alisher Amanatay,Mukhamejan Karatayev,Maxim Mametkulov,Albina Li,Anuar Suleimenov,Abylay Salimzhanov,Karina Pats,Rustam Zhumagambetov,Ferdinand Molnár,Vsevolod Peshkov,Siamac Fazli
title: A biologically-inspired multi-modal evaluation of molecular generative machine learning
title_zh: 分子生成机器学习的受生物学启发的多模式评估
comment: 59 pages, 26 figures Project GitHub repository, https://gitlab.com/cheml.io/abraham
comments: 59 pages, 26 figures Project GitHub repository, https://gitlab.com/cheml.io/abraham
abstract: While generative models have recently become ubiquitous in many scientific areas, less attention has been paid to their evaluation. For molecular generative models, the state-of-the-art examines their output in isolation or in relation to its input. However, their biological and functional properties, such as ligand-target interaction is not being addressed. In this study, a novel biologically-inspired benchmark for the evaluation of molecular generative models is proposed. Specifically, three diverse reference datasets are designed and a set of metrics are introduced which are directly relevant to the drug discovery process. In particular we propose a recreation metric, apply drug-target affinity prediction and molecular docking as complementary techniques for the evaluation of generative outputs. While all three metrics show consistent results across the tested generative models, a more detailed comparison of drug-target affinity binding and molecular docking scores revealed that unimodal predictiors can lead to erroneous conclusions about target binding on a molecular level and a multi-modal approach is thus preferrable. The key advantage of this framework is that it incorporates prior physico-chemical domain knowledge into the benchmarking process by focusing explicitly on ligand-target interactions and thus creating a highly efficient tool not only for evaluating molecular generative outputs in particular, but also for enriching the drug discovery process in general.
summary: While generative models have recently become ubiquitous in many scientific areas, less attention has been paid to their evaluation. For molecular generative models, the state-of-the-art examines their output in isolation or in relation to its input. However, their biological and functional properties, such as ligand-target interaction is not being addressed. In this study, a novel biologically-inspired benchmark for the evaluation of molecular generative models is proposed. Specifically, three diverse reference datasets are designed and a set of metrics are introduced which are directly relevant to the drug discovery process. In particular we propose a recreation metric, apply drug-target affinity prediction and molecular docking as complementary techniques for the evaluation of generative outputs. While all three metrics show consistent results across the tested generative models, a more detailed comparison of drug-target affinity binding and molecular docking scores revealed that unimodal predictiors can lead to erroneous conclusions about target binding on a molecular level and a multi-modal approach is thus preferrable. The key advantage of this framework is that it incorporates prior physico-chemical domain knowledge into the benchmarking process by focusing explicitly on ligand-target interactions and thus creating a highly efficient tool not only for evaluating molecular generative outputs in particular, but also for enriching the drug discovery process in general.
abstract_zh: 虽然生成模型最近在许多科学领域变得无处不在，但对其评估的关注却较少。对于分子生成模型，最先进的技术会单独检查其输出或与其输入相关。然而，它们的生物学和功能特性，例如配体-靶标相互作用，尚未得到解决。在这项研究中，提出了一种用于评估分子生成模型的新颖的受生物学启发的基准。具体来说，设计了三个不同的参考数据集，并引入了一组与药物发现过程直接相关的指标。特别是，我们提出了一种娱乐指标，应用药物靶标亲和力预测和分子对接作为评估生成输出的补充技术。虽然所有三个指标在测试的生成模型中显示出一致的结果，但对药物靶标亲和力结合和分子对接分数的更详细比较表明，单模态预测可能会导致关于分子水平上靶标结合的错误结论，因此多模态方法是优选的。该框架的主要优势在于，它通过明确关注配体-靶标相互作用，将先前的物理化学领域知识纳入基准测试过程中，从而创建一个高效的工具，不仅用于评估分子生成输出，而且还可以丰富一般的药物发现过程。

AI.tldr: 提出一种基于生物特性的多模态评估框架，用于评估分子生成模型的性能，并优化药物发现过程。
AI.motivation: 现有评估方法未充分考虑分子生成模型的生物功能特性，如配体-靶标相互作用，需更全面的评估框架。
AI.method: 设计三个参考数据集，引入重建度量、药物-靶标亲和力预测及分子对接技术，结合多模态指标评估生成模型。
AI.result: 多模态方法比单模态更准确，能有效评估分子靶标结合能力，避免错误结论。
AI.conclusion: 该框架整合物理化学知识，提升评估效率，为分子生成模型评估和药物发现提供有效工具。

search_text: A biologically-inspired multi-modal evaluation of molecular generative machine learning 分子生成机器学习的受生物学启发的多模式评估 While generative models have recently become ubiquitous in many scientific areas, less attention has been paid to their evaluation. For molecular generative models, the state-of-the-art examines their output in isolation or in relation to its input. However, their biological and functional properties, such as ligand-target interaction is not being addressed. In this study, a novel biologically-inspired benchmark for the evaluation of molecular generative models is proposed. Specifically, three diverse reference datasets are designed and a set of metrics are introduced which are directly relevant to the drug discovery process. In particular we propose a recreation metric, apply drug-target affinity prediction and molecular docking as complementary techniques for the evaluation of generative outputs. While all three metrics show consistent results across the tested generative models, a more detailed comparison of drug-target affinity binding and molecular docking scores revealed that unimodal predictiors can lead to erroneous conclusions about target binding on a molecular level and a multi-modal approach is thus preferrable. The key advantage of this framework is that it incorporates prior physico-chemical domain knowledge into the benchmarking process by focusing explicitly on ligand-target interactions and thus creating a highly efficient tool not only for evaluating molecular generative outputs in particular, but also for enriching the drug discovery process in general. 虽然生成模型最近在许多科学领域变得无处不在，但对其评估的关注却较少。对于分子生成模型，最先进的技术会单独检查其输出或与其输入相关。然而，它们的生物学和功能特性，例如配体-靶标相互作用，尚未得到解决。在这项研究中，提出了一种用于评估分子生成模型的新颖的受生物学启发的基准。具体来说，设计了三个不同的参考数据集，并引入了一组与药物发现过程直接相关的指标。特别是，我们提出了一种娱乐指标，应用药物靶标亲和力预测和分子对接作为评估生成输出的补充技术。虽然所有三个指标在测试的生成模型中显示出一致的结果，但对药物靶标亲和力结合和分子对接分数的更详细比较表明，单模态预测可能会导致关于分子水平上靶标结合的错误结论，因此多模态方法是优选的。该框架的主要优势在于，它通过明确关注配体-靶标相互作用，将先前的物理化学领域知识纳入基准测试过程中，从而创建一个高效的工具，不仅用于评估分子生成输出，而且还可以丰富一般的药物发现过程。 提出一种基于生物特性的多模态评估框架，用于评估分子生成模型的性能，并优化药物发现过程。 Elizaveta Vinogradova,Abay Artykbayev,Alisher Amanatay,Mukhamejan Karatayev,Maxim Mametkulov,Albina Li,Anuar Suleimenov,Abylay Salimzhanov,Karina Pats,Rustam Zhumagambetov,Ferdinand Molnár,Vsevolod Peshkov,Siamac Fazli cs.LG,cs.AI,q-bio.BM,q-bio.QM

authors_text: Christofer Meinecke,Estelle Guéville,David Joseph Wrisley,Stefan Jänicke
title: Is Medieval Distant Viewing Possible? : Extending and Enriching Annotation of Legacy Image Collections using Visual Analytics
title_zh: 中世纪的远距离观看可能吗？ ：使用视觉分析扩展和丰富遗留图像集合的注释
comment: Revision after DSH Peer Review. Paper is now accepted at DSH
comments: Revision after DSH Peer Review. Paper is now accepted at DSH
abstract: Distant viewing approaches have typically used image datasets close to the contemporary image data used to train machine learning models. To work with images from other historical periods requires expert annotated data, and the quality of labels is crucial for the quality of results. Especially when working with cultural heritage collections that contain myriad uncertainties, annotating data, or re-annotating, legacy data is an arduous task. In this paper, we describe working with two pre-annotated sets of medieval manuscript images that exhibit conflicting and overlapping metadata. Since a manual reconciliation of the two legacy ontologies would be very expensive, we aim (1) to create a more uniform set of descriptive labels to serve as a "bridge" in the combined dataset, and (2) to establish a high quality hierarchical classification that can be used as a valuable input for subsequent supervised machine learning. To achieve these goals, we developed visualization and interaction mechanisms, enabling medievalists to combine, regularize and extend the vocabulary used to describe these, and other cognate, image datasets. The visual interfaces provide experts an overview of relationships in the data going beyond the sum total of the metadata. Word and image embeddings as well as co-occurrences of labels across the datasets, enable batch re-annotation of images, recommendation of label candidates and support composing a hierarchical classification of labels.
summary: Distant viewing approaches have typically used image datasets close to the contemporary image data used to train machine learning models. To work with images from other historical periods requires expert annotated data, and the quality of labels is crucial for the quality of results. Especially when working with cultural heritage collections that contain myriad uncertainties, annotating data, or re-annotating, legacy data is an arduous task. In this paper, we describe working with two pre-annotated sets of medieval manuscript images that exhibit conflicting and overlapping metadata. Since a manual reconciliation of the two legacy ontologies would be very expensive, we aim (1) to create a more uniform set of descriptive labels to serve as a "bridge" in the combined dataset, and (2) to establish a high quality hierarchical classification that can be used as a valuable input for subsequent supervised machine learning. To achieve these goals, we developed visualization and interaction mechanisms, enabling medievalists to combine, regularize and extend the vocabulary used to describe these, and other cognate, image datasets. The visual interfaces provide experts an overview of relationships in the data going beyond the sum total of the metadata. Word and image embeddings as well as co-occurrences of labels across the datasets, enable batch re-annotation of images, recommendation of label candidates and support composing a hierarchical classification of labels.
abstract_zh: 远程观看方法通常使用与用于训练机器学习模型的当代图像数据接近的图像数据集。要处理其他历史时期的图像，需要专家注释的数据，而标签的质量对于结果的质量至关重要。尤其是在处理包含无数不确定性的文化遗产收藏时，对数据进行注释或重新注释，遗留数据是一项艰巨的任务。在本文中，我们描述了如何使用两组预先注释的中世纪手稿图像，这些图像表现出冲突和重叠的元数据。由于手动协调两个遗留本体将非常昂贵，因此我们的目标是（1）创建一组更统一的描述性标签，作为组合数据集中的“桥梁”，以及（2）建立高质量的层次分类，可用作后续监督机器学习的有价值的输入。为了实现这些目标，我们开发了可视化和交互机制，使中世纪学者能够组合、规范和扩展用于描述这些以及其他同源图像数据集的词汇。可视化界面为专家提供了超出元数据总和的数据关系概览。单词和图像嵌入以及数据集中标签的共现，支持图像的批量重新注释、候选标签的推荐并支持构建标签的分层分类。

AI.tldr: 本文探讨如何通过可视化分析扩展和丰富中世纪手稿图像集合的标注，解决历史图像数据标注不一致的问题。
AI.motivation: 传统远距离观察方法依赖现代图像数据，而处理历史图像需专家标注，但历史数据存在元数据冲突和标注不确定性，手动协调成本高昂。
AI.method: 开发可视化交互工具，结合词嵌入和标签共现分析，帮助专家统一描述词汇、批量重标注图像并构建层次化分类体系。
AI.result: 生成更统一的描述标签集和高质量分类体系，为后续监督学习提供输入，提升历史图像数据的标注效率和一致性。
AI.conclusion: 通过可视化分析工具，可有效整合冲突的历史图像标注数据，为文化遗产领域机器学习应用提供可行方案。

title: A Domain Generalization Approach for Out-Of-Distribution 12-lead ECG Classification with Convolutional Neural Networks
title_zh: 使用卷积神经网络进行非分布 12 导联心电图分类的领域泛化方法
comment: This paper has been accepted at: IEEE BigDataService2022 (http://big-dataservice.net/)
comments: This paper has been accepted at: IEEE BigDataService2022 (http://big-dataservice.net/)
abstract: Deep Learning systems have achieved great success in the past few years, even surpassing human intelligence in several cases. As of late, they have also established themselves in the biomedical and healthcare domains, where they have shown a lot of promise, but have not yet achieved widespread adoption. This is in part due to the fact that most methods fail to maintain their performance when they are called to make decisions on data that originate from a different distribution than the one they were trained on, namely Out-Of-Distribution (OOD) data. For example, in the case of biosignal classification, models often fail to generalize well on datasets from different hospitals, due to the distribution discrepancy amongst different sources of data. Our goal is to demonstrate the Domain Generalization problem present between distinct hospital databases and propose a method that classifies abnormalities on 12-lead Electrocardiograms (ECGs), by leveraging information extracted across the architecture of a Deep Neural Network, and capturing the underlying structure of the signal. To this end, we adopt a ResNet-18 as the backbone model and extract features from several intermediate convolutional layers of the network. To evaluate our method, we adopt publicly available ECG datasets from four sources and handle them as separate domains. To simulate the distributional shift present in real-world settings, we train our model on a subset of the domains and leave-out the remaining ones. We then evaluate our model both on the data present at training time (intra-distribution) and the held-out data (out-of-distribution), achieving promising results and surpassing the baseline of a vanilla Residual Network in most of the cases.
summary: Deep Learning systems have achieved great success in the past few years, even surpassing human intelligence in several cases. As of late, they have also established themselves in the biomedical and healthcare domains, where they have shown a lot of promise, but have not yet achieved widespread adoption. This is in part due to the fact that most methods fail to maintain their performance when they are called to make decisions on data that originate from a different distribution than the one they were trained on, namely Out-Of-Distribution (OOD) data. For example, in the case of biosignal classification, models often fail to generalize well on datasets from different hospitals, due to the distribution discrepancy amongst different sources of data. Our goal is to demonstrate the Domain Generalization problem present between distinct hospital databases and propose a method that classifies abnormalities on 12-lead Electrocardiograms (ECGs), by leveraging information extracted across the architecture of a Deep Neural Network, and capturing the underlying structure of the signal. To this end, we adopt a ResNet-18 as the backbone model and extract features from several intermediate convolutional layers of the network. To evaluate our method, we adopt publicly available ECG datasets from four sources and handle them as separate domains. To simulate the distributional shift present in real-world settings, we train our model on a subset of the domains and leave-out the remaining ones. We then evaluate our model both on the data present at training time (intra-distribution) and the held-out data (out-of-distribution), achieving promising results and surpassing the baseline of a vanilla Residual Network in most of the cases.
abstract_zh: 深度学习系统在过去几年中取得了巨大成功，甚至在某些情况下超越了人类智能。最近，它们还在生物医学和医疗保健领域站稳了脚跟，并在这些领域表现出了很大的前景，但尚未得到广泛采用。部分原因在于，大多数方法在被调用对源自与训练数据不同的分布的数据（即分布外（OOD）数据）做出决策时，无法保持其性能。例如，在生物信号分类的情况下，由于不同数据源之间的分布差异，模型通常无法很好地概括不同医院的数据集。我们的目标是展示不同医院数据库之间存在的域泛化问题，并提出一种方法，通过利用从深度神经网络架构中提取的信息并捕获信号的底层结构，对 12 导联心电图 (ECG) 的异常进行分类。为此，我们采用 ResNet-18 作为主干模型，并从网络的几个中间卷积层中提取特征。为了评估我们的方法，我们采用来自四个来源的公开可用的心电图数据集，并将它们作为单独的域进行处理。为了模拟现实环境中存在的分布变化，我们在域的子集上训练我们的模型，并忽略其余的域。然后，我们根据训练时存在的数据（分布内）和保留的数据（分布外）评估我们的模型，取得了有希望的结果，并在大多数情况下超越了普通残差网络的基线。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于卷积神经网络的领域泛化方法，用于解决12导联心电图（ECG）分类中的分布外（OOD）数据问题。
AI.motivation: 深度学习模型在医疗领域面临分布外数据性能下降的挑战，尤其在不同医院的数据分布差异导致模型泛化能力不足。
AI.method: 采用ResNet-18作为主干网络，从多个中间卷积层提取特征，并通过跨领域数据训练实现领域泛化，使用四个公开ECG数据集进行验证。
AI.result: 在训练数据和保留数据上均取得优于普通ResNet基线的结果，尤其在分布外数据上表现显著提升。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过多层特征提取和领域泛化策略，有效提升了ECG分类模型在不同医院数据间的鲁棒性，为医疗AI的实用化提供了可行方案。

search_text: A Domain Generalization Approach for Out-Of-Distribution 12-lead ECG Classification with Convolutional Neural Networks 使用卷积神经网络进行非分布 12 导联心电图分类的领域泛化方法 Deep Learning systems have achieved great success in the past few years, even surpassing human intelligence in several cases. As of late, they have also established themselves in the biomedical and healthcare domains, where they have shown a lot of promise, but have not yet achieved widespread adoption. This is in part due to the fact that most methods fail to maintain their performance when they are called to make decisions on data that originate from a different distribution than the one they were trained on, namely Out-Of-Distribution (OOD) data. For example, in the case of biosignal classification, models often fail to generalize well on datasets from different hospitals, due to the distribution discrepancy amongst different sources of data. Our goal is to demonstrate the Domain Generalization problem present between distinct hospital databases and propose a method that classifies abnormalities on 12-lead Electrocardiograms (ECGs), by leveraging information extracted across the architecture of a Deep Neural Network, and capturing the underlying structure of the signal. To this end, we adopt a ResNet-18 as the backbone model and extract features from several intermediate convolutional layers of the network. To evaluate our method, we adopt publicly available ECG datasets from four sources and handle them as separate domains. To simulate the distributional shift present in real-world settings, we train our model on a subset of the domains and leave-out the remaining ones. We then evaluate our model both on the data present at training time (intra-distribution) and the held-out data (out-of-distribution), achieving promising results and surpassing the baseline of a vanilla Residual Network in most of the cases. 深度学习系统在过去几年中取得了巨大成功，甚至在某些情况下超越了人类智能。最近，它们还在生物医学和医疗保健领域站稳了脚跟，并在这些领域表现出了很大的前景，但尚未得到广泛采用。部分原因在于，大多数方法在被调用对源自与训练数据不同的分布的数据（即分布外（OOD）数据）做出决策时，无法保持其性能。例如，在生物信号分类的情况下，由于不同数据源之间的分布差异，模型通常无法很好地概括不同医院的数据集。我们的目标是展示不同医院数据库之间存在的域泛化问题，并提出一种方法，通过利用从深度神经网络架构中提取的信息并捕获信号的底层结构，对 12 导联心电图 (ECG) 的异常进行分类。为此，我们采用 ResNet-18 作为主干模型，并从网络的几个中间卷积层中提取特征。为了评估我们的方法，我们采用来自四个来源的公开可用的心电图数据集，并将它们作为单独的域进行处理。为了模拟现实环境中存在的分布变化，我们在域的子集上训练我们的模型，并忽略其余的域。然后，我们根据训练时存在的数据（分布内）和保留的数据（分布外）评估我们的模型，取得了有希望的结果，并在大多数情况下超越了普通残差网络的基线。 本文提出了一种基于卷积神经网络的领域泛化方法，用于解决12导联心电图（ECG）分类中的分布外（OOD）数据问题。 Aristotelis Ballas,Christos Diou cs.LG,cs.AI

authors_text: Jun Zhang,Sirui Liu,Mengyun Chen,Haotian Chu,Min Wang,Zidong Wang,Jialiang Yu,Ningxi Ni,Fan Yu,Diqing Chen,Yi Isaac Yang,Boxin Xue,Lijiang Yang,Yuan Liu,Yi Qin Gao
title: Unsupervisedly Prompting AlphaFold2 for Few-Shot Learning of Accurate Folding Landscape and Protein Structure Prediction
title_zh: 无监督提示 AlphaFold2 进行精确折叠景观和蛋白质结构预测的少样本学习
comment: version 2.0; 28 pages, 6 figures
comments: version 2.0; 28 pages, 6 figures
abstract: Data-driven predictive methods which can efficiently and accurately transform protein sequences into biologically active structures are highly valuable for scientific research and medical development. Determining accurate folding landscape using co-evolutionary information is fundamental to the success of modern protein structure prediction methods. As the state of the art, AlphaFold2 has dramatically raised the accuracy without performing explicit co-evolutionary analysis. Nevertheless, its performance still shows strong dependence on available sequence homologs. Based on the interrogation on the cause of such dependence, we presented EvoGen, a meta generative model, to remedy the underperformance of AlphaFold2 for poor MSA targets. By prompting the model with calibrated or virtually generated homologue sequences, EvoGen helps AlphaFold2 fold accurately in low-data regime and even achieve encouraging performance with single-sequence predictions. Being able to make accurate predictions with few-shot MSA not only generalizes AlphaFold2 better for orphan sequences, but also democratizes its use for high-throughput applications. Besides, EvoGen combined with AlphaFold2 yields a probabilistic structure generation method which could explore alternative conformations of protein sequences, and the task-aware differentiable algorithm for sequence generation will benefit other related tasks including protein design.
summary: Data-driven predictive methods which can efficiently and accurately transform protein sequences into biologically active structures are highly valuable for scientific research and medical development. Determining accurate folding landscape using co-evolutionary information is fundamental to the success of modern protein structure prediction methods. As the state of the art, AlphaFold2 has dramatically raised the accuracy without performing explicit co-evolutionary analysis. Nevertheless, its performance still shows strong dependence on available sequence homologs. Based on the interrogation on the cause of such dependence, we presented EvoGen, a meta generative model, to remedy the underperformance of AlphaFold2 for poor MSA targets. By prompting the model with calibrated or virtually generated homologue sequences, EvoGen helps AlphaFold2 fold accurately in low-data regime and even achieve encouraging performance with single-sequence predictions. Being able to make accurate predictions with few-shot MSA not only generalizes AlphaFold2 better for orphan sequences, but also democratizes its use for high-throughput applications. Besides, EvoGen combined with AlphaFold2 yields a probabilistic structure generation method which could explore alternative conformations of protein sequences, and the task-aware differentiable algorithm for sequence generation will benefit other related tasks including protein design.
abstract_zh: 数据驱动的预测方法可以高效、准确地将蛋白质序列转化为生物活性结构，对于科学研究和医学发展具有很高的价值。使用共同进化信息确定准确的折叠景观是现代蛋白质结构预测方法成功的基础。作为最先进的技术，AlphaFold2 在没有执行明确的协同进化分析的情况下显着提高了准确性。尽管如此，其性能仍然表现出对可用序列同源物的强烈依赖性。基于对这种依赖性原因的询问，我们提出了 EvoGen，一种元生成模型，以弥补 AlphaFold2 对于较差的 MSA 目标的表现不佳。通过使用校准或虚拟生成的同源序列提示模型，EvoGen 帮助 AlphaFold2 在低数据范围内准确折叠，甚至通过单序列预测实现令人鼓舞的性能。能够使用少样本 MSA 进行准确预测不仅使 AlphaFold2 能够更好地推广孤儿序列，而且还使其在高通量应用中的使用更加民主化。此外，EvoGen 与 AlphaFold2 结合产生了一种概率结构生成方法，可以探索蛋白质序列的替代构象，并且用于序列生成的任务感知可微算法将有利于包括蛋白质设计在内的其他相关任务。

AI.tldr: 本文提出EvoGen方法，通过生成或校准同源序列提示AlphaFold2，在低数据条件下实现高精度蛋白质结构预测。
AI.motivation: AlphaFold2虽性能优异，但依赖大量同源序列数据，限制了其在缺乏同源序列的孤儿序列上的应用。
AI.method: 设计元生成模型EvoGen，生成虚拟同源序列并校准MSA输入，结合任务感知的可微算法优化AlphaFold2预测过程。
AI.result: EvoGen使AlphaFold2在少量MSA数据下实现准确预测，单序列预测性能提升，支持构象探索并拓展至蛋白质设计领域。
AI.conclusion: 该方法突破AlphaFold2数据依赖性，提升其泛化能力，为高通量蛋白质研究提供新工具。

authors_text: Ugochukwu Orji,Chikodili Ugwuishiwu,Mathew Okoronkwo,Caroline Asogwa,Nnaemeka Ogbene
title: Visual Exploratory Data Analysis of the Covid-19 Vaccination Progress in Nigeria
title_zh: 尼日利亚 Covid-19 疫苗接种进展的可视化探索性数据分析
abstract: The coronavirus outbreak in 2020 devastated the world's economy, including Nigeria, even resulted in a severe recession. Slowly the country is building back again, and the vaccines are helping to reduce the spread of covid-19. Since the covid-19 vaccine came to Nigeria; 18,728,188 people have been fully vaccinated as at May 31st, 2022. This is roughly 10% of the Nigerian population estimated at 206.7 million [1]. This paper presents a visual Exploratory Data Analysis of the covid-19 vaccination progress in Nigeria using the R-tidyverse package in R studio IDE for data cleaning & analysis, and Tableau for the visualizations. Our dataset is from the Nigerian National Primary Health Care Development Agency (NPHCDA) in charge of the vaccines. The data used for this research contain the state-by-state breakdown of Covid-19 vaccine distribution recorded between March 5th, 2021, and May 31st, 2022. This paper aims to show how these data analytics tools and techniques can be useful in finding insights in raw data by presenting the results of the EDA visually thus reducing the ambiguity and possible confusions that is associated with data in tables. Furthermore, our findings contribute to the growing literature on Covid-19 research by showcasing the Covid-19 vaccination trend in Nigeria and the state by state distribution.
summary: The coronavirus outbreak in 2020 devastated the world's economy, including Nigeria, even resulted in a severe recession. Slowly the country is building back again, and the vaccines are helping to reduce the spread of covid-19. Our dataset is from the Nigerian National Primary Health Care Development Agency (NPHCDA) in charge of the vaccines. The data used for this research contain the state-by-state breakdown of Covid-19 vaccine distribution recorded between March 5th, 2021, and May 31st, 2022. This paper aims to show how these data analytics tools and techniques can be useful in finding insights in raw data by presenting the results of the EDA visually thus reducing the ambiguity and possible confusions that is associated with data in tables. Furthermore, our findings contribute to the growing literature on Covid-19 research by showcasing the Covid-19 vaccination trend in Nigeria and the state by state distribution.
abstract_zh: 2020年新冠肺炎疫情爆发，对包括尼日利亚在内的世界经济造成重创，甚至导致严重衰退。该国正在慢慢恢复重建，疫苗正在帮助减少 covid-19 的传播。自从covid-19疫苗来到尼日利亚以来；截至 2022 年 5 月 31 日，已有 18,728,188 人完全接种了疫苗。这大约占尼日利亚人口估计数 2.067 亿的 10% [1]。本文使用 R studio IDE 中的 R-tidyverse 包进行数据清理和分析，并使用 Tableau 进行可视化，对尼日利亚的 covid-19 疫苗接种进展进行了可视化探索性数据分析。我们的数据集来自负责疫苗的尼日利亚国家初级卫生保健发展机构 (NPHCDA)。本研究使用的数据包含 2021 年 3 月 5 日至 2022 年 5 月 31 日期间记录的各州 Covid-19 疫苗分发细目。本文旨在展示这些数据分析工具和技术如何通过直观地呈现 EDA 结果来发现原始数据中的见解，从而减少与表中数据相关的歧义和可能的混乱。此外，我们的研究结果通过展示尼日利亚的 Covid-19 疫苗接种趋势以及各州的分布情况，为越来越多的关于 Covid-19 研究的文献做出了贡献。

AI.tldr: 本文通过可视化探索性数据分析方法，分析尼日利亚新冠疫苗接种进展，利用R和Tableau工具处理国家疫苗分发数据。
AI.motivation: 新冠疫情期间尼日利亚经济受创，疫苗接种数据需通过可视化分析减少表格数据的歧义，为政策制定提供清晰洞察。
AI.method: 使用R语言tidyverse包进行数据清洗与分析，结合Tableau制作可视化图表，基于尼日利亚国家初级卫生保健发展局（NPHCDA）提供的州级疫苗分发数据（2021.3.5-2022.5.31）。
AI.result: 呈现尼日利亚全国及各州疫苗接种趋势，显示截至2022年5月31日约10%人口完成接种，揭示疫苗分配的区域差异性。
AI.conclusion: 可视化分析工具能有效提取疫苗接种数据中的关键趋势，为公共卫生决策提供支持，同时丰富了新冠疫苗接种研究的文献体系。

ai_content.tldr: 本文通过可视化探索性数据分析方法，分析尼日利亚新冠疫苗接种进展，利用R和Tableau工具处理国家疫苗分发数据。
ai_content.motivation: 新冠疫情期间尼日利亚经济受创，疫苗接种数据需通过可视化分析减少表格数据的歧义，为政策制定提供清晰洞察。
ai_content.method: 使用R语言tidyverse包进行数据清洗与分析，结合Tableau制作可视化图表，基于尼日利亚国家初级卫生保健发展局（NPHCDA）提供的州级疫苗分发数据（2021.3.5-2022.5.31）。
ai_content.result: 呈现尼日利亚全国及各州疫苗接种趋势，显示截至2022年5月31日约10%人口完成接种，揭示疫苗分配的区域差异性。
ai_content.conclusion: 可视化分析工具能有效提取疫苗接种数据中的关键趋势，为公共卫生决策提供支持，同时丰富了新冠疫苗接种研究的文献体系。

search_text: Visual Exploratory Data Analysis of the Covid-19 Vaccination Progress in Nigeria 尼日利亚 Covid-19 疫苗接种进展的可视化探索性数据分析 The coronavirus outbreak in 2020 devastated the world's economy, including Nigeria, even resulted in a severe recession. Slowly the country is building back again, and the vaccines are helping to reduce the spread of covid-19. Since the covid-19 vaccine came to Nigeria; 18,728,188 people have been fully vaccinated as at May 31st, 2022. This is roughly 10% of the Nigerian population estimated at 206.7 million [1]. This paper presents a visual Exploratory Data Analysis of the covid-19 vaccination progress in Nigeria using the R-tidyverse package in R studio IDE for data cleaning & analysis, and Tableau for the visualizations. Our dataset is from the Nigerian National Primary Health Care Development Agency (NPHCDA) in charge of the vaccines. The data used for this research contain the state-by-state breakdown of Covid-19 vaccine distribution recorded between March 5th, 2021, and May 31st, 2022. This paper aims to show how these data analytics tools and techniques can be useful in finding insights in raw data by presenting the results of the EDA visually thus reducing the ambiguity and possible confusions that is associated with data in tables. Furthermore, our findings contribute to the growing literature on Covid-19 research by showcasing the Covid-19 vaccination trend in Nigeria and the state by state distribution. 2020年新冠肺炎疫情爆发，对包括尼日利亚在内的世界经济造成重创，甚至导致严重衰退。该国正在慢慢恢复重建，疫苗正在帮助减少 covid-19 的传播。自从covid-19疫苗来到尼日利亚以来；截至 2022 年 5 月 31 日，已有 18,728,188 人完全接种了疫苗。这大约占尼日利亚人口估计数 2.067 亿的 10% [1]。本文使用 R studio IDE 中的 R-tidyverse 包进行数据清理和分析，并使用 Tableau 进行可视化，对尼日利亚的 covid-19 疫苗接种进展进行了可视化探索性数据分析。我们的数据集来自负责疫苗的尼日利亚国家初级卫生保健发展机构 (NPHCDA)。本研究使用的数据包含 2021 年 3 月 5 日至 2022 年 5 月 31 日期间记录的各州 Covid-19 疫苗分发细目。本文旨在展示这些数据分析工具和技术如何通过直观地呈现 EDA 结果来发现原始数据中的见解，从而减少与表中数据相关的歧义和可能的混乱。此外，我们的研究结果通过展示尼日利亚的 Covid-19 疫苗接种趋势以及各州的分布情况，为越来越多的关于 Covid-19 研究的文献做出了贡献。 本文通过可视化探索性数据分析方法，分析尼日利亚新冠疫苗接种进展，利用R和Tableau工具处理国家疫苗分发数据。 Ugochukwu Orji,Chikodili Ugwuishiwu,Mathew Okoronkwo,Caroline Asogwa,Nnaemeka Ogbene cs.CY,cs.HC

authors_text: Xinrui Yan,Jiangyan Yi,Jianhua Tao,Chenglong Wang,Haoxin Ma,Tao Wang,Shiming Wang,Ruibo Fu
title: An Initial Investigation for Detecting Vocoder Fingerprints of Fake Audio
title_zh: 检测假音频声码器指纹的初步研究
comment: Accepted by ACM Multimedia 2022 Workshop: First International Workshop on Deepfake Detection for Audio Multimedia
comments: Accepted by ACM Multimedia 2022 Workshop: First International Workshop on Deepfake Detection for Audio Multimedia
abstract: Many effective attempts have been made for fake audio detection. However, they can only provide detection results but no countermeasures to curb this harm. For many related practical applications, what model or algorithm generated the fake audio also is needed. Therefore, We propose a new problem for detecting vocoder fingerprints of fake audio. Experiments are conducted on the datasets synthesized by eight state-of-the-art vocoders. We have preliminarily explored the features and model architectures. The t-SNE visualization shows that different vocoders generate distinct vocoder fingerprints.
summary: Many effective attempts have been made for fake audio detection. However, they can only provide detection results but no countermeasures to curb this harm. For many related practical applications, what model or algorithm generated the fake audio also is needed. Therefore, We propose a new problem for detecting vocoder fingerprints of fake audio. Experiments are conducted on the datasets synthesized by eight state-of-the-art vocoders. We have preliminarily explored the features and model architectures. The t-SNE visualization shows that different vocoders generate distinct vocoder fingerprints.
abstract_zh: 针对虚假音频检测，人们做出了许多有效的尝试。但他们只能提供检测结果，却没有遏制这种危害的对策。对于许多相关的实际应用来说，还需要什么模型或算法来生成假音频。因此，我们提出了一个新的问题来检测假音频的声码器指纹。在由八个最先进的声码器合成的数据集上进行了实验。我们已经初步探索了特征和模型架构。 t-SNE 可视化显示不同的声码器生成不同的声码器指纹。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在研究如何检测假音频中的语音合成器指纹，以识别生成假音频的具体模型或算法。
AI.motivation: 现有假音频检测方法仅能判断音频是否为伪造，但无法确定其使用的生成模型，而实际应用中识别生成源对防范风险至关重要。
AI.method: 基于八个主流语音合成器生成的数据集，探索特征提取方法与模型架构，并通过t-SNE可视化分析不同合成器的指纹差异。
AI.result: 实验表明，不同语音合成器生成的音频在特征空间中呈现可区分的聚类分布，验证了指纹检测的可行性。
AI.conclusion: 初步证明了通过语音合成器指纹识别生成源的思路可行，为后续开发针对性检测技术提供了理论基础。

title: The computational complexity of some explainable clustering problems
title_zh: 一些可解释的聚类问题的计算复杂度
comment: 14 pages and 1 figure
comments: 14 pages and 1 figure
abstract: We study the computational complexity of some explainable clustering problems in the framework proposed by [Dasgupta et al., ICML 2020], where explainability is achieved via axis-aligned decision trees. We consider the $k$-means, $k$-medians, $k$-centers and the spacing cost functions. We prove that the first three are hard to optimize while the latter can be optimized in polynomial time.
summary: We study the computational complexity of some explainable clustering problems in the framework proposed by [Dasgupta et al., ICML 2020], where explainability is achieved via axis-aligned decision trees. We consider the $k$-means, $k$-medians, $k$-centers and the spacing cost functions. We prove that the first three are hard to optimize while the latter can be optimized in polynomial time.
abstract_zh: 我们研究了 [Dasgupta 等人，ICML 2020] 提出的框架中一些可解释的聚类问题的计算复杂性，其中可解释性是通过轴对齐决策树实现的。我们考虑 $k$-均值、$k$-中位数、$k$-中心和间距成本函数。我们证明前三个很难优化，而后者可以在多项式时间内优化。

AI.tldr: 研究在轴对齐决策树框架下，若干可解释聚类问题的计算复杂性。
AI.motivation: 现有聚类方法缺乏可解释性，而轴对齐决策树能提供解释性，但需明确其优化难度。
AI.method: 分析k-means、k-medians、k-centers及间距成本函数的优化复杂性，结合计算理论证明。
AI.result: k-means、k-medians、k-centers难以优化，间距成本函数可多项式时间求解。
AI.conclusion: 为可解释聚类问题提供理论依据，指导算法设计与应用选择。

authors_text: Akansh Maurya,Kunal Dashrath Patil,Rohan Padhy,Kalluri Ramakrishna,Ganapathy Krishnamurthi
title: PARSE challenge 2022: Pulmonary Arteries Segmentation using Swin U-Net Transformer(Swin UNETR) and U-Net
title_zh: 2022 年 PARSE 挑战：使用 Swin U-Net Transformer(Swin UNETR) 和 U-Net 进行肺动脉分割
abstract: In this work, we present our proposed method to segment the pulmonary arteries from the CT scans using Swin UNETR and U-Net-based deep neural network architecture. Six models, three models based on Swin UNETR, and three models based on 3D U-net with residual units were ensemble using a weighted average to make the final segmentation masks. Our team achieved a multi-level dice score of 84.36 percent through this method. The code of our work is available on the following link: https://github.com/akansh12/parse2022. This work is part of the MICCAI PARSE 2022 challenge.
summary: In this work, we present our proposed method to segment the pulmonary arteries from the CT scans using Swin UNETR and U-Net-based deep neural network architecture. Six models, three models based on Swin UNETR, and three models based on 3D U-net with residual units were ensemble using a weighted average to make the final segmentation masks. Our team achieved a multi-level dice score of 84.36 percent through this method. The code of our work is available on the following link: https://github.com/akansh12/parse2022. This work is part of the MICCAI PARSE 2022 challenge.
abstract_zh: 在这项工作中，我们提出了使用 Swin UNETR 和基于 U-Net 的深度神经网络架构从 CT 扫描中分割肺动脉的方法。六个模型、三个基于 Swin UNETR 的模型和三个基于带残差单元的 3D U-net 的模型使用加权平均值进行集成，以制作最终的分割掩模。我们团队通过这种方法获得了 84.36% 的多级骰子得分。我们的工作代码可通过以下链接获取：https://github.com/akansh12/parse2022。这项工作是 MICCAI PARSE 2022 挑战的一部分。

AI.tldr: 本论文提出使用Swin UNETR和U-Net模型对CT扫描中的肺动脉进行分割，并通过集成方法提升分割效果。
AI.motivation: 肺动脉分割在临床诊断中具有重要意义，而采用先进的深度学习模型如Swin Transformer和U-Net有望提高分割精度。
AI.method: 基于Swin UNETR和3D U-Net（含残差单元）构建六种模型，通过加权平均集成策略生成最终分割结果。
AI.result: 在PARSE 2022挑战赛中，团队取得多级Dice分数84.36%的分割性能。
AI.conclusion: 集成Swin UNETR与U-Net模型能有效提升肺动脉分割效果，代码已开源供研究使用。

motivation: 肺动脉分割在临床诊断中具有重要意义，而采用先进的深度学习模型如Swin Transformer和U-Net有望提高分割精度。
method: 基于Swin UNETR和3D U-Net（含残差单元）构建六种模型，通过加权平均集成策略生成最终分割结果。
result: 在PARSE 2022挑战赛中，团队取得多级Dice分数84.36%的分割性能。
conclusion: 集成Swin UNETR与U-Net模型能有效提升肺动脉分割效果，代码已开源供研究使用。
search_text: PARSE challenge 2022: Pulmonary Arteries Segmentation using Swin U-Net Transformer(Swin UNETR) and U-Net 2022 年 PARSE 挑战：使用 Swin U-Net Transformer(Swin UNETR) 和 U-Net 进行肺动脉分割 In this work, we present our proposed method to segment the pulmonary arteries from the CT scans using Swin UNETR and U-Net-based deep neural network architecture. Six models, three models based on Swin UNETR, and three models based on 3D U-net with residual units were ensemble using a weighted average to make the final segmentation masks. Our team achieved a multi-level dice score of 84.36 percent through this method. The code of our work is available on the following link: https://github.com/akansh12/parse2022. This work is part of the MICCAI PARSE 2022 challenge. 在这项工作中，我们提出了使用 Swin UNETR 和基于 U-Net 的深度神经网络架构从 CT 扫描中分割肺动脉的方法。六个模型、三个基于 Swin UNETR 的模型和三个基于带残差单元的 3D U-net 的模型使用加权平均值进行集成，以制作最终的分割掩模。我们团队通过这种方法获得了 84.36% 的多级骰子得分。我们的工作代码可通过以下链接获取：https://github.com/akansh12/parse2022。这项工作是 MICCAI PARSE 2022 挑战的一部分。 本论文提出使用Swin UNETR和U-Net模型对CT扫描中的肺动脉进行分割，并通过集成方法提升分割效果。 Akansh Maurya,Kunal Dashrath Patil,Rohan Padhy,Kalluri Ramakrishna,Ganapathy Krishnamurthi eess.IV,cs.CV

title: Mobile Robot Navigation in Complex Polygonal Workspaces Using Conformal Navigation Transformations
title_zh: 使用共形导航变换在复杂多边形工作空间中进行移动机器人导航
comment: arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2208.06876
comments: arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2208.06876
abstract: This work proposes a novel transformation termed the conformal navigation transformation to achieve collision-free navigation of a robot in a workspace populated with arbitrary polygonal obstacles. The properties of the conformal navigation transformation in the polygonal workspace are investigated in this work as well as its capability to provide a solution to the navigation problem. %The properties of the conformal navigation transformation are investigated, which contribute to the solution of the robot navigation problem in complex polygonal environments. %which facilitates the navigation of robots in complex environments. The definition of the navigation function is generalized to accommodate non-smooth obstacle boundaries. Based on the proposed transformation and the generalized navigation function, a provably correct feedback controller is derived for the automatic guidance and motion control of the kinematic mobile robot. Moreover, an iterative method is proposed to construct the conformal navigation transformation in a multi-connected polygonal workspace, which transforms the multi-connected problem into multiple single-connected problems to achieve fast convergence.In addition to the analytic guarantees, the simulation study verifies the effectiveness of the proposed methodology in a workspace with non-trivial polygonal obstacles.
summary: This work proposes a novel transformation termed the conformal navigation transformation to achieve collision-free navigation of a robot in a workspace populated with arbitrary polygonal obstacles. The properties of the conformal navigation transformation in the polygonal workspace are investigated in this work as well as its capability to provide a solution to the navigation problem. %The properties of the conformal navigation transformation are investigated, which contribute to the solution of the robot navigation problem in complex polygonal environments. %which facilitates the navigation of robots in complex environments. The definition of the navigation function is generalized to accommodate non-smooth obstacle boundaries. Based on the proposed transformation and the generalized navigation function, a provably correct feedback controller is derived for the automatic guidance and motion control of the kinematic mobile robot. Moreover, an iterative method is proposed to construct the conformal navigation transformation in a multi-connected polygonal workspace, which transforms the multi-connected problem into multiple single-connected problems to achieve fast convergence.In addition to the analytic guarantees, the simulation study verifies the effectiveness of the proposed methodology in a workspace with non-trivial polygonal obstacles.
abstract_zh: 这项工作提出了一种称为共形导航变换的新颖变换，以实现机器人在充满任意多边形障碍物的工作空间中的无碰撞导航。这项工作研究了多边形工作空间中共形导航变换的属性及其为导航问题提供解决方案的能力。 %研究了共形导航变换的性质，有助于解决复杂多边形环境中的机器人导航问题。 %这有利于机器人在复杂环境中的导航。导航函数的定义被推广以适应非光滑障碍物边界。基于所提出的变换和广义导航函数，导出了可证明正确的反馈控制器，用于运动学移动机器人的自动引导和运动控制。此外，提出了一种迭代方法在多连通多边形工作空间中构建共形导航变换，将多连通问题转化为多个单连通问题以实现快速收敛。除了解析保证之外，仿真研究还验证了该方法在具有非平凡多边形障碍物的工作空间中的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种称为共形导航变换的新方法，用于解决复杂多边形工作空间中移动机器人的避障导航问题。
AI.motivation: 现有方法难以有效处理复杂多边形障碍物环境下的机器人导航问题，尤其在非光滑边界和多连通区域中存在挑战。
AI.method: 通过定义共形导航变换将多连通问题分解为多个单连通问题，并结合广义导航函数设计反馈控制器，最终通过迭代方法构建变换以实现快速收敛。
AI.result: 理论证明控制器的正确性，仿真验证了该方法在非平凡多边形障碍物环境中的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 共形导航变换为复杂多边形工作空间中的机器人导航提供了可证明正确的解决方案，具有实际应用价值。

title: An $O(k\log n)$ Time Fourier Set Query Algorithm
title_zh: $O(k\log n)$ 时间傅里叶集查询算法
abstract: Fourier transformation is an extensively studied problem in many research fields. It has many applications in machine learning, signal processing, compressed sensing, and so on. In many real-world applications, approximated Fourier transformation is sufficient and we only need to do the Fourier transform on a subset of coordinates. Given a vector $x \in \mathbb{C}^{n}$, an approximation parameter $ε$ and a query set $S \subset [n]$ of size $k$, we propose an algorithm to compute an approximate Fourier transform result $x'$ which uses $O(ε^{-1} k \log(n/δ))$ Fourier measurements, runs in $O(ε^{-1} k \log(n/δ))$ time and outputs a vector $x'$ such that $\| ( x' - \widehat{x} )_S \|_2^2 \leq ε\| \widehat{x}_{\bar{S}} \|_2^2 + δ\| \widehat{x} \|_1^2 $ holds with probability of at least $9/10$.
summary: Fourier transformation is an extensively studied problem in many research fields. It has many applications in machine learning, signal processing, compressed sensing, and so on. In many real-world applications, approximated Fourier transformation is sufficient and we only need to do the Fourier transform on a subset of coordinates. Given a vector $x \in \mathbb{C}^{n}$, an approximation parameter $ε$ and a query set $S \subset [n]$ of size $k$, we propose an algorithm to compute an approximate Fourier transform result $x'$ which uses $O(ε^{-1} k \log(n/δ))$ Fourier measurements, runs in $O(ε^{-1} k \log(n/δ))$ time and outputs a vector $x'$ such that $\| ( x' - \widehat{x} )_S \|_2^2 \leq ε\| \widehat{x}_{\bar{S}} \|_2^2 + δ\| \widehat{x} \|_1^2 $ holds with probability of at least $9/10$.
abstract_zh: 傅里叶变换是许多研究领域广泛研究的问题。它在机器学习、信号处理、压缩感知等方面有许多应用。在许多实际应用中，近似傅里叶变换就足够了，我们只需要对坐标子集进行傅里叶变换。给定向量 $x \in \mathbb{C}^{n}$、近似参数 $ε$ 和大小为 $k$ 的查询集 $S \subset [n]$，我们提出一种计算近似傅里叶变换结果 $x'$ 的算法，该算法使用 $O(ε^{-1} k \log(n/δ))$ 傅里叶测量，运行 $O(ε^{-1} k \log(n/δ))$ 时间并输出向量$x'$ 使得 $\| ( x' - \widehat{x} )_S \|_2^2 \leq ε\| \widehat{x}_{\bar{S}} \|_2^2 + δ\| \widehat{x} \|_1^2 $ 成立的概率至少为 $9/10$。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种在子集坐标上计算近似傅里叶变换的算法，时间复杂度为O(k log n)。
AI.motivation: 实际应用中常需对傅里叶变换的子集进行近似计算，传统方法效率不足，需设计高效且满足误差保证的算法。
AI.method: 通过设计随机采样与近似计算相结合的算法，利用O(ε⁻¹ k log(n/δ))次测量和时间，在子集S上近似计算傅里叶变换。
AI.result: 算法以至少9/10的概率满足误差条件：‖(x'−x̂)_S‖²² ≤ ε‖x̂_S̄‖²² + δ‖x̂‖₁²，时间复杂度与测量次数均为O(ε⁻¹ k log(n/δ))。
AI.conclusion: 该算法为子集傅里叶查询提供了高效且理论保证的解决方案，适用于机器学习、信号处理等需快速近似傅里叶变换的场景。

authors_text: Betty Lala,Srikant Manas Kala,Anmol Rastogi,Kunal Dahiya,Aya Hagishima
title: Are You Comfortable Now: Deep Learning the Temporal Variation in Thermal Comfort in Winters
title_zh: 您现在舒服吗：深度学习冬季热舒适度的时间变化
comment: Accepted for publication in IEEE SMC 2022
comments: Accepted for publication in IEEE SMC 2022
abstract: Indoor thermal comfort in smart buildings has a significant impact on the health and performance of occupants. Consequently, machine learning (ML) is increasingly used to solve challenges related to indoor thermal comfort. Temporal variability of thermal comfort perception is an important problem that regulates occupant well-being and energy consumption. However, in most ML-based thermal comfort studies, temporal aspects such as the time of day, circadian rhythm, and outdoor temperature are not considered. This work addresses these problems. It investigates the impact of circadian rhythm and outdoor temperature on the prediction accuracy and classification performance of ML models. The data is gathered through month-long field experiments carried out in 14 classrooms of 5 schools, involving 512 primary school students. Four thermal comfort metrics are considered as the outputs of Deep Neural Networks and Support Vector Machine models for the dataset. The effect of temporal variability on school children's comfort is shown through a "time of day" analysis. Temporal variability in prediction accuracy is demonstrated (up to 80%). Furthermore, we show that outdoor temperature (varying over time) positively impacts the prediction performance of thermal comfort models by up to 30%. The importance of spatio-temporal context is demonstrated by contrasting micro-level (location specific) and macro-level (6 locations across a city) performance. The most important finding of this work is that a definitive improvement in prediction accuracy is shown with an increase in the time of day and sky illuminance, for multiple thermal comfort metrics.

The importance of spatio-temporal context is demonstrated by contrasting micro-level (location specific) and macro-level (6 locations across a city) performance. The most important finding of this work is that a definitive improvement in prediction accuracy is shown with an increase in the time of day and sky illuminance, for multiple thermal comfort metrics.
abstract_zh: 智能建筑的室内热舒适度对居住者的健康和表现有重大影响。因此，机器学习 (ML) 越来越多地用于解决与室内热舒适性相关的挑战。热舒适感的时间变化是调节居住者福祉和能源消耗的一个重要问题。然而，在大多数基于机器学习的热舒适研究中，没有考虑时间方面，例如一天中的时间、昼夜节律和室外温度。这项工作解决了这些问题。研究了昼夜节律和室外温度对 ML 模型的预测精度和分类性能的影响。这些数据是通过在 5 所学校的 14 个教室进行的为期一个月的现场实验收集的，涉及 512 名小学生。四个热舒适度指标被视为数据集的深度神经网络和支持向量机模型的输出。通过“一天中的时间”分析显示时间变化对学童舒适度的影响。证明了预测准确性的时间变异性（高达 80%）。此外，我们还发现室外温度（随时间变化）对热舒适模型的预测性能有高达 30% 的积极影响。时空背景的重要性通过对比微观层面（特定地点）和宏观层面（整个城市的 6 个地点）表现来证明。这项工作最重要的发现是，对于多个热舒适度指标，随着一天中不同时间和天空照度的增加，预测准确性得到了明确的提高。

AI.tldr: 本研究通过深度学习方法分析冬季室内热舒适度的时变特性，探讨昼夜节律和室外温度对预测模型的影响。
AI.motivation: 现有基于机器学习的热舒适研究未充分考虑时间因素（如昼夜节律、室外温度），导致预测精度不足，影响 occupants 健康与能源效率。
AI.method: 在5所学校14间教室进行月度实地实验，收集512名小学生数据，采用深度神经网络和支持向量机模型，分析时间因素与室外温度对热舒适度预测的影响，并对比微观与宏观层面性能差异。
AI.result: 时间因素导致预测准确率波动高达80%，室外温度提升预测性能达30%；时间与天空照度增加显著改善多指标热舒适度预测精度。
AI.conclusion: 时间因素（如时间、照度）与室外温度对热舒适度预测至关重要，需在模型中引入时空上下文以提升精度与实用性。

search_text: Are You Comfortable Now: Deep Learning the Temporal Variation in Thermal Comfort in Winters 您现在舒服吗：深度学习冬季热舒适度的时间变化 Indoor thermal comfort in smart buildings has a significant impact on the health and performance of occupants. Consequently, machine learning (ML) is increasingly used to solve challenges related to indoor thermal comfort. Temporal variability of thermal comfort perception is an important problem that regulates occupant well-being and energy consumption. However, in most ML-based thermal comfort studies, temporal aspects such as the time of day, circadian rhythm, and outdoor temperature are not considered. This work addresses these problems. It investigates the impact of circadian rhythm and outdoor temperature on the prediction accuracy and classification performance of ML models. The data is gathered through month-long field experiments carried out in 14 classrooms of 5 schools, involving 512 primary school students. Four thermal comfort metrics are considered as the outputs of Deep Neural Networks and Support Vector Machine models for the dataset. The effect of temporal variability on school children's comfort is shown through a "time of day" analysis. Temporal variability in prediction accuracy is demonstrated (up to 80%). Furthermore, we show that outdoor temperature (varying over time) positively impacts the prediction performance of thermal comfort models by up to 30%. The importance of spatio-temporal context is demonstrated by contrasting micro-level (location specific) and macro-level (6 locations across a city) performance. The most important finding of this work is that a definitive improvement in prediction accuracy is shown with an increase in the time of day and sky illuminance, for multiple thermal comfort metrics. 智能建筑的室内热舒适度对居住者的健康和表现有重大影响。因此，机器学习 (ML) 越来越多地用于解决与室内热舒适性相关的挑战。热舒适感的时间变化是调节居住者福祉和能源消耗的一个重要问题。然而，在大多数基于机器学习的热舒适研究中，没有考虑时间方面，例如一天中的时间、昼夜节律和室外温度。这项工作解决了这些问题。研究了昼夜节律和室外温度对 ML 模型的预测精度和分类性能的影响。这些数据是通过在 5 所学校的 14 个教室进行的为期一个月的现场实验收集的，涉及 512 名小学生。四个热舒适度指标被视为数据集的深度神经网络和支持向量机模型的输出。通过“一天中的时间”分析显示时间变化对学童舒适度的影响。证明了预测准确性的时间变异性（高达 80%）。此外，我们还发现室外温度（随时间变化）对热舒适模型的预测性能有高达 30% 的积极影响。时空背景的重要性通过对比微观层面（特定地点）和宏观层面（整个城市的 6 个地点）表现来证明。这项工作最重要的发现是，对于多个热舒适度指标，随着一天中不同时间和天空照度的增加，预测准确性得到了明确的提高。 本研究通过深度学习方法分析冬季室内热舒适度的时变特性，探讨昼夜节律和室外温度对预测模型的影响。 Betty Lala,Srikant Manas Kala,Anmol Rastogi,Kunal Dahiya,Aya Hagishima cs.LG,cs.AI,cs.CY

authors_text: Yaman Kumar Singla,Rajat Jha,Arunim Gupta,Milan Aggarwal,Aditya Garg,Tushar Malyan,Ayush Bhardwaj,Rajiv Ratn Shah,Balaji Krishnamurthy,Changyou Chen
title: Persuasion Strategies in Advertisements
title_zh: 广告中的说服策略
comment: Accepted at AAAI-23
comments: Accepted at AAAI-23
abstract: Modeling what makes an advertisement persuasive, i.e., eliciting the desired response from consumer, is critical to the study of propaganda, social psychology, and marketing. Despite its importance, computational modeling of persuasion in computer vision is still in its infancy, primarily due to the lack of benchmark datasets that can provide persuasion-strategy labels associated with ads. Motivated by persuasion literature in social psychology and marketing, we introduce an extensive vocabulary of persuasion strategies and build the first ad image corpus annotated with persuasion strategies. We then formulate the task of persuasion strategy prediction with multi-modal learning, where we design a multi-task attention fusion model that can leverage other ad-understanding tasks to predict persuasion strategies. Further, we conduct a real-world case study on 1600 advertising campaigns of 30 Fortune-500 companies where we use our model's predictions to analyze which strategies work with different demographics (age and gender). The dataset also provides image segmentation masks, which labels persuasion strategies in the corresponding ad images on the test split. We publicly release our code and dataset https://midas-research.github.io/persuasion-advertisements/.
summary: Modeling what makes an advertisement persuasive, i.e., eliciting the desired response from consumer, is critical to the study of propaganda, social psychology, and marketing. Despite its importance, computational modeling of persuasion in computer vision is still in its infancy, primarily due to the lack of benchmark datasets that can provide persuasion-strategy labels associated with ads. Motivated by persuasion literature in social psychology and marketing, we introduce an extensive vocabulary of persuasion strategies and build the first ad image corpus annotated with persuasion strategies. We then formulate the task of persuasion strategy prediction with multi-modal learning, where we design a multi-task attention fusion model that can leverage other ad-understanding tasks to predict persuasion strategies. Further, we conduct a real-world case study on 1600 advertising campaigns of 30 Fortune-500 companies where we use our model's predictions to analyze which strategies work with different demographics (age and gender). The dataset also provides image segmentation masks, which labels persuasion strategies in the corresponding ad images on the test split. We publicly release our code and dataset https://midas-research.github.io/persuasion-advertisements/.
abstract_zh: 模拟广告具有说服力的因素，即引起消费者期望的反应，对于宣传、社会心理学和营销的研究至关重要。尽管很重要，但计算机视觉中的说服计算建模仍处于起步阶段，这主要是由于缺乏可以提供与广告相关的说服策略标签的基准数据集。受社会心理学和营销学说服文献的启发，我们引入了广泛的说服策略词汇，并建立了第一个带有说服策略注释的广告图像语料库。然后，我们用多模态学习制定说服策略预测的任务，其中我们设计了一个多任务注意力融合模型，可以利用其他广告理解任务来预测说服策略。此外，我们对 30 家财富 500 强公司的 1600 个广告活动进行了真实案例研究，其中我们使用模型的预测来分析哪些策略适合不同的人口统计数据（年龄和性别）。该数据集还提供图像分割掩模，它在测试分割上的相应广告图像中标记说服策略。我们公开发布我们的代码和数据集 https://midas-research.github.io/persuasion-advertisements/。

AI.tldr: 构建首个标注说服策略的广告图像语料库，并开发多模态模型预测广告中的说服策略
AI.motivation: 现有研究缺乏标注说服策略的基准数据集，限制了计算模型的发展，需建立标注数据集以推进该领域研究
AI.method: 设计多任务注意力融合模型，结合多模态学习与广告理解任务进行说服策略预测，并构建包含图像分割掩码的数据集
AI.result: 分析了不同人口统计学特征（年龄、性别）对说服策略效果的影响，并公开了数据集和代码
AI.conclusion: 填补了广告说服策略计算建模的数据空白，验证了模型在不同人群中的策略有效性，推动相关研究与应用

authors_text: Jiacheng Li,Yannis Katsis,Tyler Baldwin,Ho-Cheol Kim,Andrew Bartko,Julian McAuley,Chun-Nan Hsu
title: SPOT: Knowledge-Enhanced Language Representations for Information Extraction
title_zh: SPOT：用于信息提取的知识增强语言表示
comment: CIKM 2022
comments: CIKM 2022
abstract: Knowledge-enhanced pre-trained models for language representation have been shown to be more effective in knowledge base construction tasks (i.e.,~relation extraction) than language models such as BERT. These knowledge-enhanced language models incorporate knowledge into pre-training to generate representations of entities or relationships. However, existing methods typically represent each entity with a separate embedding. As a result, these methods struggle to represent out-of-vocabulary entities and a large amount of parameters, on top of their underlying token models (i.e.,~the transformer), must be used and the number of entities that can be handled is limited in practice due to memory constraints. Moreover, existing models still struggle to represent entities and relationships simultaneously. To address these problems, we propose a new pre-trained model that learns representations of both entities and relationships from token spans and span pairs in the text respectively. By encoding spans efficiently with span modules, our model can represent both entities and their relationships but requires fewer parameters than existing models. We pre-trained our model with the knowledge graph extracted from Wikipedia and test it on a broad range of supervised and unsupervised information extraction tasks. Results show that our model learns better representations for both entities and relationships than baselines, while in supervised settings, fine-tuning our model outperforms RoBERTa consistently and achieves competitive results on information extraction tasks.
summary: Knowledge-enhanced pre-trained models for language representation have been shown to be more effective in knowledge base construction tasks (i.e.,~relation extraction) than language models such as BERT. These knowledge-enhanced language models incorporate knowledge into pre-training to generate representations of entities or relationships. However, existing methods typically represent each entity with a separate embedding. As a result, these methods struggle to represent out-of-vocabulary entities and a large amount of parameters, on top of their underlying token models (i.e.,~the transformer), must be used and the number of entities that can be handled is limited in practice due to memory constraints. Moreover, existing models still struggle to represent entities and relationships simultaneously. To address these problems, we propose a new pre-trained model that learns representations of both entities and relationships from token spans and span pairs in the text respectively. By encoding spans efficiently with span modules, our model can represent both entities and their relationships but requires fewer parameters than existing models. We pre-trained our model with the knowledge graph extracted from Wikipedia and test it on a broad range of supervised and unsupervised information extraction tasks. Results show that our model learns better representations for both entities and relationships than baselines, while in supervised settings, fine-tuning our model outperforms RoBERTa consistently and achieves competitive results on information extraction tasks.
abstract_zh: 用于语言表示的知识增强预训练模型已被证明在知识库构建任务（即关系提取）中比 BERT 等语言模型更有效。这些知识增强的语言模型将知识纳入预训练中，以生成实体或关系的表示。然而，现有的方法通常用单独的嵌入来表示每个实体。因此，这些方法很难表示词汇表之外的实体，并且在其底层令牌模型（即变压器）之上必须使用大量参数，并且由于内存限制，在实践中可以处理的实体数量受到限制。此外，现有模型仍然难以同时表示实体和关系。为了解决这些问题，我们提出了一种新的预训练模型，该模型分别从文本中的标记跨度和跨度对学习实体和关系的表示。通过使用 span 模块有效地编码 span，我们的模型可以表示实体及其关系，但需要的参数比现有模型更少。我们使用从维基百科提取的知识图来预先训练我们的模型，并在广泛的监督和无监督信息提取任务上对其进行测试。结果表明，我们的模型比基线学习到了更好的实体和关系表示，而在监督设置中，微调我们的模型始终优于 RoBERTa，并在信息提取任务上取得了有竞争力的结果。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为SPOT的知识增强语言表示模型，旨在通过更高效地学习实体和关系表示来提升信息抽取任务的性能。
AI.motivation: 现有知识增强模型存在处理词汇外实体能力不足、参数量大且难以同时表征实体与关系的局限性，需设计更高效的解决方案。
AI.method: 通过引入跨度模块（span module）分别从文本的token跨度和跨度对中学习实体及关系表示，减少参数量并提升表征能力，基于维基百科知识图谱进行预训练。
AI.result: 在监督和非监督信息抽取任务中，SPOT模型均优于基线方法，尤其在监督场景下微调效果持续超越RoBERTa，取得具有竞争力的结果。
AI.conclusion: SPOT模型通过高效表征实体与关系，有效解决了现有方法的参数冗余和表征局限问题，为信息抽取任务提供了更优的预训练方案。

search_text: SPOT: Knowledge-Enhanced Language Representations for Information Extraction SPOT：用于信息提取的知识增强语言表示 Knowledge-enhanced pre-trained models for language representation have been shown to be more effective in knowledge base construction tasks (i.e.,~relation extraction) than language models such as BERT. These knowledge-enhanced language models incorporate knowledge into pre-training to generate representations of entities or relationships. However, existing methods typically represent each entity with a separate embedding. As a result, these methods struggle to represent out-of-vocabulary entities and a large amount of parameters, on top of their underlying token models (i.e.,~the transformer), must be used and the number of entities that can be handled is limited in practice due to memory constraints. Moreover, existing models still struggle to represent entities and relationships simultaneously. To address these problems, we propose a new pre-trained model that learns representations of both entities and relationships from token spans and span pairs in the text respectively. By encoding spans efficiently with span modules, our model can represent both entities and their relationships but requires fewer parameters than existing models. We pre-trained our model with the knowledge graph extracted from Wikipedia and test it on a broad range of supervised and unsupervised information extraction tasks. Results show that our model learns better representations for both entities and relationships than baselines, while in supervised settings, fine-tuning our model outperforms RoBERTa consistently and achieves competitive results on information extraction tasks. 用于语言表示的知识增强预训练模型已被证明在知识库构建任务（即关系提取）中比 BERT 等语言模型更有效。这些知识增强的语言模型将知识纳入预训练中，以生成实体或关系的表示。然而，现有的方法通常用单独的嵌入来表示每个实体。因此，这些方法很难表示词汇表之外的实体，并且在其底层令牌模型（即变压器）之上必须使用大量参数，并且由于内存限制，在实践中可以处理的实体数量受到限制。此外，现有模型仍然难以同时表示实体和关系。为了解决这些问题，我们提出了一种新的预训练模型，该模型分别从文本中的标记跨度和跨度对学习实体和关系的表示。通过使用 span 模块有效地编码 span，我们的模型可以表示实体及其关系，但需要的参数比现有模型更少。我们使用从维基百科提取的知识图来预先训练我们的模型，并在广泛的监督和无监督信息提取任务上对其进行测试。结果表明，我们的模型比基线学习到了更好的实体和关系表示，而在监督设置中，微调我们的模型始终优于 RoBERTa，并在信息提取任务上取得了有竞争力的结果。 本文提出了一种名为SPOT的知识增强语言表示模型，旨在通过更高效地学习实体和关系表示来提升信息抽取任务的性能。 Jiacheng Li,Yannis Katsis,Tyler Baldwin,Ho-Cheol Kim,Andrew Bartko,Julian McAuley,Chun-Nan Hsu cs.CL,cs.AI

title: A Novel Hybrid Sampling Framework for Imbalanced Learning
title_zh: 一种用于不平衡学习的新型混合采样框架
comment: Submitted to "Expert Systems with Applications"
comments: Submitted to "Expert Systems with Applications"
abstract: Class imbalance is a frequently occurring scenario in classification tasks. Learning from imbalanced data poses a major challenge, which has instigated a lot of research in this area. Data preprocessing using sampling techniques is a standard approach to deal with the imbalance present in the data. Since standard classification algorithms do not perform well on imbalanced data, the dataset needs to be adequately balanced before training. This can be accomplished by oversampling the minority class or undersampling the majority class. In this study, a novel hybrid sampling algorithm has been proposed. To overcome the limitations of the sampling techniques while ensuring the quality of the retained sampled dataset, a sophisticated framework has been developed to properly combine three different sampling techniques. Neighborhood Cleaning rule is first applied to reduce the imbalance. Random undersampling is then strategically coupled with the SMOTE algorithm to obtain an optimal balance in the dataset. This proposed hybrid methodology, termed "SMOTE-RUS-NC", has been compared with other state-of-the-art sampling techniques. The strategy is further incorporated into the ensemble learning framework to obtain a more robust classification algorithm, termed "SRN-BRF". Rigorous experimentation has been conducted on 26 imbalanced datasets with varying degrees of imbalance. In virtually all datasets, the proposed two algorithms outperformed existing sampling strategies, in many cases by a substantial margin. Especially in highly imbalanced datasets where popular sampling techniques failed utterly, they achieved unparalleled performance. The superior results obtained demonstrate the efficacy of the proposed models and their potential to be powerful sampling algorithms in imbalanced domain.
