To overcome the limitations of the sampling techniques while ensuring the quality of the retained sampled dataset, a sophisticated framework has been developed to properly combine three different sampling techniques. Neighborhood Cleaning rule is first applied to reduce the imbalance. Random undersampling is then strategically coupled with the SMOTE algorithm to obtain an optimal balance in the dataset. This proposed hybrid methodology, termed "SMOTE-RUS-NC", has been compared with other state-of-the-art sampling techniques. The strategy is further incorporated into the ensemble learning framework to obtain a more robust classification algorithm, termed "SRN-BRF". Rigorous experimentation has been conducted on 26 imbalanced datasets with varying degrees of imbalance. In virtually all datasets, the proposed two algorithms outperformed existing sampling strategies, in many cases by a substantial margin. Especially in highly imbalanced datasets where popular sampling techniques failed utterly, they achieved unparalleled performance. The superior results obtained demonstrate the efficacy of the proposed models and their potential to be powerful sampling algorithms in imbalanced domain.
abstract_zh: 类别不平衡是分类任务中经常出现的情况。从不平衡数据中学习是一个重大挑战，这引发了该领域的大量研究。使用采样技术进行数据预处理是处理数据中存在的不平衡问题的标准方法。由于标准分类算法在不平衡数据上表现不佳，因此在训练之前需要充分平衡数据集。这可以通过对少数类进行过采样或对多数类进行欠采样来实现。在这项研究中，提出了一种新颖的混合采样算法。为了克服采样技术的局限性，同时确保保留采样数据集的质量，开发了一个复杂的框架来正确组合三种不同的采样技术。首先应用邻里清洁规则来减少不平衡。然后随机欠采样与 SMOTE 算法策略性地结合，以获得数据集中的最佳平衡。这种提出的混合方法被称为“SMOTE-RUS-NC”，已与其他最先进的采样技术进行了比较。该策略被进一步纳入集成学习框架中，以获得更鲁棒的分类算法，称为“SRN-BRF”。对26个不同程度不平衡的不平衡数据集进行了严格的实验。在几乎所有数据集中，所提出的两种算法都优于现有的采样策略，在许多情况下明显优于现有的采样策略。特别是在高度不平衡的数据集中，流行的采样技术完全失败，它们取得了无与伦比的性能。获得的优异结果证明了所提出模型的有效性及其在不平衡域中成为强大采样算法的潜力。

AI.tldr: 提出一种新的混合采样框架SMOTE-RUS-NC以解决分类任务中的类别不平衡问题，并结合集成学习构建SRN-BRF算法。
AI.motivation: 现有采样技术存在过采样导致过拟合、欠采样丢失信息等局限，需融合多种方法优势以提升不平衡数据分类效果。
AI.method: 融合Neighborhood Cleaning规则、随机欠采样与SMOTE算法构建SMOTE-RUS-NC框架，并集成至SRN-BRF算法中。
AI.result: 在26个不平衡数据集测试中，SMOTE-RUS-NC和SRN-BRF算法在多数情况下显著优于现有方法，尤其在高度不平衡数据集上表现卓越。
AI.conclusion: 实验证明所提框架有效，展示了其在不平衡学习领域的应用潜力。

ai_content.tldr: 提出一种新的混合采样框架SMOTE-RUS-NC以解决分类任务中的类别不平衡问题，并结合集成学习构建SRN-BRF算法。

authors_text: Chenglong Wang,Jiangyan Yi,Jianhua Tao,Haiyang Sun,Xun Chen,Zhengkun Tian,Haoxin Ma,Cunhang Fan,Ruibo Fu
title: Fully Automated End-to-End Fake Audio Detection
title_zh: 全自动端到端虚假音频检测
abstract: The existing fake audio detection systems often rely on expert experience to design the acoustic features or manually design the hyperparameters of the network structure. However, artificial adjustment of the parameters can have a relatively obvious influence on the results. It is almost impossible to manually set the best set of parameters. Therefore this paper proposes a fully automated end-toend fake audio detection method. We first use wav2vec pre-trained model to obtain a high-level representation of the speech. Furthermore, for the network structure, we use a modified version of the differentiable architecture search (DARTS) named light-DARTS. It learns deep speech representations while automatically learning and optimizing complex neural structures consisting of convolutional operations and residual blocks. The experimental results on the ASVspoof 2019 LA dataset show that our proposed system achieves an equal error rate (EER) of 1.08%, which outperforms the state-of-the-art single system.
summary: The existing fake audio detection systems often rely on expert experience to design the acoustic features or manually design the hyperparameters of the network structure. However, artificial adjustment of the parameters can have a relatively obvious influence on the results. It is almost impossible to manually set the best set of parameters. Therefore this paper proposes a fully automated end-toend fake audio detection method. We first use wav2vec pre-trained model to obtain a high-level representation of the speech. Furthermore, for the network structure, we use a modified version of the differentiable architecture search (DARTS) named light-DARTS. It learns deep speech representations while automatically learning and optimizing complex neural structures consisting of convolutional operations and residual blocks. The experimental results on the ASVspoof 2019 LA dataset show that our proposed system achieves an equal error rate (EER) of 1.08%, which outperforms the state-of-the-art single system.
abstract_zh: 现有的虚假音频检测系统往往依赖专家经验来设计声学特征或手动设计网络结构的超参数。但人为调整参数会对结果产生比较明显的影响。手动设置最佳参数集几乎是不可能的。因此，本文提出了一种全自动的端到端虚假音频检测方法。我们首先使用 wav2vec 预训练模型来获得语音的高级表示。此外，对于网络结构，我们使用可微架构搜索（DARTS）的修改版本，名为 light-DARTS。它学习深度语音表示，同时自动学习和优化由卷积运算和残差块组成的复杂神经结构。 ASVspoof 2019 LA 数据集上的实验结果表明，我们提出的系统实现了 1.08% 的等错误率 (EER)，优于最先进的单一系统。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种全自动端到端的虚假音频检测方法，旨在克服传统系统依赖人工设计特征和超参数的局限性。
AI.motivation: 现有虚假音频检测系统依赖专家经验设计声学特征或手动调整网络超参数，人工干预可能导致结果不稳定且难以找到最优参数组合。
AI.method: 采用预训练的wav2vec模型提取语音高层表示，并使用改进的轻量级DARTS（light-DARTS）自动学习和优化包含卷积操作与残差块的复杂神经网络结构。
AI.result: 在ASVspoof 2019 LA数据集上，系统实现1.08%的等错误率（EER），优于当前最先进的单一系统。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过自动化特征提取与网络结构优化，显著提升了虚假音频检测性能，验证了端到端自动学习的有效性。

search_text: Fully Automated End-to-End Fake Audio Detection 全自动端到端虚假音频检测 The existing fake audio detection systems often rely on expert experience to design the acoustic features or manually design the hyperparameters of the network structure. However, artificial adjustment of the parameters can have a relatively obvious influence on the results. It is almost impossible to manually set the best set of parameters. Therefore this paper proposes a fully automated end-toend fake audio detection method. We first use wav2vec pre-trained model to obtain a high-level representation of the speech. Furthermore, for the network structure, we use a modified version of the differentiable architecture search (DARTS) named light-DARTS. It learns deep speech representations while automatically learning and optimizing complex neural structures consisting of convolutional operations and residual blocks. The experimental results on the ASVspoof 2019 LA dataset show that our proposed system achieves an equal error rate (EER) of 1.08%, which outperforms the state-of-the-art single system. 现有的虚假音频检测系统往往依赖专家经验来设计声学特征或手动设计网络结构的超参数。但人为调整参数会对结果产生比较明显的影响。手动设置最佳参数集几乎是不可能的。因此，本文提出了一种全自动的端到端虚假音频检测方法。我们首先使用 wav2vec 预训练模型来获得语音的高级表示。此外，对于网络结构，我们使用可微架构搜索（DARTS）的修改版本，名为 light-DARTS。它学习深度语音表示，同时自动学习和优化由卷积运算和残差块组成的复杂神经结构。 ASVspoof 2019 LA 数据集上的实验结果表明，我们提出的系统实现了 1.08% 的等错误率 (EER)，优于最先进的单一系统。 本文提出了一种全自动端到端的虚假音频检测方法，旨在克服传统系统依赖人工设计特征和超参数的局限性。 Chenglong Wang,Jiangyan Yi,Jianhua Tao,Haiyang Sun,Xun Chen,Zhengkun Tian,Haoxin Ma,Cunhang Fan,Ruibo Fu cs.SD,cs.AI,eess.AS

authors_text: Aris L. Moustakas,George C. Alexandropoulos,Mérouane Debbah
title: Reconfigurable Intelligent Surfaces and Capacity Optimization: A Large System Analysis
title_zh: 可重构智能表面和容量优化：大型系统分析
comment: 14 pages, 7 figures, submitted to an IEEE Transactions journal. arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2109.07754
comments: 14 pages, 7 figures, submitted to an IEEE Transactions journal. arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2109.07754
abstract: Reconfigurable Intelligent Surfaces (RISs), comprising large numbers of low-cost and almost passive metamaterials with tunable reflection properties, have been recently proposed as an enabling technology for programmable wireless propagation environments. In this paper, we present asymptotic closed-form expressions for the mean and variance of the mutual information metric for a multi-antenna transmitter-receiver pair in the presence of multiple RISs, using methods from statistical physics. While nominally valid in the large system limit, we show that the derived Gaussian approximation for the mutual information can be quite accurate, even for modest-sized antenna arrays and metasurfaces. The above results are particularly useful when fast-fading conditions are present, which renders instantaneous channel estimation extremely challenging. We find that, when the channel close to an RIS is correlated, for instance due to small angle spread, which is reasonable for wireless systems with increasing carrier frequencies, the communication link benefits significantly from statistical RIS phase optimization, resulting in gains that are surprisingly higher than the nearly uncorrelated case. Using our novel asymptotic properties of the correlation matrices of the impinging and outgoing signals at the RISs, we can optimize the metasurfaces without brute-force numerical optimization. Furthermore, when the desired reflection from any of the RISs departs significantly from geometrical optics, the metasurfaces can be optimized to provide robust communication links, without significant need for their optimal placement.
summary: Reconfigurable Intelligent Surfaces (RISs), comprising large numbers of low-cost and almost passive metamaterials with tunable reflection properties, have been recently proposed as an enabling technology for programmable wireless propagation environments. In this paper, we present asymptotic closed-form expressions for the mean and variance of the mutual information metric for a multi-antenna transmitter-receiver pair in the presence of multiple RISs, using methods from statistical physics. While nominally valid in the large system limit, we show that the derived Gaussian approximation for the mutual information can be quite accurate, even for modest-sized antenna arrays and metasurfaces. The above results are particularly useful when fast-fading conditions are present, which renders instantaneous channel estimation extremely challenging. We find that, when the channel close to an RIS is correlated, for instance due to small angle spread, which is reasonable for wireless systems with increasing carrier frequencies, the communication link benefits significantly from statistical RIS phase optimization, resulting in gains that are surprisingly higher than the nearly uncorrelated case. Using our novel asymptotic properties of the correlation matrices of the impinging and outgoing signals at the RISs, we can optimize the metasurfaces without brute-force numerical optimization. Furthermore, when the desired reflection from any of the RISs departs significantly from geometrical optics, the metasurfaces can be optimized to provide robust communication links, without significant need for their optimal placement.
abstract_zh: 可重构智能表面（RIS）由大量低成本且几乎无源的具有可调反射特性的超材料组成，最近被提议作为可编程无线传播环境的支持技术。在本文中，我们使用统计物理学的方法，在存在多个 RIS 的情况下，提出了多天线发射机-接收机对的互信息度量的均值和方差的渐近封闭式表达式。虽然名义上在大系统限制下有效，但我们表明，即使对于中等尺寸的天线阵列和超表面，导出的互信息高斯近似也可以非常准确。当存在快衰落条件时，上述结果特别有用，这使得瞬时信道估计极具挑战性。我们发现，当靠近 RIS 的信道相关时，例如由于小角度扩展（这对于载波频率不断增加的无线系统来说是合理的），通信链路会从统计 RIS 相位优化中显着受益，从而获得比几乎不相关情况高出惊人的增益。利用 RIS 上的撞击和传出信号的相关矩阵的新颖渐近特性，我们可以优化超表面，而无需强力数值优化。此外，当任何 RIS 的所需反射明显偏离几何光学时，可以优化超表面以提供强大的通信链路，而无需对其进行最佳放置。

AI.tldr: 本文通过大系统分析方法研究可重构智能表面（RIS）的容量优化问题，推导了多天线系统中互信息的均值和方差的渐近闭合表达式。
AI.motivation: RIS作为一种低成本、可编程的无线传播环境技术，需解决快速衰落场景下信道估计困难及表面相位优化问题，以提升通信可靠性。
AI.method: 采用统计物理方法，结合大系统极限理论，分析RIS入射与出射信号的互信息特性，并利用相关矩阵的渐近性质实现优化。
AI.result: 推导的高斯近似在中小规模系统中仍具高精度，发现统计相位优化在信道相关场景下可显著提升通信增益，且无需精确RIS部署位置。
AI.conclusion: RIS通过统计优化可有效增强通信容量与鲁棒性，为高频无线系统提供高效、低成本的传播环境调控方案。

authors_text: Hongxin Li,Xu Yang,Yuran Yang,Shuqi Mei,Zhaoxiang Zhang
title: MemoNav: Selecting Informative Memories for Visual Navigation
title_zh: MemoNav：选择信息记忆进行视觉导航
comment: Submitted to ICLR2023
comments: Submitted to ICLR2023
abstract: Image-goal navigation is a challenging task, as it requires the agent to navigate to a target indicated by an image in a previously unseen scene. Current methods introduce diverse memory mechanisms which save navigation history to solve this task. However, these methods use all observations in the memory for generating navigation actions without considering which fraction of this memory is informative. To address this limitation, we present the MemoNav, a novel memory mechanism for image-goal navigation, which retains the agent's informative short-term memory and long-term memory to improve the navigation performance on a multi-goal task. The node features on the agent's topological map are stored in the short-term memory, as these features are dynamically updated. To aid the short-term memory, we also generate long-term memory by continuously aggregating the short-term memory via a graph attention module. The MemoNav retains the informative fraction of the short-term memory via a forgetting module based on a Transformer decoder and then incorporates this retained short-term memory and the long-term memory into working memory. Lastly, the agent uses the working memory for action generation. We evaluate our model on a new multi-goal navigation dataset. The experimental results show that the MemoNav outperforms the SoTA methods by a large margin with a smaller fraction of navigation history. The results also empirically show that our model is less likely to be trapped in a deadlock, which further validates that the MemoNav improves the agent's navigation efficiency by reducing redundant steps.
summary: Image-goal navigation is a challenging task, as it requires the agent to navigate to a target indicated by an image in a previously unseen scene. Current methods introduce diverse memory mechanisms which save navigation history to solve this task. However, these methods use all observations in the memory for generating navigation actions without considering which fraction of this memory is informative. To address this limitation, we present the MemoNav, a novel memory mechanism for image-goal navigation, which retains the agent's informative short-term memory and long-term memory to improve the navigation performance on a multi-goal task. The node features on the agent's topological map are stored in the short-term memory, as these features are dynamically updated. To aid the short-term memory, we also generate long-term memory by continuously aggregating the short-term memory via a graph attention module. The MemoNav retains the informative fraction of the short-term memory via a forgetting module based on a Transformer decoder and then incorporates this retained short-term memory and the long-term memory into working memory. Lastly, the agent uses the working memory for action generation. We evaluate our model on a new multi-goal navigation dataset. The experimental results show that the MemoNav outperforms the SoTA methods by a large margin with a smaller fraction of navigation history. The results also empirically show that our model is less likely to be trapped in a deadlock, which further validates that the MemoNav improves the agent's navigation efficiency by reducing redundant steps.
abstract_zh: 图像目标导航是一项具有挑战性的任务，因为它需要代理导航到以前未见过的场景中的图像指示的目标。当前的方法引入了多种存储机制来保存导航历史来解决此任务。然而，这些方法使用内存中的所有观察来生成导航动作，而不考虑该内存的哪一部分是信息性的。为了解决这个限制，我们提出了 MemoNav，一种用于图像目标导航的新型记忆机制，它保留了代理的信息丰富的短期记忆和长期记忆，以提高多目标任务的导航性能。代理拓扑图上的节点特征存储在短期存储器中，因为这些特征是动态更新的。为了帮助短期记忆，我们还通过图注意力模块不断聚合短期记忆来生成长期记忆。 MemoNav 通过基于 Transformer 解码器的遗忘模块保留短期记忆的信息部分，然后将保留的短期记忆和长期记忆合并到工作记忆中。最后，代理使用工作记忆来生成动作。我们在新的多目标导航数据集上评估我们的模型。实验结果表明，MemoNav 在导航历史记录较少的情况下大幅优于 SoTA 方法。结果还从经验上表明，我们的模型不太可能陷入僵局，这进一步验证了 MemoNav 通过减少冗余步骤来提高代理的导航效率。

AI.tldr: 本文提出MemoNav，一种用于图像目标导航的新记忆机制，通过筛选短期和长期记忆中的信息性内容以提升多目标任务的导航性能。
AI.motivation: 现有导航方法未区分记忆中的信息量，导致冗余步骤和死锁问题，需设计能保留关键记忆的机制以提高效率。
AI.method: MemoNav通过短期记忆存储拓扑图节点特征，利用图注意力模块生成长期记忆，并基于Transformer解码器的遗忘模块筛选短期记忆，最终结合工作记忆生成导航动作。
AI.result: 实验表明，MemoNav在更小的历史数据量下显著优于现有方法，且减少死锁发生，验证了其导航效率的提升。
AI.conclusion: MemoNav通过有效筛选信息记忆，优化了导航过程中的冗余步骤，证明了其在多目标视觉导航任务中的有效性。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出MemoNav，一种用于图像目标导航的新记忆机制，通过筛选短期和长期记忆中的信息性内容以提升多目标任务的导航性能。

search_text: MemoNav: Selecting Informative Memories for Visual Navigation MemoNav：选择信息记忆进行视觉导航 Image-goal navigation is a challenging task, as it requires the agent to navigate to a target indicated by an image in a previously unseen scene. Current methods introduce diverse memory mechanisms which save navigation history to solve this task. However, these methods use all observations in the memory for generating navigation actions without considering which fraction of this memory is informative. To address this limitation, we present the MemoNav, a novel memory mechanism for image-goal navigation, which retains the agent's informative short-term memory and long-term memory to improve the navigation performance on a multi-goal task. The node features on the agent's topological map are stored in the short-term memory, as these features are dynamically updated. To aid the short-term memory, we also generate long-term memory by continuously aggregating the short-term memory via a graph attention module. The MemoNav retains the informative fraction of the short-term memory via a forgetting module based on a Transformer decoder and then incorporates this retained short-term memory and the long-term memory into working memory. Lastly, the agent uses the working memory for action generation. We evaluate our model on a new multi-goal navigation dataset. The experimental results show that the MemoNav outperforms the SoTA methods by a large margin with a smaller fraction of navigation history. The results also empirically show that our model is less likely to be trapped in a deadlock, which further validates that the MemoNav improves the agent's navigation efficiency by reducing redundant steps. 图像目标导航是一项具有挑战性的任务，因为它需要代理导航到以前未见过的场景中的图像指示的目标。当前的方法引入了多种存储机制来保存导航历史来解决此任务。然而，这些方法使用内存中的所有观察来生成导航动作，而不考虑该内存的哪一部分是信息性的。为了解决这个限制，我们提出了 MemoNav，一种用于图像目标导航的新型记忆机制，它保留了代理的信息丰富的短期记忆和长期记忆，以提高多目标任务的导航性能。代理拓扑图上的节点特征存储在短期存储器中，因为这些特征是动态更新的。为了帮助短期记忆，我们还通过图注意力模块不断聚合短期记忆来生成长期记忆。 MemoNav 通过基于 Transformer 解码器的遗忘模块保留短期记忆的信息部分，然后将保留的短期记忆和长期记忆合并到工作记忆中。最后，代理使用工作记忆来生成动作。我们在新的多目标导航数据集上评估我们的模型。实验结果表明，MemoNav 在导航历史记录较少的情况下大幅优于 SoTA 方法。结果还从经验上表明，我们的模型不太可能陷入僵局，这进一步验证了 MemoNav 通过减少冗余步骤来提高代理的导航效率。 本文提出MemoNav，一种用于图像目标导航的新记忆机制，通过筛选短期和长期记忆中的信息性内容以提升多目标任务的导航性能。 Hongxin Li,Xu Yang,Yuran Yang,Shuqi Mei,Zhaoxiang Zhang cs.CV,cs.AI

title: Exploring Adversarial Robustness of Vision Transformers in the Spectral Perspective
title_zh: 从光谱角度探索视觉变压器的对抗鲁棒性
comment: Accepted in IEEE/CVF Winter Conference on Applications of Computer Vision (WACV) 2024
comments: Accepted in IEEE/CVF Winter Conference on Applications of Computer Vision (WACV) 2024
abstract: The Vision Transformer has emerged as a powerful tool for image classification tasks, surpassing the performance of convolutional neural networks (CNNs). Recently, many researchers have attempted to understand the robustness of Transformers against adversarial attacks. However, previous researches have focused solely on perturbations in the spatial domain. This paper proposes an additional perspective that explores the adversarial robustness of Transformers against frequency-selective perturbations in the spectral domain. To facilitate comparison between these two domains, an attack framework is formulated as a flexible tool for implementing attacks on images in the spatial and spectral domains. The experiments reveal that Transformers rely more on phase and low frequency information, which can render them more vulnerable to frequency-selective attacks than CNNs. This work offers new insights into the properties and adversarial robustness of Transformers.
summary: The Vision Transformer has emerged as a powerful tool for image classification tasks, surpassing the performance of convolutional neural networks (CNNs). Recently, many researchers have attempted to understand the robustness of Transformers against adversarial attacks. However, previous researches have focused solely on perturbations in the spatial domain. This paper proposes an additional perspective that explores the adversarial robustness of Transformers against frequency-selective perturbations in the spectral domain. To facilitate comparison between these two domains, an attack framework is formulated as a flexible tool for implementing attacks on images in the spatial and spectral domains. The experiments reveal that Transformers rely more on phase and low frequency information, which can render them more vulnerable to frequency-selective attacks than CNNs. This work offers new insights into the properties and adversarial robustness of Transformers.
abstract_zh: Vision Transformer 已成为图像分类任务的强大工具，其性能超越了卷积神经网络 (CNN)。最近，许多研究人员试图了解 Transformers 针对对抗性攻击的鲁棒性。然而，先前的研究仅集中于空间域的扰动。本文提出了一个额外的视角，探讨 Transformers 针对谱域中频率选择性扰动的对抗鲁棒性。为了便于这两个领域之间的比较，攻击框架被制定为一种灵活的工具，用于对空间和光谱域中的图像实施攻击。实验表明，Transformers 更多地依赖相位和低频信息，这使得它们比 CNN 更容易受到频率选择性攻击。这项工作为变形金刚的属性和对抗鲁棒性提供了新的见解。

AI.tldr: 本文从频域角度研究视觉Transformer的对抗鲁棒性，提出频域选择性扰动攻击框架，揭示Transformer对频域攻击的脆弱性。
AI.motivation: 现有研究仅关注空间域对抗攻击，而Transformer在频域特性方面的鲁棒性尚未被充分探索，需建立跨域对比分析框架。
AI.method: 构建支持空间域与频域攻击的统一框架，通过频率选择性扰动分析Transformer的频域特征依赖性。
AI.result: 实验表明Transformer更依赖相位和低频信息，相较于CNN在频域攻击下表现出更高脆弱性。
AI.conclusion: 该研究为理解Transformer的对抗鲁棒性提供了频域视角的新见解，揭示其与CNN在频域特征利用上的本质差异。

title: Using Multi-Encoder Fusion Strategies to Improve Personalized Response Selection
title_zh: 使用多编码器融合策略改进个性化响应选择
comment: Accepted by COLING 2022. arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2105.09050 by other authors
comments: Accepted by COLING 2022. arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2105.09050 by other authors
abstract: Personalized response selection systems are generally grounded on persona. However, there exists a co-relation between persona and empathy, which is not explored well in these systems. Also, faithfulness to the conversation context plunges when a contradictory or an off-topic response is selected. This paper attempts to address these issues by proposing a suite of fusion strategies that capture the interaction between persona, emotion, and entailment information of the utterances. Ablation studies on the Persona-Chat dataset show that incorporating emotion and entailment improves the accuracy of response selection. We combine our fusion strategies and concept-flow encoding to train a BERT-based model which outperforms the previous methods by margins larger than 2.3 % on original personas and 1.9 % on revised personas in terms of hits@1 (top-1 accuracy), achieving a new state-of-the-art performance on the Persona-Chat dataset.
summary: Personalized response selection systems are generally grounded on persona. However, there exists a co-relation between persona and empathy, which is not explored well in these systems. Also, faithfulness to the conversation context plunges when a contradictory or an off-topic response is selected. This paper attempts to address these issues by proposing a suite of fusion strategies that capture the interaction between persona, emotion, and entailment information of the utterances. Ablation studies on the Persona-Chat dataset show that incorporating emotion and entailment improves the accuracy of response selection. We combine our fusion strategies and concept-flow encoding to train a BERT-based model which outperforms the previous methods by margins larger than 2.3 % on original personas and 1.9 % on revised personas in terms of hits@1 (top-1 accuracy), achieving a new state-of-the-art performance on the Persona-Chat dataset.
abstract_zh: 个性化响应选择系统通常基于人物角色。然而，人格面具和同理心之间存在着相互关系，而这些系统并没有很好地探讨这一关系。此外，当选择矛盾或偏离主题的响应时，对对话上下文的忠实度就会下降。本文试图通过提出一套融合策略来解决这些问题，这些策略捕获人物角色、情感和话语蕴含信息之间的相互作用。对 Persona-Chat 数据集的消融研究表明，结合情感和蕴涵可以提高响应选择的准确性。我们结合融合策略和概念流编码来训练基于 BERT 的模型，该模型在 hit@1（top-1 准确率）方面优于之前的方法，在原始角色上优于之前的方法 2.3%，在修改后的角色上优于之前的方法 1.9%，在 Persona-Chat 数据集上实现了新的最先进的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出多编码器融合策略，通过结合人格、情感和蕴含信息改进个性化响应选择系统。
AI.motivation: 现有系统未充分利用人格与共情的关联性，导致响应选择不忠实于对话上下文且准确性不足。
AI.method: 设计融合策略捕捉人格、情感及蕴含信息交互，结合概念流编码训练改进的BERT模型。
AI.result: 在Persona-Chat数据集上，hits@1指标较原方法提升2.3%（原始人格）和1.9%（修订人格），达到新SOTA。
AI.conclusion: 融合多模态信息的策略有效提升响应选择准确性，验证了情感与人格关联建模的重要性。

title: Vision-Language Matching for Text-to-Image Synthesis via Generative Adversarial Networks
title_zh: 通过生成对抗网络进行文本到图像合成的视觉语言匹配
comment: 14 pages
comments: 14 pages
abstract: Text-to-image synthesis aims to generate a photo-realistic and semantic consistent image from a specific text description. The images synthesized by off-the-shelf models usually contain limited components compared with the corresponding image and text description, which decreases the image quality and the textual-visual consistency. To address this issue, we propose a novel Vision-Language Matching strategy for text-to-image synthesis, named VLMGAN*, which introduces a dual vision-language matching mechanism to strengthen the image quality and semantic consistency. The dual vision-language matching mechanism considers textual-visual matching between the generated image and the corresponding text description, and visual-visual consistent constraints between the synthesized image and the real image. Given a specific text description, VLMGAN* firstly encodes it into textual features and then feeds them to a dual vision-language matching-based generative model to synthesize a photo-realistic and textual semantic consistent image. Besides, the popular evaluation metrics for text-to-image synthesis are borrowed from simple image generation, which mainly evaluates the reality and diversity of the synthesized images. Therefore, we introduce a metric named Vision-Language Matching Score (VLMS) to evaluate the performance of text-to-image synthesis which can consider both the image quality and the semantic consistency between synthesized image and the description. The proposed dual multi-level vision-language matching strategy can be applied to other text-to-image synthesis methods. We implement this strategy on two popular baselines, which are marked with ${\text{VLMGAN}_{+\text{AttnGAN}}}$ and ${\text{VLMGAN}_{+\text{DFGAN}}}$. The experimental results on two widely-used datasets show that the model achieves significant improvements over other state-of-the-art methods.
summary: Text-to-image synthesis aims to generate a photo-realistic and semantic consistent image from a specific text description. The images synthesized by off-the-shelf models usually contain limited components compared with the corresponding image and text description, which decreases the image quality and the textual-visual consistency. To address this issue, we propose a novel Vision-Language Matching strategy for text-to-image synthesis, named VLMGAN*, which introduces a dual vision-language matching mechanism to strengthen the image quality and semantic consistency. The dual vision-language matching mechanism considers textual-visual matching between the generated image and the corresponding text description, and visual-visual consistent constraints between the synthesized image and the real image. Given a specific text description, VLMGAN* firstly encodes it into textual features and then feeds them to a dual vision-language matching-based generative model to synthesize a photo-realistic and textual semantic consistent image. Besides, the popular evaluation metrics for text-to-image synthesis are borrowed from simple image generation, which mainly evaluates the reality and diversity of the synthesized images. Therefore, we introduce a metric named Vision-Language Matching Score (VLMS) to evaluate the performance of text-to-image synthesis which can consider both the image quality and the semantic consistency between synthesized image and the description. The proposed dual multi-level vision-language matching strategy can be applied to other text-to-image synthesis methods. We implement this strategy on two popular baselines, which are marked with ${\text{VLMGAN}_{+\text{AttnGAN}}}$ and ${\text{VLMGAN}_{+\text{DFGAN}}}$. The experimental results on two widely-used datasets show that the model achieves significant improvements over other state-of-the-art methods.
abstract_zh: 文本到图像合成的目的是根据特定的文本描述生成逼真且语义一致的图像。与相应的图像和文本描述相比，现成模型合成的图像通常包含有限的成分，这降低了图像质量和文本视觉一致性。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种用于文本到图像合成的新型视觉语言匹配策略，名为 VLMGAN*，它引入了双视觉语言匹配机制来增强图像质量和语义一致性。双视觉-语言匹配机制考虑了生成图像与相应文本描述之间的文本-视觉匹配，以及合成图像与真实图像之间的视觉-视觉一致约束。给定特定的文本描述，VLMGAN* 首先将其编码为文本特征，然后将其输入基于双视觉语言匹配的生成模型，以合成照片般真实且文本语义一致的图像。此外，文本到图像合成的流行评估指标借鉴了简单的图像生成，主要评估合成图像的真实性和多样性。因此，我们引入了一种名为视觉语言匹配分数（VLMS）的指标来评估文本到图像合成的性能，该指标可以同时考虑图像质量和合成图像与描述之间的语义一致性。所提出的双重多级视觉语言匹配策略可以应用于其他文本到图像合成方法。我们在两个流行的基线上实施此策略，分别标记为 ${\text{VLMGAN}_{+\text{AttnGAN}}}$ 和 ${\text{VLMGAN}_{+\text{DFGAN}}}$。在两个广泛使用的数据集上的实验结果表明，该模型比其他最先进的方法取得了显着的改进。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于生成对抗网络的视觉-语言匹配策略VLMGAN*，用于提升文本到图像合成的图像质量与语义一致性。
AI.motivation: 现有文本到图像生成模型生成的图像与文本描述的语义一致性不足，且缺乏对视觉-语言匹配的全面约束。
AI.method: 设计双视觉-语言匹配机制，通过文本-图像匹配与合成图像-真实图像的视觉一致性约束，结合新指标VLMS评估生成效果。
AI.result: 在两个常用数据集上实验表明，VLMGAN*在图像质量与语义一致性上显著优于现有先进方法。
AI.conclusion: 提出的双层级视觉-语言匹配策略可有效提升文本到图像合成性能，并适用于其他生成方法。

We implement this strategy on two popular baselines, which are marked with ${\text{VLMGAN}_{+\text{AttnGAN}}}$ and ${\text{VLMGAN}_{+\text{DFGAN}}}$. authors_text: Wentao Liu,Chaofan Ma,Yuhuan Yang,Weidi Xie,Ya Zhang
title: Transforming the Interactive Segmentation for Medical Imaging
title_zh: 改变医学成像的交互式分割
comment: Accepted to MICCAI 2022
comments: Accepted to MICCAI 2022
abstract: The goal of this paper is to interactively refine the automatic segmentation on challenging structures that fall behind human performance, either due to the scarcity of available annotations or the difficulty nature of the problem itself, for example, on segmenting cancer or small organs. Specifically, we propose a novel Transformer-based architecture for Interactive Segmentation (TIS), that treats the refinement task as a procedure for grouping pixels with similar features to those clicks given by the end users. Our proposed architecture is composed of Transformer Decoder variants, which naturally fulfills feature comparison with the attention mechanisms. In contrast to existing approaches, our proposed TIS is not limited to binary segmentations, and allows the user to edit masks for arbitrary number of categories. To validate the proposed approach, we conduct extensive experiments on three challenging datasets and demonstrate superior performance over the existing state-of-the-art methods. The project page is: https://wtliu7.github.io/tis/.
summary: The goal of this paper is to interactively refine the automatic segmentation on challenging structures that fall behind human performance, either due to the scarcity of available annotations or the difficulty nature of the problem itself, for example, on segmenting cancer or small organs. Specifically, we propose a novel Transformer-based architecture for Interactive Segmentation (TIS), that treats the refinement task as a procedure for grouping pixels with similar features to those clicks given by the end users. Our proposed architecture is composed of Transformer Decoder variants, which naturally fulfills feature comparison with the attention mechanisms. In contrast to existing approaches, our proposed TIS is not limited to binary segmentations, and allows the user to edit masks for arbitrary number of categories. To validate the proposed approach, we conduct extensive experiments on three challenging datasets and demonstrate superior performance over the existing state-of-the-art methods. The project page is: https://wtliu7.github.io/tis/.
abstract_zh: 本文的目标是交互式地改进对落后于人类表现的挑战性结构的自动分割，这些结构要么是由于可用注释的缺乏，要么是问题本身的困难性，例如分割癌症或小器官。具体来说，我们提出了一种新颖的基于 Transformer 的交互式分割（TIS）架构，它将细化任务视为对具有与最终用户给出的点击相似特征的像素进行分组的过程。我们提出的架构由 Transformer Decoder 变体组成，它自然地实现了与注意力机制的特征比较。与现有方法相比，我们提出的 TIS 不限于二进制分割，并且允许用户编辑任意数量类别的掩码。为了验证所提出的方法，我们对三个具有挑战性的数据集进行了广泛的实验，并展示了优于现有最先进方法的性能。项目页面为：https://wtliu7.github.io/tis/。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于Transformer的交互式分割架构（TIS），用于改进医学影像中复杂结构的自动分割效果。
AI.motivation: 现有分割方法在处理标注稀缺或问题本身难度高的医学影像（如肿瘤或小器官分割）时表现不足，需通过用户交互进行优化，但传统方法受限于二分类任务且无法灵活处理多类别编辑。
AI.method: 设计Transformer解码器变体架构，通过注意力机制将用户点击点与像素特征进行相似性分组，支持任意数量类别的交互式掩码编辑。
AI.result: 在三个具有挑战性的数据集上实验验证，TIS方法在分割精度上优于现有最先进算法。
AI.conclusion: TIS通过结合用户交互与Transformer的特征比较能力，为医学影像分割提供了更灵活高效的解决方案。

authors_text: Debo Cheng,Jiuyong Li,Lin Liu,Jixue Liu,Thuc Duy Le
title: Data-Driven Causal Effect Estimation Based on Graphical Causal Modelling: A Survey
title_zh: 基于图形因果建模的数据驱动因果效应估计：调查
comment: 35 pages, 10 figures and 2 table, Accepted by ACM Computing Surveys
comments: 35 pages, 10 figures and 2 table, Accepted by ACM Computing Surveys
abstract: In many fields of scientific research and real-world applications, unbiased estimation of causal effects from non-experimental data is crucial for understanding the mechanism underlying the data and for decision-making on effective responses or interventions. A great deal of research has been conducted to address this challenging problem from different angles. For estimating causal effect in observational data, assumptions such as Markov condition, faithfulness and causal sufficiency are always made. Under the assumptions, full knowledge such as, a set of covariates or an underlying causal graph, is typically required. A practical challenge is that in many applications, no such full knowledge or only some partial knowledge is available. In recent years, research has emerged to use search strategies based on graphical causal modelling to discover useful knowledge from data for causal effect estimation, with some mild assumptions, and has shown promise in tackling the practical challenge. In this survey, we review these data-driven methods on causal effect estimation for a single treatment with a single outcome of interest and focus on the challenges faced by data-driven causal effect estimation. We concisely summarise the basic concepts and theories that are essential for data-driven causal effect estimation using graphical causal modelling but are scattered around the literature. We identify and discuss the challenges faced by data-driven causal effect estimation and characterise the existing methods by their assumptions and the approaches to tackling the challenges. We analyse the strengths and limitations of the different types of methods and present an empirical evaluation to support the discussions. We hope this review will motivate more researchers to design better data-driven methods based on graphical causal modelling for the challenging problem of causal effect estimation.
summary: In many fields of scientific research and real-world applications, unbiased estimation of causal effects from non-experimental data is crucial for understanding the mechanism underlying the data and for decision-making on effective responses or interventions. A great deal of research has been conducted to address this challenging problem from different angles. For estimating causal effect in observational data, assumptions such as Markov condition, faithfulness and causal sufficiency are always made. Under the assumptions, full knowledge such as, a set of covariates or an underlying causal graph, is typically required. A practical challenge is that in many applications, no such full knowledge or only some partial knowledge is available. In recent years, research has emerged to use search strategies based on graphical causal modelling to discover useful knowledge from data for causal effect estimation, with some mild assumptions, and has shown promise in tackling the practical challenge. In this survey, we review these data-driven methods on causal effect estimation for a single treatment with a single outcome of interest and focus on the challenges faced by data-driven causal effect estimation. We concisely summarise the basic concepts and theories that are essential for data-driven causal effect estimation using graphical causal modelling but are scattered around the literature. We identify and discuss the challenges faced by data-driven causal effect estimation and characterise the existing methods by their assumptions and the approaches to tackling the challenges. We analyse the strengths and limitations of the different types of methods and present an empirical evaluation to support the discussions. We hope this review will motivate more researchers to design better data-driven methods based on graphical causal modelling for the challenging problem of causal effect estimation.
abstract_zh: 在科学研究和现实世界应用的许多领域，对非实验数据的因果效应进行公正的估计对于理解数据背后的机制以及有效应对或干预的决策至关重要。为了从不同角度解决这一具有挑战性的问题，人们进行了大量的研究。为了估计观测数据中的因果效应，总是做出马尔可夫条件、忠实性和因果充分性等假设。在这些假设下，通常需要完整的知识，例如一组协变量或潜在的因果图。一个实际的挑战是，在许多应用中，没有这样的完整知识或只有一些部分知识可用。近年来，出现了一些研究，使用基于图形因果模型的搜索策略，在一些温和的假设下，从数据中发现有用的知识，用于因果效应估计，并在解决实际挑战方面显示出希望。在本次调查中，我们回顾了这些数据驱动的方法，用于对具有单一感兴趣结果的单一治疗进行因果效应估计，并重点关注数据驱动的因果效应估计所面临的挑战。我们简洁地总结了使用图形因果模型进行数据驱动的因果效应估计所必需的基本概念和理论，但这些概念和理论分散在文献中。我们确定并讨论了数据驱动的因果效应估计所面临的挑战，并通过假设和应对挑战的方法来描述现有方法的特征。我们分析了不同类型方法的优点和局限性，并提出实证评估来支持讨论。我们希望这篇综述能够激励更多的研究人员设计更好的基于图形因果模型的数据驱动方法，以解决因果效应估计这一具有挑战性的问题。

AI.tldr: 本文综述了基于图因果建模的数据驱动因果效应估计方法，总结其核心概念、挑战及现有方法的优缺点。
AI.motivation: 在非实验数据中无偏估计因果效应对理解数据机制和决策至关重要，但实际应用中常缺乏完整因果知识，需探索基于图因果建模的轻量假设方法。

search_text: Data-Driven Causal Effect Estimation Based on Graphical Causal Modelling: A Survey 基于图形因果建模的数据驱动因果效应估计：调查 In many fields of scientific research and real-world applications, unbiased estimation of causal effects from non-experimental data is crucial for understanding the mechanism underlying the data and for decision-making on effective responses or interventions. A great deal of research has been conducted to address this challenging problem from different angles. For estimating causal effect in observational data, assumptions such as Markov condition, faithfulness and causal sufficiency are always made. Under the assumptions, full knowledge such as, a set of covariates or an underlying causal graph, is typically required. A practical challenge is that in many applications, no such full knowledge or only some partial knowledge is available. In recent years, research has emerged to use search strategies based on graphical causal modelling to discover useful knowledge from data for causal effect estimation, with some mild assumptions, and has shown promise in tackling the practical challenge. In this survey, we review these data-driven methods on causal effect estimation for a single treatment with a single outcome of interest and focus on the challenges faced by data-driven causal effect estimation. We concisely summarise the basic concepts and theories that are essential for data-driven causal effect estimation using graphical causal modelling but are scattered around the literature. We identify and discuss the challenges faced by data-driven causal effect estimation and characterise the existing methods by their assumptions and the approaches to tackling the challenges. We analyse the strengths and limitations of the different types of methods and present an empirical evaluation to support the discussions. We hope this review will motivate more researchers to design better data-driven methods based on graphical causal modelling for the challenging problem of causal effect estimation. 在科学研究和现实世界应用的许多领域，对非实验数据的因果效应进行公正的估计对于理解数据背后的机制以及有效应对或干预的决策至关重要。为了从不同角度解决这一具有挑战性的问题，人们进行了大量的研究。为了估计观测数据中的因果效应，总是做出马尔可夫条件、忠实性和因果充分性等假设。在这些假设下，通常需要完整的知识，例如一组协变量或潜在的因果图。一个实际的挑战是，在许多应用中，没有这样的完整知识或只有一些部分知识可用。近年来，出现了一些研究，使用基于图形因果模型的搜索策略，在一些温和的假设下，从数据中发现有用的知识，用于因果效应估计，并在解决实际挑战方面显示出希望。在本次调查中，我们回顾了这些数据驱动的方法，用于对具有单一感兴趣结果的单一治疗进行因果效应估计，并重点关注数据驱动的因果效应估计所面临的挑战。我们简洁地总结了使用图形因果模型进行数据驱动的因果效应估计所必需的基本概念和理论，但这些概念和理论分散在文献中。我们确定并讨论了数据驱动的因果效应估计所面临的挑战，并通过假设和应对挑战的方法来描述现有方法的特征。我们分析了不同类型方法的优点和局限性，并提出实证评估来支持讨论。我们希望这篇综述能够激励更多的研究人员设计更好的基于图形因果模型的数据驱动方法，以解决因果效应估计这一具有挑战性的问题。 本文综述了基于图因果建模的数据驱动因果效应估计方法，总结其核心概念、挑战及现有方法的优缺点。 Debo Cheng,Jiuyong Li,Lin Liu,Jixue Liu,Thuc Duy Le cs.AI,cs.LG

authors_text: Victor Adewopo,Nelly Elsayed,Zag ElSayed,Murat Ozer,Ahmed Abdelgawad,Magdy Bayoumi
title: Review on Action Recognition for Accident Detection in Smart City Transportation Systems
title_zh: 智慧城市交通系统事故检测动作识别综述
comment: 16 pages
comments: 16 pages
abstract: Action detection and public traffic safety are crucial aspects of a safe community and a better society. Monitoring traffic flows in a smart city using different surveillance cameras can play a significant role in recognizing accidents and alerting first responders. The utilization of action recognition (AR) in computer vision tasks has contributed towards high-precision applications in video surveillance, medical imaging, and digital signal processing. This paper presents an intensive review focusing on action recognition in accident detection and autonomous transportation systems for a smart city. In this paper, we focused on AR systems that used diverse sources of traffic video capturing, such as static surveillance cameras on traffic intersections, highway monitoring cameras, drone cameras, and dash-cams. Through this review, we identified the primary techniques, taxonomies, and algorithms used in AR for autonomous transportation and accident detection. We also examined data sets utilized in the AR tasks, identifying the main sources of datasets and features of the datasets. This paper provides potential research direction to develop and integrate accident detection systems for autonomous cars and public traffic safety systems by alerting emergency personnel and law enforcement in the event of road accidents to minimize human error in accident reporting and provide a spontaneous response to victims

This paper provides potential research direction to develop and integrate accident detection systems for autonomous cars and public traffic safety systems by alerting emergency personnel and law enforcement in the event of road accidents to minimize human error in accident reporting and provide a spontaneous response to victims
abstract_zh: 行为检测和公共交通安全是安全社区和美好社会的重要方面。使用不同的监控摄像头监控智慧城市的交通流量可以在识别事故和向急救人员发出警报方面发挥重要作用。动作识别（AR）在计算机视觉任务中的应用为视频监控、医学成像和数字信号处理中的高精度应用做出了贡献。本文对智慧城市的事故检测和自主交通系统中的动作识别进行了深入的综述。在本文中，我们重点关注使用不同来源的交通视频捕获的 AR 系统，例如交通路口的静态监控摄像头、高速公路监控摄像头、无人机摄像头和行车记录仪。通过这次审查，我们确定了 AR 用于自主交通和事故检测的主要技术、分类法和算法。我们还检查了 AR 任务中使用的数据集，确定了数据集的主要来源和数据集的特征。本文提供了开发和集成自动驾驶汽车和公共交通安全系统的事故检测系统的潜在研究方向，通过在发生道路事故时向应急人员和执法人员发出警报，最大限度地减少事故报告中的人为错误，并向受害者提供自发响应

AI.tldr: 本文综述了在智慧城市交通系统中用于事故检测的动作识别技术。
AI.motivation: 动作检测和公共交通安全对于构建安全社区和更美好的社会至关重要，而利用动作识别技术可以提高视频监控、医疗成像和数字信号处理等领域的精度。
AI.method: 本文通过回顾使用多种交通视频捕捉源（如交通路口的静态监控摄像头、高速公路监控摄像头、无人机摄像头和行车记录仪）的动作识别系统，总结了相关技术、分类和算法。
AI.result: 识别了用于自动驾驶和事故检测的动作识别系统的主要技术、分类和算法，并分析了数据集的来源和特征。
AI.conclusion: 本文为开发和集成事故检测系统提供了潜在的研究方向，以提高自动驾驶汽车和公共交通安全系统的响应能力。

authors_text: Sami Alperen Akgun,Moojan Ghafurian,Mark Crowley,Kerstin Dautenhahn
title: Using Affect as a Communication Modality to Improve Human-Robot Communication in Robot-Assisted Search and Rescue Scenarios
title_zh: 使用情感作为沟通方式改善机器人辅助搜索和救援场景中的人机沟通
abstract: Emotions can provide a natural communication modality to complement the existing multi-modal capabilities of social robots, such as text and speech, in many domains. We conducted three online studies with 112, 223, and 151 participants to investigate the benefits of using emotions as a communication modality for Search And Rescue (SAR) robots. In the first experiment, we investigated the feasibility of conveying information related to SAR situations through robots' emotions, resulting in mappings from SAR situations to emotions. The second study used Affect Control Theory as an alternative method for deriving such mappings. This method is more flexible, e.g. allows for such mappings to be adjusted for different emotion sets and different robots. In the third experiment, we created affective expressions for an appearance-constrained outdoor field research robot using LEDs as an expressive channel. Using these affective expressions in a variety of simulated SAR situations, we evaluated the effect of these expressions on participants' (adopting the role of rescue workers) situational awareness. Our results and proposed methodologies provide (a) insights on how emotions could help conveying messages in the context of SAR, and (b) evidence on the effectiveness of adding emotions as a communication modality in a (simulated) SAR communication context.
summary: Emotions can provide a natural communication modality to complement the existing multi-modal capabilities of social robots, such as text and speech, in many domains. We conducted three online studies with 112, 223, and 151 participants to investigate the benefits of using emotions as a communication modality for Search And Rescue (SAR) robots. In the first experiment, we investigated the feasibility of conveying information related to SAR situations through robots' emotions, resulting in mappings from SAR situations to emotions. The second study used Affect Control Theory as an alternative method for deriving such mappings. This method is more flexible, e.g. allows for such mappings to be adjusted for different emotion sets and different robots. In the third experiment, we created affective expressions for an appearance-constrained outdoor field research robot using LEDs as an expressive channel. Using these affective expressions in a variety of simulated SAR situations, we evaluated the effect of these expressions on participants' (adopting the role of rescue workers) situational awareness. Our results and proposed methodologies provide (a) insights on how emotions could help conveying messages in the context of SAR, and (b) evidence on the effectiveness of adding emotions as a communication modality in a (simulated) SAR communication context.
abstract_zh: 情感可以提供一种自然的交流方式，以补充社交机器人在许多领域现有的多模式功能，例如文本和语音。我们对 112、223 和 151 名参与者进行了三项在线研究，以调查使用情感作为搜索和救援 (SAR) 机器人沟通方式的好处。在第一个实验中，我们研究了通过机器人情绪传达与 SAR 情况相关的信息的可行性，从而产生从 SAR 情况到情绪的映射。第二项研究使用情感控制理论作为推导此类映射的替代方法。这种方法比较灵活，例如允许针对不同的情绪集和不同的机器人调整此类映射。在第三个实验中，我们使用 LED 作为表达通道，为外观受限的户外野外研究机器人创建了情感表达。在各种模拟搜救情景中使用这些情感表达，我们评估了这些表达对参与者（采用救援人员的角色）态势感知的影响。我们的结果和提出的方法提供了（a）关于情感如何帮助在 SAR 环境中传达信息的见解，以及（b）关于在（模拟的）SAR 通信环境中添加情感作为通信方式的有效性的证据。

AI.tldr: 该论文探讨了在搜救机器人中使用情感作为沟通方式以提升人机交互效果的方法。
AI.motivation: 现有社交机器人依赖文本和语音等多模态能力，但缺乏情感表达，可能影响复杂场景下的信息传递效率。
AI.method: 通过三项在线实验（共586名参与者），结合情感控制理论与LED灯光表达，研究情感映射关系及对救援人员情境感知的影响。
AI.result: 证实了情感表达能有效传递搜救场景信息，提升救援人员情境感知能力，并验证了情感映射方法的灵活性。
AI.conclusion: 情感作为沟通模态可增强搜救机器人交互效果，相关方法论为未来人机协作提供了理论支持与实践参考。

search_text: Using Affect as a Communication Modality to Improve Human-Robot Communication in Robot-Assisted Search and Rescue Scenarios 使用情感作为沟通方式改善机器人辅助搜索和救援场景中的人机沟通 Emotions can provide a natural communication modality to complement the existing multi-modal capabilities of social robots, such as text and speech, in many domains. We conducted three online studies with 112, 223, and 151 participants to investigate the benefits of using emotions as a communication modality for Search And Rescue (SAR) robots. In the first experiment, we investigated the feasibility of conveying information related to SAR situations through robots' emotions, resulting in mappings from SAR situations to emotions. The second study used Affect Control Theory as an alternative method for deriving such mappings. This method is more flexible, e.g. allows for such mappings to be adjusted for different emotion sets and different robots. In the third experiment, we created affective expressions for an appearance-constrained outdoor field research robot using LEDs as an expressive channel. Using these affective expressions in a variety of simulated SAR situations, we evaluated the effect of these expressions on participants' (adopting the role of rescue workers) situational awareness. Our results and proposed methodologies provide (a) insights on how emotions could help conveying messages in the context of SAR, and (b) evidence on the effectiveness of adding emotions as a communication modality in a (simulated) SAR communication context. 情感可以提供一种自然的交流方式，以补充社交机器人在许多领域现有的多模式功能，例如文本和语音。我们对 112、223 和 151 名参与者进行了三项在线研究，以调查使用情感作为搜索和救援 (SAR) 机器人沟通方式的好处。在第一个实验中，我们研究了通过机器人情绪传达与 SAR 情况相关的信息的可行性，从而产生从 SAR 情况到情绪的映射。第二项研究使用情感控制理论作为推导此类映射的替代方法。这种方法比较灵活，例如允许针对不同的情绪集和不同的机器人调整此类映射。在第三个实验中，我们使用 LED 作为表达通道，为外观受限的户外野外研究机器人创建了情感表达。在各种模拟搜救情景中使用这些情感表达，我们评估了这些表达对参与者（采用救援人员的角色）态势感知的影响。我们的结果和提出的方法提供了（a）关于情感如何帮助在 SAR 环境中传达信息的见解，以及（b）关于在（模拟的）SAR 通信环境中添加情感作为通信方式的有效性的证据。 该论文探讨了在搜救机器人中使用情感作为沟通方式以提升人机交互效果的方法。 Sami Alperen Akgun,Moojan Ghafurian,Mark Crowley,Kerstin Dautenhahn cs.RO,cs.HC

title: Learning in Audio-visual Context: A Review, Analysis, and New Perspective
title_zh: 视听情境中的学习：回顾、分析和新视角
comment: https://gewu-lab.github.io/audio-visual-learning/
comments: https://gewu-lab.github.io/audio-visual-learning/
abstract: Sight and hearing are two senses that play a vital role in human communication and scene understanding. To mimic human perception ability, audio-visual learning, aimed at developing computational approaches to learn from both audio and visual modalities, has been a flourishing field in recent years. A comprehensive survey that can systematically organize and analyze studies of the audio-visual field is expected. Starting from the analysis of audio-visual cognition foundations, we introduce several key findings that have inspired our computational studies. Then, we systematically review the recent audio-visual learning studies and divide them into three categories: audio-visual boosting, cross-modal perception and audio-visual collaboration. Through our analysis, we discover that, the consistency of audio-visual data across semantic, spatial and temporal support the above studies. To revisit the current development of the audio-visual learning field from a more macro view, we further propose a new perspective on audio-visual scene understanding, then discuss and analyze the feasible future direction of the audio-visual learning area. Overall, this survey reviews and outlooks the current audio-visual learning field from different aspects. We hope it can provide researchers with a better understanding of this area. A website including constantly-updated survey is released: \url{https://gewu-lab.github.io/audio-visual-learning/}.

abstract_zh: 视觉和听觉是在人类交流和场景理解中发挥着至关重要作用的两种感官。为了模仿人类的感知能力，视听学习旨在开发从音频和视觉模式中学习的计算方法，近年来已成为一个蓬勃发展的领域。期望能够系统地组织和分析视听领域的研究的综合调查。从视听认知基础的分析开始，我们介绍了启发我们计算研究的几个关键发现。然后，我们系统地回顾了最近的视听学习研究，并将其分为三类：视听增强、跨模态感知和视听协作。通过我们的分析，我们发现，视听数据在语义、空间和时间上的一致性支持了上述研究。为了从更宏观的角度重新审视当前视听学习领域的发展，我们进一步提出了视听场景理解的新视角，并对视听学习领域未来可行的方向进行了讨论和分析。总体而言，本次调查从不同方面对当前视听学习领域进行了回顾和展望。我们希望它能让研究人员更好地了解这一领域。发布了一个包含不断更新的调查的网站：\url{https://gewu-lab.github.io/audio-visual-learning/}。

AI.tldr: 本文系统回顾并分析了近年来的音频-视觉学习研究，提出新的场景理解视角。
AI.motivation: 音频与视觉感知对人类交流至关重要，但缺乏对音频-视觉学习领域系统性梳理和宏观视角分析。
AI.method: 通过分析音频-视觉认知基础，将研究分为音频-视觉增强、跨模态感知和协作三类，并提出新的场景理解框架。
AI.result: 发现语义、空间和时间一致性支撑现有研究，提出宏观视角下的音频-视觉场景理解新方向。
AI.conclusion: 该综述为研究者提供了领域全景认知，并通过持续更新的网站资源推动未来研究发展。

authors_text: Zhenrui Yue,Huimin Zeng,Ziyi Kou,Lanyu Shang,Dong Wang
title: Contrastive Domain Adaptation for Early Misinformation Detection: A Case Study on COVID-19
title_zh: 用于早期错误信息检测的对比域适应：COVID-19 案例研究
comment: Accepted to CIKM 2022
comments: Accepted to CIKM 2022
abstract: Despite recent progress in improving the performance of misinformation detection systems, classifying misinformation in an unseen domain remains an elusive challenge. To address this issue, a common approach is to introduce a domain critic and encourage domain-invariant input features. However, early misinformation often demonstrates both conditional and label shifts against existing misinformation data (e.g., class imbalance in COVID-19 datasets), rendering such methods less effective for detecting early misinformation. In this paper, we propose contrastive adaptation network for early misinformation detection (CANMD). Specifically, we leverage pseudo labeling to generate high-confidence target examples for joint training with source data. We additionally design a label correction component to estimate and correct the label shifts (i.e., class priors) between the source and target domains. Moreover, a contrastive adaptation loss is integrated in the objective function to reduce the intra-class discrepancy and enlarge the inter-class discrepancy. As such, the adapted model learns corrected class priors and an invariant conditional distribution across both domains for improved estimation of the target data distribution. To demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed CANMD, we study the case of COVID-19 early misinformation detection and perform extensive experiments using multiple real-world datasets. The results suggest that CANMD can effectively adapt misinformation detection systems to the unseen COVID-19 target domain with significant improvements compared to the state-of-the-art baselines.
summary: Despite recent progress in improving the performance of misinformation detection systems, classifying misinformation in an unseen domain remains an elusive challenge. To address this issue, a common approach is to introduce a domain critic and encourage domain-invariant input features. However, early misinformation often demonstrates both conditional and label shifts against existing misinformation data (e.g., class imbalance in COVID-19 datasets), rendering such methods less effective for detecting early misinformation. In this paper, we propose contrastive adaptation network for early misinformation detection (CANMD). Specifically, we leverage pseudo labeling to generate high-confidence target examples for joint training with source data. We additionally design a label correction component to estimate and correct the label shifts (i.e., class priors) between the source and target domains. Moreover, a contrastive adaptation loss is integrated in the objective function to reduce the intra-class discrepancy and enlarge the inter-class discrepancy. As such, the adapted model learns corrected class priors and an invariant conditional distribution across both domains for improved estimation of the target data distribution. To demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed CANMD, we study the case of COVID-19 early misinformation detection and perform extensive experiments using multiple real-world datasets. The results suggest that CANMD can effectively adapt misinformation detection systems to the unseen COVID-19 target domain with significant improvements compared to the state-of-the-art baselines.
abstract_zh: 尽管最近在提高错误信息检测系统的性能方面取得了进展，但在看不见的领域对错误信息进行分类仍然是一个难以捉摸的挑战。为了解决这个问题，一种常见的方法是引入领域批评家并鼓励领域不变的输入特征。然而，早期的错误信息通常表现出针对现有错误信息数据的条件和标签变化（例如，COVID-19 数据集中的类别不平衡），使得此类方法在检测早期错误信息方面效果较差。在本文中，我们提出了用于早期错误信息检测的对比适应网络（CANMD）。具体来说，我们利用伪标签来生成高置信度的目标示例，以便与源数据进行联合训练。我们还设计了一个标签校正组件来估计和校正源域和目标域之间的标签偏移（即类先验）。此外，目标函数中集成了对比适应损失，以减少类内差异并扩大类间差异。因此，适应的模型学习校正的类先验和跨两个域的不变条件分布，以改进对目标数据分布的估计。为了证明所提出的 CANMD 的有效性，我们研究了 COVID-19 早期错误信息检测的案例，并使用多个真实世界数据集进行了广泛的实验。结果表明，CANMD 可以有效地将错误信息检测系统适应看不见的 COVID-19 目标领域，与最先进的基线相比，具有显着改进。

AI.tldr: 本文提出对比域适应网络CANMD，用于解决早期虚假信息检测中跨域适应的挑战，特别是在新冠疫情期间。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在检测未见过领域中的虚假信息时效果有限，早期虚假信息存在条件和标签偏移问题，导致模型适应性不足。
AI.method: 结合伪标签生成、标签校正组件和对比适应损失函数，通过减少类内差异、扩大类间差异，实现跨域条件分布不变的学习。
AI.result: 在多个真实新冠数据集上的实验表明，CANMD相比现有方法在目标域适应性上显著提升。
AI.conclusion: CANMD有效解决了早期虚假信息检测的跨域适应问题，为应对突发公共卫生事件中的虚假信息提供了新方法。

We additionally design a label correction component to estimate and correct the label shifts (i.e., class priors) between the source and target domains. Moreover, a contrastive adaptation loss is integrated in the objective function to reduce the intra-class discrepancy and enlarge the inter-class discrepancy. As such, the adapted model learns corrected class priors and an invariant conditional distribution across both domains for improved estimation of the target data distribution. To demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed CANMD, we study the case of COVID-19 early misinformation detection and perform extensive experiments using multiple real-world datasets. The results suggest that CANMD can effectively adapt misinformation detection systems to the unseen COVID-19 target domain with significant improvements compared to the state-of-the-art baselines. 尽管最近在提高错误信息检测系统的性能方面取得了进展，但在看不见的领域对错误信息进行分类仍然是一个难以捉摸的挑战。为了解决这个问题，一种常见的方法是引入领域批评家并鼓励领域不变的输入特征。然而，早期的错误信息通常表现出针对现有错误信息数据的条件和标签变化（例如，COVID-19 数据集中的类别不平衡），使得此类方法在检测早期错误信息方面效果较差。在本文中，我们提出了用于早期错误信息检测的对比适应网络（CANMD）。具体来说，我们利用伪标签来生成高置信度的目标示例，以便与源数据进行联合训练。我们还设计了一个标签校正组件来估计和校正源域和目标域之间的标签偏移（即类先验）。此外，目标函数中集成了对比适应损失，以减少类内差异并扩大类间差异。因此，适应的模型学习校正的类先验和跨两个域的不变条件分布，以改进对目标数据分布的估计。为了证明所提出的 CANMD 的有效性，我们研究了 COVID-19 早期错误信息检测的案例，并使用多个真实世界数据集进行了广泛的实验。结果表明，CANMD 可以有效地将错误信息检测系统适应看不见的 COVID-19 目标领域，与最先进的基线相比，具有显着改进。 本文提出对比域适应网络CANMD，用于解决早期虚假信息检测中跨域适应的挑战，特别是在新冠疫情期间。 Zhenrui Yue,Huimin Zeng,Ziyi Kou,Lanyu Shang,Dong Wang cs.CV,cs.AI,cs.CL

title: Unit Selection with Nonbinary Treatment and Effect
title_zh: 采用非二元处理和效果的单位选择
abstract: The unit selection problem aims to identify a set of individuals who are most likely to exhibit a desired mode of behavior, for example, selecting individuals who would respond one way if encouraged and a different way if not encouraged. Using a combination of experimental and observational data, Li and Pearl derived tight bounds on the "benefit function", which is the payoff/cost associated with selecting an individual with given characteristics. This paper extends the benefit function to the general form such that the treatment and effect are not restricted to binary. We propose an algorithm to test the identifiability of the nonbinary benefit function and an algorithm to compute the bounds of the nonbinary benefit function using experimental and observational data.
summary: The unit selection problem aims to identify a set of individuals who are most likely to exhibit a desired mode of behavior, for example, selecting individuals who would respond one way if encouraged and a different way if not encouraged. Using a combination of experimental and observational data, Li and Pearl derived tight bounds on the "benefit function", which is the payoff/cost associated with selecting an individual with given characteristics. This paper extends the benefit function to the general form such that the treatment and effect are not restricted to binary. We propose an algorithm to test the identifiability of the nonbinary benefit function and an algorithm to compute the bounds of the nonbinary benefit function using experimental and observational data.
abstract_zh: 单元选择问题旨在识别一组最有可能表现出所需行为模式的个体，例如，选择如果受到鼓励则以一种方式做出反应，如果不受到鼓励则以不同方式做出反应的个体。通过结合实验和观察数据，李和珀尔得出了“效益函数”的严格界限，即与选择具有给定特征的个体相关的回报/成本。本文将效益函数扩展到一般形式，使得处理和效果不限于二元。我们提出了一种测试非二元收益函数的可识别性的算法，以及一种使用实验和观测数据计算非二元收益函数的界限的算法。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了非二元处理和效应下的单元选择问题，扩展了原有的效益函数并提出相关算法。
AI.motivation: 原有效益函数仅适用于二元处理和效应，难以应对实际中更复杂的非二元场景，需扩展模型并开发新算法。
AI.method: 提出两种算法：1) 测试非二元效益函数可识别性的算法；2) 基于实验与观察数据计算非二元效益函数界限的算法。
AI.result: 成功将效益函数推广至非二元形式，并验证了算法在计算界限和可识别性检验中的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为处理非二元治疗和效应的单元选择问题提供了理论工具，拓展了原有模型的应用范围。

title: Probabilities of Causation with Nonbinary Treatment and Effect
title_zh: 非二元处理和效应的因果概率
abstract: This paper deals with the problem of estimating the probabilities of causation when treatment and effect are not binary. Tian and Pearl derived sharp bounds for the probability of necessity and sufficiency (PNS), the probability of sufficiency (PS), and the probability of necessity (PN) using experimental and observational data. In this paper, we provide theoretical bounds for all types of probabilities of causation to multivalued treatments and effects. We further discuss examples where our bounds guide practical decisions and use simulation studies to evaluate how informative the bounds are for various combinations of data.
summary: This paper deals with the problem of estimating the probabilities of causation when treatment and effect are not binary. Tian and Pearl derived sharp bounds for the probability of necessity and sufficiency (PNS), the probability of sufficiency (PS), and the probability of necessity (PN) using experimental and observational data. In this paper, we provide theoretical bounds for all types of probabilities of causation to multivalued treatments and effects. We further discuss examples where our bounds guide practical decisions and use simulation studies to evaluate how informative the bounds are for various combinations of data.
abstract_zh: 本文讨论的是当治疗和效果不是二元时估计因果关系的概率的问题。 Tian 和 Pearl 使用实验和观测数据得出了必要性和充分性概率 (PNS)、充分性概率 (PS) 和必要性概率 (PN) 的明确界限。在本文中，我们为多值治疗和效应的所有类型因果概率提供了理论界限。我们进一步讨论我们的界限指导实际决策的示例，并使用模拟研究来评估界限对于各种数据组合的信息量。

AI.tldr: 研究非二元治疗和效应下的因果概率理论界限，并评估其实际应用价值。
AI.motivation: 现有因果概率理论多针对二元变量，而实际问题中治疗和效应常为多值，需扩展理论以适应更复杂场景。
AI.method: 基于实验与观察数据，结合Tian和Pearl的二元变量方法，推导多值变量的因果概率界限，并通过实例与模拟验证有效性。
AI.result: 提出适用于多值治疗和效应的因果概率理论界限，通过模拟研究证明其在不同数据组合下的信息价值。
AI.conclusion: 多值因果概率界限可有效指导实际决策，为复杂场景下的因果推断提供理论支持与实践工具。

authors_text: Ayush Singla,Qingyu Zhao,Daniel K. Do,Yuyin Zhou,Kilian M. Pohl,Ehsan Adeli
title: Multiple Instance Neuroimage Transformer
title_zh: 多实例神经图像转换器
abstract: For the first time, we propose using a multiple instance learning based convolution-free transformer model, called Multiple Instance Neuroimage Transformer (MINiT), for the classification of T1weighted (T1w) MRIs. We first present several variants of transformer models adopted for neuroimages. These models extract non-overlapping 3D blocks from the input volume and perform multi-headed self-attention on a sequence of their linear projections. MINiT, on the other hand, treats each of the non-overlapping 3D blocks of the input MRI as its own instance, splitting it further into non-overlapping 3D patches, on which multi-headed self-attention is computed. As a proof-of-concept, we evaluate the efficacy of our model by training it to identify sex from T1w-MRIs of two public datasets: Adolescent Brain Cognitive Development (ABCD) and the National Consortium on Alcohol and Neurodevelopment in Adolescence (NCANDA). The learned attention maps highlight voxels contributing to identifying sex differences in brain morphometry. The code is available at https://github.com/singlaayush/MINIT.
summary: For the first time, we propose using a multiple instance learning based convolution-free transformer model, called Multiple Instance Neuroimage Transformer (MINiT), for the classification of T1weighted (T1w) MRIs. We first present several variants of transformer models adopted for neuroimages. These models extract non-overlapping 3D blocks from the input volume and perform multi-headed self-attention on a sequence of their linear projections. MINiT, on the other hand, treats each of the non-overlapping 3D blocks of the input MRI as its own instance, splitting it further into non-overlapping 3D patches, on which multi-headed self-attention is computed. As a proof-of-concept, we evaluate the efficacy of our model by training it to identify sex from T1w-MRIs of two public datasets: Adolescent Brain Cognitive Development (ABCD) and the National Consortium on Alcohol and Neurodevelopment in Adolescence (NCANDA). The learned attention maps highlight voxels contributing to identifying sex differences in brain morphometry. The code is available at https://github.com/singlaayush/MINIT.
abstract_zh: 我们首次建议使用基于多实例学习的无卷积变换器模型，称为多实例神经图像变换器 (MINiT)，用于 T1 加权 (T1w) MRI 的分类。我们首先介绍神经图像采用的变压器模型的几种变体。这些模型从输入体积中提取不重叠的 3D 块，并对一系列线性投影执行多头自注意力。另一方面，MINiT 将输入 MRI 的每个非重叠 3D 块视为其自己的实例，将其进一步拆分为非重叠 3D 块，在其上计算多头自注意力。作为概念验证，我们通过训练模型从两个公共数据集的 T1w-MRI 中识别性别来评估模型的有效性：青少年大脑认知发展（ABCD）和国家青少年酒精和神经发育联盟（NCANDA）。学习到的注意力图突出了有助于识别大脑形态测量中性别差异的体素。代码可在 https://github.com/singlaayush/MINIT 获取。

AI.tldr: 提出一种基于多实例学习的无卷积Transformer模型（MINiT），用于分类T1加权MRI图像，以识别性别差异。
AI.motivation: 传统卷积网络在处理神经影像时可能受限于局部感受野，而Transformer的全局注意力机制可更好捕捉长距离依赖关系。通过多实例学习框架，可提升模型对脑部形态差异的敏感性。
AI.method: 设计多种Transformer变体处理神经影像，MINiT将输入MRI分割为非重叠3D块作为实例，并进一步划分为3D小块，通过多头自注意力机制提取特征，最终进行性别分类。
AI.result: 在ABCD和NCANDA数据集上验证了模型有效性，注意力图成功定位与性别相关的脑区形态差异。
AI.conclusion: MINiT模型在神经影像分类任务中表现优异，其注意力机制为脑结构差异提供了可解释的可视化依据，未来可扩展至其他神经影像分析任务。

conclusion: MINiT模型在神经影像分类任务中表现优异，其注意力机制为脑结构差异提供了可解释的可视化依据，未来可扩展至其他神经影像分析任务。
search_text: Multiple Instance Neuroimage Transformer 多实例神经图像转换器 For the first time, we propose using a multiple instance learning based convolution-free transformer model, called Multiple Instance Neuroimage Transformer (MINiT), for the classification of T1weighted (T1w) MRIs. We first present several variants of transformer models adopted for neuroimages. These models extract non-overlapping 3D blocks from the input volume and perform multi-headed self-attention on a sequence of their linear projections. MINiT, on the other hand, treats each of the non-overlapping 3D blocks of the input MRI as its own instance, splitting it further into non-overlapping 3D patches, on which multi-headed self-attention is computed. As a proof-of-concept, we evaluate the efficacy of our model by training it to identify sex from T1w-MRIs of two public datasets: Adolescent Brain Cognitive Development (ABCD) and the National Consortium on Alcohol and Neurodevelopment in Adolescence (NCANDA). The learned attention maps highlight voxels contributing to identifying sex differences in brain morphometry. The code is available at https://github.com/singlaayush/MINIT. 我们首次建议使用基于多实例学习的无卷积变换器模型，称为多实例神经图像变换器 (MINiT)，用于 T1 加权 (T1w) MRI 的分类。我们首先介绍神经图像采用的变压器模型的几种变体。这些模型从输入体积中提取不重叠的 3D 块，并对一系列线性投影执行多头自注意力。另一方面，MINiT 将输入 MRI 的每个非重叠 3D 块视为其自己的实例，将其进一步拆分为非重叠 3D 块，在其上计算多头自注意力。作为概念验证，我们通过训练模型从两个公共数据集的 T1w-MRI 中识别性别来评估模型的有效性：青少年大脑认知发展（ABCD）和国家青少年酒精和神经发育联盟（NCANDA）。学习到的注意力图突出了有助于识别大脑形态测量中性别差异的体素。代码可在 https://github.com/singlaayush/MINIT 获取。 提出一种基于多实例学习的无卷积Transformer模型（MINiT），用于分类T1加权MRI图像，以识别性别差异。 Ayush Singla,Qingyu Zhao,Daniel K. Do,Yuyin Zhou,Kilian M. Pohl,Ehsan Adeli cs.CV,cs.LG

authors_text: Shichao Xu,Yikang Li,Jenhao Hsiao,Chiuman Ho,Zhu Qi
title: Open Vocabulary Multi-Label Classification with Dual-Modal Decoder on Aligned Visual-Textual Features
title_zh: 基于对齐的视觉文本特征的双模态解码器的开放词汇多标签分类
comment: preprint
comments: preprint
abstract: In computer vision, multi-label recognition are important tasks with many real-world applications, but classifying previously unseen labels remains a significant challenge. In this paper, we propose a novel algorithm, Aligned Dual moDality ClaSsifier (ADDS), which includes a Dual-Modal decoder (DM-decoder) with alignment between visual and textual features, for open-vocabulary multi-label classification tasks. Then we design a simple and yet effective method called Pyramid-Forwarding to enhance the performance for inputs with high resolutions. Moreover, the Selective Language Supervision is applied to further enhance the model performance. Extensive experiments conducted on several standard benchmarks, NUS-WIDE, ImageNet-1k, ImageNet-21k, and MS-COCO, demonstrate that our approach significantly outperforms previous methods and provides state-of-the-art performance for open-vocabulary multi-label classification, conventional multi-label classification and an extreme case called single-to-multi label classification where models trained on single-label datasets (ImageNet-1k, ImageNet-21k) are tested on multi-label ones (MS-COCO and NUS-WIDE).
summary: In computer vision, multi-label recognition are important tasks with many real-world applications, but classifying previously unseen labels remains a significant challenge. In this paper, we propose a novel algorithm, Aligned Dual moDality ClaSsifier (ADDS), which includes a Dual-Modal decoder (DM-decoder) with alignment between visual and textual features, for open-vocabulary multi-label classification tasks. Then we design a simple and yet effective method called Pyramid-Forwarding to enhance the performance for inputs with high resolutions. Moreover, the Selective Language Supervision is applied to further enhance the model performance. Extensive experiments conducted on several standard benchmarks, NUS-WIDE, ImageNet-1k, ImageNet-21k, and MS-COCO, demonstrate that our approach significantly outperforms previous methods and provides state-of-the-art performance for open-vocabulary multi-label classification, conventional multi-label classification and an extreme case called single-to-multi label classification where models trained on single-label datasets (ImageNet-1k, ImageNet-21k) are tested on multi-label ones (MS-COCO and NUS-WIDE).
abstract_zh: 在计算机视觉中，多标签识别是许多现实应用中的重要任务，但对以前未见过的标签进行分类仍然是一个重大挑战。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的算法，对齐双模态分类器（ADDS），其中包括一个双模态解码器（DM-解码器），具有视觉和文本特征之间的对齐，用于开放词汇多标签分类任务。然后，我们设计了一种简单而有效的方法，称为金字塔转发，以增强高分辨率输入的性能。此外，应用选择性语言监督进一步提高模型性能。在多个标准基准（NUS-WIDE、ImageNet-1k、ImageNet-21k 和 MS-COCO）上进行的大量实验表明，我们的方法明显优于以前的方法，并为开放词汇多标签分类、传统多标签分类和称为单到多标签分类的极端情况提供了最先进的性能，其中在单标签数据集（ImageNet-1k、ImageNet-21k）上训练的模型在多标签数据集上进行测试（MS-COCO 和 NUS-WIDE）。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于对齐视觉-文本特征的双模态解码器（ADDS），用于解决开放词汇多标签分类问题。
AI.motivation: 传统多标签分类方法在处理未见过的标签时表现不佳，需设计能有效利用视觉-文本对齐信息的模型以提升开放词汇场景下的分类性能。
AI.method: 提出ADDS算法，包含双模态解码器（DM-decoder）实现视觉与文本特征对齐，并引入Pyramid-Forwarding增强高分辨率输入处理能力，结合选择性语言监督进一步优化模型。
AI.result: 在NUS-WIDE、ImageNet、MS-COCO等数据集上显著优于现有方法，在开放词汇多标签分类、常规多标签分类及单标签到多标签迁移任务中均达到SOTA性能。
AI.conclusion: ADDS通过双模态特征对齐与多技术协同，在开放词汇多标签分类任务中展现出优越性，为跨模态学习提供了新思路。

title: Personalized Decision Making -- A Conceptual Introduction
title_zh: 个性化决策——概念介绍
abstract: Personalized decision making targets the behavior of a specific individual, while population-based decision making concerns a sub-population resembling that individual. This paper clarifies the distinction between the two and explains why the former leads to more informed decisions. We further show that by combining experimental and observational studies we can obtain valuable information about individual behavior and, consequently, improve decisions over those obtained from experimental studies alone.
summary: Personalized decision making targets the behavior of a specific individual, while population-based decision making concerns a sub-population resembling that individual. This paper clarifies the distinction between the two and explains why the former leads to more informed decisions. We further show that by combining experimental and observational studies we can obtain valuable information about individual behavior and, consequently, improve decisions over those obtained from experimental studies alone.
abstract_zh: 个性化决策针对特定个人的行为，而基于人群的决策则涉及与该个人相似的子群体。本文阐明了两者之间的区别，并解释了为什么前者可以做出更明智的决策。我们进一步表明，通过结合实验和观察研究，我们可以获得有关个人行为的有价值的信息，从而改进仅从实验研究中获得的决策。

AI.tldr: 本文介绍个性化决策的概念，阐明其与基于人群决策的区别，并探讨如何通过结合实验与观察研究提升决策质量。
AI.motivation: 传统群体决策难以满足个体差异需求，需探索更精准的个性化决策方法以提高决策有效性。
AI.method: 通过整合实验研究与观察研究数据，分析个体行为特征并优化决策模型。
AI.result: 证明结合实验与观察研究可获取更精确的个体行为信息，显著优于单纯依赖实验研究的决策效果。
AI.conclusion: 个性化决策能提升决策质量，未来需进一步研究数据整合方法与实际应用框架。

authors_text: James R. Kirk,Robert E. Wray,Peter Lindes,John E. Laird
title: Integrating Diverse Knowledge Sources for Online One-shot Learning of Novel Tasks
title_zh: 整合多种知识源，在线一次性学习新任务
comment: 20 pages, 3 figures. (Added technical appendix based on reviewer feedback.)
comments: 20 pages, 3 figures. (Added technical appendix based on reviewer feedback.)
abstract: Autonomous agents are able to draw on a wide variety of potential sources of task knowledge; however current approaches invariably focus on only one or two. Here we investigate the challenges and impact of exploiting diverse knowledge sources to learn online, in one-shot, new tasks for a simulated office mobile robot. The resulting agent, developed in the Soar cognitive architecture, uses the following sources of domain and task knowledge: interaction with the environment, task execution and search knowledge, human natural language instruction, and responses retrieved from a large language model (GPT-3). We explore the distinct contributions of these knowledge sources and evaluate the performance of different combinations in terms of learning correct task knowledge and human workload. Results show that an agent's online integration of diverse knowledge sources improves one-shot task learning overall, reducing human feedback needed for rapid and reliable task learning.
summary: Autonomous agents are able to draw on a wide variety of potential sources of task knowledge; however current approaches invariably focus on only one or two. Here we investigate the challenges and impact of exploiting diverse knowledge sources to learn online, in one-shot, new tasks for a simulated office mobile robot. The resulting agent, developed in the Soar cognitive architecture, uses the following sources of domain and task knowledge: interaction with the environment, task execution and search knowledge, human natural language instruction, and responses retrieved from a large language model (GPT-3). We explore the distinct contributions of these knowledge sources and evaluate the performance of different combinations in terms of learning correct task knowledge and human workload. Results show that an agent's online integration of diverse knowledge sources improves one-shot task learning overall, reducing human feedback needed for rapid and reliable task learning.
abstract_zh: 自主代理能够利用各种潜在的任务知识来源；然而，当前的方法总是只关注一两个。在这里，我们研究了利用不同知识源一次性在线学习模拟办公室移动机器人新任务的挑战和影响。在 Soar 认知架构中开发的最终代理使用以下领域和任务知识来源：与环境的交互、任务执行和搜索知识、人类自然语言指令以及从大型语言模型 (GPT-3) 检索的响应。我们探索这些知识源的独特贡献，并评估不同组合在学习正确的任务知识和人力工作量方面的表现。结果表明，代理对不同知识源的在线集成总体上改善了一次性任务学习，减少了快速可靠的任务学习所需的人类反馈。

AI.tldr: 研究如何整合多样化知识源以提升在线单次学习新任务的能力。
AI.motivation: 现有方法局限于单一或少数知识源，无法有效利用多源信息提升学习效率。
AI.method: 基于Soar认知架构开发智能体，整合环境交互、任务执行知识、人类指令及GPT-3模型响应，并测试不同组合效果。
AI.result: 多源知识整合显著提升单次任务学习准确性，减少人类反馈需求，降低工作负荷。
AI.conclusion: 多样化知识源的在线整合能有效增强自主智能体的单次学习能力，为实际应用提供高效框架。

search_text: Integrating Diverse Knowledge Sources for Online One-shot Learning of Novel Tasks 整合多种知识源，在线一次性学习新任务 Autonomous agents are able to draw on a wide variety of potential sources of task knowledge; however current approaches invariably focus on only one or two. Here we investigate the challenges and impact of exploiting diverse knowledge sources to learn online, in one-shot, new tasks for a simulated office mobile robot. The resulting agent, developed in the Soar cognitive architecture, uses the following sources of domain and task knowledge: interaction with the environment, task execution and search knowledge, human natural language instruction, and responses retrieved from a large language model (GPT-3). We explore the distinct contributions of these knowledge sources and evaluate the performance of different combinations in terms of learning correct task knowledge and human workload. Results show that an agent's online integration of diverse knowledge sources improves one-shot task learning overall, reducing human feedback needed for rapid and reliable task learning. 自主代理能够利用各种潜在的任务知识来源；然而，当前的方法总是只关注一两个。在这里，我们研究了利用不同知识源一次性在线学习模拟办公室移动机器人新任务的挑战和影响。在 Soar 认知架构中开发的最终代理使用以下领域和任务知识来源：与环境的交互、任务执行和搜索知识、人类自然语言指令以及从大型语言模型 (GPT-3) 检索的响应。我们探索这些知识源的独特贡献，并评估不同组合在学习正确的任务知识和人力工作量方面的表现。结果表明，代理对不同知识源的在线集成总体上改善了一次性任务学习，减少了快速可靠的任务学习所需的人类反馈。 研究如何整合多样化知识源以提升在线单次学习新任务的能力。 James R. Kirk,Robert E. Wray,Peter Lindes,John E. Laird cs.AI

authors_text: Rohit Ranjan,Himadri Bhakta,Animesh Jha,Parv Maheshwari,Debashish Chakravarty
title: [Re] Differentiable Spatial Planning using Transformers
title_zh: [Re] 使用 Transformer 进行可微分空间规划
comment: ef:ReScience C 8.2 (#34) 2022
comments: ef:ReScience C 8.2 (#34) 2022
abstract: This report covers our reproduction effort of the paper 'Differentiable Spatial Planning using Transformers' by Chaplot et al. . In this paper, the problem of spatial path planning in a differentiable way is considered. They show that their proposed method of using Spatial Planning Transformers outperforms prior data-driven models and leverages differentiable structures to learn mapping without a ground truth map simultaneously. We verify these claims by reproducing their experiments and testing their method on new data. We also investigate the stability of planning accuracy with maps with increased obstacle complexity. Efforts to investigate and verify the learnings of the Mapper module were met with failure stemming from a paucity of computational resources and unreachable authors.
summary: This report covers our reproduction effort of the paper 'Differentiable Spatial Planning using Transformers' by Chaplot et al. . In this paper, the problem of spatial path planning in a differentiable way is considered. They show that their proposed method of using Spatial Planning Transformers outperforms prior data-driven models and leverages differentiable structures to learn mapping without a ground truth map simultaneously. We verify these claims by reproducing their experiments and testing their method on new data. We also investigate the stability of planning accuracy with maps with increased obstacle complexity. Efforts to investigate and verify the learnings of the Mapper module were met with failure stemming from a paucity of computational resources and unreachable authors.
abstract_zh: 本报告涵盖了我们对 Chaplot 等人的论文“使用 Transformers 进行可微分空间规划”的复制工作。 。本文考虑可微分方式的空间路径规划问题。他们表明，他们提出的使用空间规划变压器的方法优于先前的数据驱动模型，并利用可微结构来学习映射，同时无需地面实况图。我们通过重现他们的实验并在新数据上测试他们的方法来验证这些说法。我们还研究了障碍物复杂性增加的地图的规划准确性的稳定性。由于计算资源匮乏和无法联系到作者，调查和验证 Mapper 模块的学习成果的努力失败了。

AI.tldr: 本论文复现了Chaplot等人提出的'可微分空间规划使用变换器'方法，验证其在无需真实地图的情况下进行空间路径规划的有效性。
AI.motivation: 传统路径规划方法依赖真实地图或难以处理复杂障碍物环境，需探索无需先验地图且能学习环境表示的可微分规划方法。
AI.method: 提出空间规划变换器模型，通过可微分结构同时学习环境映射与路径规划，无需依赖真实地图进行训练与推理。
AI.result: 复现实验验证了方法在新数据集上的有效性，但发现规划准确性随障碍物复杂度增加而下降，Mapper模块分析因资源限制未完成。
AI.conclusion: 原论文方法在路径规划任务中表现优越，但其映射学习机制仍需进一步验证，未来需更多计算资源与作者合作推进研究。
