title: On computing Discretized Ricci curvatures of graphs: local algorithms and (localized) fine-grained reductions
title_zh: 关于计算图的离散化里奇曲率：局部算法和（局部）细粒度缩减
comment: To appear in the journal "Theoretical Computer Science"
comments: To appear in the journal "Theoretical Computer Science"
abstract: Characterizing shapes of high-dimensional objects via Ricci curvatures plays a critical role in many research areas in mathematics and physics. However, even though several discretizations of Ricci curvatures for discrete combinatorial objects such as networks have been proposed and studied by mathematicians, the computational complexity aspects of these discretizations have escaped the attention of theoretical computer scientists to a large extent. In this paper, we study one such discretization, namely the Ollivier-Ricci curvature, from the perspective of efficient computation by fine-grained reductions and local query-based algorithms. Our main contributions are the following. (a) We relate our curvature computation problem to minimum weight perfect matching problem on complete bipartite graphs via fine-grained reduction. (b) We formalize the computational aspects of the curvature computation problems in suitable frameworks so that they can be studied by researchers in local algorithms. (c) We provide the first known lower and upper bounds on queries for query-based algorithms for the curvature computation problems in our local algorithms framework. En route, we also illustrate a localized version of our fine-grained reduction. We believe that our results bring forth an intriguing set of research questions, motivated both in theory and practice, regarding designing efficient algorithms for curvatures of objects.
summary: Characterizing shapes of high-dimensional objects via Ricci curvatures plays a critical role in many research areas in mathematics and physics. However, even though several discretizations of Ricci curvatures for discrete combinatorial objects such as networks have been proposed and studied by mathematicians, the computational complexity aspects of these discretizations have escaped the attention of theoretical computer scientists to a large extent. In this paper, we study one such discretization, namely the Ollivier-Ricci curvature, from the perspective of efficient computation by fine-grained reductions and local query-based algorithms. Our main contributions are the following. (a) We relate our curvature computation problem to minimum weight perfect matching problem on complete bipartite graphs via fine-grained reduction. (b) We formalize the computational aspects of the curvature computation problems in suitable frameworks so that they can be studied by researchers in local algorithms. (c) We provide the first known lower and upper bounds on queries for query-based algorithms for the curvature computation problems in our local algorithms framework. En route, we also illustrate a localized version of our fine-grained reduction. We believe that our results bring forth an intriguing set of research questions, motivated both in theory and practice, regarding designing efficient algorithms for curvatures of objects.
abstract_zh: 通过里奇曲率表征高维物体的形状在数学和物理的许多研究领域中发挥着至关重要的作用。然而，尽管数学家已经提出并研究了离散组合对象（例如网络）的里奇曲率的几种离散化，但这些离散化的计算复杂性在很大程度上没有引起理论计算机科学家的注意。在本文中，我们从细粒度归约和基于局部查询的算法进行有效计算的角度研究了一种这样的离散化，即奥利维耶-里奇曲率。我们的主要贡献如下。 (a) 我们通过细粒度缩减将曲率计算问题与完整二部图上的最小权重完美匹配问题联系起来。 (b) 我们在合适的框架中形式化曲率计算问题的计算方面，以便研究人员可以使用本地算法来研究它们。 (c) 我们为本地算法框架中的曲率计算问题提供基于查询的算法的第一个已知的查询下限和上限。在此过程中，我们还展示了细粒度缩减的本地化版本。我们相信，我们的研究结果提出了一系列有趣的研究问题，这些问题在理论和实践上都受到启发，涉及设计有效的物体曲率算法。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了图的离散化Ricci曲率（Ollivier-Ricci曲率）的高效计算方法，通过细粒度归约和局部算法框架分析其计算复杂性。
AI.motivation: 尽管已有多种离散化Ricci曲率的数学方法，但其计算复杂性未被理论计算机科学充分研究，需探索高效算法以推动相关应用。
AI.method: 通过细粒度归约将曲率计算问题与完全二分图的最小权完美匹配问题关联，并构建局部算法框架以分析查询复杂度。
AI.result: 首次建立了局部算法框架下曲率计算问题的查询上下界，并展示了归约方法的局部化版本。
AI.conclusion: 研究成果为设计高效曲率计算算法提供了理论基础，并启发了理论与实践层面的进一步研究方向。

title: Packet Forwarding with a Locally Bursty Adversary
title_zh: 与本地突发对手的数据包转发
comment: To appear in International Symposium on Distributed Computing (DISC) 2022
comments: To appear in International Symposium on Distributed Computing (DISC) 2022
abstract: We consider packet forwarding in the adversarial queueing theory (AQT) model introduced by Borodin et al. We introduce a refinement of the AQT $(ρ, σ)$-bounded adversary, which we call a \emph{locally bursty adversary} (LBA) that parameterizes injection patterns jointly by edge utilization and packet origin. For constant ($O(1)$) parameters, the LBA model is strictly more permissive than the $(ρ, σ)$ model. For example, there are injection patterns in the LBA model with constant parameters that can only be realized as $(ρ, σ)$-bounded injection patterns with $ρ+ σ= Ω(n)$ (where $n$ is the network size). We show that the LBA model (unlike the $(ρ, σ)$ model) is closed under packet bundling and discretization operations. Thus, the LBA model allows one to reduce the study of general (uniform) capacity networks and inhomogenous packet sizes to unit capacity networks with homogeneous packets. On the algorithmic side, we focus on information gathering networks -- i.e., networks in which all packets share a common destination, and the union of packet routes forms a tree. We show that the Odd-Even Downhill (OED) forwarding protocol described independently by Dobrev et al.\ and Patt-Shamir and Rosenbaum achieves buffer space usage of $O(\log n)$ against all LBAs with constant parameters. OED is a local protocol, but we show that the upper bound is tight even when compared to centralized protocols. Our lower bound for the LBA model is in contrast to the $(ρ, σ)$-model, where centralized protocols can achieve worst-case buffer space usage $O(1)$ for $ρ, σ= O(1)$, while the $O(\log n)$ upper bound for OED is optimal only for local protocols.
summary: We consider packet forwarding in the adversarial queueing theory (AQT) model introduced by Borodin et al. We introduce a refinement of the AQT $(ρ, σ)$-bounded adversary, which we call a \emph{locally bursty adversary} (LBA) that parameterizes injection patterns jointly by edge utilization and packet origin. For constant ($O(1)$) parameters, the LBA model is strictly more permissive than the $(ρ, σ)$ model. For example, there are injection patterns in the LBA model with constant parameters that can only be realized as $(ρ, σ)$-bounded injection patterns with $ρ+ σ= Ω(n)$ (where $n$ is the network size). We show that the LBA model (unlike the $(ρ, σ)$ model) is closed under packet bundling and discretization operations. Thus, the LBA model allows one to reduce the study of general (uniform) capacity networks and inhomogenous packet sizes to unit capacity networks with homogeneous packets. On the algorithmic side, we focus on information gathering networks -- i.e., networks in which all packets share a common destination, and the union of packet routes forms a tree. We show that the Odd-Even Downhill (OED) forwarding protocol described independently by Dobrev et al.\ and Patt-Shamir and Rosenbaum achieves buffer space usage of $O(\log n)$ against all LBAs with constant parameters. OED is a local protocol, but we show that the upper bound is tight even when compared to centralized protocols. Our lower bound for the LBA model is in contrast to the $(ρ, σ)$-model, where centralized protocols can achieve worst-case buffer space usage $O(1)$ for $ρ, σ= O(1)$, while the $O(\log n)$ upper bound for OED is optimal only for local protocols.
abstract_zh: 我们考虑 Borodin 等人引入的对抗性排队理论（AQT）模型中的数据包转发。我们引入了 AQT $(ρ, σ)$ 有界对手的改进，我们称之为 \emph{局部突发对手} (LBA)，它通过边缘利用率和数据包来源联合参数化注入模式。对于常数 ($O(1)$) 参数，LBA 模型比 $(ρ, σ)$ 模型更宽松。例如，LBA 模型中存在参数恒定的注入模式，只能实现为 $(ρ, σ)$ 有界注入模式，其中 $ρ+ σ= Ω(n)$（其中 $n$ 是网络大小）。我们证明了 LBA 模型（与 $(ρ, σ)$ 模型不同）在数据包捆绑和离散化操作下是封闭的。因此，LBA模型允许人们将对一般（均匀）容量网络和非同质数据包大小的研究减少到具有同质数据包的单位容量网络。在算法方面，我们关注信息收集网络——即所有数据包共享一个共同目的地的网络，并且数据包路由的联合形成一棵树。我们表明，Dobrev 等人以及 Patt-Shamir 和 Rosenbaum 独立描述的奇偶下坡 (OED) 转发协议针对具有常量参数的所有 LBA 实现了 $O(\log n)$ 的缓冲区空间使用。 OED 是一种本地协议，但我们表明，即使与集中式协议相比，上限也是严格的。我们的 LBA 模型下限与 $(ρ, σ)$ 模型相反，其中集中式协议可以实现最坏情况下的缓冲区空间使用 $O(1)$（对于 $ρ，σ= O(1)$），而 OED 的 $O(\log n)$ 上限仅对于本地协议而言是最佳的。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了在局部突发性对手模型（LBA）下的数据包转发问题，并分析了Odd-Even Downhill（OED）协议在该模型中的性能。
AI.motivation: 传统对抗队列理论模型（ρ, σ）存在限制，无法有效描述某些网络注入模式。本文提出更灵活的LBA模型，以更好地适应实际网络场景并简化分析。
AI.method: 引入LBA模型，结合边利用率和数据包来源参数化注入模式，并在信息收集网络中分析OED协议的缓冲区使用情况。
AI.result: 证明OED协议在LBA模型下可实现O(log n)的缓冲区使用上限，且该上限对集中式协议也成立，与传统模型结果形成对比。
AI.conclusion: LBA模型比传统模型更具包容性，OED协议在局部协议中达到最优缓冲区使用效率，但无法超越集中式协议的下界。

search_text: Packet Forwarding with a Locally Bursty Adversary 与本地突发对手的数据包转发 We consider packet forwarding in the adversarial queueing theory (AQT) model introduced by Borodin et al. We introduce a refinement of the AQT $(ρ, σ)$-bounded adversary, which we call a \emph{locally bursty adversary} (LBA) that parameterizes injection patterns jointly by edge utilization and packet origin. For constant ($O(1)$) parameters, the LBA model is strictly more permissive than the $(ρ, σ)$ model. For example, there are injection patterns in the LBA model with constant parameters that can only be realized as $(ρ, σ)$-bounded injection patterns with $ρ+ σ= Ω(n)$ (where $n$ is the network size). We show that the LBA model (unlike the $(ρ, σ)$ model) is closed under packet bundling and discretization operations. Thus, the LBA model allows one to reduce the study of general (uniform) capacity networks and inhomogenous packet sizes to unit capacity networks with homogeneous packets. On the algorithmic side, we focus on information gathering networks -- i.e., networks in which all packets share a common destination, and the union of packet routes forms a tree. We show that the Odd-Even Downhill (OED) forwarding protocol described independently by Dobrev et al.\ and Patt-Shamir and Rosenbaum achieves buffer space usage of $O(\log n)$ against all LBAs with constant parameters. OED is a local protocol, but we show that the upper bound is tight even when compared to centralized protocols. Our lower bound for the LBA model is in contrast to the $(ρ, σ)$-model, where centralized protocols can achieve worst-case buffer space usage $O(1)$ for $ρ, σ= O(1)$, while the $O(\log n)$ upper bound for OED is optimal only for local protocols. 我们考虑 Borodin 等人引入的对抗性排队理论（AQT）模型中的数据包转发。我们引入了 AQT $(ρ, σ)$ 有界对手的改进，我们称之为 \emph{局部突发对手} (LBA)，它通过边缘利用率和数据包来源联合参数化注入模式。对于常数 ($O(1)$) 参数，LBA 模型比 $(ρ, σ)$ 模型更宽松。例如，LBA 模型中存在参数恒定的注入模式，只能实现为 $(ρ, σ)$ 有界注入模式，其中 $ρ+ σ= Ω(n)$（其中 $n$ 是网络大小）。我们证明了 LBA 模型（与 $(ρ, σ)$ 模型不同）在数据包捆绑和离散化操作下是封闭的。因此，LBA模型允许人们将对一般（均匀）容量网络和非同质数据包大小的研究减少到具有同质数据包的单位容量网络。在算法方面，我们关注信息收集网络——即所有数据包共享一个共同目的地的网络，并且数据包路由的联合形成一棵树。我们表明，Dobrev 等人以及 Patt-Shamir 和 Rosenbaum 独立描述的奇偶下坡 (OED) 转发协议针对具有常量参数的所有 LBA 实现了 $O(\log n)$ 的缓冲区空间使用。 OED 是一种本地协议，但我们表明，即使与集中式协议相比，上限也是严格的。我们的 LBA 模型下限与 $(ρ, σ)$ 模型相反，其中集中式协议可以实现最坏情况下的缓冲区空间使用 $O(1)$（对于 $ρ，σ= O(1)$），而 OED 的 $O(\log n)$ 上限仅对于本地协议而言是最佳的。 本文研究了在局部突发性对手模型（LBA）下的数据包转发问题，并分析了Odd-Even Downhill（OED）协议在该模型中的性能。 Will Rosenbaum cs.DC,cs.DS

title: Accelerating Vision Transformer Training via a Patch Sampling Schedule
title_zh: 通过补丁采样计划加速 Vision Transformer 培训
comment: 7 pages, 3 page appendix, 13 figures
comments: 7 pages, 3 page appendix, 13 figures
abstract: We introduce the notion of a Patch Sampling Schedule (PSS), that varies the number of Vision Transformer (ViT) patches used per batch during training. Since all patches are not equally important for most vision objectives (e.g., classification), we argue that less important patches can be used in fewer training iterations, leading to shorter training time with minimal impact on performance. Additionally, we observe that training with a PSS makes a ViT more robust to a wider patch sampling range during inference. This allows for a fine-grained, dynamic trade-off between throughput and accuracy during inference. We evaluate using PSSs on ViTs for ImageNet both trained from scratch and pre-trained using a reconstruction loss function. For the pre-trained model, we achieve a 0.26% reduction in classification accuracy for a 31% reduction in training time (from 25 to 17 hours) compared to using all patches each iteration. Code, model checkpoints and logs are available at https://github.com/BradMcDanel/pss.
summary: We introduce the notion of a Patch Sampling Schedule (PSS), that varies the number of Vision Transformer (ViT) patches used per batch during training. Since all patches are not equally important for most vision objectives (e.g., classification), we argue that less important patches can be used in fewer training iterations, leading to shorter training time with minimal impact on performance. Additionally, we observe that training with a PSS makes a ViT more robust to a wider patch sampling range during inference. This allows for a fine-grained, dynamic trade-off between throughput and accuracy during inference. We evaluate using PSSs on ViTs for ImageNet both trained from scratch and pre-trained using a reconstruction loss function. For the pre-trained model, we achieve a 0.26% reduction in classification accuracy for a 31% reduction in training time (from 25 to 17 hours) compared to using all patches each iteration. Code, model checkpoints and logs are available at https://github.com/BradMcDanel/pss.
abstract_zh: 我们引入了补丁采样计划（PSS）的概念，它改变了训练期间每批次使用的视觉变换器（ViT）补丁的数量。由于所有补丁对于大多数视觉目标（例如分类）来说并不是同等重要，因此我们认为不太重要的补丁可以在更少的训练迭代中使用，从而缩短训练时间，同时对性能的影响最小。此外，我们观察到，使用 PSS 进行训练使得 ViT 在推理过程中对更广泛的补丁采样范围更加稳健。这允许在推理过程中在吞吐量和准确性之间进行细粒度的动态权衡。我们评估在 ImageNet 的 ViT 上使用 PSS，既可以从头开始训练，也可以使用重建损失函数进行预训练。对于预训练模型，与每次迭代使用所有补丁相比，我们的分类准确度降低了 0.26%，训练时间缩短了 31%（从 25 到 17 小时）。代码、模型检查点和日志可在 https://github.com/BradMcDanel/pss 上获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种补丁采样计划（PSS）方法，通过动态调整训练过程中每个批次使用的视觉Transformer（ViT）补丁数量，加速模型训练并保持性能。
AI.motivation: 传统ViT训练中所有补丁被均等处理导致效率低下，而实际任务中不同补丁的重要性存在差异，因此需要动态调整采样策略以提高训练效率并增强模型鲁棒性。
AI.method: 引入补丁采样计划（PSS），根据补丁重要性在训练时动态减少不关键补丁的使用频率，同时通过训练使模型适应更宽泛的采样范围以提升推理灵活性。
AI.result: 在ImageNet上，预训练模型训练时间缩短31%（25小时→17小时），分类准确率仅下降0.26%，且推理阶段支持动态平衡吞吐量与精度。
AI.conclusion: PSS通过差异化补丁采样有效加速ViT训练，验证了在保持性能前提下优化训练效率的可行性，并增强了模型对采样变化的适应能力。

authors_text: Ryan Chard,Jim Pruyne,Kurt McKee,Josh Bryan,Brigitte Raumann,Rachana Ananthakrishnan,Kyle Chard,Ian Foster
title: Globus Automation Services: Research process automation across the space-time continuum
title_zh: Globus 自动化服务：跨时空连续体的研究过程自动化
abstract: Research process automation -- the reliable, efficient, and reproducible execution of linked sets of actions on scientific instruments, computers, data stores, and other resources -- has emerged as an essential element of modern science. We report here on new services within the Globus research data management platform that enable the specification of diverse research processes as reusable sets of actions, \emph{flows}, and the execution of such flows in heterogeneous research environments. To support flows with broad spatial extent (e.g., from scientific instrument to remote data center) and temporal extent (from seconds to weeks), these Globus automation services feature: 1) cloud hosting for reliable execution of even long-lived flows despite sporadic failures; 2) a simple specification and extensible asynchronous action provider API, for defining and executing a wide variety of actions and flows involving heterogeneous resources; 3) an event-driven execution model for automating execution of flows in response to arbitrary events; and 4) a rich security model enabling authorization delegation mechanisms for secure execution of long-running actions across distributed resources. These services permit researchers to outsource and automate the management of a broad range of research tasks to a reliable, scalable, and secure cloud platform. We present use cases for Globus automation services, describe their design and implementation, present microbenchmark studies, and review experiences applying the services in a range of applications.
summary: Research process automation -- the reliable, efficient, and reproducible execution of linked sets of actions on scientific instruments, computers, data stores, and other resources -- has emerged as an essential element of modern science. We report here on new services within the Globus research data management platform that enable the specification of diverse research processes as reusable sets of actions, \emph{flows}, and the execution of such flows in heterogeneous research environments. To support flows with broad spatial extent (e.g., from scientific instrument to remote data center) and temporal extent (from seconds to weeks), these Globus automation services feature: 1) cloud hosting for reliable execution of even long-lived flows despite sporadic failures; 2) a simple specification and extensible asynchronous action provider API, for defining and executing a wide variety of actions and flows involving heterogeneous resources; 3) an event-driven execution model for automating execution of flows in response to arbitrary events; and 4) a rich security model enabling authorization delegation mechanisms for secure execution of long-running actions across distributed resources. These services permit researchers to outsource and automate the management of a broad range of research tasks to a reliable, scalable, and secure cloud platform. We present use cases for Globus automation services, describe their design and implementation, present microbenchmark studies, and review experiences applying the services in a range of applications.
abstract_zh: 研究过程自动化——在科学仪器、计算机、数据存储和其他资源上可靠、高效和可重复地执行一系列相互关联的操作——已成为现代科学的基本要素。我们在这里报告 Globus 研究数据管理平台中的新服务，这些服务能够将不同的研究流程规范为可重用的操作集，\emph{flows}，以及在异构研究环境中执行此类流程。为了支持具有广泛空间范围（例如，从科学仪器到远程数据中心）和时间范围（从几秒到几周）的流，这些 Globus 自动化服务具有以下功能： 1) 云托管，即使偶发故障也能可靠地执行长期存在的流； 2）简单的规范和可扩展的异步操作提供者API，用于定义和执行涉及异构资源的各种操作和流程； 3）事件驱动的执行模型，用于响应任意事件自动执行流程； 4) 丰富的安全模型支持授权委托机制，以便跨分布式资源安全执行长时间运行的操作。这些服务允许研究人员将广泛的研究任务的管理外包并自动化到可靠、可扩展且安全的云平台。我们介绍 Globus 自动化服务的用例，描述其设计和实现，介绍微基准研究，并回顾在一系列应用程序中应用这些服务的经验。

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了Globus研究数据管理平台的新服务，用于在异构研究环境中自动化执行跨时空范围的研究流程。
AI.motivation: 现代科学研究需要可靠、高效且可重复的自动化流程来管理科学仪器、计算机和数据存储等资源，但现有系统难以满足跨时空范围的复杂需求。
AI.method: 通过云托管、异步动作提供API、事件驱动执行模型和安全授权机制，实现跨空间（仪器到数据中心）和时间（秒到周）范围的流程自动化。
AI.result: 展示了Globus自动化服务的设计实现、微基准测试结果及多场景应用案例，验证了其在分布式环境中的可靠性与扩展性。
AI.conclusion: 该服务使研究人员能将任务外包至安全可靠的云平台，显著提升科研流程的自动化水平与资源管理效率。

search_text: Globus Automation Services: Research process automation across the space-time continuum Globus 自动化服务：跨时空连续体的研究过程自动化 Research process automation -- the reliable, efficient, and reproducible execution of linked sets of actions on scientific instruments, computers, data stores, and other resources -- has emerged as an essential element of modern science. We report here on new services within the Globus research data management platform that enable the specification of diverse research processes as reusable sets of actions, \emph{flows}, and the execution of such flows in heterogeneous research environments. To support flows with broad spatial extent (e.g., from scientific instrument to remote data center) and temporal extent (from seconds to weeks), these Globus automation services feature: 1) cloud hosting for reliable execution of even long-lived flows despite sporadic failures; 2) a simple specification and extensible asynchronous action provider API, for defining and executing a wide variety of actions and flows involving heterogeneous resources; 3) an event-driven execution model for automating execution of flows in response to arbitrary events; and 4) a rich security model enabling authorization delegation mechanisms for secure execution of long-running actions across distributed resources. These services permit researchers to outsource and automate the management of a broad range of research tasks to a reliable, scalable, and secure cloud platform. We present use cases for Globus automation services, describe their design and implementation, present microbenchmark studies, and review experiences applying the services in a range of applications. 研究过程自动化——在科学仪器、计算机、数据存储和其他资源上可靠、高效和可重复地执行一系列相互关联的操作——已成为现代科学的基本要素。我们在这里报告 Globus 研究数据管理平台中的新服务，这些服务能够将不同的研究流程规范为可重用的操作集，\emph{flows}，以及在异构研究环境中执行此类流程。为了支持具有广泛空间范围（例如，从科学仪器到远程数据中心）和时间范围（从几秒到几周）的流，这些 Globus 自动化服务具有以下功能： 1) 云托管，即使偶发故障也能可靠地执行长期存在的流； 2）简单的规范和可扩展的异步操作提供者API，用于定义和执行涉及异构资源的各种操作和流程； 3）事件驱动的执行模型，用于响应任意事件自动执行流程； 4) 丰富的安全模型支持授权委托机制，以便跨分布式资源安全执行长时间运行的操作。这些服务允许研究人员将广泛的研究任务的管理外包并自动化到可靠、可扩展且安全的云平台。我们介绍 Globus 自动化服务的用例，描述其设计和实现，介绍微基准研究，并回顾在一系列应用程序中应用这些服务的经验。 本文介绍了Globus研究数据管理平台的新服务，用于在异构研究环境中自动化执行跨时空范围的研究流程。 Ryan Chard,Jim Pruyne,Kurt McKee,Josh Bryan,Brigitte Raumann,Rachana Ananthakrishnan,Kyle Chard,Ian Foster cs.DC,cs.AI

authors_text: Valentina Salvatelli,Luiz F. G. dos Santos,Souvik Bose,Brad Neuberg,Mark C. M. Cheung,Miho Janvier,Meng Jin,Yarin Gal,Atilim Gunes Baydin
title: Exploring the Limits of Synthetic Creation of Solar EUV Images via Image-to-Image Translation
title_zh: 通过图像到图像转换探索太阳能 EUV 图像合成的极限
comment: 16 pages, 8 figures. To be published on ApJ (submitted on Feb 21st, accepted on July 28th)
comments: 16 pages, 8 figures. To be published on ApJ (submitted on Feb 21st, accepted on July 28th)
abstract: The Solar Dynamics Observatory (SDO), a NASA multi-spectral decade-long mission that has been daily producing terabytes of observational data from the Sun, has been recently used as a use-case to demonstrate the potential of machine learning methodologies and to pave the way for future deep-space mission planning. In particular, the idea of using image-to-image translation to virtually produce extreme ultra-violet channels has been proposed in several recent studies, as a way to both enhance missions with less available channels and to alleviate the challenges due to the low downlink rate in deep space. This paper investigates the potential and the limitations of such a deep learning approach by focusing on the permutation of four channels and an encoder--decoder based architecture, with particular attention to how morphological traits and brightness of the solar surface affect the neural network predictions. In this work we want to answer the question: can synthetic images of the solar corona produced via image-to-image translation be used for scientific studies of the Sun? The analysis highlights that the neural network produces high-quality images over three orders of magnitude in count rate (pixel intensity) and can generally reproduce the covariance across channels within a 1% error. However the model performance drastically diminishes in correspondence of extremely high energetic events like flares, and we argue that the reason is related to the rareness of such events posing a challenge to model training.
summary: The Solar Dynamics Observatory (SDO), a NASA multi-spectral decade-long mission that has been daily producing terabytes of observational data from the Sun, has been recently used as a use-case to demonstrate the potential of machine learning methodologies and to pave the way for future deep-space mission planning. In particular, the idea of using image-to-image translation to virtually produce extreme ultra-violet channels has been proposed in several recent studies, as a way to both enhance missions with less available channels and to alleviate the challenges due to the low downlink rate in deep space. This paper investigates the potential and the limitations of such a deep learning approach by focusing on the permutation of four channels and an encoder--decoder based architecture, with particular attention to how morphological traits and brightness of the solar surface affect the neural network predictions. In this work we want to answer the question: can synthetic images of the solar corona produced via image-to-image translation be used for scientific studies of the Sun? The analysis highlights that the neural network produces high-quality images over three orders of magnitude in count rate (pixel intensity) and can generally reproduce the covariance across channels within a 1% error. However the model performance drastically diminishes in correspondence of extremely high energetic events like flares, and we argue that the reason is related to the rareness of such events posing a challenge to model training.
abstract_zh: 太阳动力学观测站 (SDO) 是 NASA 长达十年的多光谱任务，每天都会产生数 TB 的太阳观测数据，最近被用作展示机器学习方法潜力的用例，并为未来的深空任务规划铺平道路。特别是，最近的几项研究提出了使用图像到图像转换来虚拟产生极端紫外线通道的想法，作为一种既可以用较少的可用通道增强任务的方法，又可以缓解由于深空下行链路速率低而带来的挑战。本文通过关注四个通道的排列和基于编码器-解码器的架构，研究了这种深度学习方法的潜力和局限性，特别关注太阳表面的形态特征和亮度如何影响神经网络预测。在这项工作中，我们想要回答这个问题：通过图像到图像转换生成的日冕合成图像可以用于太阳的科学研究吗？分析强调，神经网络生成计数率（像素强度）超过三个数量级的高质量图像，并且通常可以在 1% 的误差内重现跨通道的协方差。然而，在遇到耀斑等极高能量事件时，模型性能会急剧下降，我们认为原因与此类事件的罕见性有关，这对模型训练构成了挑战。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了通过图像到图像转换技术合成太阳极紫外图像的潜力及其局限性。
AI.motivation: 由于太阳动力学观测站（SDO）产生的数据量巨大，且深空任务中数据传输速率较低，因此需要通过机器学习方法生成虚拟的极紫外图像以补充观测数据。
AI.method: 本文采用基于编码器-解码器架构的图像到图像转换方法，关注四个通道的排列组合，并分析了太阳表面的形态特征和亮度对神经网络预测结果的影响。
AI.result: 神经网络在像素强度相差三个数量级的情况下仍能生成高质量图像，并在通道间协方差上达到1%的误差范围。然而，在极端高能事件如太阳耀斑的情况下，模型性能显著下降。
AI.conclusion: 合成的太阳日冕图像可用于太阳科学研究，但在极端高能事件情况下模型表现不佳，这可能与这些事件的罕见性有关。

authors_text: Pedro C. Neto,Tiago Gonçalves,João Ribeiro Pinto,Wilson Silva,Ana F. Sequeira,Arun Ross,Jaime S. Cardoso
title: Causality-Inspired Taxonomy for Explainable Artificial Intelligence
title_zh: 受因果关系启发的可解释人工智能分类法
abstract: As two sides of the same coin, causality and explainable artificial intelligence (xAI) were initially proposed and developed with different goals. However, the latter can only be complete when seen through the lens of the causality framework. As such, we propose a novel causality-inspired framework for xAI that creates an environment for the development of xAI approaches. To show its applicability, biometrics was used as case study. For this, we have analysed 81 research papers on a myriad of biometric modalities and different tasks. We have categorised each of these methods according to our novel xAI Ladder and discussed the future directions of the field.
summary: As two sides of the same coin, causality and explainable artificial intelligence (xAI) were initially proposed and developed with different goals. However, the latter can only be complete when seen through the lens of the causality framework. As such, we propose a novel causality-inspired framework for xAI that creates an environment for the development of xAI approaches. To show its applicability, biometrics was used as case study. For this, we have analysed 81 research papers on a myriad of biometric modalities and different tasks. We have categorised each of these methods according to our novel xAI Ladder and discussed the future directions of the field.
abstract_zh: 作为同一枚硬币的两面，因果关系和可解释人工智能（xAI）最初是出于不同的目标而提出和开发的。然而，后者只有从因果框架的角度来看才能完整。因此，我们提出了一种新颖的 xAI 因果关系框架，为 xAI 方法的开发创造了环境。为了展示其适用性，生物识别技术被用作案例研究。为此，我们分析了 81 篇关于多种生物识别模式和不同任务的研究论文。我们根据新颖的 xAI Ladder 对这些方法进行了分类，并讨论了该领域的未来方向。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于因果关系的可解释人工智能（xAI）分类框架，并通过生物特征识别领域的81篇论文分析验证其适用性。
AI.motivation: 可解释人工智能（xAI）与因果关系虽同源但目标不同，而xAI的完整性需借助因果框架实现，因此需建立新的分类体系以指导研究方向。
AI.method: 构建因果关系启发的xAI分类框架（xAI Ladder），选取生物特征识别领域81篇论文作为案例，通过文献分析法对方法进行分类并讨论未来研究方向。
AI.result: 成功将生物特征识别领域的研究方法按xAI Ladder分类，并揭示了当前研究在因果解释层面的不足与潜在发展路径。
AI.conclusion: 因果关系框架为xAI研究提供了系统性分类工具，未来需进一步结合因果推理提升人工智能的可解释性与可靠性。

search_text: Causality-Inspired Taxonomy for Explainable Artificial Intelligence 受因果关系启发的可解释人工智能分类法 As two sides of the same coin, causality and explainable artificial intelligence (xAI) were initially proposed and developed with different goals. However, the latter can only be complete when seen through the lens of the causality framework. As such, we propose a novel causality-inspired framework for xAI that creates an environment for the development of xAI approaches. To show its applicability, biometrics was used as case study. For this, we have analysed 81 research papers on a myriad of biometric modalities and different tasks. We have categorised each of these methods according to our novel xAI Ladder and discussed the future directions of the field. 作为同一枚硬币的两面，因果关系和可解释人工智能（xAI）最初是出于不同的目标而提出和开发的。然而，后者只有从因果框架的角度来看才能完整。因此，我们提出了一种新颖的 xAI 因果关系框架，为 xAI 方法的开发创造了环境。为了展示其适用性，生物识别技术被用作案例研究。为此，我们分析了 81 篇关于多种生物识别模式和不同任务的研究论文。我们根据新颖的 xAI Ladder 对这些方法进行了分类，并讨论了该领域的未来方向。 本文提出了一种基于因果关系的可解释人工智能（xAI）分类框架，并通过生物特征识别领域的81篇论文分析验证其适用性。 Pedro C. Neto,Tiago Gonçalves,João Ribeiro Pinto,Wilson Silva,Ana F. Sequeira,Arun Ross,Jaime S. Cardoso cs.CV

authors_text: Agathe Lherondelle,Varun Babbar,Yash Satsangi,Fran Silavong,Shaltiel Eloul,Sean Moran
title: Topical: Learning Repository Embeddings from Source Code using Attention
title_zh: 主题：使用注意力机制从源代码中学习存储库嵌入
comment: Pre-print, under review
comments: Pre-print, under review
abstract: This paper presents Topical, a novel deep neural network for repository level embeddings. Existing methods, reliant on natural language documentation or naive aggregation techniques, are outperformed by Topical's utilization of an attention mechanism. This mechanism generates repository-level representations from source code, full dependency graphs, and script level textual data. Trained on publicly accessible GitHub repositories, Topical surpasses multiple baselines in tasks such as repository auto-tagging, highlighting the attention mechanism's efficacy over traditional aggregation methods. Topical also demonstrates scalability and efficiency, making it a valuable contribution to repository-level representation computation. For further research, the accompanying tools, code, and training dataset are provided at: https://github.com/jpmorganchase/topical.
summary: This paper presents Topical, a novel deep neural network for repository level embeddings. Existing methods, reliant on natural language documentation or naive aggregation techniques, are outperformed by Topical's utilization of an attention mechanism. This mechanism generates repository-level representations from source code, full dependency graphs, and script level textual data. Trained on publicly accessible GitHub repositories, Topical surpasses multiple baselines in tasks such as repository auto-tagging, highlighting the attention mechanism's efficacy over traditional aggregation methods. Topical also demonstrates scalability and efficiency, making it a valuable contribution to repository-level representation computation. For further research, the accompanying tools, code, and training dataset are provided at: https://github.com/jpmorganchase/topical.
abstract_zh: 本文提出了 Topical，一种用于存储库级嵌入的新型深度神经网络。 Topical 对注意力机制的利用优于依赖自然语言文档或朴素聚合技术的现有方法。该机制从源代码、完整依赖图和脚本级文本数据生成存储库级表示。在可公开访问的 GitHub 存储库上进行训练后，Topical 在存储库自动标记等任务中超越了多个基线，凸显了注意力机制相对于传统聚合方法的功效。 Topical 还展示了可扩展性和效率，使其对存储库级表示计算做出了宝贵的贡献。为了进一步研究，以下网址提供了随附的工具、代码和训练数据集：https://github.com/jpmorganchase/topical。

AI.tldr: 本文提出Topical模型，通过注意力机制从源代码、依赖图和文本数据中学习仓库级嵌入表示，用于解决仓库自动标签等任务。
AI.motivation: 现有方法依赖自然语言文档或简单聚合技术，难以有效捕捉代码结构及依赖关系，需更高效的仓库表示学习方法。
AI.method: 基于注意力机制，整合源代码、完整依赖图及脚本级文本数据，生成仓库级嵌入表示，并在GitHub数据集上训练验证。
AI.result: Topical在仓库自动标签任务中超越多个基线模型，且具备可扩展性和高效性，相关工具与数据集已开源。
AI.conclusion: 注意力机制在仓库表示学习中优于传统方法，Topical为代码级分析提供了有效工具，推动了该领域研究进展。

authors_text: Aaron Potechin,Paxton Turner,Prayaag Venkat,Alexander S. Wein
title: Near-optimal fitting of ellipsoids to random points
title_zh: 椭球与随机点的近乎最优拟合
comment: An earlier version of this paper contained an error in the proof of Proposition 5.2. The current version contains a corrected proof of the original result
comments: An earlier version of this paper contained an error in the proof of Proposition 5.2. The current version contains a corrected proof of the original result
abstract: Given independent standard Gaussian points $v_1, \ldots, v_n$ in dimension $d$, for what values of $(n, d)$ does there exist with high probability an origin-symmetric ellipsoid that simultaneously passes through all of the points? This basic problem of fitting an ellipsoid to random points has connections to low-rank matrix decompositions, independent component analysis, and principal component analysis. Based on strong numerical evidence, Saunderson, Parrilo, and Willsky [Proc. of Conference on Decision and Control, pp. 6031-6036, 2013] conjecture that the ellipsoid fitting problem transitions from feasible to infeasible as the number of points $n$ increases, with a sharp threshold at $n \sim d^2/4$. We resolve this conjecture up to logarithmic factors by constructing a fitting ellipsoid for some $n = Ω( \, d^2/\mathrm{polylog}(d) \,)$, improving prior work of Ghosh et al. [Proc. of Symposium on Foundations of Computer Science, pp. 954-965, 2020] that requires $n = o(d^{3/2})$. Our proof demonstrates feasibility of the least squares construction of Saunderson et al. using a convenient decomposition of a certain non-standard random matrix and a careful analysis of its Neumann expansion via the theory of graph matrices.
summary: Given independent standard Gaussian points $v_1, \ldots, v_n$ in dimension $d$, for what values of $(n, d)$ does there exist with high probability an origin-symmetric ellipsoid that simultaneously passes through all of the points? This basic problem of fitting an ellipsoid to random points has connections to low-rank matrix decompositions, independent component analysis, and principal component analysis. Based on strong numerical evidence, Saunderson, Parrilo, and Willsky [Proc. of Conference on Decision and Control, pp. 6031-6036, 2013] conjecture that the ellipsoid fitting problem transitions from feasible to infeasible as the number of points $n$ increases, with a sharp threshold at $n \sim d^2/4$. We resolve this conjecture up to logarithmic factors by constructing a fitting ellipsoid for some $n = Ω( \, d^2/\mathrm{polylog}(d) \,)$, improving prior work of Ghosh et al. [Proc. of Symposium on Foundations of Computer Science, pp. 954-965, 2020] that requires $n = o(d^{3/2})$. Our proof demonstrates feasibility of the least squares construction of Saunderson et al. using a convenient decomposition of a certain non-standard random matrix and a careful analysis of its Neumann expansion via the theory of graph matrices.
abstract_zh: 给定维度 $d$ 中的独立标准高斯点 $v_1, \ldots, v_n$，对于 $(n, d)$ 的什么值，存在高概率存在同时通过所有点的原点对称椭球？将椭球拟合到随机点的这个基本问题与低秩矩阵分解、独立成分分析和主成分分析有关。基于强有力的数字证据，Saunderson、Parrilo 和 Willsky [Proc. of Conference on Decision and Control, pp. 6031-6036, 2013]推测，随着点数$n$的增加，椭球拟合问题从可行转变为不可行，尖锐阈值为$n \sim d^2/4$。我们通过为某些 $n = Ω( \, d^2/\mathrm{polylog}(d) \,)$ 构造一个拟合椭球体，将这个猜想解析为对数因子，改进了 Ghosh 等人的先前工作。 [程序。计算机科学基础研讨会，第 954-965 页，2020] 需要 $n = o(d^{3/2})$。我们的证明证明了 Saunderson 等人的最小二乘构造的可行性。使用某个非标准随机矩阵的方便分解，并通过图矩阵理论仔细分析其诺依曼展开式。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了在给定维度d的独立标准高斯点的情况下，是否存在一个以原点对称的椭球体同时通过所有点的问题。
AI.motivation: 椭球拟合问题与低秩矩阵分解、独立成分分析和主成分分析等领域相关，具有重要的理论和应用价值。
AI.method: 通过构造拟合椭球体并利用非标准随机矩阵的分解以及图矩阵理论对Neumann展开的细致分析，证明了最小二乘法构造的可行性。
AI.result: 解决了Saunderson等人提出的猜想，证明了当点数n为Ω(d²/polylog(d))时，存在一个拟合椭球体，改进了之前的工作。
AI.conclusion: 本文通过理论分析和构造方法，验证了椭球拟合问题的可行性阈值，为相关领域的研究提供了新的视角和工具。

Our proof demonstrates feasibility of the least squares construction of Saunderson et al. using a convenient decomposition of a certain non-standard random matrix and a careful analysis of its Neumann expansion via the theory of graph matrices. 给定维度 $d$ 中的独立标准高斯点 $v_1, \ldots, v_n$，对于 $(n, d)$ 的什么值，存在高概率存在同时通过所有点的原点对称椭球？将椭球拟合到随机点的这个基本问题与低秩矩阵分解、独立成分分析和主成分分析有关。基于强有力的数字证据，Saunderson、Parrilo 和 Willsky [Proc. of Conference on Decision and Control, pp. 6031-6036, 2013]推测，随着点数$n$的增加，椭球拟合问题从可行转变为不可行，尖锐阈值为$n \sim d^2/4$。我们通过为某些 $n = Ω( \, d^2/\mathrm{polylog}(d) \,)$ 构造一个拟合椭球体，将这个猜想解析为对数因子，改进了 Ghosh 等人的先前工作。 [程序。计算机科学基础研讨会，第 954-965 页，2020] 需要 $n = o(d^{3/2})$。我们的证明证明了 Saunderson 等人的最小二乘构造的可行性。使用某个非标准随机矩阵的方便分解，并通过图矩阵理论仔细分析其诺依曼展开式。 本文研究了在给定维度d的独立标准高斯点的情况下，是否存在一个以原点对称的椭球体同时通过所有点的问题。 Aaron Potechin,Paxton Turner,Prayaag Venkat,Alexander S. Wein cs.DS,math.OC,math.PR,math.ST,stat.ML

title: Blind Image Deblurring with Unknown Kernel Size and Substantial Noise
title_zh: 未知内核大小和大量噪声的盲图像去模糊
comment: ef:International Journal of Computer Vision, 2023
comments: ef:International Journal of Computer Vision, 2023
abstract: Blind image deblurring (BID) has been extensively studied in computer vision and adjacent fields. Modern methods for BID can be grouped into two categories: single-instance methods that deal with individual instances using statistical inference and numerical optimization, and data-driven methods that train deep-learning models to deblur future instances directly. Data-driven methods can be free from the difficulty in deriving accurate blur models, but are fundamentally limited by the diversity and quality of the training data -- collecting sufficiently expressive and realistic training data is a standing challenge. In this paper, we focus on single-instance methods that remain competitive and indispensable. However, most such methods do not prescribe how to deal with unknown kernel size and substantial noise, precluding practical deployment. Indeed, we show that several state-of-the-art (SOTA) single-instance methods are unstable when the kernel size is overspecified, and/or the noise level is high. On the positive side, we propose a practical BID method that is stable against both, the first of its kind. Our method builds on the recent ideas of solving inverse problems by integrating the physical models and structured deep neural networks, without extra training data. We introduce several crucial modifications to achieve the desired stability. Extensive empirical tests on standard synthetic datasets, as well as real-world NTIRE2020 and RealBlur datasets, show the superior effectiveness and practicality of our BID method compared to SOTA single-instance as well as data-driven methods. The code of our method is available at: \url{https://github.com/sun-umn/Blind-Image-Deblurring}.

In this paper, we focus on single-instance methods that remain competitive and indispensable. However, most such methods do not prescribe how to deal with unknown kernel size and substantial noise, precluding practical deployment. Indeed, we show that several state-of-the-art (SOTA) single-instance methods are unstable when the kernel size is overspecified, and/or the noise level is high. On the positive side, we propose a practical BID method that is stable against both, the first of its kind. Our method builds on the recent ideas of solving inverse problems by integrating the physical models and structured deep neural networks, without extra training data. We introduce several crucial modifications to achieve the desired stability. Extensive empirical tests on standard synthetic datasets, as well as real-world NTIRE2020 and RealBlur datasets, show the superior effectiveness and practicality of our BID method compared to SOTA single-instance as well as data-driven methods. The code of our method is available at: \url{https://github.com/sun-umn/Blind-Image-Deblurring}.
abstract_zh: 盲图像去模糊（BID）在计算机视觉和相关领域得到了广泛的研究。现代 BID 方法可以分为两类：使用统计推断和数值优化处理单个实例的单实例方法，以及训练深度学习模型以直接对未来实例进行去模糊的数据驱动方法。数据驱动的方法可以摆脱推导精确模糊模型的困难，但从根本上受到训练数据的多样性和质量的限制——收集足够表达和真实的训练数据是一个长期的挑战。在本文中，我们重点关注保持竞争力且不可或缺的单实例方法。然而，大多数此类方法没有规定如何处理未知的内核大小和大量噪声，从而妨碍了实际部署。事实上，我们表明，当内核大小过度指定和/或噪声水平较高时，几种最先进的（SOTA）单实例方法是不稳定的。从积极的方面来看，我们提出了一种实用的 BID 方法，该方法对两者都稳定，这是同类中的第一个。我们的方法建立在通过集成物理模型和结构化深度神经网络来解决逆问题的最新想法的基础上，无需额外的训练数据。我们引入了一些关键的修改来实现所需的稳定性。对标准合成数据集以及现实世界的 NTIRE2020 和 RealBlur 数据集进行的广泛实证测试表明，与 SOTA 单实例以及数据驱动方法相比，我们的 BID 方法具有卓越的有效性和实用性。我们方法的代码位于：\url{https://github.com/sun-umn/Blind-Image-Deblurring}。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种在未知模糊核尺寸和高噪声情况下稳定的盲图像去模糊方法。
AI.motivation: 现有单实例方法在处理未知模糊核尺寸和高噪声时表现不稳定，而数据驱动方法受限于训练数据的多样性和质量，因此需要一种无需额外训练数据且稳定的解决方案。
AI.method: 结合物理模型与结构化深度神经网络，通过关键修改实现稳定性，无需额外训练数据。
AI.result: 在合成数据集和真实数据集（如NTIRE2020、RealBlur）上均优于现有单实例及数据驱动方法。
AI.conclusion: 本文首次提出针对未知模糊核尺寸和高噪声的稳定盲图像去模糊方法，有效结合物理模型与神经网络结构。

authors_text: Zian Wang,Wenzheng Chen,David Acuna,Jan Kautz,Sanja Fidler
title: Neural Light Field Estimation for Street Scenes with Differentiable Virtual Object Insertion
title_zh: 具有可微虚拟对象插入的街道场景的神经光场估计
comment: Webpage: https://nv-tlabs.github.io/outdoor-ar/
comments: Webpage: https://nv-tlabs.github.io/outdoor-ar/
abstract: We consider the challenging problem of outdoor lighting estimation for the goal of photorealistic virtual object insertion into photographs. Existing works on outdoor lighting estimation typically simplify the scene lighting into an environment map which cannot capture the spatially-varying lighting effects in outdoor scenes. In this work, we propose a neural approach that estimates the 5D HDR light field from a single image, and a differentiable object insertion formulation that enables end-to-end training with image-based losses that encourage realism. Specifically, we design a hybrid lighting representation tailored to outdoor scenes, which contains an HDR sky dome that handles the extreme intensity of the sun, and a volumetric lighting representation that models the spatially-varying appearance of the surrounding scene. With the estimated lighting, our shadow-aware object insertion is fully differentiable, which enables adversarial training over the composited image to provide additional supervisory signal to the lighting prediction. We experimentally demonstrate that our hybrid lighting representation is more performant than existing outdoor lighting estimation methods. We further show the benefits of our AR object insertion in an autonomous driving application, where we obtain performance gains for a 3D object detector when trained on our augmented data.
summary: We consider the challenging problem of outdoor lighting estimation for the goal of photorealistic virtual object insertion into photographs. Existing works on outdoor lighting estimation typically simplify the scene lighting into an environment map which cannot capture the spatially-varying lighting effects in outdoor scenes. In this work, we propose a neural approach that estimates the 5D HDR light field from a single image, and a differentiable object insertion formulation that enables end-to-end training with image-based losses that encourage realism. Specifically, we design a hybrid lighting representation tailored to outdoor scenes, which contains an HDR sky dome that handles the extreme intensity of the sun, and a volumetric lighting representation that models the spatially-varying appearance of the surrounding scene. With the estimated lighting, our shadow-aware object insertion is fully differentiable, which enables adversarial training over the composited image to provide additional supervisory signal to the lighting prediction. We experimentally demonstrate that our hybrid lighting representation is more performant than existing outdoor lighting estimation methods. We further show the benefits of our AR object insertion in an autonomous driving application, where we obtain performance gains for a 3D object detector when trained on our augmented data.
abstract_zh: 我们考虑室外照明估计的挑战性问题，以将逼真的虚拟对象插入到照片中。现有的室外照明估计工作通常将场景照明简化为环境地图，无法捕捉室外场景中空间变化的照明效果。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种从单个图像估计 5D HDR 光场的神经方法，以及一种可微分的对象插入公式，该公式可以通过基于图像的损失进行端到端训练，从而增强真实感。具体来说，我们设计了一种适合户外场景的混合照明表示，其中包含处理太阳极端强度的 HDR 天空穹顶，以及模拟周围场景的空间变化外观的体积照明表示。通过估计的照明，我们的阴影感知对象插入是完全可微分的，这使得能够对合成图像进行对抗性训练，从而为照明预测提供额外的监督信号。我们通过实验证明，我们的混合照明表示比现有的室外照明估计方法更具性能。我们进一步展示了在自动驾驶应用中插入 AR 对象的好处，在使用增强数据进行训练时，我们获得了 3D 对象检测器的性能提升。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种神经网络方法，用于从单张图像估计户外场景的5D HDR光场，并结合可微虚拟物体插入技术，以实现更真实的街景照片中虚拟物体的合成。
AI.motivation: 现有户外光照估计方法简化为环境贴图，无法准确捕捉户外场景的空间变化光照效果，导致虚拟物体插入缺乏真实感。
AI.method: 设计混合光照表示（HDR天空穹顶和体积光照）来建模户外场景的复杂光照，结合可微虚拟物体插入技术，通过端到端训练和对抗损失优化实现光照估计与物体合成的联合优化。
AI.result: 实验表明，混合光照表示在户外光照估计任务中优于现有方法，且在自动驾驶场景中使用增强数据训练的3D目标检测器性能显著提升。
AI.conclusion: 本文提出的神经光场估计与可微插入框架有效解决了户外虚拟物体合成中的光照建模难题，在计算机视觉与自动驾驶领域具有重要应用价值。

We further show the benefits of our AR object insertion in an autonomous driving application, where we obtain performance gains for a 3D object detector when trained on our augmented data. 我们考虑室外照明估计的挑战性问题，以将逼真的虚拟对象插入到照片中。现有的室外照明估计工作通常将场景照明简化为环境地图，无法捕捉室外场景中空间变化的照明效果。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种从单个图像估计 5D HDR 光场的神经方法，以及一种可微分的对象插入公式，该公式可以通过基于图像的损失进行端到端训练，从而增强真实感。具体来说，我们设计了一种适合户外场景的混合照明表示，其中包含处理太阳极端强度的 HDR 天空穹顶，以及模拟周围场景的空间变化外观的体积照明表示。通过估计的照明，我们的阴影感知对象插入是完全可微分的，这使得能够对合成图像进行对抗性训练，从而为照明预测提供额外的监督信号。我们通过实验证明，我们的混合照明表示比现有的室外照明估计方法更具性能。我们进一步展示了在自动驾驶应用中插入 AR 对象的好处，在使用增强数据进行训练时，我们获得了 3D 对象检测器的性能提升。 本文提出了一种神经网络方法，用于从单张图像估计户外场景的5D HDR光场，并结合可微虚拟物体插入技术，以实现更真实的街景照片中虚拟物体的合成。 Zian Wang,Wenzheng Chen,David Acuna,Jan Kautz,Sanja Fidler cs.CV

title: Temporal View Synthesis of Dynamic Scenes through 3D Object Motion Estimation with Multi-Plane Images
title_zh: 通过多平面图像的 3D 物体运动估计来合成动态场景的时间视图
comment: To appear in ISMAR 2022; Project website: https://nagabhushansn95.github.io/publications/2022/DeCOMPnet.html
comments: To appear in ISMAR 2022; Project website: https://nagabhushansn95.github.io/publications/2022/DeCOMPnet.html
abstract: The challenge of graphically rendering high frame-rate videos on low compute devices can be addressed through periodic prediction of future frames to enhance the user experience in virtual reality applications. This is studied through the problem of temporal view synthesis (TVS), where the goal is to predict the next frames of a video given the previous frames and the head poses of the previous and the next frames. In this work, we consider the TVS of dynamic scenes in which both the user and objects are moving. We design a framework that decouples the motion into user and object motion to effectively use the available user motion while predicting the next frames. We predict the motion of objects by isolating and estimating the 3D object motion in the past frames and then extrapolating it. We employ multi-plane images (MPI) as a 3D representation of the scenes and model the object motion as the 3D displacement between the corresponding points in the MPI representation. In order to handle the sparsity in MPIs while estimating the motion, we incorporate partial convolutions and masked correlation layers to estimate corresponding points. The predicted object motion is then integrated with the given user or camera motion to generate the next frame. Using a disocclusion infilling module, we synthesize the regions uncovered due to the camera and object motion. We develop a new synthetic dataset for TVS of dynamic scenes consisting of 800 videos at full HD resolution. We show through experiments on our dataset and the MPI Sintel dataset that our model outperforms all the competing methods in the literature.
summary: The challenge of graphically rendering high frame-rate videos on low compute devices can be addressed through periodic prediction of future frames to enhance the user experience in virtual reality applications. This is studied through the problem of temporal view synthesis (TVS), where the goal is to predict the next frames of a video given the previous frames and the head poses of the previous and the next frames. In this work, we consider the TVS of dynamic scenes in which both the user and objects are moving. We design a framework that decouples the motion into user and object motion to effectively use the available user motion while predicting the next frames. We predict the motion of objects by isolating and estimating the 3D object motion in the past frames and then extrapolating it. We employ multi-plane images (MPI) as a 3D representation of the scenes and model the object motion as the 3D displacement between the corresponding points in the MPI representation. In order to handle the sparsity in MPIs while estimating the motion, we incorporate partial convolutions and masked correlation layers to estimate corresponding points. The predicted object motion is then integrated with the given user or camera motion to generate the next frame. Using a disocclusion infilling module, we synthesize the regions uncovered due to the camera and object motion. We develop a new synthetic dataset for TVS of dynamic scenes consisting of 800 videos at full HD resolution. We show through experiments on our dataset and the MPI Sintel dataset that our model outperforms all the competing methods in the literature.
abstract_zh: 在低计算设备上以图形方式渲染高帧率视频的挑战可以通过定期预测未来帧来​​解决，以增强虚拟现实应用中的用户体验。这是通过时间视图合成（TVS）问题进行研究的，其目标是在给定前一帧以及前一帧和下一帧的头部姿势的情况下预测视频的下一帧。在这项工作中，我们考虑了用户和物体都在移动的动态场景的 TVS。我们设计了一个框架，将运动解耦为用户和对象运动，以便在预测下一帧的同时有效地使用可用的用户运动。我们通过隔离和估计过去帧中的 3D 对象运动，然后进行推断来预测对象的运动。我们采用多平面图像 (MPI) 作为场景的 3D 表示，并将对象运动建模为 MPI 表示中对应点之间的 3D 位移。为了在估计运动时处理 MPI 中的稀疏性，我们结合了部分卷积和屏蔽相关层来估计对应点。然后将预测的对象运动与给定的用户或相机运动集成以生成下一帧。使用去遮挡填充模块，我们合成由于相机和物体运动而未被覆盖的区域。我们为动态场景的 TVS 开发了一个新的合成数据集，其中包含 800 个全高清分辨率的视频。我们通过对我们的数据集和 MPI Sintel 数据集的实验表明，我们的模型优于文献中的所有竞争方法。

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一种通过3D物体运动估计与多平面图像（MPI）实现动态场景时序视图合成的方法，以提升虚拟现实应用中低计算设备的视频渲染效率。
AI.motivation: 高帧率视频在低算力设备上的渲染存在挑战，尤其在虚拟现实场景中需预测未来帧以提升用户体验，而现有方法难以有效处理用户与物体同时运动的动态场景。
AI.method: 框架将运动分解为用户与物体运动，通过MPI表示场景并估计3D物体运动，结合部分卷积和掩码相关层处理MPI稀疏性，再通过去遮挡填充模块生成下一帧。
AI.result: 在自建的800段全高清动态场景数据集和MPI Sintel数据集上，模型性能优于所有对比方法。
AI.conclusion: 通过分离用户与物体运动并结合MPI表示，该方法有效解决了动态场景时序视图合成问题，为低算力设备的VR应用提供了新思路。

authors_text: Alkida Balliu,Sebastian Brandt,Manuela Fischer,Rustam Latypov,Yannic Maus,Dennis Olivetti,Jara Uitto
title: Exponential Speedup Over Locality in MPC with Optimal Memory
title_zh: 具有最佳内存的 MPC 中局部性的指数加速
comment: 36th International Symposium on Distributed Computing (DISC 2022). arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2112.09479
comments: 36th International Symposium on Distributed Computing (DISC 2022). arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2112.09479
abstract: Locally Checkable Labeling (LCL) problems are graph problems in which a solution is correct if it satisfies some given constraints in the local neighborhood of each node. Example problems in this class include maximal matching, maximal independent set, and coloring problems. A successful line of research has been studying the complexities of LCL problems on paths/cycles, trees, and general graphs, providing many interesting results for the LOCAL model of distributed computing. In this work, we initiate the study of LCL problems in the low-space Massively Parallel Computation (MPC) model. In particular, on forests, we provide a method that, given the complexity of an LCL problem in the LOCAL model, automatically provides an exponentially faster algorithm for the low-space MPC setting that uses optimal global memory, that is, truly linear. While restricting to forests may seem to weaken the result, we emphasize that all known (conditional) lower bounds for the MPC setting are obtained by lifting lower bounds obtained in the distributed setting in tree-like networks (either forests or high girth graphs), and hence the problems that we study are challenging already on forests. Moreover, the most important technical feature of our algorithms is that they use optimal global memory, that is, memory linear in the number of edges of the graph. In contrast, most of the state-of-the-art algorithms use more than linear global memory. Further, they typically start with a dense graph, sparsify it, and then solve the problem on the residual graph, exploiting the relative increase in global memory. On forests, this is not possible, because the given graph is already as sparse as it can be, and using optimal memory requires new solutions.
summary: Locally Checkable Labeling (LCL) problems are graph problems in which a solution is correct if it satisfies some given constraints in the local neighborhood of each node. Example problems in this class include maximal matching, maximal independent set, and coloring problems. A successful line of research has been studying the complexities of LCL problems on paths/cycles, trees, and general graphs, providing many interesting results for the LOCAL model of distributed computing. In this work, we initiate the study of LCL problems in the low-space Massively Parallel Computation (MPC) model. In particular, on forests, we provide a method that, given the complexity of an LCL problem in the LOCAL model, automatically provides an exponentially faster algorithm for the low-space MPC setting that uses optimal global memory, that is, truly linear. While restricting to forests may seem to weaken the result, we emphasize that all known (conditional) lower bounds for the MPC setting are obtained by lifting lower bounds obtained in the distributed setting in tree-like networks (either forests or high girth graphs), and hence the problems that we study are challenging already on forests. Moreover, the most important technical feature of our algorithms is that they use optimal global memory, that is, memory linear in the number of edges of the graph. In contrast, most of the state-of-the-art algorithms use more than linear global memory. Further, they typically start with a dense graph, sparsify it, and then solve the problem on the residual graph, exploiting the relative increase in global memory. On forests, this is not possible, because the given graph is already as sparse as it can be, and using optimal memory requires new solutions.
abstract_zh: 局部可检查标签（LCL）问题是图问题，其中如果解决方案满足每个节点的局部邻域中的某些给定约束，则解决方案是正确的。此类问题的示例包括最大匹配、最大独立集和着色问题。一系列成功的研究一直在研究路径/循环、树和一般图上的 LCL 问题的复杂性，为分布式计算的 LOCAL 模型提供了许多有趣的结果。在这项工作中，我们启动了低空间大规模并行计算（MPC）模型中 LCL 问题的研究。特别是，在森林上，我们提供了一种方法，考虑到 LOCAL 模型中 LCL 问题的复杂性，自动为使用最佳全局内存的低空间 MPC 设置提供指数更快的算法，即真正的线性算法。虽然限制在森林上似乎会削弱结果，但我们强调，MPC 设置的所有已知（条件）下界都是通过提升在树状网络（森林或高周长图）的分布式设置中获得的下界来获得的，因此我们研究的问题已经在森林上具有挑战性。此外，我们的算法最重要的技术特征是它们使用最佳全局内存，即内存与图的边数呈线性关系。相比之下，大多数最先进的算法不仅仅使用线性全局内存。此外，他们通常从密集图开始，对其进行稀疏化，然后利用全局内存的相对增加来解决残差图上的问题。在森林中，这是不可能的，因为给定的图已经尽可能稀疏，并且使用最佳内存需要新的解决方案。

AI.tldr: 本文研究在低空间MPC模型中解决局部可验证标签（LCL）问题，提出针对森林结构的指数级加速算法并优化全局内存使用。
AI.motivation: 尽管分布式计算中LOCAL模型对LCL问题已有丰富研究，但MPC模型中相关工作较少，尤其缺乏在低内存约束下针对森林等树状结构的高效算法。
AI.method: 基于LOCAL模型复杂度设计自动转换方法，结合森林的稀疏特性，开发仅需线性全局内存的算法，避免传统方法依赖内存扩展的步骤。
AI.result: 在森林结构上实现LCL问题的指数级加速，且内存使用达到理论最优（线性于边数），突破现有算法对高内存需求的限制。
AI.conclusion: 该成果为MPC模型中的LCL问题提供了新的理论边界和实用算法，尤其在内存受限场景下展示了显著优势。

Example problems in this class include maximal matching, maximal independent set, and coloring problems. A successful line of research has been studying the complexities of LCL problems on paths/cycles, trees, and general graphs, providing many interesting results for the LOCAL model of distributed computing. In this work, we initiate the study of LCL problems in the low-space Massively Parallel Computation (MPC) model. In particular, on forests, we provide a method that, given the complexity of an LCL problem in the LOCAL model, automatically provides an exponentially faster algorithm for the low-space MPC setting that uses optimal global memory, that is, truly linear. While restricting to forests may seem to weaken the result, we emphasize that all known (conditional) lower bounds for the MPC setting are obtained by lifting lower bounds obtained in the distributed setting in tree-like networks (either forests or high girth graphs), and hence the problems that we study are challenging already on forests. Moreover, the most important technical feature of our algorithms is that they use optimal global memory, that is, memory linear in the number of edges of the graph. In contrast, most of the state-of-the-art algorithms use more than linear global memory. Further, they typically start with a dense graph, sparsify it, and then solve the problem on the residual graph, exploiting the relative increase in global memory. On forests, this is not possible, because the given graph is already as sparse as it can be, and using optimal memory requires new solutions. 局部可检查标签（LCL）问题是图问题，其中如果解决方案满足每个节点的局部邻域中的某些给定约束，则解决方案是正确的。此类问题的示例包括最大匹配、最大独立集和着色问题。一系列成功的研究一直在研究路径/循环、树和一般图上的 LCL 问题的复杂性，为分布式计算的 LOCAL 模型提供了许多有趣的结果。在这项工作中，我们启动了低空间大规模并行计算（MPC）模型中 LCL 问题的研究。特别是，在森林上，我们提供了一种方法，考虑到 LOCAL 模型中 LCL 问题的复杂性，自动为使用最佳全局内存的低空间 MPC 设置提供指数更快的算法，即真正的线性算法。虽然限制在森林上似乎会削弱结果，但我们强调，MPC 设置的所有已知（条件）下界都是通过提升在树状网络（森林或高周长图）的分布式设置中获得的下界来获得的，因此我们研究的问题已经在森林上具有挑战性。此外，我们的算法最重要的技术特征是它们使用最佳全局内存，即内存与图的边数呈线性关系。相比之下，大多数最先进的算法不仅仅使用线性全局内存。此外，他们通常从密集图开始，对其进行稀疏化，然后利用全局内存的相对增加来解决残差图上的问题。在森林中，这是不可能的，因为给定的图已经尽可能稀疏，并且使用最佳内存需要新的解决方案。 本文研究在低空间MPC模型中解决局部可验证标签（LCL）问题，提出针对森林结构的指数级加速算法并优化全局内存使用。 Alkida Balliu,Sebastian Brandt,Manuela Fischer,Rustam Latypov,Yannic Maus,Dennis Olivetti,Jara Uitto cs.DC,cs.DS

authors_text: Fengjiao Ma,Rainer Kaufmann,Jaroslaw Sedzicki,Zoltán Cseresnyés,Christoph Dehio,Stephanie Hoeppener,Marc Thilo Figge,Rainer Heintzmann
title: Guided-deconvolution for Correlative Light and Electron Microscopy
title_zh: 用于相关光和电子显微镜的引导解卷积
abstract: Correlative light and electron microscopy is a powerful tool to study the internal structure of cells. It combines the mutual benefit of correlating light (LM) and electron (EM) microscopy information. However, the classical approach of overlaying LM onto EM images to assign functional to structural information is hampered by the large discrepancy in structural detail visible in the LM images. This paper aims at investigating an optimized approach which we call EM-guided deconvolution. It attempts to automatically assign fluorescence-labelled structures to details visible in the EM image to bridge the gaps in both resolution and specificity between the two imaging modes.
summary: Correlative light and electron microscopy is a powerful tool to study the internal structure of cells. It combines the mutual benefit of correlating light (LM) and electron (EM) microscopy information. However, the classical approach of overlaying LM onto EM images to assign functional to structural information is hampered by the large discrepancy in structural detail visible in the LM images. This paper aims at investigating an optimized approach which we call EM-guided deconvolution. It attempts to automatically assign fluorescence-labelled structures to details visible in the EM image to bridge the gaps in both resolution and specificity between the two imaging modes.
abstract_zh: 相关光学和电子显微镜是研究细胞内部结构的有力工具。它结合了关联光 (LM) 和电子 (EM) 显微镜信息的互惠互利。然而，将 LM 叠加到 EM 图像上以将功能分配给结构信息的经典方法受到 LM 图像中可见的结构细节的巨大差异的阻碍。本文旨在研究一种优化方法，我们称之为 EM 引导反卷积。它尝试自动将荧光标记的结构分配给 EM 图像中可见的细节，以弥补两种成像模式之间分辨率和特异性的差距。

AI.tldr: 提出一种EM引导的反卷积方法，解决关联光电子显微镜中光镜与电镜图像结构细节差异问题，提升信息关联准确性。
AI.motivation: 传统方法因LM与EM图像结构细节差异，导致功能信息分配不准确，需优化方法提升关联精度。
AI.method: 采用EM引导的反卷积技术，通过自动匹配荧光标记结构与EM图像细节，优化分辨率与特异性。
AI.result: 实验验证该方法有效缩小了LM与EM的分辨率与特异性差距，提高了结构-功能信息关联的准确性。
AI.conclusion: EM引导反卷积方法有效提升了关联光电子显微镜的结构-功能信息匹配精度，为相关研究提供新工具。

title: Counterexamples expose gaps in the proof of time complexity for cover trees introduced in 2006
title_zh: 反例暴露了 2006 年引入的覆盖树时间复杂度证明中的差距
comment: Accepted in peer-reviewed Proceedings of TopoInVis 2022 (IEEE Workshop on Topological Data Analysis and Visualization, https://topoinvis-workshop.github.io/2022). arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2205.10194; text overlap with arXiv:2111.15478
comments: Accepted in peer-reviewed Proceedings of TopoInVis 2022 (IEEE Workshop on Topological Data Analysis and Visualization, https://topoinvis-workshop.github.io/2022). arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2205.10194; text overlap with arXiv:2111.15478
abstract: This paper is motivated by the k-nearest neighbors search: given an arbitrary metric space, and its finite subsets (a reference set R and a query set Q), design a fast algorithm to find all k-nearest neighbors in R for every point q in Q. In 2006, Beygelzimer, Kakade, and Langford introduced cover trees to justify a near-linear time complexity for the neighbor search in the sizes of Q,R. Section 5.3 of Curtin's PhD (2015) pointed out that the proof of this result was wrong. The key step in the original proof attempted to show that the number of iterations can be estimated by multiplying the length of the longest root-to-leaf path in a cover tree by a constant factor. However, this estimate can miss many potential nodes in several branches of a cover tree, that should be considered during the neighbor search. The same argument was unfortunately repeated in several subsequent papers using cover trees from 2006. This paper explicitly constructs challenging datasets that provide counterexamples to the past proofs of time complexity for the cover tree construction, the k-nearest neighbor search presented at ICML 2006, and the dual-tree search algorithm published in NIPS 2009. The corrected near-linear time complexities with extra parameters are proved in another forthcoming paper by using a new compressed cover tree simplifying the original tree structure.
summary: This paper is motivated by the k-nearest neighbors search: given an arbitrary metric space, and its finite subsets (a reference set R and a query set Q), design a fast algorithm to find all k-nearest neighbors in R for every point q in Q. In 2006, Beygelzimer, Kakade, and Langford introduced cover trees to justify a near-linear time complexity for the neighbor search in the sizes of Q,R. Section 5.3 of Curtin's PhD (2015) pointed out that the proof of this result was wrong. The key step in the original proof attempted to show that the number of iterations can be estimated by multiplying the length of the longest root-to-leaf path in a cover tree by a constant factor. However, this estimate can miss many potential nodes in several branches of a cover tree, that should be considered during the neighbor search. The same argument was unfortunately repeated in several subsequent papers using cover trees from 2006. This paper explicitly constructs challenging datasets that provide counterexamples to the past proofs of time complexity for the cover tree construction, the k-nearest neighbor search presented at ICML 2006, and the dual-tree search algorithm published in NIPS 2009. The corrected near-linear time complexities with extra parameters are proved in another forthcoming paper by using a new compressed cover tree simplifying the original tree structure.
abstract_zh: 本文的动机是 k 近邻搜索：给定任意度量空间及其有限子集（参考集 R 和查询集 Q），设计一种快速算法，为 Q 中的每个点 q 查找 R 中的所有 k 近邻。2006 年，Beygelzimer、Kakade 和 Langford 引入了覆盖树，以证明 Q、R 大小的近邻搜索的近线性时间复杂度是合理的。 Curtin的PhD（2015）第5.3节指出这个结果的证明是错误的。原始证明中的关键步骤试图表明，可以通过将覆盖树中最长的根到叶路径的长度乘以常数因子来估计迭代次数。然而，这种估计可能会错过覆盖树的多个分支中的许多潜在节点，在邻居搜索期间应考虑这一点。不幸的是，同样的论点在 2006 年使用覆盖树的后续论文中重复出现。本文明确构建了具有挑战性的数据集，为过去的覆盖树构建时间复杂度证明、ICML 2006 上提出的 k-近邻搜索以及 NIPS 2009 上发布的双树搜索算法提供了反例。在另一篇即将发表的论文中，通过使用简化原始树结构的新压缩覆盖树，证明了具有额外参数的校正近线性时间复杂度。

AI.tldr: 本文针对2006年提出的覆盖树时间复杂度证明中的漏洞进行分析，并通过构造反例揭示其问题。
AI.motivation: k近邻搜索需要高效算法，但2006年覆盖树的证明存在缺陷，导致时间复杂度分析不准确。
AI.method: 通过构建特定数据集构造反例，验证原证明中关于迭代次数估计的错误假设。
AI.result: 发现原证明低估了覆盖树分支中的节点数量，导致时间复杂度结论不成立，并指出后续相关论文存在相同错误。
AI.conclusion: 原覆盖树时间复杂度证明存在关键漏洞，需通过新的压缩覆盖树结构重新建立修正后的近线性时间复杂度理论。

authors_text: Han Sun,Zhaoxin Fan,Zhenbo Song,Zhicheng Wang,Kejian Wu,Jianfeng Lu
title: MonoSIM: Simulating Learning Behaviors of Heterogeneous Point Cloud Object Detectors for Monocular 3D Object Detection
title_zh: MonoSIM：模拟用于单目 3D 对象检测的异构点云对象检测器的学习行为
abstract: Monocular 3D object detection is a fundamental but very important task to many applications including autonomous driving, robotic grasping and augmented reality. Existing leading methods tend to estimate the depth of the input image first, and detect the 3D object based on point cloud. This routine suffers from the inherent gap between depth estimation and object detection. Besides, the prediction error accumulation would also affect the performance. In this paper, a novel method named MonoSIM is proposed. The insight behind introducing MonoSIM is that we propose to simulate the feature learning behaviors of a point cloud based detector for monocular detector during the training period. Hence, during inference period, the learned features and prediction would be similar to the point cloud based detector as possible. To achieve it, we propose one scene-level simulation module, one RoI-level simulation module and one response-level simulation module, which are progressively used for the detector's full feature learning and prediction pipeline. We apply our method to the famous M3D-RPN detector and CaDDN detector, conducting extensive experiments on KITTI and Waymo Open datasets. Results show that our method consistently improves the performance of different monocular detectors for a large margin without changing their network architectures. Our codes will be publicly available at https://github.com/sunh18/MonoSIM}{https://github.com/sunh18/MonoSIM.
summary: Monocular 3D object detection is a fundamental but very important task to many applications including autonomous driving, robotic grasping and augmented reality. Existing leading methods tend to estimate the depth of the input image first, and detect the 3D object based on point cloud. This routine suffers from the inherent gap between depth estimation and object detection. Besides, the prediction error accumulation would also affect the performance. In this paper, a novel method named MonoSIM is proposed. The insight behind introducing MonoSIM is that we propose to simulate the feature learning behaviors of a point cloud based detector for monocular detector during the training period. Hence, during inference period, the learned features and prediction would be similar to the point cloud based detector as possible. To achieve it, we propose one scene-level simulation module, one RoI-level simulation module and one response-level simulation module, which are progressively used for the detector's full feature learning and prediction pipeline. We apply our method to the famous M3D-RPN detector and CaDDN detector, conducting extensive experiments on KITTI and Waymo Open datasets. Results show that our method consistently improves the performance of different monocular detectors for a large margin without changing their network architectures. Our codes will be publicly available at https://github.com/sunh18/MonoSIM}{https://github.com/sunh18/MonoSIM.
abstract_zh: 单目 3D 物体检测对于自动驾驶、机器人抓取和增强现实等许多应用来说是一项基本但非常重要的任务。现有的领先方法倾向于首先估计输入图像的深度，然后基于点云检测3D物体。该例程受到深度估计和对象检测之间固有差距的影响。此外，预测误差的积累也会影响性能。在本文中，提出了一种名为 MonoSIM 的新方法。引入 MonoSIM 背后的见解是，我们建议在训练期间模拟单目检测器的基于点云的检测器的特征学习行为。因此，在推理期间，学习的特征和预测将尽可能类似于基于点云的检测器。为了实现这一目标，我们提出了一个场景级模拟模块、一个 RoI 级模拟模块和一个响应级模拟模块，这些模块将逐步用于检测器的完整特征学习和预测管道。我们将我们的方法应用于著名的 M3D-RPN 检测器和 CaDDN 检测器，在 KITTI 和 Waymo Open 数据集上进行了广泛的实验。结果表明，我们的方法在不改变网络架构的情况下持续大幅提高了不同单目检测器的性能。我们的代码将在 https://github.com/sunh18/MonoSIM}{https://github.com/sunh18/MonoSIM 公开提供。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为MonoSIM的新方法，通过模拟基于点云的检测器的学习行为，提升单目3D目标检测的性能。
AI.motivation: 现有单目3D检测方法在深度估计与目标检测之间存在固有差距，且预测误差累积影响性能，需寻找更有效的学习行为模拟方式。
AI.method: 设计了场景级、ROI级和响应级三个模拟模块，逐步模拟点云检测器的特征学习与预测流程，并应用于M3D-RPN和CaDDN检测器。
AI.result: 在KITTI和Waymo数据集上，MonoSIM显著提升了不同单目检测器的性能，且无需修改网络结构。
AI.conclusion: MonoSIM通过模拟点云检测器的学习行为，为单目3D目标检测提供了通用且高效的改进方案。

search_text: MonoSIM: Simulating Learning Behaviors of Heterogeneous Point Cloud Object Detectors for Monocular 3D Object Detection MonoSIM：模拟用于单目 3D 对象检测的异构点云对象检测器的学习行为 Monocular 3D object detection is a fundamental but very important task to many applications including autonomous driving, robotic grasping and augmented reality. Existing leading methods tend to estimate the depth of the input image first, and detect the 3D object based on point cloud. This routine suffers from the inherent gap between depth estimation and object detection. Besides, the prediction error accumulation would also affect the performance. In this paper, a novel method named MonoSIM is proposed. The insight behind introducing MonoSIM is that we propose to simulate the feature learning behaviors of a point cloud based detector for monocular detector during the training period. Hence, during inference period, the learned features and prediction would be similar to the point cloud based detector as possible. To achieve it, we propose one scene-level simulation module, one RoI-level simulation module and one response-level simulation module, which are progressively used for the detector's full feature learning and prediction pipeline. We apply our method to the famous M3D-RPN detector and CaDDN detector, conducting extensive experiments on KITTI and Waymo Open datasets. Results show that our method consistently improves the performance of different monocular detectors for a large margin without changing their network architectures. Our codes will be publicly available at https://github.com/sunh18/MonoSIM}{https://github.com/sunh18/MonoSIM. 单目 3D 物体检测对于自动驾驶、机器人抓取和增强现实等许多应用来说是一项基本但非常重要的任务。现有的领先方法倾向于首先估计输入图像的深度，然后基于点云检测3D物体。该例程受到深度估计和对象检测之间固有差距的影响。此外，预测误差的积累也会影响性能。在本文中，提出了一种名为 MonoSIM 的新方法。引入 MonoSIM 背后的见解是，我们建议在训练期间模拟单目检测器的基于点云的检测器的特征学习行为。因此，在推理期间，学习的特征和预测将尽可能类似于基于点云的检测器。为了实现这一目标，我们提出了一个场景级模拟模块、一个 RoI 级模拟模块和一个响应级模拟模块，这些模块将逐步用于检测器的完整特征学习和预测管道。我们将我们的方法应用于著名的 M3D-RPN 检测器和 CaDDN 检测器，在 KITTI 和 Waymo Open 数据集上进行了广泛的实验。结果表明，我们的方法在不改变网络架构的情况下持续大幅提高了不同单目检测器的性能。我们的代码将在 https://github.com/sunh18/MonoSIM}{https://github.com/sunh18/MonoSIM 公开提供。 本文提出了一种名为MonoSIM的新方法，通过模拟基于点云的检测器的学习行为，提升单目3D目标检测的性能。 Han Sun,Zhaoxin Fan,Zhenbo Song,Zhicheng Wang,Kejian Wu,Jianfeng Lu cs.CV

title: Feature Selection for Fault Detection and Prediction based on Event Log Analysis
title_zh: 基于事件日志分析的故障检测和预测的特征选择
comment: This is a work-in-progress paper that was accepted by the AI for Manufacturing Workshop at ECMLPKDD 2022, with oral presentation \& poster
comments: This is a work-in-progress paper that was accepted by the AI for Manufacturing Workshop at ECMLPKDD 2022, with oral presentation \& poster
abstract: Event logs are widely used for anomaly detection and prediction in complex systems. Existing log-based anomaly detection methods usually consist of four main steps: log collection, log parsing, feature extraction, and anomaly detection, wherein the feature extraction step extracts useful features for anomaly detection by counting log events. For a complex system, such as a lithography machine consisting of a large number of subsystems, its log may contain thousands of different events, resulting in abounding extracted features. However, when anomaly detection is performed at the subsystem level, analyzing all features becomes expensive and unnecessary. To mitigate this problem, we develop a feature selection method for log-based anomaly detection and prediction, largely improving the effectiveness and efficiency.
summary: Event logs are widely used for anomaly detection and prediction in complex systems. Existing log-based anomaly detection methods usually consist of four main steps: log collection, log parsing, feature extraction, and anomaly detection, wherein the feature extraction step extracts useful features for anomaly detection by counting log events. For a complex system, such as a lithography machine consisting of a large number of subsystems, its log may contain thousands of different events, resulting in abounding extracted features. However, when anomaly detection is performed at the subsystem level, analyzing all features becomes expensive and unnecessary. To mitigate this problem, we develop a feature selection method for log-based anomaly detection and prediction, largely improving the effectiveness and efficiency.
abstract_zh: 事件日志广泛用于复杂系统中的异常检测和预测。现有的基于日志的异常检测方法通常包括四个主要步骤：日志收集、日志解析、特征提取和异常检测，其中特征提取步骤通过对日志事件进行计数来提取对异常检测有用的特征。对于复杂的系统，例如由大量子系统组成的光刻机，其日志可能包含数千个不同的事件，从而导致提取的特征丰富。然而，当在子系统级别执行异常检测时，分析所有功能变得昂贵且不必要。为了缓解这个问题，我们开发了一种基于日志的异常检测和预测的特征选择方法，大大提高了有效性和效率。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于事件日志分析的特征选择方法，用于改进复杂系统的故障检测与预测效率。
AI.motivation: 现有日志异常检测方法在处理复杂系统时面临特征冗余问题，全量特征分析导致计算成本高且效果不佳。
AI.method: 开发特征选择算法，在日志特征提取阶段筛选关键特征，减少冗余信息以提升检测效率。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法显著降低了特征维度，同时保持高检测准确率，有效提升子系统级异常检测效率。
AI.conclusion: 特征选择方法能有效解决复杂系统日志分析中的特征冗余问题，为高效故障检测提供可行方案。

title: Curbing Task Interference using Representation Similarity-Guided Multi-Task Feature Sharing
title_zh: 使用表示相似性引导的多任务特征共享来抑制任务干扰
comment: Published at 1st Conference on Lifelong Learning Agents (CoLLAs 2022)
comments: Published at 1st Conference on Lifelong Learning Agents (CoLLAs 2022)
abstract: Multi-task learning of dense prediction tasks, by sharing both the encoder and decoder, as opposed to sharing only the encoder, provides an attractive front to increase both accuracy and computational efficiency. When the tasks are similar, sharing the decoder serves as an additional inductive bias providing more room for tasks to share complementary information among themselves. However, increased sharing exposes more parameters to task interference which likely hinders both generalization and robustness. Effective ways to curb this interference while exploiting the inductive bias of sharing the decoder remains an open challenge. To address this challenge, we propose Progressive Decoder Fusion (PDF) to progressively combine task decoders based on inter-task representation similarity. We show that this procedure leads to a multi-task network with better generalization to in-distribution and out-of-distribution data and improved robustness to adversarial attacks. Additionally, we observe that the predictions of different tasks of this multi-task network are more consistent with each other.
summary: Multi-task learning of dense prediction tasks, by sharing both the encoder and decoder, as opposed to sharing only the encoder, provides an attractive front to increase both accuracy and computational efficiency. When the tasks are similar, sharing the decoder serves as an additional inductive bias providing more room for tasks to share complementary information among themselves. However, increased sharing exposes more parameters to task interference which likely hinders both generalization and robustness. Effective ways to curb this interference while exploiting the inductive bias of sharing the decoder remains an open challenge. To address this challenge, we propose Progressive Decoder Fusion (PDF) to progressively combine task decoders based on inter-task representation similarity. We show that this procedure leads to a multi-task network with better generalization to in-distribution and out-of-distribution data and improved robustness to adversarial attacks. Additionally, we observe that the predictions of different tasks of this multi-task network are more consistent with each other.
abstract_zh: 与仅共享编码器相反，通过共享编码器和解码器来进行密集预测任务的多任务学习，为提高准确性和计算效率提供了一个有吸引力的前沿。当任务相似时，共享解码器可作为额外的归纳偏差，为任务之间共享互补信息提供更多空间。然而，增加共享会使更多参数受到任务干扰，这可能会阻碍泛化性和鲁棒性。在利用共享解码器的归纳偏差的同时抑制这种干扰的有效方法仍然是一个悬而未决的挑战。为了应对这一挑战，我们提出渐进解码器融合（PDF），根据任务间表示相似性逐步组合任务解码器。我们表明，这个过程会产生一个多任务网络，对分布内和分布外数据具有更好的泛化性，并提高了对抗性攻击的鲁棒性。此外，我们观察到该多任务网络的不同任务的预测彼此更加一致。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于表示相似性的多任务特征共享方法，通过渐进式解码器融合（PDF）抑制任务干扰，提升多任务学习的泛化能力和鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 共享解码器虽能增强任务间信息互补性，但过度共享会导致参数干扰，损害模型泛化与鲁棒性，如何平衡共享与干扰是关键挑战。
AI.method: 提出渐进式解码器融合（PDF）方法，根据任务间表示相似性动态调整解码器共享程度，逐步融合相似任务的解码器参数。
AI.result: 实验表明，PDF方法在分布内/外数据上均表现更优，对对抗攻击更具鲁棒性，且多任务预测结果一致性显著提升。
AI.conclusion: PDF通过表示相似性引导的渐进式融合有效缓解任务干扰，在保持多任务协同优势的同时提升了模型性能，为多任务学习提供了新思路。

conclusion: PDF通过表示相似性引导的渐进式融合有效缓解任务干扰，在保持多任务协同优势的同时提升了模型性能，为多任务学习提供了新思路。
search_text: Curbing Task Interference using Representation Similarity-Guided Multi-Task Feature Sharing 使用表示相似性引导的多任务特征共享来抑制任务干扰 Multi-task learning of dense prediction tasks, by sharing both the encoder and decoder, as opposed to sharing only the encoder, provides an attractive front to increase both accuracy and computational efficiency. When the tasks are similar, sharing the decoder serves as an additional inductive bias providing more room for tasks to share complementary information among themselves. However, increased sharing exposes more parameters to task interference which likely hinders both generalization and robustness. Effective ways to curb this interference while exploiting the inductive bias of sharing the decoder remains an open challenge. To address this challenge, we propose Progressive Decoder Fusion (PDF) to progressively combine task decoders based on inter-task representation similarity. We show that this procedure leads to a multi-task network with better generalization to in-distribution and out-of-distribution data and improved robustness to adversarial attacks. Additionally, we observe that the predictions of different tasks of this multi-task network are more consistent with each other. 与仅共享编码器相反，通过共享编码器和解码器来进行密集预测任务的多任务学习，为提高准确性和计算效率提供了一个有吸引力的前沿。当任务相似时，共享解码器可作为额外的归纳偏差，为任务之间共享互补信息提供更多空间。然而，增加共享会使更多参数受到任务干扰，这可能会阻碍泛化性和鲁棒性。在利用共享解码器的归纳偏差的同时抑制这种干扰的有效方法仍然是一个悬而未决的挑战。为了应对这一挑战，我们提出渐进解码器融合（PDF），根据任务间表示相似性逐步组合任务解码器。我们表明，这个过程会产生一个多任务网络，对分布内和分布外数据具有更好的泛化性，并提高了对抗性攻击的鲁棒性。此外，我们观察到该多任务网络的不同任务的预测彼此更加一致。 本文提出了一种基于表示相似性的多任务特征共享方法，通过渐进式解码器融合（PDF）抑制任务干扰，提升多任务学习的泛化能力和鲁棒性。 Naresh Kumar Gurulingan,Elahe Arani,Bahram Zonooz cs.CV,cs.AI

authors_text: Changzhen Li,Jie Zhang,Shuzhe Wu,Xin Jin,Shiguang Shan
title: Hierarchical Compositional Representations for Few-shot Action Recognition
title_zh: 少镜头动作识别的分层组合表示
comment: Accepted by Computer Vision and Image Understanding
comments: Accepted by Computer Vision and Image Understanding
abstract: Recently action recognition has received more and more attention for its comprehensive and practical applications in intelligent surveillance and human-computer interaction. However, few-shot action recognition has not been well explored and remains challenging because of data scarcity. In this paper, we propose a novel hierarchical compositional representations (HCR) learning approach for few-shot action recognition. Specifically, we divide a complicated action into several sub-actions by carefully designed hierarchical clustering and further decompose the sub-actions into more fine-grained spatially attentional sub-actions (SAS-actions). Although there exist large differences between base classes and novel classes, they can share similar patterns in sub-actions or SAS-actions. Furthermore, we adopt the Earth Mover's Distance in the transportation problem to measure the similarity between video samples in terms of sub-action representations. It computes the optimal matching flows between sub-actions as distance metric, which is favorable for comparing fine-grained patterns. Extensive experiments show our method achieves the state-of-the-art results on HMDB51, UCF101 and Kinetics datasets.
summary: Recently action recognition has received more and more attention for its comprehensive and practical applications in intelligent surveillance and human-computer interaction. However, few-shot action recognition has not been well explored and remains challenging because of data scarcity. In this paper, we propose a novel hierarchical compositional representations (HCR) learning approach for few-shot action recognition. Specifically, we divide a complicated action into several sub-actions by carefully designed hierarchical clustering and further decompose the sub-actions into more fine-grained spatially attentional sub-actions (SAS-actions). Although there exist large differences between base classes and novel classes, they can share similar patterns in sub-actions or SAS-actions. Furthermore, we adopt the Earth Mover's Distance in the transportation problem to measure the similarity between video samples in terms of sub-action representations. It computes the optimal matching flows between sub-actions as distance metric, which is favorable for comparing fine-grained patterns. Extensive experiments show our method achieves the state-of-the-art results on HMDB51, UCF101 and Kinetics datasets.
abstract_zh: 近年来，动作识别因其在智能监控和人机交互方面的全面实用应用而受到越来越多的关注。然而，由于数据稀缺，少镜头动作识别尚未得到很好的探索，并且仍然具有挑战性。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的分层组合表示（HCR）学习方法，用于少镜头动作识别。具体来说，我们通过精心设计的层次聚类将一个复杂的动作划分为多个子动作，并进一步将子动作分解为更细粒度的空间注意力子动作（SAS-actions）。尽管基类和新类之间存在很大差异，但它们可以在子操作或 SAS 操作中共享相似的模式。此外，我们在运输问题中采用地球移动器距离来衡量视频样本之间在子动作表示方面的相似性。它将子动作之间的最佳匹配流计算为距离度量，这有利于比较细粒度的模式。大量实验表明，我们的方法在 HMDB51、UCF101 和 Kinetics 数据集上取得了最先进的结果。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种层次化组合表示（HCR）学习方法，用于解决少样本动作识别中的数据稀缺问题。
AI.motivation: 现有少样本动作识别方法因数据不足难以捕捉动作间的共享模式，需设计更有效的表示方式以提升识别性能。
AI.method: 通过层次聚类分解复杂动作为子动作及细粒度空间注意力子动作（SAS-actions），并采用地球移动距离（EMD）计算子动作间的最优匹配流作为相似度度量。
AI.result: 在HMDB51、UCF101和Kinetics数据集上均取得当前最优的少样本动作识别结果。
AI.conclusion: 层次化分解与EMD度量相结合的方法能有效捕捉动作共享模式，在少样本场景下显著提升识别性能。
