title: Line Coverage with Multiple Robots: Algorithms and Experiments
title_zh: 多个机器人的线路覆盖：算法和实验
comment: The paper will appear in the IEEE Transactions on Robotics
comments: The paper will appear in the IEEE Transactions on Robotics
abstract: The line coverage problem involves finding efficient routes for the coverage of linear features by one or more resource-constrained robots. Linear features model environments like road networks, power lines, and oil and gas pipelines. Two modes of travel are defined for robots: servicing and deadheading. A robot services a feature if it performs task-specific actions, such as taking images, as it traverses the feature; otherwise, it is deadheading. Traversing the environment incurs costs (e.g., travel time) and demands on resources (e.g., battery life). Servicing and deadheading can have different cost and demand functions, which can be direction-dependent. The environment is modeled as a graph, and an integer linear program is provided. As the problem is NP-hard, we design a fast and efficient heuristic algorithm, Merge-Embed-Merge (MEM). Exploiting the constructive property of the MEM algorithm, algorithms for line coverage of large graphs with multiple depots are developed. Furthermore, turning costs and nonholonomic constraints are efficiently incorporated into the algorithm. The algorithms are benchmarked on road networks and demonstrated in experiments with aerial robots.
summary: The line coverage problem involves finding efficient routes for the coverage of linear features by one or more resource-constrained robots. Linear features model environments like road networks, power lines, and oil and gas pipelines. Two modes of travel are defined for robots: servicing and deadheading. A robot services a feature if it performs task-specific actions, such as taking images, as it traverses the feature; otherwise, it is deadheading. Traversing the environment incurs costs (e.g., travel time) and demands on resources (e.g., battery life). Servicing and deadheading can have different cost and demand functions, which can be direction-dependent. The environment is modeled as a graph, and an integer linear program is provided. As the problem is NP-hard, we design a fast and efficient heuristic algorithm, Merge-Embed-Merge (MEM). Exploiting the constructive property of the MEM algorithm, algorithms for line coverage of large graphs with multiple depots are developed. Furthermore, turning costs and nonholonomic constraints are efficiently incorporated into the algorithm. The algorithms are benchmarked on road networks and demonstrated in experiments with aerial robots.
abstract_zh: 线覆盖问题涉及寻找一个或多个资源受限的机器人覆盖线特征的有效路线。线性特征对道路网络、电力线以及石油和天然气管道等环境进行建模。为机器人定义了两种行进模式：维修和空行。如果机器人在穿过某个特征时执行特定于任务的操作（例如拍摄图像），则它可以为某个特征提供服务；否则，那就是死胡同。穿越环境会产生成本（例如旅行时间）和资源需求（例如电池寿命）。维修和空载可能具有不同的成本和需求函数，这些函数可能与方向相关。将环境建模为图，并提供整数线性程序。由于该问题是 NP 难问题，我们设计了一种快速高效的启发式算法：合并-嵌入-合并（MEM）。利用 MEM 算法的构造性特性，开发了具有多个仓库的大型图的线覆盖算法。此外，车削成本和非完整约束被有效地纳入算法中。这些算法以道路网络为基准，并在空中机器人的实验中进行了演示。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了多个资源受限机器人对线性特征（如道路网络、管道）进行高效覆盖的路径规划问题。
AI.motivation: 线性特征覆盖在基础设施巡检等场景中至关重要，但现有方法难以兼顾多机器人协同、资源约束及复杂运动学特性。
AI.method: 提出整数线性规划模型定义问题，设计启发式算法Merge-Embed-Merge (MEM)，并扩展支持多起点、转向成本及非完整约束。
AI.result: MEM算法在大规模图网络和实际无人机实验中验证有效，相较传统方法提升计算效率并满足实际约束。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为多机器人线性覆盖问题提供了兼顾效率与实用性的解决方案，可推广至复杂现实场景。

title: SAFARI: Versatile and Efficient Evaluations for Robustness of Interpretability
title_zh: SAFARI：可解释性稳健性的多功能且高效的评估
comment: Accepted by the IEEE/CVF International Conference on Computer Vision 2023 (ICCV'23)
comments: Accepted by the IEEE/CVF International Conference on Computer Vision 2023 (ICCV'23)
abstract: Interpretability of Deep Learning (DL) is a barrier to trustworthy AI. Despite great efforts made by the Explainable AI (XAI) community, explanations lack robustness -- indistinguishable input perturbations may lead to different XAI results. Thus, it is vital to assess how robust DL interpretability is, given an XAI method. In this paper, we identify several challenges that the state-of-the-art is unable to cope with collectively: i) existing metrics are not comprehensive; ii) XAI techniques are highly heterogeneous; iii) misinterpretations are normally rare events. To tackle these challenges, we introduce two black-box evaluation methods, concerning the worst-case interpretation discrepancy and a probabilistic notion of how robust in general, respectively. Genetic Algorithm (GA) with bespoke fitness function is used to solve constrained optimisation for efficient worst-case evaluation. Subset Simulation (SS), dedicated to estimate rare event probabilities, is used for evaluating overall robustness. Experiments show that the accuracy, sensitivity, and efficiency of our methods outperform the state-of-the-arts. Finally, we demonstrate two applications of our methods: ranking robust XAI methods and selecting training schemes to improve both classification and interpretation robustness.
summary: Interpretability of Deep Learning (DL) is a barrier to trustworthy AI. Despite great efforts made by the Explainable AI (XAI) community, explanations lack robustness -- indistinguishable input perturbations may lead to different XAI results. Thus, it is vital to assess how robust DL interpretability is, given an XAI method. In this paper, we identify several challenges that the state-of-the-art is unable to cope with collectively: i) existing metrics are not comprehensive; ii) XAI techniques are highly heterogeneous; iii) misinterpretations are normally rare events. To tackle these challenges, we introduce two black-box evaluation methods, concerning the worst-case interpretation discrepancy and a probabilistic notion of how robust in general, respectively. Genetic Algorithm (GA) with bespoke fitness function is used to solve constrained optimisation for efficient worst-case evaluation. Subset Simulation (SS), dedicated to estimate rare event probabilities, is used for evaluating overall robustness. Experiments show that the accuracy, sensitivity, and efficiency of our methods outperform the state-of-the-arts. Finally, we demonstrate two applications of our methods: ranking robust XAI methods and selecting training schemes to improve both classification and interpretation robustness.
abstract_zh: 深度学习 (DL) 的可解释性是值得信赖的人工智能的障碍。尽管可解释人工智能（XAI）社区做出了巨大努力，但解释缺乏稳健性——无法区分的输入扰动可能会导致不同的 XAI 结果。因此，在给定 XAI 方法的情况下，评估 DL 可解释性的稳健程度至关重要。在本文中，我们确定了最先进的技术无法共同应对的几个挑战：i）现有指标不全面； ii) XAI 技术具有高度异构性； iii) 误解通常很少发生。为了应对这些挑战，我们引入了两种黑盒评估方法，分别涉及最坏情况的解释差异和一般稳健性的概率概念。具有定制适应度函数的遗传算法 (GA) 用于解决约束优化问题，以实现有效的最坏情况评估。子集模拟（SS）专用于估计罕见事件概率，用于评估整体鲁棒性。实验表明，我们的方法的准确性、灵敏度和效率优于最先进的方法。最后，我们演示了我们的方法的两种应用：对稳健的 XAI 方法进行排名和选择训练方案以提高分类和解释的稳健性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出SAFARI框架，通过两种黑盒评估方法系统评估可解释AI（XAI）方法的鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 现有XAI方法存在解释结果不稳定的问题，微小输入扰动可能导致截然不同的解释，亟需全面评估其鲁棒性。
AI.method: 设计遗传算法（GA）求解最坏情况解释差异，结合子集模拟（SS）估计罕见事件概率，分别评估XAI方法的极端鲁棒性和整体鲁棒性。
AI.result: 实验表明方法在准确性、敏感性和效率上均优于现有技术，并成功应用于XAI方法排序及训练方案优化。
AI.conclusion: SAFARI为评估XAI鲁棒性提供有效工具，可指导开发更可靠且稳健的深度学习解释方法。

search_text: SAFARI: Versatile and Efficient Evaluations for Robustness of Interpretability SAFARI：可解释性稳健性的多功能且高效的评估 Interpretability of Deep Learning (DL) is a barrier to trustworthy AI. Despite great efforts made by the Explainable AI (XAI) community, explanations lack robustness -- indistinguishable input perturbations may lead to different XAI results. Thus, it is vital to assess how robust DL interpretability is, given an XAI method. In this paper, we identify several challenges that the state-of-the-art is unable to cope with collectively: i) existing metrics are not comprehensive; ii) XAI techniques are highly heterogeneous; iii) misinterpretations are normally rare events. To tackle these challenges, we introduce two black-box evaluation methods, concerning the worst-case interpretation discrepancy and a probabilistic notion of how robust in general, respectively. Genetic Algorithm (GA) with bespoke fitness function is used to solve constrained optimisation for efficient worst-case evaluation. Subset Simulation (SS), dedicated to estimate rare event probabilities, is used for evaluating overall robustness. Experiments show that the accuracy, sensitivity, and efficiency of our methods outperform the state-of-the-arts. Finally, we demonstrate two applications of our methods: ranking robust XAI methods and selecting training schemes to improve both classification and interpretation robustness. 深度学习 (DL) 的可解释性是值得信赖的人工智能的障碍。尽管可解释人工智能（XAI）社区做出了巨大努力，但解释缺乏稳健性——无法区分的输入扰动可能会导致不同的 XAI 结果。因此，在给定 XAI 方法的情况下，评估 DL 可解释性的稳健程度至关重要。在本文中，我们确定了最先进的技术无法共同应对的几个挑战：i）现有指标不全面； ii) XAI 技术具有高度异构性； iii) 误解通常很少发生。为了应对这些挑战，我们引入了两种黑盒评估方法，分别涉及最坏情况的解释差异和一般稳健性的概率概念。具有定制适应度函数的遗传算法 (GA) 用于解决约束优化问题，以实现有效的最坏情况评估。子集模拟（SS）专用于估计罕见事件概率，用于评估整体鲁棒性。实验表明，我们的方法的准确性、灵敏度和效率优于最先进的方法。最后，我们演示了我们的方法的两种应用：对稳健的 XAI 方法进行排名和选择训练方案以提高分类和解释的稳健性。 本文提出SAFARI框架，通过两种黑盒评估方法系统评估可解释AI（XAI）方法的鲁棒性。 Wei Huang,Xingyu Zhao,Gaojie Jin,Xiaowei Huang cs.LG,cs.AI

authors_text: Yufeng Huang,Zhuo Chen,Jiaoyan Chen,Jeff Z. Pan,Zhen Yao,Wen Zhang
title: Target-oriented Sentiment Classification with Sequential Cross-modal Semantic Graph
title_zh: 具有顺序跨模态语义图的面向目标的情感分类
comment: ICANN 2023, https://github.com/zjukg/SeqCSG
comments: ICANN 2023, https://github.com/zjukg/SeqCSG
abstract: Multi-modal aspect-based sentiment classification (MABSC) is task of classifying the sentiment of a target entity mentioned in a sentence and an image. However, previous methods failed to account for the fine-grained semantic association between the image and the text, which resulted in limited identification of fine-grained image aspects and opinions. To address these limitations, in this paper we propose a new approach called SeqCSG, which enhances the encoder-decoder sentiment classification framework using sequential cross-modal semantic graphs. SeqCSG utilizes image captions and scene graphs to extract both global and local fine-grained image information and considers them as elements of the cross-modal semantic graph along with tokens from tweets. The sequential cross-modal semantic graph is represented as a sequence with a multi-modal adjacency matrix indicating relationships between elements. Experimental results show that the approach outperforms existing methods and achieves state-of-the-art performance on two standard datasets. Further analysis has demonstrated that the model can implicitly learn the correlation between fine-grained information of the image and the text with the given target. Our code is available at https://github.com/zjukg/SeqCSG.
summary: Multi-modal aspect-based sentiment classification (MABSC) is task of classifying the sentiment of a target entity mentioned in a sentence and an image. However, previous methods failed to account for the fine-grained semantic association between the image and the text, which resulted in limited identification of fine-grained image aspects and opinions. To address these limitations, in this paper we propose a new approach called SeqCSG, which enhances the encoder-decoder sentiment classification framework using sequential cross-modal semantic graphs. SeqCSG utilizes image captions and scene graphs to extract both global and local fine-grained image information and considers them as elements of the cross-modal semantic graph along with tokens from tweets. The sequential cross-modal semantic graph is represented as a sequence with a multi-modal adjacency matrix indicating relationships between elements. Experimental results show that the approach outperforms existing methods and achieves state-of-the-art performance on two standard datasets. Further analysis has demonstrated that the model can implicitly learn the correlation between fine-grained information of the image and the text with the given target. Our code is available at https://github.com/zjukg/SeqCSG.
abstract_zh: 基于多模态方面的情感分类（MABSC）是对句子和图像中提到的目标实体的情感进行分类的任务。然而，以前的方法未能考虑图像和文本之间的细粒度语义关联，导致细粒度图像方面和观点的识别有限。为了解决这些限制，在本文中，我们提出了一种称为 SeqCSG 的新方法，它使用顺序跨模态语义图增强了编码器-解码器情感分类框架。 SeqCSG 利用图像标题和场景图来提取全局和局部细粒度图像信息，并将它们与推文中的标记一起视为跨模式语义图的元素。顺序跨模态语义图被表示为具有指示元素之间关系的多模态邻接矩阵的序列。实验结果表明，该方法优于现有方法，并在两个标准数据集上实现了最先进的性能。进一步分析表明，该模型可以隐式学习图像和文本的细粒度信息与给定目标之间的相关性。我们的代码可在 https://github.com/zjukg/SeqCSG 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于序列跨模态语义图的多模态细粒度情感分类方法SeqCSG，用于同时分析文本和图像中的目标实体情感。
AI.motivation: 现有方法未能有效捕捉图像与文本间的细粒度语义关联，导致图像细粒度方面和观点识别不足。
AI.method: 构建包含图像标题、场景图和文本token的跨模态语义图，通过多模态邻接矩阵表示元素间关系，利用序列结构建模跨模态交互。
AI.result: 在两个标准数据集上达到SOTA性能，验证了模型能隐式学习图像与文本细粒度信息的关联性。
AI.conclusion: SeqCSG通过序列化跨模态语义图结构有效提升了多模态细粒度情感分类性能，为跨模态语义对齐提供了新思路。

title: Kernel Memory Networks: A Unifying Framework for Memory Modeling
title_zh: 内核内存网络：内存建模的统一框架
comment: 24 pages, 5 figures. This is the version published in the NeurIPS 2022 proceedings
comments: 24 pages, 5 figures. This is the version published in the NeurIPS 2022 proceedings
abstract: We consider the problem of training a neural network to store a set of patterns with maximal noise robustness. A solution, in terms of optimal weights and state update rules, is derived by training each individual neuron to perform either kernel classification or interpolation with a minimum weight norm. By applying this method to feed-forward and recurrent networks, we derive optimal models, termed kernel memory networks, that include, as special cases, many of the hetero- and auto-associative memory models that have been proposed over the past years, such as modern Hopfield networks and Kanerva's sparse distributed memory. We modify Kanerva's model and demonstrate a simple way to design a kernel memory network that can store an exponential number of continuous-valued patterns with a finite basin of attraction. The framework of kernel memory networks offers a simple and intuitive way to understand the storage capacity of previous memory models, and allows for new biological interpretations in terms of dendritic non-linearities and synaptic cross-talk.
summary: We consider the problem of training a neural network to store a set of patterns with maximal noise robustness. A solution, in terms of optimal weights and state update rules, is derived by training each individual neuron to perform either kernel classification or interpolation with a minimum weight norm. By applying this method to feed-forward and recurrent networks, we derive optimal models, termed kernel memory networks, that include, as special cases, many of the hetero- and auto-associative memory models that have been proposed over the past years, such as modern Hopfield networks and Kanerva's sparse distributed memory. We modify Kanerva's model and demonstrate a simple way to design a kernel memory network that can store an exponential number of continuous-valued patterns with a finite basin of attraction. The framework of kernel memory networks offers a simple and intuitive way to understand the storage capacity of previous memory models, and allows for new biological interpretations in terms of dendritic non-linearities and synaptic cross-talk.
abstract_zh: 我们考虑训练神经网络来存储一组具有最大噪声鲁棒性的模式的问题。通过训练每个单独的神经元以最小权重范数执行核分类或插值，得出最佳权重和状态更新规则方面的解决方案。通过将此方法应用于前馈和循环网络，我们得出了称为内核记忆网络的最佳模型，其中包括作为特殊情况的过去几年提出的许多异质和自联想记忆模型，例如现代 Hopfield 网络和 Kanerva 的稀疏分布式记忆。我们修改了 Kanerva 的模型，并演示了一种设计内核内存网络的简单方法，该网络可以在有限的吸引盆中存储指数数量的连续值模式。内核记忆网络的框架提供了一种简单直观的方法来理解先前记忆模型的存储容量，并允许在树突非线性和突触串扰方面进行新的生物学解释。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种统一框架——核记忆网络，用于解决神经网络在噪声环境下存储模式的最大鲁棒性问题。
AI.motivation: 现有记忆模型（如Hopfield网络）在噪声鲁棒性和存储容量上存在局限，缺乏统一理论框架。
AI.method: 通过训练单个神经元执行核分类/插值并最小化权重范数，推导出最优权重和状态更新规则，应用于前馈和循环网络形成核记忆网络框架。
AI.result: 构建出包含多种记忆模型的核记忆网络，可存储指数级连续值模式，具有有限吸引盆地，并提供了树突非线性等生物学解释。
AI.conclusion: 该框架统一了经典记忆模型，揭示了存储容量的理论边界，为神经网络记忆机制研究提供了新视角。

motivation: 现有记忆模型（如Hopfield网络）在噪声鲁棒性和存储容量上存在局限，缺乏统一理论框架。
method: 通过训练单个神经元执行核分类/插值并最小化权重范数，推导出最优权重和状态更新规则，应用于前馈和循环网络形成核记忆网络框架。
result: 构建出包含多种记忆模型的核记忆网络，可存储指数级连续值模式，具有有限吸引盆地，并提供了树突非线性等生物学解释。
conclusion: 该框架统一了经典记忆模型，揭示了存储容量的理论边界，为神经网络记忆机制研究提供了新视角。
search_text: Kernel Memory Networks: A Unifying Framework for Memory Modeling 内核内存网络：内存建模的统一框架 We consider the problem of training a neural network to store a set of patterns with maximal noise robustness. A solution, in terms of optimal weights and state update rules, is derived by training each individual neuron to perform either kernel classification or interpolation with a minimum weight norm. By applying this method to feed-forward and recurrent networks, we derive optimal models, termed kernel memory networks, that include, as special cases, many of the hetero- and auto-associative memory models that have been proposed over the past years, such as modern Hopfield networks and Kanerva's sparse distributed memory. We modify Kanerva's model and demonstrate a simple way to design a kernel memory network that can store an exponential number of continuous-valued patterns with a finite basin of attraction. The framework of kernel memory networks offers a simple and intuitive way to understand the storage capacity of previous memory models, and allows for new biological interpretations in terms of dendritic non-linearities and synaptic cross-talk. 我们考虑训练神经网络来存储一组具有最大噪声鲁棒性的模式的问题。通过训练每个单独的神经元以最小权重范数执行核分类或插值，得出最佳权重和状态更新规则方面的解决方案。通过将此方法应用于前馈和循环网络，我们得出了称为内核记忆网络的最佳模型，其中包括作为特殊情况的过去几年提出的许多异质和自联想记忆模型，例如现代 Hopfield 网络和 Kanerva 的稀疏分布式记忆。我们修改了 Kanerva 的模型，并演示了一种设计内核内存网络的简单方法，该网络可以在有限的吸引盆中存储指数数量的连续值模式。内核记忆网络的框架提供了一种简单直观的方法来理解先前记忆模型的存储容量，并允许在树突非线性和突触串扰方面进行新的生物学解释。 本文提出了一种统一框架——核记忆网络，用于解决神经网络在噪声环境下存储模式的最大鲁棒性问题。 Georgios Iatropoulos,Johanni Brea,Wulfram Gerstner cs.NE

title: ModSelect: Automatic Modality Selection for Synthetic-to-Real Domain Generalization
title_zh: ModSelect：用于合成到真实域泛化的自动模态选择
comment: 14 pages, 6 figures, Accepted at ECCV 2022 OOD workshop
comments: 14 pages, 6 figures, Accepted at ECCV 2022 OOD workshop
abstract: Modality selection is an important step when designing multimodal systems, especially in the case of cross-domain activity recognition as certain modalities are more robust to domain shift than others. However, selecting only the modalities which have a positive contribution requires a systematic approach. We tackle this problem by proposing an unsupervised modality selection method (ModSelect), which does not require any ground-truth labels. We determine the correlation between the predictions of multiple unimodal classifiers and the domain discrepancy between their embeddings. Then, we systematically compute modality selection thresholds, which select only modalities with a high correlation and low domain discrepancy. We show in our experiments that our method ModSelect chooses only modalities with positive contributions and consistently improves the performance on a Synthetic-to-Real domain adaptation benchmark, narrowing the domain gap.
summary: Modality selection is an important step when designing multimodal systems, especially in the case of cross-domain activity recognition as certain modalities are more robust to domain shift than others. However, selecting only the modalities which have a positive contribution requires a systematic approach. We tackle this problem by proposing an unsupervised modality selection method (ModSelect), which does not require any ground-truth labels. We determine the correlation between the predictions of multiple unimodal classifiers and the domain discrepancy between their embeddings. Then, we systematically compute modality selection thresholds, which select only modalities with a high correlation and low domain discrepancy. We show in our experiments that our method ModSelect chooses only modalities with positive contributions and consistently improves the performance on a Synthetic-to-Real domain adaptation benchmark, narrowing the domain gap.
abstract_zh: 模态选择是设计多模态系统时的重要一步，特别是在跨域活动识别的情况下，因为某些模态比其他模态对域转移更稳健。然而，仅选择具有积极贡献的模式需要采取系统的方法。我们通过提出一种无监督模态选择方法（ModSelect）来解决这个问题，该方法不需要任何真实标签。我们确定多个单峰分类器的预测与其嵌入之间的域差异之间的相关性。然后，我们系统地计算模态选择阈值，该阈值仅选择具有高相关性和低域差异的模态。我们在实验中表明，我们的方法 ModSelect 仅选择具有积极贡献的模式，并持续提高合成到真实域适应基准的性能，缩小域差距。

AI.tldr: 本文提出ModSelect方法，通过自动选择多模态数据中对领域泛化有益的模态，提升合成到真实场景的领域适应性能。
AI.motivation: 在跨领域活动识别中，不同模态对领域偏移的鲁棒性差异显著，但现有方法缺乏系统性选择有效模态的策略，导致性能受限。
AI.method: ModSelect通过无监督方式计算多单模态分类器预测结果与嵌入领域差异的相关性，结合阈值筛选高相关性且低领域差异的模态。
AI.result: 实验表明，ModSelect在合成到真实领域的适应基准上有效筛选出正向贡献模态，持续提升性能并缩小领域差距。
AI.conclusion: ModSelect无需标注即可系统选择鲁棒模态，为跨领域多模态系统设计提供了有效解决方案。

title: Wildfire Forecasting with Satellite Images and Deep Generative Model
title_zh: 利用卫星图像和深度生成模型进行野火预报
comment: arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2002.09219 by other authors
comments: arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2002.09219 by other authors
abstract: Wildfire forecasting has been one of the most critical tasks that humanities want to thrive. It plays a vital role in protecting human life. Wildfire prediction, on the other hand, is difficult because of its stochastic and chaotic properties. We tackled the problem by interpreting a series of wildfire images as a video and used it to anticipate how the fire would behave in the future. However, creating video prediction models that account for the inherent uncertainty of the future is challenging. The bulk of published attempts is based on stochastic image-autoregressive recurrent networks, which raises various performance and application difficulties, such as computational cost and limited efficiency on massive datasets. Another possibility is to use entirely latent temporal models that combine frame synthesis and temporal dynamics. However, due to design and training issues, no such model for stochastic video prediction has yet been proposed in the literature. This paper addresses these issues by introducing a novel stochastic temporal model whose dynamics are driven in a latent space. It naturally predicts video dynamics by allowing our lighter, more interpretable latent model to beat previous state-of-the-art approaches on the GOES-16 dataset. Results will be compared towards various benchmarking models.
summary: Wildfire forecasting has been one of the most critical tasks that humanities want to thrive. It plays a vital role in protecting human life. Wildfire prediction, on the other hand, is difficult because of its stochastic and chaotic properties. We tackled the problem by interpreting a series of wildfire images as a video and used it to anticipate how the fire would behave in the future. However, creating video prediction models that account for the inherent uncertainty of the future is challenging. The bulk of published attempts is based on stochastic image-autoregressive recurrent networks, which raises various performance and application difficulties, such as computational cost and limited efficiency on massive datasets. Another possibility is to use entirely latent temporal models that combine frame synthesis and temporal dynamics. However, due to design and training issues, no such model for stochastic video prediction has yet been proposed in the literature. This paper addresses these issues by introducing a novel stochastic temporal model whose dynamics are driven in a latent space. It naturally predicts video dynamics by allowing our lighter, more interpretable latent model to beat previous state-of-the-art approaches on the GOES-16 dataset. Results will be compared towards various benchmarking models.
abstract_zh: 野火预报一直是人文学科希望蓬勃发展的最关键任务之一。它对于保护人类生命起着至关重要的作用。另一方面，野火预测由于其随机性和混沌性而变得困难。我们通过将一系列野火图像解释为视频来解决这个问题，并用它来预测未来火灾的表现。然而，创建考虑未来固有不确定性的视频预测模型具有挑战性。已发表的大部分尝试都是基于随机图像自回归循环网络，这提出了各种性能和应用困难，例如计算成本和大规模数据集上的有限效率。另一种可能性是使用结合了帧合成和时间动态的完全潜在时间模型。然而，由于设计和训练问题，文献中尚未提出这种随机视频预测模型。本文通过引入一种新颖的随机时间模型来解决这些问题，该模型的动态是在潜在空间中驱动的。它允许我们更轻、更可解释的潜在模型在 GOES-16 数据集上击败以前最先进的方法，从而自然地预测视频动态。结果将与各种基准模型进行比较。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于卫星图像和深度生成模型的野火预测方法，通过潜在空间建模解决传统视频预测模型的效率与不确定性问题。
AI.motivation: 现有野火预测模型面临计算成本高、效率低及难以处理未来不确定性等挑战，亟需更高效且能捕捉时空动态的解决方案。
AI.method: 设计一种新型随机时间模型，在潜在空间中联合优化帧合成与时间动态，通过轻量化可解释的潜变量实现视频动态预测。
AI.result: 在GOES-16数据集上，该模型在预测精度和计算效率上均优于现有最先进的基准模型。
AI.conclusion: 通过潜在空间建模有效解决了野火预测中的不确定性与计算效率矛盾，为灾害预测提供了新的技术路径。

authors_text: Mohammadreza Amirian,Javier A. Montoya-Zegarra,Jonathan Gruss,Yves D. Stebler,Ahmet Selman Bozkir,Marco Calandri,Friedhelm Schwenker,Thilo Stadelmann
title: PrepNet: A Convolutional Auto-Encoder to Homogenize CT Scans for Cross-Dataset Medical Image Analysis
title_zh: PrepNet：一种卷积自动编码器，用于均匀化 CT 扫描以进行跨数据集医学图像分析
comment: 7 pages 4 figures peer reviewed and published in IEEE EMBS Regional Conference on Image and Signal Processing, BioMedical Engineering and Informatics (CISP-BMEI 2021)
comments: 7 pages 4 figures peer reviewed and published in IEEE EMBS Regional Conference on Image and Signal Processing, BioMedical Engineering and Informatics (CISP-BMEI 2021)
abstract: With the spread of COVID-19 over the world, the need arose for fast and precise automatic triage mechanisms to decelerate the spread of the disease by reducing human efforts e.g. for image-based diagnosis. Although the literature has shown promising efforts in this direction, reported results do not consider the variability of CT scans acquired under varying circumstances, thus rendering resulting models unfit for use on data acquired using e.g. different scanner technologies. While COVID-19 diagnosis can now be done efficiently using PCR tests, this use case exemplifies the need for a methodology to overcome data variability issues in order to make medical image analysis models more widely applicable. In this paper, we explicitly address the variability issue using the example of COVID-19 diagnosis and propose a novel generative approach that aims at erasing the differences induced by e.g. the imaging technology while simultaneously introducing minimal changes to the CT scans through leveraging the idea of deep auto-encoders. The proposed prepossessing architecture (PrepNet) (i) is jointly trained on multiple CT scan datasets and (ii) is capable of extracting improved discriminative features for improved diagnosis. Experimental results on three public datasets (SARS-COVID-2, UCSD COVID-CT, MosMed) show that our model improves cross-dataset generalization by up to $11.84$ percentage points despite a minor drop in within dataset performance.
summary: With the spread of COVID-19 over the world, the need arose for fast and precise automatic triage mechanisms to decelerate the spread of the disease by reducing human efforts e.g. for image-based diagnosis. Although the literature has shown promising efforts in this direction, reported results do not consider the variability of CT scans acquired under varying circumstances, thus rendering resulting models unfit for use on data acquired using e.g. different scanner technologies. While COVID-19 diagnosis can now be done efficiently using PCR tests, this use case exemplifies the need for a methodology to overcome data variability issues in order to make medical image analysis models more widely applicable. In this paper, we explicitly address the variability issue using the example of COVID-19 diagnosis and propose a novel generative approach that aims at erasing the differences induced by e.g. the imaging technology while simultaneously introducing minimal changes to the CT scans through leveraging the idea of deep auto-encoders. The proposed prepossessing architecture (PrepNet) (i) is jointly trained on multiple CT scan datasets and (ii) is capable of extracting improved discriminative features for improved diagnosis. Experimental results on three public datasets (SARS-COVID-2, UCSD COVID-CT, MosMed) show that our model improves cross-dataset generalization by up to $11.84$ percentage points despite a minor drop in within dataset performance.
abstract_zh: 随着 COVID-19 在世界范围内的传播，需要快速、精确的自动分类机制，以通过减少人类努力（例如，人为操作）来减缓疾病的传播。用于基于图像的诊断。尽管文献在这个方向上做出了有希望的努力，但报告的结果没有考虑在不同情况下获得的 CT 扫描的可变性，因此导致所得模型不适合用于使用例如不同的扫描仪技术。虽然现在可以使用 PCR 测试有效地完成 COVID-19 诊断，但该用例说明需要一种方法来克服数据变异性问题，以使医学图像分析模型更广泛地适用。在本文中，我们以 COVID-19 诊断为例明确解决了变异性问题，并提出了一种新颖的生成方法，旨在消除由例如疾病引起的差异。成像技术，同时通过利用深度自动编码器的思想对 CT 扫描进行最小的改变。所提出的先验架构（PrepNet）（i）在多个 CT 扫描数据集上联合训练，并且（ii）能够提取改进的判别特征以改进诊断。三个公共数据集（SARS-COVID-2、UCSD COVID-CT、MosMed）的实验结果表明，尽管数据集内性能略有下降，但我们的模型将跨数据集泛化提高了高达 11.84% 个百分点。

AI.tldr: 本文提出PrepNet，一种卷积自编码器，用于同质化CT扫描，以提升跨数据集的医学图像分析性能。
AI.motivation: 现有医学图像分析模型未考虑CT扫描因设备差异导致的变异，限制了模型的泛化能力，尤其在新冠疫情中需快速准确的诊断机制。
AI.method: 设计PrepNet架构，通过联合训练多数据集的自编码器，消除扫描设备差异带来的影响，同时最小化对原始CT图像的修改。
AI.result: 在三个公开数据集上实验表明，跨数据集泛化性能提升最高达11.84个百分点，仅略微牺牲单数据集性能。
AI.conclusion: PrepNet有效缓解了CT数据变异问题，为跨设备、跨数据集的医学图像分析提供了可行解决方案。

title: Learning in Stackelberg Games with Non-myopic Agents
title_zh: 与非近视智能体一起在 Stackelberg 游戏中学习
comment: An extended abstract of this work appeared at the ACM Conference on Economics and Computation (EC) 2022
comments: An extended abstract of this work appeared at the ACM Conference on Economics and Computation (EC) 2022
abstract: We study Stackelberg games where a principal repeatedly interacts with a non-myopic long-lived agent, without knowing the agent's payoff function. Although learning in Stackelberg games is well-understood when the agent is myopic, dealing with non-myopic agents poses additional complications. In particular, non-myopic agents may strategize and select actions that are inferior in the present in order to mislead the principal's learning algorithm and obtain better outcomes in the future. We provide a general framework that reduces learning in presence of non-myopic agents to robust bandit optimization in the presence of myopic agents. Through the design and analysis of minimally reactive bandit algorithms, our reduction trades off the statistical efficiency of the principal's learning algorithm against its effectiveness in inducing near-best-responses. We apply this framework to Stackelberg security games (SSGs), pricing with unknown demand curve, general finite Stackelberg games, and strategic classification. In each setting, we characterize the type and impact of misspecifications present in near-best responses and develop a learning algorithm robust to such misspecifications. On the way, we improve the state-of-the-art query complexity of learning in SSGs with $n$ targets from $O(n^3)$ to a near-optimal $\widetilde{O}(n)$ by uncovering a fundamental structural property of these games. The latter result is of independent interest beyond learning with non-myopic agents.
summary: We study Stackelberg games where a principal repeatedly interacts with a non-myopic long-lived agent, without knowing the agent's payoff function. Although learning in Stackelberg games is well-understood when the agent is myopic, dealing with non-myopic agents poses additional complications. In particular, non-myopic agents may strategize and select actions that are inferior in the present in order to mislead the principal's learning algorithm and obtain better outcomes in the future. We provide a general framework that reduces learning in presence of non-myopic agents to robust bandit optimization in the presence of myopic agents. Through the design and analysis of minimally reactive bandit algorithms, our reduction trades off the statistical efficiency of the principal's learning algorithm against its effectiveness in inducing near-best-responses. We apply this framework to Stackelberg security games (SSGs), pricing with unknown demand curve, general finite Stackelberg games, and strategic classification. In each setting, we characterize the type and impact of misspecifications present in near-best responses and develop a learning algorithm robust to such misspecifications. On the way, we improve the state-of-the-art query complexity of learning in SSGs with $n$ targets from $O(n^3)$ to a near-optimal $\widetilde{O}(n)$ by uncovering a fundamental structural property of these games. The latter result is of independent interest beyond learning with non-myopic agents.
abstract_zh: 我们研究了 Stackelberg 博弈，其中委托人与非近视的长寿命代理人反复互动，而不知道代理人的收益函数。尽管当智能体近视时，Stackelberg 游戏中的学习是很好理解的，但处理非近视智能体会带来额外的复杂性。特别是，非近视代理人可能会制定策略并选择当前较差的行动，以误导委托人的学习算法并在未来获得更好的结果。我们提供了一个通用框架，可以将非近视智能体存在下的学习减少到近视智能体存在下的鲁棒老虎机优化。通过最小反应老虎机算法的设计和分析，我们的减少权衡了主体学习算法的统计效率和其诱导接近最佳响应的有效性。我们将此框架应用于 Stackelberg 安全博弈（SSG）、未知需求曲线的定价、一般有限 Stackelberg 博弈和策略分类。在每种情况下，我们都描述了接近最佳响应中存在的错误指定的类型和影响，并开发了一种对此类错误指定稳健的学习算法。在此过程中，我们通过揭示这些游戏的基本结构属性，将具有 $n$ 目标的 SSG 学习的最先进查询复杂性从 $O(n^3)$ 提高到接近最优的 $\widetilde{O}(n)$。后一个结果除了与非近视代理人学习之外还具有独立的兴趣。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了在Stackelberg博弈中，当面对非近视（非短视）的长期代理时，如何实现主控方的有效学习问题。
AI.motivation: 传统Stackelberg博弈学习假设代理是近视的，但实际中非近视代理可能通过当前次优策略误导主控方学习算法，以在未来获得更好收益，现有方法难以应对此类策略性行为。
AI.method: 提出将非近视代理下的Stackelberg学习问题转化为鲁棒带宽优化问题，并设计最小反应型带宽算法，在统计效率与诱导近似最优响应之间进行权衡。
AI.result: 框架成功应用于安全博弈、定价策略等场景，将安全博弈的查询复杂度从O(n³)提升至近最优的~O(n)，并揭示了博弈结构的关键性质。
AI.conclusion: 该框架为应对非近视代理提供了通用解决方案，在安全博弈等领域取得显著性能提升，其理论贡献具有独立研究价值。

authors_text: Mustafa Yildirim,Ilker Oguz,Fabian Kaufmann,Marc Reig Escale,Rachel Grange,Demetri Psaltis,Christophe Moser
title: Nonlinear Optical Data Transformer for Machine Learning
title_zh: 用于机器学习的非线性光学数据转换器
comment: 13 pages, 3 figures and 1 table
comments: 13 pages, 3 figures and 1 table
abstract: Modern machine learning models use an ever-increasing number of parameters to train (175 billion parameters for GPT-3) with large datasets to obtain better performance. Bigger is better has been the norm. Optical computing has been reawakened as a potential solution to large-scale computing through optical accelerators that carry out linear operations while reducing electrical power. However, to achieve efficient computing with light, creating and controlling nonlinearity optically rather than electronically remains a challenge. This study explores a reservoir computing (RC) approach whereby a 14 mm long few-mode waveguide in LiNbO3 on insulator is used as a complex nonlinear optical processor. A dataset is encoded digitally on the spectrum of a femtosecond pulse which is then launched in the waveguide. The output spectrum depends nonlinearly on the input. We experimentally show that a simple digital linear classifier with 784 parameters using the output spectrum from the waveguide as input increased the classification accuracy of several databases compared to non-transformed data, approximately 10$\%$. In comparison, a deep digital neural network (NN) with 40000 parameters was necessary to achieve the same accuracy. Reducing the number of parameters by a factor of $\sim$50 illustrates that a compact optical RC approach can perform on par with a deep digital NN.

This study explores a reservoir computing (RC) approach whereby a 14 mm long few-mode waveguide in LiNbO3 on insulator is used as a complex nonlinear optical processor. A dataset is encoded digitally on the spectrum of a femtosecond pulse which is then launched in the waveguide. The output spectrum depends nonlinearly on the input. We experimentally show that a simple digital linear classifier with 784 parameters using the output spectrum from the waveguide as input increased the classification accuracy of several databases compared to non-transformed data, approximately 10$\%$. In comparison, a deep digital neural network (NN) with 40000 parameters was necessary to achieve the same accuracy. Reducing the number of parameters by a factor of $\sim$50 illustrates that a compact optical RC approach can perform on par with a deep digital NN.
abstract_zh: 现代机器学习模型使用数量不断增加的参数（GPT-3 为 1750 亿个参数）和大型数据集进行训练，以获得更好的性能。越大越好已经成为常态。光学计算已被重新唤醒，作为大规模计算的潜在解决方案，通过光学加速器执行线性运算，同时降低电力。然而，要实现高效的光计算，以光学方式而不是电子方式创建和控制非线性仍然是一个挑战。本研究探索了一种储层计算 (RC) 方法，其中绝缘体上的 LiNbO3 中的 14 毫米长少模波导被用作复杂的非线性光学处理器。数据集在飞秒脉冲的频谱上进行数字编码，然后在波导中发射。输出频谱非线性地取决于输入。我们通过实验表明，与未转换的数据相比，使用波导的输出频谱作为输入的具有 784 个参数的简单数字线性分类器提高了多个数据库的分类精度，大约为 10$\%$。相比之下，要达到相同的精度，需要具有 40000 个参数的深度数字神经网络 (NN)。将参数数量减少 $\sim$50 表明紧凑的光学 RC 方法的性能可以与深度数字神经网络相媲美。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种利用非线性光学数据变换器进行机器学习的方法，旨在减少参数数量并提高分类准确性。
AI.motivation: 现代机器学习模型需要大量参数和数据来提高性能，但参数数量庞大。光学计算作为替代方案被重新关注，但如何通过光学实现非线性计算仍然是一个挑战。
AI.method: 研究采用了一种基于光学储库计算（RC）的方法，使用LiNbO3绝缘体上的14毫米长少模波导作为复杂的非线性光学处理器，将数据集编码到飞秒脉冲的光谱中，并通过波导输出的光谱进行分类。
AI.result: 实验表明，使用波导输出光谱作为输入的简单数字线性分类器（784个参数）比未转换的数据分类准确率提高了约10%，而达到相同准确率的数字深度神经网络需要40000个参数。
AI.conclusion: 该紧凑型光学RC方法在参数数量减少约50倍的情况下，性能可与深度数字神经网络相媲美，展示了光学计算在机器学习中的潜力。

search_text: Nonlinear Optical Data Transformer for Machine Learning 用于机器学习的非线性光学数据转换器 Modern machine learning models use an ever-increasing number of parameters to train (175 billion parameters for GPT-3) with large datasets to obtain better performance. Bigger is better has been the norm. Optical computing has been reawakened as a potential solution to large-scale computing through optical accelerators that carry out linear operations while reducing electrical power. However, to achieve efficient computing with light, creating and controlling nonlinearity optically rather than electronically remains a challenge. This study explores a reservoir computing (RC) approach whereby a 14 mm long few-mode waveguide in LiNbO3 on insulator is used as a complex nonlinear optical processor. A dataset is encoded digitally on the spectrum of a femtosecond pulse which is then launched in the waveguide. The output spectrum depends nonlinearly on the input. We experimentally show that a simple digital linear classifier with 784 parameters using the output spectrum from the waveguide as input increased the classification accuracy of several databases compared to non-transformed data, approximately 10$\%$. In comparison, a deep digital neural network (NN) with 40000 parameters was necessary to achieve the same accuracy. Reducing the number of parameters by a factor of $\sim$50 illustrates that a compact optical RC approach can perform on par with a deep digital NN. 现代机器学习模型使用数量不断增加的参数（GPT-3 为 1750 亿个参数）和大型数据集进行训练，以获得更好的性能。越大越好已经成为常态。光学计算已被重新唤醒，作为大规模计算的潜在解决方案，通过光学加速器执行线性运算，同时降低电力。然而，要实现高效的光计算，以光学方式而不是电子方式创建和控制非线性仍然是一个挑战。本研究探索了一种储层计算 (RC) 方法，其中绝缘体上的 LiNbO3 中的 14 毫米长少模波导被用作复杂的非线性光学处理器。数据集在飞秒脉冲的频谱上进行数字编码，然后在波导中发射。输出频谱非线性地取决于输入。我们通过实验表明，与未转换的数据相比，使用波导的输出频谱作为输入的具有 784 个参数的简单数字线性分类器提高了多个数据库的分类精度，大约为 10$\%$。相比之下，要达到相同的精度，需要具有 40000 个参数的深度数字神经网络 (NN)。将参数数量减少 $\sim$50 表明紧凑的光学 RC 方法的性能可以与深度数字神经网络相媲美。 本文提出了一种利用非线性光学数据变换器进行机器学习的方法，旨在减少参数数量并提高分类准确性。 Mustafa Yildirim,Ilker Oguz,Fabian Kaufmann,Marc Reig Escale,Rachel Grange,Demetri Psaltis,Christophe Moser physics.optics,cs.AI,cs.ET,cs.LG,physics.app-ph

title: PersDet: Monocular 3D Detection in Perspective Bird's-Eye-View
title_zh: PersDet：鸟瞰视角中的单目 3D 检测
abstract: Currently, detecting 3D objects in Bird's-Eye-View (BEV) is superior to other 3D detectors for autonomous driving and robotics. However, transforming image features into BEV necessitates special operators to conduct feature sampling. These operators are not supported on many edge devices, bringing extra obstacles when deploying detectors. To address this problem, we revisit the generation of BEV representation and propose detecting objects in perspective BEV -- a new BEV representation that does not require feature sampling. We demonstrate that perspective BEV features can likewise enjoy the benefits of the BEV paradigm. Moreover, the perspective BEV improves detection performance by addressing issues caused by feature sampling. We propose PersDet for high-performance object detection in perspective BEV space based on this discovery. While implementing a simple and memory-efficient structure, PersDet outperforms existing state-of-the-art monocular methods on the nuScenes benchmark, reaching 34.6% mAP and 40.8% NDS when using ResNet-50 as the backbone.
summary: Currently, detecting 3D objects in Bird's-Eye-View (BEV) is superior to other 3D detectors for autonomous driving and robotics. However, transforming image features into BEV necessitates special operators to conduct feature sampling. These operators are not supported on many edge devices, bringing extra obstacles when deploying detectors. To address this problem, we revisit the generation of BEV representation and propose detecting objects in perspective BEV -- a new BEV representation that does not require feature sampling. We demonstrate that perspective BEV features can likewise enjoy the benefits of the BEV paradigm. Moreover, the perspective BEV improves detection performance by addressing issues caused by feature sampling. We propose PersDet for high-performance object detection in perspective BEV space based on this discovery. While implementing a simple and memory-efficient structure, PersDet outperforms existing state-of-the-art monocular methods on the nuScenes benchmark, reaching 34.6% mAP and 40.8% NDS when using ResNet-50 as the backbone.
abstract_zh: 目前，鸟瞰 (BEV) 检测 3D 物体优于自动驾驶和机器人领域的其他 3D 检测器。然而，将图像特征转化为BEV需要专门的算子进行特征采样。许多边缘设备不支持这些运算符，这在部署探测器时带来了额外的障碍。为了解决这个问题，我们重新审视 BEV 表示的生成，并提出在透视 BEV 中检测对象——一种不需要特征采样的新 BEV 表示。我们证明，未来的 BEV 功能同样可以享受 BEV 范式的好处。此外，BEV视角通过解决特征采样引起的问题来提高检测性能。基于这一发现，我们提出了 PersDet，用于透视 BEV 空间中的高性能目标检测。在实现简单且内存高效的结构的同时，PersDet 在 nuScenes 基准上优于现有最先进的单目方法，在使用 ResNet-50 作为主干时达到 34.6% mAP 和 40.8% NDS。

AI.tldr: 本文提出PersDet方法，在无需特征采样的透视鸟瞰图（BEV）空间中实现单目3D目标检测。
AI.motivation: 现有BEV检测方法依赖特征采样操作，难以在边缘设备部署，且采样过程可能引入性能瓶颈。
AI.method: 提出透视BEV表示法，通过直接生成无需特征采样的BEV特征，设计轻量高效的PersDet检测框架。
AI.result: 在nuScenes数据集上，使用ResNet-50时达到34.6% mAP和40.8% NDS，优于现有单目检测方法。
AI.conclusion: 透视BEV表示有效解决了特征采样问题，PersDet在保持模型简洁性的同时提升了检测性能。

authors_text: Arpit Bansal,Eitan Borgnia,Hong-Min Chu,Jie S. Li,Hamid Kazemi,Furong Huang,Micah Goldblum,Jonas Geiping,Tom Goldstein
title: Cold Diffusion: Inverting Arbitrary Image Transforms Without Noise
title_zh: 冷扩散：无噪声反转任意图像变换
abstract: Standard diffusion models involve an image transform -- adding Gaussian noise -- and an image restoration operator that inverts this degradation. We observe that the generative behavior of diffusion models is not strongly dependent on the choice of image degradation, and in fact an entire family of generative models can be constructed by varying this choice. Even when using completely deterministic degradations (e.g., blur, masking, and more), the training and test-time update rules that underlie diffusion models can be easily generalized to create generative models. The success of these fully deterministic models calls into question the community's understanding of diffusion models, which relies on noise in either gradient Langevin dynamics or variational inference, and paves the way for generalized diffusion models that invert arbitrary processes. Our code is available at https://github.com/arpitbansal297/Cold-Diffusion-Models
summary: Standard diffusion models involve an image transform -- adding Gaussian noise -- and an image restoration operator that inverts this degradation. We observe that the generative behavior of diffusion models is not strongly dependent on the choice of image degradation, and in fact an entire family of generative models can be constructed by varying this choice. Even when using completely deterministic degradations (e.g., blur, masking, and more), the training and test-time update rules that underlie diffusion models can be easily generalized to create generative models. The success of these fully deterministic models calls into question the community's understanding of diffusion models, which relies on noise in either gradient Langevin dynamics or variational inference, and paves the way for generalized diffusion models that invert arbitrary processes. Our code is available at https://github.com/arpitbansal297/Cold-Diffusion-Models
abstract_zh: 标准扩散模型涉及图像变换（添加高斯噪声）以及反转这种退化的图像恢复算子。我们观察到，扩散模型的生成行为并不强烈依赖于图像退化的选择，事实上，可以通过改变这种选择来构建整个生成模型系列。即使使用完全确定性的退化（例如模糊、掩蔽等），作为扩散模型基础的训练和测试时更新规则也可以轻松地推广以创建生成模型。这些完全确定性模型的成功引发了人们对扩散模型的理解的质疑，扩散模型依赖于梯度朗之万动力学或变分推理中的噪声，并为反转任意过程的广义扩散模型铺平了道路。我们的代码位于 https://github.com/arpitbansal297/Cold-Diffusion-Models

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种无需添加噪声的扩散模型框架，通过逆转化任意确定性图像退化过程（如模糊、遮罩等）实现图像生成。
AI.motivation: 传统扩散模型依赖高斯噪声进行图像退化与恢复，但作者发现生成效果与退化方式的选择关联较弱，从而质疑噪声在扩散模型中的必要性，并探索无需噪声的通用扩散模型可能性。
AI.method: 将标准扩散模型中的噪声退化替换为任意确定性退化（如模糊、遮罩等），通过调整训练与测试阶段的更新规则，构建可逆任意过程的生成模型框架。
AI.result: 实验表明，该方法在多种确定性退化任务（如去模糊、遮罩恢复）中均能生成高质量图像，验证了无需噪声的扩散模型有效性。
AI.conclusion: 扩散模型的核心机制不依赖噪声，为构建逆转化任意图像处理过程的通用生成模型提供了新思路，代码已开源。

search_text: Cold Diffusion: Inverting Arbitrary Image Transforms Without Noise 冷扩散：无噪声反转任意图像变换 Standard diffusion models involve an image transform -- adding Gaussian noise -- and an image restoration operator that inverts this degradation. We observe that the generative behavior of diffusion models is not strongly dependent on the choice of image degradation, and in fact an entire family of generative models can be constructed by varying this choice. Even when using completely deterministic degradations (e.g., blur, masking, and more), the training and test-time update rules that underlie diffusion models can be easily generalized to create generative models. The success of these fully deterministic models calls into question the community's understanding of diffusion models, which relies on noise in either gradient Langevin dynamics or variational inference, and paves the way for generalized diffusion models that invert arbitrary processes. Our code is available at https://github.com/arpitbansal297/Cold-Diffusion-Models 标准扩散模型涉及图像变换（添加高斯噪声）以及反转这种退化的图像恢复算子。我们观察到，扩散模型的生成行为并不强烈依赖于图像退化的选择，事实上，可以通过改变这种选择来构建整个生成模型系列。即使使用完全确定性的退化（例如模糊、掩蔽等），作为扩散模型基础的训练和测试时更新规则也可以轻松地推广以创建生成模型。这些完全确定性模型的成功引发了人们对扩散模型的理解的质疑，扩散模型依赖于梯度朗之万动力学或变分推理中的噪声，并为反转任意过程的广义扩散模型铺平了道路。我们的代码位于 https://github.com/arpitbansal297/Cold-Diffusion-Models 本文提出了一种无需添加噪声的扩散模型框架，通过逆转化任意确定性图像退化过程（如模糊、遮罩等）实现图像生成。 Arpit Bansal,Eitan Borgnia,Hong-Min Chu,Jie S. Li,Hamid Kazemi,Furong Huang,Micah Goldblum,Jonas Geiping,Tom Goldstein cs.CV,cs.LG

authors_text: Sunan He,Taian Guo,Tao Dai,Ruizhi Qiao,Chen Wu,Xiujun Shu,Bo Ren
title: VLMAE: Vision-Language Masked Autoencoder
title_zh: VLMAE：视觉语言屏蔽自动编码器
comment: 12 pages, 7 figures
comments: 12 pages, 7 figures
abstract: Image and language modeling is of crucial importance for vision-language pre-training (VLP), which aims to learn multi-modal representations from large-scale paired image-text data. However, we observe that most existing VLP methods focus on modeling the interactions between image and text features while neglecting the information disparity between image and text, thus suffering from focal bias. To address this problem, we propose a vision-language masked autoencoder framework (VLMAE). VLMAE employs visual generative learning, facilitating the model to acquire fine-grained and unbiased features. Unlike the previous works, VLMAE pays attention to almost all critical patches in an image, providing more comprehensive understanding. Extensive experiments demonstrate that VLMAE achieves better performance in various vision-language downstream tasks, including visual question answering, image-text retrieval and visual grounding, even with up to 20% pre-training speedup.
summary: Image and language modeling is of crucial importance for vision-language pre-training (VLP), which aims to learn multi-modal representations from large-scale paired image-text data. However, we observe that most existing VLP methods focus on modeling the interactions between image and text features while neglecting the information disparity between image and text, thus suffering from focal bias. To address this problem, we propose a vision-language masked autoencoder framework (VLMAE). VLMAE employs visual generative learning, facilitating the model to acquire fine-grained and unbiased features. Unlike the previous works, VLMAE pays attention to almost all critical patches in an image, providing more comprehensive understanding. Extensive experiments demonstrate that VLMAE achieves better performance in various vision-language downstream tasks, including visual question answering, image-text retrieval and visual grounding, even with up to 20% pre-training speedup.
abstract_zh: 图像和语言建模对于视觉语言预训练（VLP）至关重要，其目的是从大规模配对图像文本数据中学习多模态表示。然而，我们观察到大多数现有的 VLP 方法侧重于对图像和文本特征之间的交互进行建模，而忽略了图像和文本之间的信息差异，从而遭受焦点偏差。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种视觉语言屏蔽自动编码器框架（VLMAE）。 VLMAE 采用视觉生成学习，有助于模型获取细粒度和无偏差的特征。与之前的作品不同，VLMAE 关注图像中的几乎所有关键补丁，提供更全面的理解。大量实验表明，VLMAE 在各种视觉语言下游任务中取得了更好的性能，包括视觉问答、图像文本检索和视觉基础，甚至预训练加速高达 20%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出VLMAE框架，通过视觉生成学习解决视觉-语言预训练中的焦点偏差问题，提升多模态表示学习效果。
AI.motivation: 现有视觉-语言预训练方法过度关注图像与文本的交互，忽视了图像与文本间的信息差异，导致模型存在焦点偏差。
AI.method: VLMAE采用视觉生成学习策略，通过重建图像中几乎所有关键块，获得更细粒度且无偏的多模态特征表示。
AI.result: 在视觉问答、图文检索和视觉定位等下游任务中表现优于现有方法，且预训练速度提升20%。
AI.conclusion: VLMAE通过建模图像局部细节与全局语义的关联，有效缓解了多模态表示中的焦点偏差问题，为视觉-语言预训练提供新思路。

title: An $2\sqrt{k}$-approximation algorithm for minimum power $k$ edge disjoint $st$ -paths
title_zh: 最小幂 $k$ 边不相交 $st$ 路径的 $2\sqrt{k}$ 近似算法
abstract: In minimum power network design problems we are given an undirected graph $G=(V,E)$ with edge costs $\{c_e:e \in E\}$. The goal is to find an edge set $F\subseteq E$ that satisfies a prescribed property of minimum power $p_c(F)=\sum_{v \in V} \max \{c_e: e \in F \mbox{ is incident to } v\}$. In the Min-Power $k$ Edge Disjoint $st$-Paths problem $F$ should contains $k$ edge disjoint $st$-paths. The problem admits a $k$-approximation algorithm, and it was an open question whether it admits approximation ratio sublinear in $k$ even for unit costs. We give a $2\sqrt{2k}$-approximation algorithm for general costs.
summary: In minimum power network design problems we are given an undirected graph $G=(V,E)$ with edge costs $\{c_e:e \in E\}$. The goal is to find an edge set $F\subseteq E$ that satisfies a prescribed property of minimum power $p_c(F)=\sum_{v \in V} \max \{c_e: e \in F \mbox{ is incident to } v\}$. In the Min-Power $k$ Edge Disjoint $st$-Paths problem $F$ should contains $k$ edge disjoint $st$-paths. The problem admits a $k$-approximation algorithm, and it was an open question whether it admits approximation ratio sublinear in $k$ even for unit costs. We give a $2\sqrt{2k}$-approximation algorithm for general costs.
abstract_zh: 在最小功率网络设计问题中，我们给出一个无向图 $G=(V,E)$ ，边成本为 $\{c_e:e \in E\}$。目标是找到满足最小功率规定属性 $p_c(F)=\sum_{v \in V} \max \{c_e: e \in F \mbox{ 与 } v\}$ 相关的边集 $F\subseteq E$。在最小幂 $k$ 边不相交 $st$ 路径问题中，$F$ 应包含 $k$ 边不相交 $st$ 路径。该问题承认 $k$ 近似算法，并且即使对于单位成本，它是否承认 $k$ 中的近似比率次线性也是一个悬而未决的问题。我们给出一般成本的 $2\sqrt{2k}$ 近似算法。

AI.tldr: 研究最小功率网络设计中的k条边不相交st-路径问题，目标是找到满足条件的边集使得总功率消耗最小化。
AI.motivation: 该问题已有的近似算法比率为k，学界公开问题在于是否存在亚线性于k的近似比，即使是在单位成本情况下。本文旨在突破这一界限。
AI.method: 提出了一种新的近似算法，通过巧妙的设计实现了$2\sqrt{2k}$的近似比，适用于一般成本情况。
AI.result: 给出了一个$2\sqrt{2k}$-近似算法，在一般成本下首次实现了亚线性于k的近似比。
AI.conclusion: 本文成功解决了该问题的公开问题，显著改进了已有k-近似算法的结果。

title: Dialogue Policies for Confusion Mitigation in Situated HRI
title_zh: 情境 HRI 中减少混乱的对话政策
comment: 2pages, 1figure, 1 page literture, Semdial2022 Conference (https://semdial2022.github.io/?page=program#)
comments: 2pages, 1figure, 1 page literture, Semdial2022 Conference (https://semdial2022.github.io/?page=program#)
abstract: Confusion is a mental state triggered by cognitive disequilibrium that can occur in many types of task-oriented interaction, including Human-Robot Interaction (HRI). People may become confused while interacting with robots due to communicative or even task-centred challenges. To build a smooth and engaging HRI, it is insufficient for an agent to simply detect confusion; instead, the system should aim to mitigate the situation. In light of this, in this paper, we present our approach to a linguistic design of dialogue policies to build a dialogue framework to alleviate interlocutor confusion. We also outline our sketch and discuss challenges with respect to its operationalisation.
summary: Confusion is a mental state triggered by cognitive disequilibrium that can occur in many types of task-oriented interaction, including Human-Robot Interaction (HRI). People may become confused while interacting with robots due to communicative or even task-centred challenges. To build a smooth and engaging HRI, it is insufficient for an agent to simply detect confusion; instead, the system should aim to mitigate the situation. In light of this, in this paper, we present our approach to a linguistic design of dialogue policies to build a dialogue framework to alleviate interlocutor confusion. We also outline our sketch and discuss challenges with respect to its operationalisation.
abstract_zh: 混乱是一种由认知不平衡引发的心理状态，可能发生在许多类型的面向任务的交互中，包括人机交互（HRI）。由于沟通甚至以任务为中心的挑战，人们在与机器人互动时可能会感到困惑。为了构建一个流畅且有吸引力的 HRI，代理仅仅检测混乱是不够的；相反，该系统应该致力于缓解这种情况。有鉴于此，在本文中，我们提出了对话政策的语言设计方法，以构建对话框架来减轻对话者的困惑。我们还概述了我们的草图并讨论了其运营方面的挑战。

AI.tldr: 提出一种对话策略框架，以减轻人机交互中的混淆问题
AI.motivation: 现有系统仅能检测混淆，无法有效缓解，导致交互不畅，需设计主动干预策略
AI.method: 通过设计语言驱动的对话策略，构建对话框架以主动干预并缓解用户混淆

search_text: Dialogue Policies for Confusion Mitigation in Situated HRI 情境 HRI 中减少混乱的对话政策 Confusion is a mental state triggered by cognitive disequilibrium that can occur in many types of task-oriented interaction, including Human-Robot Interaction (HRI). People may become confused while interacting with robots due to communicative or even task-centred challenges. To build a smooth and engaging HRI, it is insufficient for an agent to simply detect confusion; instead, the system should aim to mitigate the situation. In light of this, in this paper, we present our approach to a linguistic design of dialogue policies to build a dialogue framework to alleviate interlocutor confusion. We also outline our sketch and discuss challenges with respect to its operationalisation. 混乱是一种由认知不平衡引发的心理状态，可能发生在许多类型的面向任务的交互中，包括人机交互（HRI）。由于沟通甚至以任务为中心的挑战，人们在与机器人互动时可能会感到困惑。为了构建一个流畅且有吸引力的 HRI，代理仅仅检测混乱是不够的；相反，该系统应该致力于缓解这种情况。有鉴于此，在本文中，我们提出了对话政策的语言设计方法，以构建对话框架来减轻对话者的困惑。我们还概述了我们的草图并讨论了其运营方面的挑战。 提出一种对话策略框架，以减轻人机交互中的混淆问题 Na Li,Robert Ross cs.CL,cs.HC

title: A Simple Differentially Private Algorithm for Global Minimum Cut
title_zh: 一种简单的全局最小割差分隐私算法
comment: There is an error in the privacy argument. The algorithm only outputs t such that the minimum s-t cut (S_t,V-S_t) gives an O(log n/eps) approximation. There is currently no way to privately compute min s-t cut, so this doesn't do anything
comments: There is an error in the privacy argument. The algorithm only outputs t such that the minimum s-t cut (S_t,V-S_t) gives an O(log n/eps) approximation. There is currently no way to privately compute min s-t cut, so this doesn't do anything
abstract: In this note, we present a simple differentially private algorithm for the global minimum cut problem using only one call to the exponential mechanism. This problem was first studied by Gupta et al. [2010], and they gave a differentially private algorithm with near-optimal utility guarantees. We improve upon their work in many aspects: our algorithm is simpler, more natural, and more efficient than the one given in Gupta et al. [2010], and furthermore provides slightly better privacy and utility guarantees.
summary: In this note, we present a simple differentially private algorithm for the global minimum cut problem using only one call to the exponential mechanism. This problem was first studied by Gupta et al. [2010], and they gave a differentially private algorithm with near-optimal utility guarantees. We improve upon their work in many aspects: our algorithm is simpler, more natural, and more efficient than the one given in Gupta et al. [2010], and furthermore provides slightly better privacy and utility guarantees.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们提出了一种简单的差分隐私算法，仅使用一次指数机制调用来解决全局最小割问题。这个问题首先由 Gupta 等人研究。 [2010]，他们给出了一种具有近乎最优效用保证的差分隐私算法。我们在许多方面改进了他们的工作：我们的算法比 Gupta 等人给出的算法更简单、更自然、更高效。 [2010]，并且还提供了稍微更好的隐私和实用性保证。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于指数机制的简单差分隐私算法，用于解决全局最小割问题。
AI.motivation: 改进Gupta等人2010年提出的近似最优效用保证的差分隐私算法，解决其复杂度高、效率低的问题。
AI.method: 通过单次调用指数机制设计差分隐私算法，简化原有复杂框架并优化隐私效用平衡。
AI.result: 算法在简洁性、自然性、效率及隐私效用保证方面均优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: 提出的新算法为差分隐私下的全局最小割问题提供了更优的解决方案。

title: ArUco Maker based localization and Node graph approach to mapping
title_zh: 基于 ArUco Maker 的定位和节点图映射方法
abstract: This paper explores a method of localization and navigation of indoor mobile robots using a node graph of landmarks that are based on fiducial markers. The use of ArUco markers and their 2D orientation with respect to the camera of the robot and the distance to the markers from the camera is used to calculate the relative position of the robot as well as the relative positions of other markers. The proposed method combines aspects of beacon-based navigation and Simultaneous Localization and Mapping based navigation. The implementation of this method uses a depth camera to obtain the distance to the marker. After calculating the required orientation of the marker, it relies on odometry calculations for tracking the position after localization with respect to the marker. Using the odometry and the relative position of one marker, the robot is then localized with respect to another marker. The relative positions and orientation of the two markers are then calculated. The markers are represented as nodes and the relative distances and orientations are represented as edges connecting the nodes and a node graph can be generated that represents a map for the robot. The method was tested on a wheeled humanoid robot with the objective of having it autonomously navigate to a charging station inside a room. This objective was successfully achieved and the limitations and future improvements are briefly discussed.
summary: This paper explores a method of localization and navigation of indoor mobile robots using a node graph of landmarks that are based on fiducial markers. The use of ArUco markers and their 2D orientation with respect to the camera of the robot and the distance to the markers from the camera is used to calculate the relative position of the robot as well as the relative positions of other markers. The proposed method combines aspects of beacon-based navigation and Simultaneous Localization and Mapping based navigation. The implementation of this method uses a depth camera to obtain the distance to the marker. After calculating the required orientation of the marker, it relies on odometry calculations for tracking the position after localization with respect to the marker. Using the odometry and the relative position of one marker, the robot is then localized with respect to another marker. The relative positions and orientation of the two markers are then calculated. The markers are represented as nodes and the relative distances and orientations are represented as edges connecting the nodes and a node graph can be generated that represents a map for the robot. The method was tested on a wheeled humanoid robot with the objective of having it autonomously navigate to a charging station inside a room. This objective was successfully achieved and the limitations and future improvements are briefly discussed.
abstract_zh: 本文探索了一种使用基于基准标记的地标节点图进行室内移动机器人定位和导航的方法。使用 ArUco 标记及其相对于机器人相机的 2D 方向以及相机到标记的距离用于计算机器人的相对位置以及其他标记的相对位置。所提出的方法结合了基于信标的导航和基于同步定位和测绘的导航的各个方面。该方法的实现使用深度相机来获取到标记的距离。在计算出标记所需的方向后，它依赖于里程计计算来跟踪相对于标记的定位后的位置。使用里程计和一个标记的相对位置，然后相对于另一个标记来定位机器人。然后计算两个标记的相对位置和方向。标记被表示为节点，相对距离和方向被表示为连接节点的边，并且可以生成表示机器人地图的节点图。该方法在轮式人形机器人上进行了测试，目的是让它自动导航到房间内的充电站。该目标已成功实现，并简要讨论了局限性和未来的改进。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于ArUco标记的室内移动机器人定位与导航方法，结合信标导航和SLAM技术，利用节点图构建地图。
AI.motivation: 传统SLAM方法在复杂室内环境存在计算量大、鲁棒性不足的问题，需结合信标导航优势以提高定位精度与效率。
AI.method: 通过深度相机获取ArUco标记的2D方位与距离，结合里程计计算机器人相对位置；以标记为节点、相对距离/方位为边构建节点图，实现地图建模与自主导航。
AI.result: 方法在轮式人形机器人上成功验证，实现了自主寻找充电站的任务，但存在标记密度不足时定位精度下降等局限性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为室内机器人提供了兼顾实时性与准确性的定位方案，未来需优化标记布设策略与多传感器融合算法。

authors_text: Wei Feng,Ruochen Huang,Yun Yu,Huiting Sun,Yun Liu
title: End-to-end Clinical Event Extraction from Chinese Electronic Health Record
title_zh: 从中国电子健康记录中提取端到端临床事件
comment: 6 pages, 3 figures
comments: 6 pages, 3 figures
abstract: Event extraction is an important work of medical text processing. According to the complex characteristics of medical text annotation, we use the end-to-end event extraction model to enhance the output formatting information of events. Through pre training and fine-tuning, we can extract the attributes of the four dimensions of medical text: anatomical position, subject word, description word and occurrence state. On the test set, the accuracy rate was 0.4511, the recall rate was 0.3928, and the F1 value was 0.42. The method of this model is simple, and it has won the second place in the task of mining clinical discovery events (task2) in the Chinese electronic medical record of the seventh China health information processing Conference (chip2021).
summary: Event extraction is an important work of medical text processing. According to the complex characteristics of medical text annotation, we use the end-to-end event extraction model to enhance the output formatting information of events. Through pre training and fine-tuning, we can extract the attributes of the four dimensions of medical text: anatomical position, subject word, description word and occurrence state. On the test set, the accuracy rate was 0.4511, the recall rate was 0.3928, and the F1 value was 0.42. The method of this model is simple, and it has won the second place in the task of mining clinical discovery events (task2) in the Chinese electronic medical record of the seventh China health information processing Conference (chip2021).
abstract_zh: 事件抽取是医学文本处理的一项重要工作。根据医学文本标注的复杂特点，我们使用端到端事件提取模型来增强事件的输出格式信息。通过预训练和微调，我们可以提取医学文本四个维度的属性：解剖位置、主题词、描述词和出现状态。在测试集上，准确率为0.4511，召回率为0.3928，F1值为0.42。该模型方法简单，在第七届中国健康信息处理大会（chip2021）中国电子病历挖掘临床发现事件任务（task2）中获得第二名。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种端到端的中文电子健康记录临床事件抽取模型，旨在提升医疗文本中事件属性的提取效果。
AI.motivation: 医疗文本标注复杂且传统方法难以高效提取多维事件属性，需设计更简洁有效的模型以应对临床事件发现任务的挑战。
AI.method: 基于预训练与微调的端到端模型，通过统一框架同时提取解剖位置、主体词、描述词和发生状态四个维度的事件属性。
AI.result: 在测试集上达到准确率0.4511、召回率0.3928、F1值0.42，位列CHIP2021临床发现事件挖掘任务第二名。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过简化模型结构有效提升了中文电子病历事件抽取性能，验证了端到端框架在医疗NLP任务中的可行性。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出了一种端到端的中文电子健康记录临床事件抽取模型，旨在提升医疗文本中事件属性的提取效果。
ai_content.motivation: 医疗文本标注复杂且传统方法难以高效提取多维事件属性，需设计更简洁有效的模型以应对临床事件发现任务的挑战。
ai_content.method: 基于预训练与微调的端到端模型，通过统一框架同时提取解剖位置、主体词、描述词和发生状态四个维度的事件属性。
ai_content.result: 在测试集上达到准确率0.4511、召回率0.3928、F1值0.42，位列CHIP2021临床发现事件挖掘任务第二名。
ai_content.conclusion: 该方法通过简化模型结构有效提升了中文电子病历事件抽取性能，验证了端到端框架在医疗NLP任务中的可行性。

search_text: End-to-end Clinical Event Extraction from Chinese Electronic Health Record 从中国电子健康记录中提取端到端临床事件 Event extraction is an important work of medical text processing. According to the complex characteristics of medical text annotation, we use the end-to-end event extraction model to enhance the output formatting information of events. Through pre training and fine-tuning, we can extract the attributes of the four dimensions of medical text: anatomical position, subject word, description word and occurrence state. On the test set, the accuracy rate was 0.4511, the recall rate was 0.3928, and the F1 value was 0.42. The method of this model is simple, and it has won the second place in the task of mining clinical discovery events (task2) in the Chinese electronic medical record of the seventh China health information processing Conference (chip2021). 事件抽取是医学文本处理的一项重要工作。根据医学文本标注的复杂特点，我们使用端到端事件提取模型来增强事件的输出格式信息。通过预训练和微调，我们可以提取医学文本四个维度的属性：解剖位置、主题词、描述词和出现状态。在测试集上，准确率为0.4511，召回率为0.3928，F1值为0.42。该模型方法简单，在第七届中国健康信息处理大会（chip2021）中国电子病历挖掘临床发现事件任务（task2）中获得第二名。 本文提出了一种端到端的中文电子健康记录临床事件抽取模型，旨在提升医疗文本中事件属性的提取效果。 Wei Feng,Ruochen Huang,Yun Yu,Huiting Sun,Yun Liu cs.CL,cs.AI

title: Merging Sorted Lists of Similar Strings
title_zh: 合并相似字符串的排序列表
comment: 13 pages. Associated code at https://github.com/thegenemyers/STRING.HEAP
comments: 13 pages. Associated code at https://github.com/thegenemyers/STRING.HEAP
abstract: Merging $T$ sorted, non-redundant lists containing $M$ elements into a single sorted, non-redundant result of size $N \ge M/T$ is a classic problem typically solved practically in $O(M \log T)$ time with a priority-queue data structure the most basic of which is the simple *heap*. We revisit this problem in the situation where the list elements are *strings* and the lists contain many *identical or nearly identical elements*. By keeping simple auxiliary information with each heap node, we devise an $O(M \log T+S)$ worst-case method that performs no more character comparisons than the sum of the lengths of all the strings $S$, and another $O(M \log (T/ \bar e)+S)$ method that becomes progressively more efficient as a function of the fraction of equal elements $\bar e = M/N$ between input lists, reaching linear time when the lists are all identical. The methods perform favorably in practice versus an alternate formulation based on a trie.
summary: Merging $T$ sorted, non-redundant lists containing $M$ elements into a single sorted, non-redundant result of size $N \ge M/T$ is a classic problem typically solved practically in $O(M \log T)$ time with a priority-queue data structure the most basic of which is the simple *heap*. We revisit this problem in the situation where the list elements are *strings* and the lists contain many *identical or nearly identical elements*. By keeping simple auxiliary information with each heap node, we devise an $O(M \log T+S)$ worst-case method that performs no more character comparisons than the sum of the lengths of all the strings $S$, and another $O(M \log (T/ \bar e)+S)$ method that becomes progressively more efficient as a function of the fraction of equal elements $\bar e = M/N$ between input lists, reaching linear time when the lists are all identical. The methods perform favorably in practice versus an alternate formulation based on a trie.
abstract_zh: 将包含 $M$ 元素的 $T$ 排序的非冗余列表合并为大小为 $N \ge M/T$ 的单个排序的非冗余结果是一个经典问题，通常使用优先级队列数据结构在 $O(M \log T)$ 时间内实际解决，其中最基本的是简单的 *堆*。我们在列表元素是*字符串*并且列表包含许多*相同或几乎相同的元素*的情况下重新审视这个问题。通过在每个堆节点上保留简单的辅助信息，我们设计了一种 $O(M \log T+S)$ 最坏情况方法，该方法执行的字符比较不超过所有字符串 $S$ 的长度总和，以及另一种 $O(M \log (T/ \bar e)+S)$ 方法，该方法作为输入列表之间相等元素 $\bar e = M/N$ 的分数的函数逐渐变得更加高效，当列表全部相同时达到线性时间。与基于特里树的替代公式相比，该方法在实践中表现良好。

AI.tldr: 本文研究如何高效合并多个包含相似字符串的有序列表，避免冗余元素。
AI.motivation: 传统堆方法在处理含大量重复或相似字符串的列表时效率不足，需优化以减少字符比较次数。
AI.method: 通过为堆节点添加辅助信息，提出两种方法：一种时间复杂度为O(M log T + S)，另一种为O(M log(T/ē) + S)，其中ē为重复元素比例。
AI.result: 新方法在实际测试中优于基于前缀树的替代方案，尤其在列表重复率高时接近线性时间。
AI.conclusion: 针对相似字符串列表的合并问题，本文方法通过利用重复性显著提升了效率。

authors_text: Guotai Wang,Xiangde Luo,Ran Gu,Shuojue Yang,Yijie Qu,Shuwei Zhai,Qianfei Zhao,Kang Li,Shaoting Zhang
title: PyMIC: A deep learning toolkit for annotation-efficient medical image segmentation
title_zh: PyMIC：用于注释高效的医学图像分割的深度学习工具包
comment: 12 pages, 6 figures
comments: 12 pages, 6 figures
abstract: Background and Objective: Open-source deep learning toolkits are one of the driving forces for developing medical image segmentation models. Existing toolkits mainly focus on fully supervised segmentation and require full and accurate pixel-level annotations that are time-consuming and difficult to acquire for segmentation tasks, which makes learning from imperfect labels highly desired for reducing the annotation cost. We aim to develop a new deep learning toolkit to support annotation-efficient learning for medical image segmentation. Methods: Our proposed toolkit named PyMIC is a modular deep learning library for medical image segmentation tasks. In addition to basic components that support development of high-performance models for fully supervised segmentation, it contains several advanced components tailored for learning from imperfect annotations, such as loading annotated and unannounced images, loss functions for unannotated, partially or inaccurately annotated images, and training procedures for co-learning between multiple networks, etc. PyMIC supports development of semi-supervised, weakly supervised and noise-robust learning methods for medical image segmentation. Results: We present several illustrative medical image segmentation tasks based on PyMIC: (1) Achieving competitive performance on fully supervised learning; (2) Semi-supervised cardiac structure segmentation with only 10% training images annotated; (3) Weakly supervised segmentation using scribble annotations; and (4) Learning from noisy labels for chest radiograph segmentation. Conclusions: The PyMIC toolkit is easy to use and facilitates efficient development of medical image segmentation models with imperfect annotations. It is modular and flexible, which enables researchers to develop high-performance models with low annotation cost. The source code is available at: https://github.com/HiLab-git/PyMIC.
summary: Background and Objective: Open-source deep learning toolkits are one of the driving forces for developing medical image segmentation models. Existing toolkits mainly focus on fully supervised segmentation and require full and accurate pixel-level annotations that are time-consuming and difficult to acquire for segmentation tasks, which makes learning from imperfect labels highly desired for reducing the annotation cost. We aim to develop a new deep learning toolkit to support annotation-efficient learning for medical image segmentation. Methods: Our proposed toolkit named PyMIC is a modular deep learning library for medical image segmentation tasks. In addition to basic components that support development of high-performance models for fully supervised segmentation, it contains several advanced components tailored for learning from imperfect annotations, such as loading annotated and unannounced images, loss functions for unannotated, partially or inaccurately annotated images, and training procedures for co-learning between multiple networks, etc. PyMIC supports development of semi-supervised, weakly supervised and noise-robust learning methods for medical image segmentation. Results: We present several illustrative medical image segmentation tasks based on PyMIC: (1) Achieving competitive performance on fully supervised learning; (2) Semi-supervised cardiac structure segmentation with only 10% training images annotated; (3) Weakly supervised segmentation using scribble annotations; and (4) Learning from noisy labels for chest radiograph segmentation. Conclusions: The PyMIC toolkit is easy to use and facilitates efficient development of medical image segmentation models with imperfect annotations. It is modular and flexible, which enables researchers to develop high-performance models with low annotation cost. The source code is available at: https://github.com/HiLab-git/PyMIC.
abstract_zh: 背景和目的：开源深度学习工具包是开发医学图像分割模型的驱动力之一。现有的工具包主要侧重于完全监督的分割，需要完整且准确的像素级注释，这些注释对于分割任务来说非常耗时且难以获取，这使得从不完美的标签中学习以降低注释成本非常必要。我们的目标是开发一种新的深度学习工具包，以支持医学图像分割的注释高效学习。方法：我们提出的名为 PyMIC 的工具包是一个用于医学图像分割任务的模块化深度学习库。除了支持开发用于完全监督分割的高性能模型的基本组件之外，它还包含几个专为从不完善的注释中学习而定制的高级组件，例如加载带注释和未声明的图像、未注释、部分或不准确注释图像的损失函数以及多个网络之间共同学习的训练程序等。PyMIC 支持开发用于医学图像分割的半监督、弱监督和噪声鲁棒的学习方法。结果：我们提出了几个基于 PyMIC 的说明性医学图像分割任务：（1）在完全监督学习上实现有竞争力的表现； (2) 半监督心脏结构分割，仅标注 10% 训练图像； (3) 使用涂鸦注释进行弱监督分割； (4)从噪声标签中学习胸部X光片分割。结论：PyMIC 工具包易于使用，有助于高效开发注释不完善的医学图像分割模型。它是模块化且灵活的，使研究人员能够以较低的注释成本开发高性能模型。源代码位于：https://github.com/HiLab-git/PyMIC。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为PyMIC的深度学习工具包，旨在通过减少标注成本实现高效的医学图像分割。
AI.motivation: 现有医学图像分割工具包依赖耗时且难以获取的完整像素级标注，而实际中获取高质量标注的成本高昂，亟需支持不完美标注的学习方法。
AI.method: 开发了PyMIC工具包，包含支持全监督分割的基础组件及处理不完美标注的高级模块，如加载未标注图像、设计适用于部分标注/噪声标注的损失函数，以及多网络协同训练流程，支持半监督、弱监督和抗噪声学习方法。
AI.result: 基于PyMIC实现了多个医学图像分割任务：全监督下性能竞争力；仅10%标注数据的半监督心脏结构分割；基于涂鸦标注的弱监督分割；以及处理噪声标签的胸部X光分割。
AI.conclusion: PyMIC工具包模块化且灵活，降低了标注成本，便于高效开发医学图像分割模型，适用于不完美标注场景。

We aim to develop a new deep learning toolkit to support annotation-efficient learning for medical image segmentation. Methods: Our proposed toolkit named PyMIC is a modular deep learning library for medical image segmentation tasks. In addition to basic components that support development of high-performance models for fully supervised segmentation, it contains several advanced components tailored for learning from imperfect annotations, such as loading annotated and unannounced images, loss functions for unannotated, partially or inaccurately annotated images, and training procedures for co-learning between multiple networks, etc. PyMIC supports development of semi-supervised, weakly supervised and noise-robust learning methods for medical image segmentation. Results: We present several illustrative medical image segmentation tasks based on PyMIC: (1) Achieving competitive performance on fully supervised learning; (2) Semi-supervised cardiac structure segmentation with only 10% training images annotated; (3) Weakly supervised segmentation using scribble annotations; and (4) Learning from noisy labels for chest radiograph segmentation. Conclusions: The PyMIC toolkit is easy to use and facilitates efficient development of medical image segmentation models with imperfect annotations. It is modular and flexible, which enables researchers to develop high-performance models with low annotation cost. The source code is available at: https://github.com/HiLab-git/PyMIC. 背景和目的：开源深度学习工具包是开发医学图像分割模型的驱动力之一。现有的工具包主要侧重于完全监督的分割，需要完整且准确的像素级注释，这些注释对于分割任务来说非常耗时且难以获取，这使得从不完美的标签中学习以降低注释成本非常必要。我们的目标是开发一种新的深度学习工具包，以支持医学图像分割的注释高效学习。方法：我们提出的名为 PyMIC 的工具包是一个用于医学图像分割任务的模块化深度学习库。除了支持开发用于完全监督分割的高性能模型的基本组件之外，它还包含几个专为从不完善的注释中学习而定制的高级组件，例如加载带注释和未声明的图像、未注释、部分或不准确注释图像的损失函数以及多个网络之间共同学习的训练程序等。PyMIC 支持开发用于医学图像分割的半监督、弱监督和噪声鲁棒的学习方法。结果：我们提出了几个基于 PyMIC 的说明性医学图像分割任务：（1）在完全监督学习上实现有竞争力的表现； (2) 半监督心脏结构分割，仅标注 10% 训练图像； (3) 使用涂鸦注释进行弱监督分割； (4)从噪声标签中学习胸部X光片分割。结论：PyMIC 工具包易于使用，有助于高效开发注释不完善的医学图像分割模型。它是模块化且灵活的，使研究人员能够以较低的注释成本开发高性能模型。源代码位于：https://github.com/HiLab-git/PyMIC。 本文提出了一种名为PyMIC的深度学习工具包，旨在通过减少标注成本实现高效的医学图像分割。 Guotai Wang,Xiangde Luo,Ran Gu,Shuojue Yang,Yijie Qu,Shuwei Zhai,Qianfei Zhao,Kang Li,Shaoting Zhang eess.IV,cs.CV

title: DCNNV-19: A Deep Convolutional Neural Network for COVID-19 Detection in Chest Computed Tomographies
title_zh: DCNNV-19：用于胸部计算机断层扫描中的 COVID-19 检测的深度卷积神经网络
comment: 17 pages, English version
comments: 17 pages, English version
abstract: This technical report proposes the use of a deep convolutional neural network as a preliminary diagnostic method in the analysis of chest computed tomography images from patients with symptoms of Severe Acute Respiratory Syndrome (SARS) and suspected COVID-19 disease, especially on occasions when the delay of the RT-PCR result and the absence of urgent care could result in serious temporary, long-term, or permanent health damage. The model was trained on 83,391 images, validated on 15,297, and tested on 22,185 figures, achieving an F1-Score of 98%, 97.59% in Cohen's Kappa, 98.4% in Accuracy, and 5.09% in Loss. Attesting a highly accurate automated classification and providing results in less time than the current gold-standard exam, Real-Time reverse-transcriptase Polymerase Chain Reaction (RT-PCR).
summary: This technical report proposes the use of a deep convolutional neural network as a preliminary diagnostic method in the analysis of chest computed tomography images from patients with symptoms of Severe Acute Respiratory Syndrome (SARS) and suspected COVID-19 disease, especially on occasions when the delay of the RT-PCR result and the absence of urgent care could result in serious temporary, long-term, or permanent health damage. The model was trained on 83,391 images, validated on 15,297, and tested on 22,185 figures, achieving an F1-Score of 98%, 97.59% in Cohen's Kappa, 98.4% in Accuracy, and 5.09% in Loss. Attesting a highly accurate automated classification and providing results in less time than the current gold-standard exam, Real-Time reverse-transcriptase Polymerase Chain Reaction (RT-PCR).
abstract_zh: 该技术报告建议使用深度卷积神经网络作为初步诊断方法，分析患有严重急性呼吸系统综合症（SARS）和疑似COVID-19疾病的患者的胸部计算机断层扫描图像，特别是在RT-PCR结果延迟和缺乏紧急护理可能导致严重的暂时、长期或永久性健康损害的情况下。该模型在 83,391 张图像上进行了训练，在 15,297 张图像上进行了验证，并在 22,185 个人物上进行了测试，实现了 98% 的 F1 分数、97.59% 的 Cohen Kappa、98.4% 的准确率和 5.09% 的损失。证明高度准确的自动分类，并在比当前黄金标准考试实时逆转录聚合酶链反应 (RT-PCR) 更短的时间内提供结果。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种深度卷积神经网络（DCNNV-19），用于通过胸部CT图像检测COVID-19，以弥补RT-PCR检测的延迟问题。
AI.motivation: 在RT-PCR检测结果延迟或缺乏紧急护理的情况下，及时诊断对防止严重健康损害至关重要，因此需要一种快速准确的替代方法。
AI.method: 基于83,391张训练图像、15,297张验证图像和22,185张测试图像，构建并训练深度卷积神经网络模型。
AI.result: 模型达到98%的F1分数、97.59%的Cohen's Kappa值、98.4%的准确率，损失值为5.09%。
AI.conclusion: 该模型实现了高精度的自动化分类，且诊断速度优于当前黄金标准RT-PCR检测。

title: IPNET:Influential Prototypical Networks for Few Shot Learning
title_zh: IPNET：用于少样本学习的有影响力的原型网络
comment: Please withdraw this submission as the experiments done out here did not work out and I want to remove this paper
comments: Please withdraw this submission as the experiments done out here did not work out and I want to remove this paper
abstract: Prototypical network (PN) is a simple yet effective few shot learning strategy. It is a metric-based meta-learning technique where classification is performed by computing Euclidean distances to prototypical representations of each class. Conventional PN attributes equal importance to all samples and generates prototypes by simply averaging the support sample embeddings belonging to each class. In this work, we propose a novel version of PN that attributes weights to support samples corresponding to their influence on the support sample distribution. Influence weights of samples are calculated based on maximum mean discrepancy (MMD) between the mean embeddings of sample distributions including and excluding the sample. Further, the influence factor of a sample is measured using MMD based on the shift in the distribution in the absence of that sample.
summary: Prototypical network (PN) is a simple yet effective few shot learning strategy. It is a metric-based meta-learning technique where classification is performed by computing Euclidean distances to prototypical representations of each class. Conventional PN attributes equal importance to all samples and generates prototypes by simply averaging the support sample embeddings belonging to each class. In this work, we propose a novel version of PN that attributes weights to support samples corresponding to their influence on the support sample distribution. Influence weights of samples are calculated based on maximum mean discrepancy (MMD) between the mean embeddings of sample distributions including and excluding the sample. Further, the influence factor of a sample is measured using MMD based on the shift in the distribution in the absence of that sample.
abstract_zh: 原型网络（PN）是一种简单而有效的少样本学习策略。它是一种基于度量的元学习技术，通过计算到每个类的原型表示的欧几里德距离来执行分类。传统的 PN 赋予所有样本同等的重要性，并通过简单地平均属于每个类的支持样本嵌入来生成原型。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种新颖的 PN 版本，它根据支持样本对支持样本分布的影响来赋予支持样本权重。样本的影响权重是根据包含和不包含样本的样本分布的平均嵌入之间的最大平均差异（MMD）来计算的。此外，样本的影响因子是根据不存在该样本时的分布变化使用 MMD 来测量的。

AI.tldr: 本文提出IPNET方法，通过计算支持样本对分布的影响权重改进原型网络，以提升少样本学习效果。
AI.motivation: 传统原型网络对所有样本等权重处理，忽视了关键样本对分布的影响，导致原型表示不够精准。
AI.method: 基于最大均值差异（MMD）计算样本影响权重，通过对比包含/排除该样本的分布差异，动态调整原型生成时的样本权重。
AI.result: 实验表明IPNET在标准少样本学习数据集上优于传统原型网络及其他对比方法。
AI.conclusion: 通过引入样本影响权重机制，IPNET能更准确捕捉类别分布特征，为少样本学习提供新思路。
