title: A note on incorrect inferences in non-binary qualitative probabilistic networks
title_zh: 关于非二元定性概率网络中错误推理的说明
comment: 11 pages, 3 figures
comments: 11 pages, 3 figures
abstract: Qualitative probabilistic networks (QPNs) combine the conditional independence assumptions of Bayesian networks with the qualitative properties of positive and negative dependence. They formalise various intuitive properties of positive dependence to allow inferences over a large network of variables. However, we will demonstrate in this paper that, due to an incorrect symmetry property, many inferences obtained in non-binary QPNs are not mathematically true. We will provide examples of such incorrect inferences and briefly discuss possible resolutions.
summary: Qualitative probabilistic networks (QPNs) combine the conditional independence assumptions of Bayesian networks with the qualitative properties of positive and negative dependence. They formalise various intuitive properties of positive dependence to allow inferences over a large network of variables. However, we will demonstrate in this paper that, due to an incorrect symmetry property, many inferences obtained in non-binary QPNs are not mathematically true. We will provide examples of such incorrect inferences and briefly discuss possible resolutions.
abstract_zh: 定性概率网络 (QPN) 将贝叶斯网络的条件独立性假设与正相关性和负相关性的定性特性相结合。他们将正相关的各种直观属性形式化，以允许对大型变量网络进行推断。然而，我们将在本文中证明，由于不正确的对称性，在非二元 QPN 中获得的许多推论在数学上并不正确。我们将提供此类错误推论的示例，并简要讨论可能的解决方案。

AI.tldr: 本文指出非二元定性概率网络（QPNs）中由于对称性属性错误导致的推理问题，并探讨可能的解决方案。
AI.motivation: 现有非二元QPNs的对称性属性存在缺陷，导致推理结果不准确，需修正以提升可靠性。
AI.method: 通过具体例子展示错误推理，并简要讨论可能的修正方法。
AI.result: 证明了非二元QPNs中因对称性错误导致的推理不准确，并提供了修正案例。
AI.conclusion: 需修正非二元QPNs的对称性属性，以确保推理的数学正确性。

search_text: A note on incorrect inferences in non-binary qualitative probabilistic networks 关于非二元定性概率网络中错误推理的说明 Qualitative probabilistic networks (QPNs) combine the conditional independence assumptions of Bayesian networks with the qualitative properties of positive and negative dependence. They formalise various intuitive properties of positive dependence to allow inferences over a large network of variables. However, we will demonstrate in this paper that, due to an incorrect symmetry property, many inferences obtained in non-binary QPNs are not mathematically true. We will provide examples of such incorrect inferences and briefly discuss possible resolutions. 定性概率网络 (QPN) 将贝叶斯网络的条件独立性假设与正相关性和负相关性的定性特性相结合。他们将正相关的各种直观属性形式化，以允许对大型变量网络进行推断。然而，我们将在本文中证明，由于不正确的对称性，在非二元 QPN 中获得的许多推论在数学上并不正确。我们将提供此类错误推论的示例，并简要讨论可能的解决方案。 本文指出非二元定性概率网络（QPNs）中由于对称性属性错误导致的推理问题，并探讨可能的解决方案。 Jack Storror Carter cs.AI,math.ST,stat.ME

title: Evaluating Explainability for Graph Neural Networks
title_zh: 评估图神经网络的可解释性
abstract: As post hoc explanations are increasingly used to understand the behavior of graph neural networks (GNNs), it becomes crucial to evaluate the quality and reliability of GNN explanations. However, assessing the quality of GNN explanations is challenging as existing graph datasets have no or unreliable ground-truth explanations for a given task. Here, we introduce a synthetic graph data generator, ShapeGGen, which can generate a variety of benchmark datasets (e.g., varying graph sizes, degree distributions, homophilic vs. heterophilic graphs) accompanied by ground-truth explanations. Further, the flexibility to generate diverse synthetic datasets and corresponding ground-truth explanations allows us to mimic the data generated by various real-world applications. We include ShapeGGen and several real-world graph datasets into an open-source graph explainability library, GraphXAI. In addition to synthetic and real-world graph datasets with ground-truth explanations, GraphXAI provides data loaders, data processing functions, visualizers, GNN model implementations, and evaluation metrics to benchmark the performance of GNN explainability methods.
summary: As post hoc explanations are increasingly used to understand the behavior of graph neural networks (GNNs), it becomes crucial to evaluate the quality and reliability of GNN explanations. However, assessing the quality of GNN explanations is challenging as existing graph datasets have no or unreliable ground-truth explanations for a given task. Here, we introduce a synthetic graph data generator, ShapeGGen, which can generate a variety of benchmark datasets (e.g., varying graph sizes, degree distributions, homophilic vs. heterophilic graphs) accompanied by ground-truth explanations. Further, the flexibility to generate diverse synthetic datasets and corresponding ground-truth explanations allows us to mimic the data generated by various real-world applications. We include ShapeGGen and several real-world graph datasets into an open-source graph explainability library, GraphXAI. In addition to synthetic and real-world graph datasets with ground-truth explanations, GraphXAI provides data loaders, data processing functions, visualizers, GNN model implementations, and evaluation metrics to benchmark the performance of GNN explainability methods.
abstract_zh: 随着事后解释越来越多地用于理解图神经网络 (GNN) 的行为，评估 GNN 解释的质量和可靠性变得至关重要。然而，评估 GNN 解释的质量具有挑战性，因为现有的图数据集对于给定任务没有或不可靠的真实解释。在这里，我们介绍了一个合成图数据生成器 ShapeGGen，它可以生成各种基准数据集（例如，不同的图大小、度分布、同质图与异质图）并附有真实解释。此外，生成各种合成数据集和相应的真实解释的灵活性使我们能够模仿各种现实世界应用程序生成的数据。我们将 ShapeGGen 和几个现实世界的图形数据集纳入开源图形可解释性库 GraphXAI 中。除了具有真实解释的合成和真实世界图形数据集之外，GraphXAI 还提供数据加载器、数据处理函数、可视化工具、GNN 模型实现和评估指标，以对 GNN 可解释性方法的性能进行基准测试。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种合成图数据生成器ShapeGGen和开源库GraphXAI，用于评估图神经网络（GNN）解释方法的质量和可靠性。
AI.motivation: 现有图数据集缺乏可靠的真实解释标签，导致难以有效评估GNN解释方法的质量。
AI.method: 开发ShapeGGen生成包含真实解释的合成图数据集，并整合至GraphXAI库，提供数据加载、可视化、模型实现及评估指标。
AI.result: 构建了支持多种图结构和解释类型的基准数据集，为GNN解释方法提供了系统化的评估框架。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过合成数据与真实数据结合，为提升GNN可解释性研究提供了灵活可靠的实验平台。

authors_text: Yulong Wang,Minghui Zhao,Shenghong Li,Xin Yuan,Wei Ni
title: Dispersed Pixel Perturbation-based Imperceptible Backdoor Trigger for Image Classifier Models
title_zh: 基于分散像素扰动的图像分类器模型不可察觉的后门触发器
abstract: Typical deep neural network (DNN) backdoor attacks are based on triggers embedded in inputs. Existing imperceptible triggers are computationally expensive or low in attack success. In this paper, we propose a new backdoor trigger, which is easy to generate, imperceptible, and highly effective. The new trigger is a uniformly randomly generated three-dimensional (3D) binary pattern that can be horizontally and/or vertically repeated and mirrored and superposed onto three-channel images for training a backdoored DNN model. Dispersed throughout an image, the new trigger produces weak perturbation to individual pixels, but collectively holds a strong recognizable pattern to train and activate the backdoor of the DNN. We also analytically reveal that the trigger is increasingly effective with the improving resolution of the images. Experiments are conducted using the ResNet-18 and MLP models on the MNIST, CIFAR-10, and BTSR datasets. In terms of imperceptibility, the new trigger outperforms existing triggers, such as BadNets, Trojaned NN, and Hidden Backdoor, by over an order of magnitude. The new trigger achieves an almost 100% attack success rate, only reduces the classification accuracy by less than 0.7%-2.4%, and invalidates the state-of-the-art defense techniques.
summary: Typical deep neural network (DNN) backdoor attacks are based on triggers embedded in inputs. Existing imperceptible triggers are computationally expensive or low in attack success. In this paper, we propose a new backdoor trigger, which is easy to generate, imperceptible, and highly effective. The new trigger is a uniformly randomly generated three-dimensional (3D) binary pattern that can be horizontally and/or vertically repeated and mirrored and superposed onto three-channel images for training a backdoored DNN model. Dispersed throughout an image, the new trigger produces weak perturbation to individual pixels, but collectively holds a strong recognizable pattern to train and activate the backdoor of the DNN. We also analytically reveal that the trigger is increasingly effective with the improving resolution of the images. Experiments are conducted using the ResNet-18 and MLP models on the MNIST, CIFAR-10, and BTSR datasets. In terms of imperceptibility, the new trigger outperforms existing triggers, such as BadNets, Trojaned NN, and Hidden Backdoor, by over an order of magnitude. The new trigger achieves an almost 100% attack success rate, only reduces the classification accuracy by less than 0.7%-2.4%, and invalidates the state-of-the-art defense techniques.
abstract_zh: 典型的深度神经网络 (DNN) 后门攻击基于嵌入在输入中的触发器。现有的难以察觉的触发器的计算成本很高，或者攻击成功率很低。在本文中，我们提出了一种新的后门触发器，它易于生成、不易察觉且高效。新的触发器是均匀随机生成的三维 (3D) 二进制模式，可以水平和/或垂直重复、镜像并叠加到三通道图像上，用于训练后门 DNN 模型。新的触发器分散在整个图像中，对各个像素产生微弱的扰动，但总体上具有很强的可识别模式来训练和激活 DNN 的后门。我们还通过分析发现，随着图像分辨率的提高，触发器越来越有效。使用 ResNet-18 和 MLP 模型在 MNIST、CIFAR-10 和 BTSR 数据集上进行实验。在不可察觉性方面，新触发器的性能优于现有触发器（例如 BadNets、Trojaned NN 和 Hidden Backdoor）一个数量级以上。新的触发器实现了几乎100%的攻击成功率，仅使分类精度降低了不到0.7%-2.4%，并使最先进的防御技术失效。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于分散像素扰动的不可察觉后门触发器，用于图像分类模型。
AI.motivation: 现有的不可察觉后门触发器在计算成本或攻击成功率方面存在不足，因此需要一种更高效且难以察觉的触发器。
AI.method: 该触发器是一种三维二进制模式，通过水平和/或垂直重复、镜像并叠加到三通道图像上，以产生微弱的像素扰动，但整体具有可识别的模式，用于训练和激活后门。
AI.result: 新触发器在不可察觉性方面优于现有方法，攻击成功率接近100%，仅轻微降低分类准确率，并能无效化最先进的防御技术。
AI.conclusion: 该方法提供了一种高效、不可察觉且强大的后门攻击方式，适用于多种图像分类模型。

title: Text to Image Generation: Leaving no Language Behind
title_zh: 文本到图像生成：不遗漏任何语言
abstract: One of the latest applications of Artificial Intelligence (AI) is to generate images from natural language descriptions. These generators are now becoming available and achieve impressive results that have been used for example in the front cover of magazines. As the input to the generators is in the form of a natural language text, a question that arises immediately is how these models behave when the input is written in different languages. In this paper we perform an initial exploration of how the performance of three popular text-to-image generators depends on the language. The results show that there is a significant performance degradation when using languages other than English, especially for languages that are not widely used. This observation leads us to discuss different alternatives on how text-to-image generators can be improved so that performance is consistent across different languages. This is fundamental to ensure that this new technology can be used by non-native English speakers and to preserve linguistic diversity.
summary: One of the latest applications of Artificial Intelligence (AI) is to generate images from natural language descriptions. These generators are now becoming available and achieve impressive results that have been used for example in the front cover of magazines. As the input to the generators is in the form of a natural language text, a question that arises immediately is how these models behave when the input is written in different languages. In this paper we perform an initial exploration of how the performance of three popular text-to-image generators depends on the language. The results show that there is a significant performance degradation when using languages other than English, especially for languages that are not widely used. This observation leads us to discuss different alternatives on how text-to-image generators can be improved so that performance is consistent across different languages. This is fundamental to ensure that this new technology can be used by non-native English speakers and to preserve linguistic diversity.
abstract_zh: 人工智能（AI）的最新应用之一是根据自然语言描述生成图像。这些生成器现已上市，并取得了令人印象深刻的效果，例如已用于杂志封面。由于生成器的输入采用自然语言文本的形式，因此立即出现的一个问题是，当输入以不同语言编写时，这些模型的行为如何。在本文中，我们对三种流行的文本到图像生成器的性能如何取决于语言进行了初步探索。结果表明，使用英语以外的语言时，尤其是使用不广泛的语言时，性能会显着下降。这一观察结果引导我们讨论如何改进文本到图像生成器的不同替代方案，以使不同语言的性能保持一致。这是确保非英语母语人士可以使用这项新技术并保持语言多样性的基础。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了文本到图像生成模型在不同语言输入下的性能表现，发现非英语尤其是低资源语言存在显著性能下降问题。
AI.motivation: 确保非英语使用者能平等使用该技术并保护语言多样性，是推动AI技术普惠的重要前提。
AI.method: 对三种主流文本到图像生成模型进行多语言测试，使用不同语言的文本输入评估生成质量。
AI.result: 实验表明除英语外其他语言（尤其是低资源语言）的生成效果存在显著性能退化。
AI.conclusion: 需通过模型改进实现跨语言性能一致性，才能保障技术公平性与语言多样性保护。

search_text: Text to Image Generation: Leaving no Language Behind 文本到图像生成：不遗漏任何语言 One of the latest applications of Artificial Intelligence (AI) is to generate images from natural language descriptions. These generators are now becoming available and achieve impressive results that have been used for example in the front cover of magazines. As the input to the generators is in the form of a natural language text, a question that arises immediately is how these models behave when the input is written in different languages. In this paper we perform an initial exploration of how the performance of three popular text-to-image generators depends on the language. The results show that there is a significant performance degradation when using languages other than English, especially for languages that are not widely used. This observation leads us to discuss different alternatives on how text-to-image generators can be improved so that performance is consistent across different languages. This is fundamental to ensure that this new technology can be used by non-native English speakers and to preserve linguistic diversity. 人工智能（AI）的最新应用之一是根据自然语言描述生成图像。这些生成器现已上市，并取得了令人印象深刻的效果，例如已用于杂志封面。由于生成器的输入采用自然语言文本的形式，因此立即出现的一个问题是，当输入以不同语言编写时，这些模型的行为如何。在本文中，我们对三种流行的文本到图像生成器的性能如何取决于语言进行了初步探索。结果表明，使用英语以外的语言时，尤其是使用不广泛的语言时，性能会显着下降。这一观察结果引导我们讨论如何改进文本到图像生成器的不同替代方案，以使不同语言的性能保持一致。这是确保非英语母语人士可以使用这项新技术并保持语言多样性的基础。 本文研究了文本到图像生成模型在不同语言输入下的性能表现，发现非英语尤其是低资源语言存在显著性能下降问题。 Pedro Reviriego,Elena Merino-Gómez cs.CL,cs.AI,cs.CV

title: Low-light Enhancement Method Based on Attention Map Net
title_zh: 基于注意力图网络的弱光增强方法
comment: This paper contains some errors in the analysis presented in the introduction section, such as misunderstanding some of the improved methods in comparison to traditional methods like histogram equalization. These errors have impacted the quality and reliability of my research, and could potentially mislead readers and colleagues
comments: This paper contains some errors in the analysis presented in the introduction section, such as misunderstanding some of the improved methods in comparison to traditional methods like histogram equalization. These errors have impacted the quality and reliability of my research, and could potentially mislead readers and colleagues
abstract: Low-light image enhancement is a crucial preprocessing task for some complex vision tasks. Target detection, image segmentation, and image recognition outcomes are all directly impacted by the impact of image enhancement. However, the majority of the currently used image enhancement techniques do not produce satisfactory outcomes, and these enhanced networks have relatively weak robustness. We suggest an improved network called BrightenNet that uses U-Net as its primary structure and incorporates a number of different attention mechanisms as a solution to this issue. In a specific application, we employ the network as the generator and LSGAN as the training framework to achieve better enhancement results. We demonstrate the validity of the proposed network BrightenNet in the experiments that follow in this paper. The results it produced can both preserve image details and conform to human vision standards.
summary: Low-light image enhancement is a crucial preprocessing task for some complex vision tasks. Target detection, image segmentation, and image recognition outcomes are all directly impacted by the impact of image enhancement. However, the majority of the currently used image enhancement techniques do not produce satisfactory outcomes, and these enhanced networks have relatively weak robustness. We suggest an improved network called BrightenNet that uses U-Net as its primary structure and incorporates a number of different attention mechanisms as a solution to this issue. In a specific application, we employ the network as the generator and LSGAN as the training framework to achieve better enhancement results. We demonstrate the validity of the proposed network BrightenNet in the experiments that follow in this paper. The results it produced can both preserve image details and conform to human vision standards.
abstract_zh: 低光图像增强是一些复杂视觉任务的关键预处理任务。目标检测、图像分割和图像识别结果都直接受到图像增强的影响。然而，目前使用的大多数图像增强技术并没有产生令人满意的结果，并且这些增强网络的鲁棒性相对较弱。我们提出了一种名为 BrightenNet 的改进网络，它使用 U-Net 作为其主要结构，并结合了许多不同的注意力机制来解决这个问题。在具体应用中，我们采用网络作为生成器，LSGAN作为训练框架，以达到更好的增强效果。我们在本文接下来的实验中证明了所提出的网络 BrightenNet 的有效性。其产生的结果既可以保留图像细节，又符合人类视觉标准。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于注意力机制的低光照图像增强方法BrightenNet，结合U-Net结构和LSGAN训练框架提升增强效果。
AI.motivation: 现有图像增强技术存在增强效果不理想、网络鲁棒性不足的问题，影响后续视觉任务性能。
AI.method: 以U-Net为核心架构，融合多种注意力机制，并采用LSGAN作为生成器训练框架进行优化。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法能有效保留图像细节且符合人类视觉标准，验证了BrightenNet的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 通过注意力机制与LSGAN的结合，提出的BrightenNet在低光照增强任务中表现出优越性能。

authors_text: Siyin Wang,Jie Zhou,Changzhi Sun,Junjie Ye,Tao Gui,Qi Zhang,Xuanjing Huang
title: Causal Intervention Improves Implicit Sentiment Analysis
title_zh: 因果干预改善隐性情绪分析
abstract: Despite having achieved great success for sentiment analysis, existing neural models struggle with implicit sentiment analysis. This may be due to the fact that they may latch onto spurious correlations ("shortcuts", e.g., focusing only on explicit sentiment words), resulting in undermining the effectiveness and robustness of the learned model. In this work, we propose a causal intervention model for Implicit Sentiment Analysis using Instrumental Variable (ISAIV). We first review sentiment analysis from a causal perspective and analyze the confounders existing in this task. Then, we introduce an instrumental variable to eliminate the confounding causal effects, thus extracting the pure causal effect between sentence and sentiment. We compare the proposed ISAIV model with several strong baselines on both the general implicit sentiment analysis and aspect-based implicit sentiment analysis tasks. The results indicate the great advantages of our model and the efficacy of implicit sentiment reasoning.
summary: Despite having achieved great success for sentiment analysis, existing neural models struggle with implicit sentiment analysis. This may be due to the fact that they may latch onto spurious correlations ("shortcuts", e.g., focusing only on explicit sentiment words), resulting in undermining the effectiveness and robustness of the learned model. In this work, we propose a causal intervention model for Implicit Sentiment Analysis using Instrumental Variable (ISAIV). We first review sentiment analysis from a causal perspective and analyze the confounders existing in this task. Then, we introduce an instrumental variable to eliminate the confounding causal effects, thus extracting the pure causal effect between sentence and sentiment. We compare the proposed ISAIV model with several strong baselines on both the general implicit sentiment analysis and aspect-based implicit sentiment analysis tasks. The results indicate the great advantages of our model and the efficacy of implicit sentiment reasoning.
abstract_zh: 尽管在情感分析方面取得了巨大成功，但现有的神经模型在隐式情感分析方面仍存在困难。这可能是因为它们可能会抓住虚假的相关性（“捷径”，例如，只关注明确的情感词），从而破坏学习模型的有效性和鲁棒性。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种使用工具变量进行内隐情绪分析的因果干预模型（ISAIV）。我们首先从因果角度回顾情感分析，并分析该任务中存在的混杂因素。然后，我们引入一个工具变量来消除混杂的因果效应，从而提取句子和情感之间的纯因果效应。我们将所提出的 ISAIV 模型与一般隐式情感分析和基于方面的隐式情感分析任务的几个强基线进行比较。结果表明了我们的模型的巨大优势和隐式情感推理的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于因果干预的隐式情感分析模型ISAIV，通过消除混淆因素提升模型效果。
AI.motivation: 现有神经网络模型在隐式情感分析中依赖虚假相关性（如显式情感词），导致效果和鲁棒性不足。
AI.method: 从因果视角分析任务中的混淆因素，引入工具变量消除混杂因果效应，提取句子与情感间的纯因果关系。
AI.result: ISAIV在通用隐式情感分析和基于方面的情感分析任务中均优于多个强基线模型，验证了方法有效性。
AI.conclusion: 因果干预能显著提升隐式情感分析性能，未来可进一步探索因果推理在NLP任务中的应用潜力。

title: A Ptolemaic Partitioning Mechanism
title_zh: 托勒密分割机制
comment: submitted to SISAP 2022
comments: submitted to SISAP 2022
abstract: For many years, exact metric search relied upon the property of triangle inequality to give a lower bound on uncalculated distances. Two exclusion mechanisms derive from this property, generally known as pivot exclusion and hyperplane exclusion. These mechanisms work in any proper metric space and are the basis of many metric indexing mechanisms. More recently, the Ptolemaic and four-point lower bound properties have been shown to give tighter bounds in some subclasses of metric space. Both triangle inequality and the four-point lower bound directly imply straightforward partitioning mechanisms: that is, a method of dividing a finite space according to a fixed partition, in order that one or more classes of the partition can be eliminated from a search at query time. However, up to now, no partitioning principle has been identified for the Ptolemaic inequality, which has been used only as a filtering mechanism. Here, a novel partitioning mechanism for the Ptolemaic lower bound is presented. It is always better than either pivot or hyperplane partitioning. While the exclusion condition itself is weaker than Hilbert (four-point) exclusion, its calculation is cheaper. Furthermore, it can be combined with Hilbert exclusion to give a new maximum for exclusion power with respect to the number of distances measured per query.
summary: For many years, exact metric search relied upon the property of triangle inequality to give a lower bound on uncalculated distances. Two exclusion mechanisms derive from this property, generally known as pivot exclusion and hyperplane exclusion. These mechanisms work in any proper metric space and are the basis of many metric indexing mechanisms. More recently, the Ptolemaic and four-point lower bound properties have been shown to give tighter bounds in some subclasses of metric space. Both triangle inequality and the four-point lower bound directly imply straightforward partitioning mechanisms: that is, a method of dividing a finite space according to a fixed partition, in order that one or more classes of the partition can be eliminated from a search at query time. However, up to now, no partitioning principle has been identified for the Ptolemaic inequality, which has been used only as a filtering mechanism. Here, a novel partitioning mechanism for the Ptolemaic lower bound is presented. It is always better than either pivot or hyperplane partitioning. While the exclusion condition itself is weaker than Hilbert (four-point) exclusion, its calculation is cheaper. Furthermore, it can be combined with Hilbert exclusion to give a new maximum for exclusion power with respect to the number of distances measured per query.
abstract_zh: 多年来，精确度量搜索依赖于三角不等式的性质来给出未计算距离的下限。两种排除机制源自此属性，通常称为枢轴排除和超平面排除。这些机制适用于任何适当的度量空间，并且是许多度量索引机制的基础。最近，托勒密和四点下界性质已被证明可以在度量空间的某些子类中给出更严格的界限。三角形不等式和四点下界都直接暗示了简单的划分机制：即一种根据固定划分来划分有限空间的方法，以便可以在查询时从搜索中消除该划分的一个或多个类别。然而，迄今为止，托勒密不等式尚未确定划分原则，仅用作过滤机制。这里，提出了托勒密下界的一种新颖的划分机制。它总是比枢轴分区或超平面分区更好。虽然排除条件本身比希尔伯特（四点）排除弱，但其计算成本较低。此外，它可以与希尔伯特排除相结合，针对每个查询测量的距离数给出新的排除能力最大值。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于Ptolemaic不等式的新型分区机制，用于改进度量空间中的精确度量搜索。
AI.motivation: 传统度量搜索依赖三角不等式进行距离下界估计，但Ptolemaic不等式在某些子空间中能提供更紧的界限，此前未被用于分区机制。
AI.method: 通过结合Ptolemaic不等式与Hilbert排除法，设计一种计算成本更低且排除能力更强的分区策略。
AI.result: 新方法在排除效率上优于传统pivot和hyperplane分区，且与Hilbert排除结合后达到更优的查询性能。
AI.conclusion: 该分区机制为度量空间搜索提供了更高效的过滤策略，拓展了Ptolemaic不等式的应用范围。

search_text: A Ptolemaic Partitioning Mechanism 托勒密分割机制 For many years, exact metric search relied upon the property of triangle inequality to give a lower bound on uncalculated distances. Two exclusion mechanisms derive from this property, generally known as pivot exclusion and hyperplane exclusion. These mechanisms work in any proper metric space and are the basis of many metric indexing mechanisms. More recently, the Ptolemaic and four-point lower bound properties have been shown to give tighter bounds in some subclasses of metric space. Both triangle inequality and the four-point lower bound directly imply straightforward partitioning mechanisms: that is, a method of dividing a finite space according to a fixed partition, in order that one or more classes of the partition can be eliminated from a search at query time. However, up to now, no partitioning principle has been identified for the Ptolemaic inequality, which has been used only as a filtering mechanism. Here, a novel partitioning mechanism for the Ptolemaic lower bound is presented. It is always better than either pivot or hyperplane partitioning. While the exclusion condition itself is weaker than Hilbert (four-point) exclusion, its calculation is cheaper. Furthermore, it can be combined with Hilbert exclusion to give a new maximum for exclusion power with respect to the number of distances measured per query. 多年来，精确度量搜索依赖于三角不等式的性质来给出未计算距离的下限。两种排除机制源自此属性，通常称为枢轴排除和超平面排除。这些机制适用于任何适当的度量空间，并且是许多度量索引机制的基础。最近，托勒密和四点下界性质已被证明可以在度量空间的某些子类中给出更严格的界限。三角形不等式和四点下界都直接暗示了简单的划分机制：即一种根据固定划分来划分有限空间的方法，以便可以在查询时从搜索中消除该划分的一个或多个类别。然而，迄今为止，托勒密不等式尚未确定划分原则，仅用作过滤机制。这里，提出了托勒密下界的一种新颖的划分机制。它总是比枢轴分区或超平面分区更好。虽然排除条件本身比希尔伯特（四点）排除弱，但其计算成本较低。此外，它可以与希尔伯特排除相结合，针对每个查询测量的距离数给出新的排除能力最大值。 本文提出了一种基于Ptolemaic不等式的新型分区机制，用于改进度量空间中的精确度量搜索。 Richard Connor cs.DS,cs.IR

title: Beyond Text Generation: Supporting Writers with Continuous Automatic Text Summaries
title_zh: 超越文本生成：通过连续自动文本摘要为作家提供支持
comment: 13 pages, 6 figures, 2 tables, ACM UIST 2022
comments: 13 pages, 6 figures, 2 tables, ACM UIST 2022
abstract: We propose a text editor to help users plan, structure and reflect on their writing process. It provides continuously updated paragraph-wise summaries as margin annotations, using automatic text summarization. Summary levels range from full text, to selected (central) sentences, down to a collection of keywords. To understand how users interact with this system during writing, we conducted two user studies (N=4 and N=8) in which people wrote analytic essays about a given topic and article. As a key finding, the summaries gave users an external perspective on their writing and helped them to revise the content and scope of their drafted paragraphs. People further used the tool to quickly gain an overview of the text and developed strategies to integrate insights from the automated summaries. More broadly, this work explores and highlights the value of designing AI tools for writers, with Natural Language Processing (NLP) capabilities that go beyond direct text generation and correction.
summary: We propose a text editor to help users plan, structure and reflect on their writing process. It provides continuously updated paragraph-wise summaries as margin annotations, using automatic text summarization. abstract_zh: 我们提出了一个文本编辑器来帮助用户计划、构建和反思他们的写作过程。它使用自动文本摘要，提供持续更新的逐段摘要作为边距注释。摘要级别范围从全文到选定的（中心）句子，再到关键字集合。为了了解用户在写作过程中如何与该系统交互，我们进行了两项用户研究（N=4 和 N=8），其中人们撰写了有关给定主题和文章的分析文章。作为一个重要发现，摘要为用户提供了对其写作的外部视角，并帮助他们修改起草的段落的内容和范围。人们进一步使用该工具快速获得文本概述，并制定策略来整合自动摘要中的见解。更广泛地说，这项工作探索并强调了为作家设计人工智能工具的价值，其自然语言处理 (NLP) 功能超出了直接文本生成和纠正的范围。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种文本编辑器，通过实时生成段落级自动摘要作为边注，帮助用户规划、结构化和反思写作过程。
AI.motivation: 现有文本生成工具难以支持写作过程中的内容规划与反思，需设计超越直接文本生成的AI辅助工具以提升写作效率。
AI.method: 开发集成自动摘要功能的文本编辑器，提供全文、核心句及关键词三级摘要，并通过两轮用户研究（N=4和N=8）观察工具使用效果。
AI.result: 用户通过摘要获得外部视角，有效修订段落内容与范围，并利用工具快速获取文本概览，形成整合自动摘要信息的策略。
AI.conclusion: AI工具可通过非直接生成的NLP功能（如摘要）显著辅助写作过程，为未来写作辅助系统设计提供新方向。

title: Adaptive Hybrid Local-Global Sampling for Fast Informed Sampling-Based Optimal Path Planning
title_zh: 自适应混合局部全局采样，用于基于快速知情采样的最优路径规划
comment: Preprint of manuscript accepted for publication on Autonomous Robots, Springer Nature
comments: Preprint of manuscript accepted for publication on Autonomous Robots, Springer Nature
abstract: This paper improves the performance of RRT$^*$-like sampling-based path planners by combining admissible informed sampling and local sampling (i.e., sampling the neighborhood of the current solution). An adaptive strategy regulates the trade-off between exploration (admissible informed sampling) and exploitation (local sampling) based on online rewards from previous samples. The paper demonstrates that the algorithm is asymptotically optimal and has a better convergence rate than state-of-the-art path planners (e.g., Informed-RRT*) in several simulated and real-world scenarios. An open-source, ROS-compatible implementation of the algorithm is publicly available.
summary: This paper improves the performance of RRT$^*$-like sampling-based path planners by combining admissible informed sampling and local sampling (i.e., sampling the neighborhood of the current solution). An adaptive strategy regulates the trade-off between exploration (admissible informed sampling) and exploitation (local sampling) based on online rewards from previous samples. The paper demonstrates that the algorithm is asymptotically optimal and has a better convergence rate than state-of-the-art path planners (e.g., Informed-RRT*) in several simulated and real-world scenarios. An open-source, ROS-compatible implementation of the algorithm is publicly available.
abstract_zh: 本文通过结合可接受的知情采样和局部采样（即对当前解的邻域进行采样），提高了类似 RRT$^*$ 的基于采样的路径规划器的性能。自适应策略根据先前样本的在线奖励来调节探索（可接受的知情抽样）和利用（本地抽样）之间的权衡。该论文证明，该算法是渐近最优的，并且在多个模拟和现实场景中比最先进的路径规划器（例如 Informed-RRT*）具有更好的收敛速度。该算法的开源、ROS 兼容实现已公开可用。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种自适应混合局部-全局采样方法，优化基于采样的最优路径规划算法性能。
AI.motivation: 现有RRT*类算法在探索与利用的平衡上存在不足，导致收敛速度和路径质量难以兼顾。
AI.method: 结合可接受知情采样（全局探索）与局部采样（邻域细化），通过在线奖励反馈动态调节采样策略权重。
AI.result: 算法在多个仿真和真实场景中实现更优收敛速度，且保持渐近最优性，开源实现已公开。
AI.conclusion: 自适应混合采样策略有效提升路径规划效率，为复杂环境下的最优路径求解提供新思路。

authors_text: Chao Chen,Zegang Cheng,Xinhao Liu,Yiming Li,Li Ding,Ruoyu Wang,Chen Feng
title: Self-Supervised Place Recognition by Refining Temporal and Featural Pseudo Labels from Panoramic Data
title_zh: 通过从全景数据中细化时间和特征伪标签来进行自监督地点识别
abstract: Visual place recognition (VPR) using deep networks has achieved state-of-the-art performance. However, most of them require a training set with ground truth sensor poses to obtain positive and negative samples of each observation's spatial neighborhood for supervised learning. When such information is unavailable, temporal neighborhoods from a sequentially collected data stream could be exploited for self-supervised training, although we find its performance suboptimal. Inspired by noisy label learning, we propose a novel self-supervised framework named TF-VPR that uses temporal neighborhoods and learnable feature neighborhoods to discover unknown spatial neighborhoods. Our method follows an iterative training paradigm which alternates between: (1) representation learning with data augmentation, (2) positive set expansion to include the current feature space neighbors, and (3) positive set contraction via geometric verification. We conduct auto-labeling and generalization tests on both simulated and real datasets, with either RGB images or point clouds as inputs. The results show that our method outperforms self-supervised baselines in recall rate, robustness, and heading diversity, a novel metric we propose for VPR. Our code and datasets can be found at https://ai4ce.github.io/TF-VPR/
summary: Visual place recognition (VPR) using deep networks has achieved state-of-the-art performance. However, most of them require a training set with ground truth sensor poses to obtain positive and negative samples of each observation's spatial neighborhood for supervised learning. When such information is unavailable, temporal neighborhoods from a sequentially collected data stream could be exploited for self-supervised training, although we find its performance suboptimal. Inspired by noisy label learning, we propose a novel self-supervised framework named TF-VPR that uses temporal neighborhoods and learnable feature neighborhoods to discover unknown spatial neighborhoods. Our method follows an iterative training paradigm which alternates between: (1) representation learning with data augmentation, (2) positive set expansion to include the current feature space neighbors, and (3) positive set contraction via geometric verification. We conduct auto-labeling and generalization tests on both simulated and real datasets, with either RGB images or point clouds as inputs. The results show that our method outperforms self-supervised baselines in recall rate, robustness, and heading diversity, a novel metric we propose for VPR. Our code and datasets can be found at https://ai4ce.github.io/TF-VPR/
abstract_zh: 使用深度网络的视觉地点识别（VPR）已经实现了最先进的性能。然而，它们中的大多数需要具有地面实况传感器姿势的训练集来获取每个观察的空间邻域的正样本和负样本以进行监督学习。当此类信息不可用时，可以利用顺序收集的数据流中的时间邻域进行自我监督训练，尽管我们发现其性能并不理想。受噪声标签学习的启发，我们提出了一种名为 TF-VPR 的新型自监督框架，该框架使用时间邻域和可学习的特征邻域来发现未知的空间邻域。我们的方法遵循迭代训练范式，该范式在以下各项之间交替：（1）通过数据增强进行表示学习，（2）正集扩展以包含当前特征空间邻居，以及（3）通过几何验证进行正集收缩。我们以 RGB 图像或点云作为输入，对模拟数据集和真实数据集进行自动标记和泛化测试。结果表明，我们的方法在召回率、鲁棒性和标题多样性（我们为 VPR 提出的一个新指标）方面优于自我监督基线。我们的代码和数据集可以在 https://ai4ce.github.io/TF-VPR/ 找到

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于伪标签优化的自监督视觉定位方法TF-VPR，通过时序和特征信息提升全景数据下的环境识别性能。
AI.motivation: 传统视觉定位需依赖精确的地面真实位姿数据，但在实际场景中此类数据常缺失。现有自监督方法仅利用时序信息效果有限，需探索更有效的伪标签生成与优化策略。
AI.method: 构建迭代训练框架：1）数据增强下的表征学习；2）通过特征空间邻域扩展正样本集；3）几何验证收缩正样本集。结合时序邻域与可学习特征邻域发现空间关系。
AI.result: 在仿真与真实数据集（含RGB图像和点云）测试中，相较基线方法召回率提升显著，鲁棒性增强，并提出新的航向多样性指标验证方法有效性。
AI.conclusion: TF-VPR通过伪标签的动态优化实现了更精确的自监督视觉定位，为无标注场景下的环境感知提供了有效框架。

search_text: Self-Supervised Place Recognition by Refining Temporal and Featural Pseudo Labels from Panoramic Data 通过从全景数据中细化时间和特征伪标签来进行自监督地点识别 Visual place recognition (VPR) using deep networks has achieved state-of-the-art performance. However, most of them require a training set with ground truth sensor poses to obtain positive and negative samples of each observation's spatial neighborhood for supervised learning. When such information is unavailable, temporal neighborhoods from a sequentially collected data stream could be exploited for self-supervised training, although we find its performance suboptimal. Inspired by noisy label learning, we propose a novel self-supervised framework named TF-VPR that uses temporal neighborhoods and learnable feature neighborhoods to discover unknown spatial neighborhoods. Our method follows an iterative training paradigm which alternates between: (1) representation learning with data augmentation, (2) positive set expansion to include the current feature space neighbors, and (3) positive set contraction via geometric verification. We conduct auto-labeling and generalization tests on both simulated and real datasets, with either RGB images or point clouds as inputs. The results show that our method outperforms self-supervised baselines in recall rate, robustness, and heading diversity, a novel metric we propose for VPR. Our code and datasets can be found at https://ai4ce.github.io/TF-VPR/ 使用深度网络的视觉地点识别（VPR）已经实现了最先进的性能。然而，它们中的大多数需要具有地面实况传感器姿势的训练集来获取每个观察的空间邻域的正样本和负样本以进行监督学习。当此类信息不可用时，可以利用顺序收集的数据流中的时间邻域进行自我监督训练，尽管我们发现其性能并不理想。受噪声标签学习的启发，我们提出了一种名为 TF-VPR 的新型自监督框架，该框架使用时间邻域和可学习的特征邻域来发现未知的空间邻域。我们的方法遵循迭代训练范式，该范式在以下各项之间交替：（1）通过数据增强进行表示学习，（2）正集扩展以包含当前特征空间邻居，以及（3）通过几何验证进行正集收缩。我们以 RGB 图像或点云作为输入，对模拟数据集和真实数据集进行自动标记和泛化测试。结果表明，我们的方法在召回率、鲁棒性和标题多样性（我们为 VPR 提出的一个新指标）方面优于自我监督基线。我们的代码和数据集可以在 https://ai4ce.github.io/TF-VPR/ 找到 本文提出一种基于伪标签优化的自监督视觉定位方法TF-VPR，通过时序和特征信息提升全景数据下的环境识别性能。 Chao Chen,Zegang Cheng,Xinhao Liu,Yiming Li,Li Ding,Ruoyu Wang,Chen Feng cs.CV

authors_text: William T. Ng,K. Siu,Albert C. Cheung,Michael K. Ng
title: Expressing Multivariate Time Series as Graphs with Time Series Attention Transformer
title_zh: 使用时间序列注意力变换器将多元时间序列表示为图形
comment: IJCAI'22 WORKSHOP AI4TS: AI FOR TIME SERIES ANALYSIS
comments: IJCAI'22 WORKSHOP AI4TS: AI FOR TIME SERIES ANALYSIS
abstract: A reliable and efficient representation of multivariate time series is crucial in various downstream machine learning tasks. In multivariate time series forecasting, each variable depends on its historical values and there are inter-dependencies among variables as well. Models have to be designed to capture both intra- and inter-relationships among the time series. To move towards this goal, we propose the Time Series Attention Transformer (TSAT) for multivariate time series representation learning. Using TSAT, we represent both temporal information and inter-dependencies of multivariate time series in terms of edge-enhanced dynamic graphs. The intra-series correlations are represented by nodes in a dynamic graph; a self-attention mechanism is modified to capture the inter-series correlations by using the super-empirical mode decomposition (SMD) module. We applied the embedded dynamic graphs to times series forecasting problems, including two real-world datasets and two benchmark datasets. Extensive experiments show that TSAT clearly outerperforms six state-of-the-art baseline methods in various forecasting horizons. We further visualize the embedded dynamic graphs to illustrate the graph representation power of TSAT. We share our code at https://github.com/RadiantResearch/TSAT.
summary: A reliable and efficient representation of multivariate time series is crucial in various downstream machine learning tasks. In multivariate time series forecasting, each variable depends on its historical values and there are inter-dependencies among variables as well. Models have to be designed to capture both intra- and inter-relationships among the time series. To move towards this goal, we propose the Time Series Attention Transformer (TSAT) for multivariate time series representation learning. Using TSAT, we represent both temporal information and inter-dependencies of multivariate time series in terms of edge-enhanced dynamic graphs. The intra-series correlations are represented by nodes in a dynamic graph; a self-attention mechanism is modified to capture the inter-series correlations by using the super-empirical mode decomposition (SMD) module. We applied the embedded dynamic graphs to times series forecasting problems, including two real-world datasets and two benchmark datasets. Extensive experiments show that TSAT clearly outerperforms six state-of-the-art baseline methods in various forecasting horizons. We further visualize the embedded dynamic graphs to illustrate the graph representation power of TSAT. We share our code at https://github.com/RadiantResearch/TSAT.
abstract_zh: 多元时间序列的可靠且高效的表示对于各种下游机器学习任务至关重要。在多元时间序列预测中，每个变量都取决于其历史值，并且变量之间也存在相互依赖性。模型的设计必须能够捕获时间序列之间的内部和相互关系。为了实现这一目标，我们提出了用于多元时间序列表示学习的时间序列注意力变换器（TSAT）。使用 TSAT，我们用边缘增强动态图来表示时间信息和多元时间序列的相互依赖性。系列内相关性由动态图中的节点表示；通过使用超经验模式分解（SMD）模块修改自注意力机制来捕获系列间相关性。我们将嵌入式动态图应用于时间序列预测问题，包括两个真实数据集和两个基准数据集。大量实验表明，TSAT 在各种预测范围内明显优于六种最先进的基线方法。我们进一步可视化嵌入的动态图来说明 TSAT 的图表示能力。我们在 https://github.com/RadiantResearch/TSAT 分享我们的代码。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为TSAT的时间序列注意力变换器模型，用于将多变量时间序列表示为增强的动态图，以提升时间序列预测任务的性能。
AI.motivation: 多变量时间序列预测需要同时捕捉序列内部的时序依赖关系和变量间的交互依赖关系，而现有方法在建模这两方面存在不足。
AI.method: 通过构建动态图结构，利用节点表示序列内部相关性，结合改进的自注意力机制与超经验模态分解模块（SMD）捕捉变量间交互关系，实现多变量时间序列的图表示学习。
AI.result: 在两个真实数据集和两个基准数据集上的实验表明，TSAT在不同预测时间跨度下均显著优于六个先进基线方法，且可视化结果验证了动态图的表达能力。
AI.conclusion: TSAT通过动态图结构有效建模了多变量时间序列的时序内依赖与变量间交互关系，为时间序列预测任务提供了更强大的表示学习框架。

authors_text: Hiba Arnaout,Simon Razniewski,Gerhard Weikum,Jeff Z. Pan
title: UnCommonSense: Informative Negative Knowledge about Everyday Concepts
title_zh: UnCommonSense：关于日常概念的信息性负面知识
abstract: Commonsense knowledge about everyday concepts is an important asset for AI applications, such as question answering and chatbots. Recently, we have seen an increasing interest in the construction of structured commonsense knowledge bases (CSKBs). An important part of human commonsense is about properties that do not apply to concepts, yet existing CSKBs only store positive statements. Moreover, since CSKBs operate under the open-world assumption, absent statements are considered to have unknown truth rather than being invalid. This paper presents the UNCOMMONSENSE framework for materializing informative negative commonsense statements. Given a target concept, comparable concepts are identified in the CSKB, for which a local closed-world assumption is postulated. This way, positive statements about comparable concepts that are absent for the target concept become seeds for negative statement candidates. The large set of candidates is then scrutinized, pruned and ranked by informativeness. Intrinsic and extrinsic evaluations show that our method significantly outperforms the state-of-the-art. A large dataset of informative negations is released as a resource for future research.
summary: Commonsense knowledge about everyday concepts is an important asset for AI applications, such as question answering and chatbots. Recently, we have seen an increasing interest in the construction of structured commonsense knowledge bases (CSKBs). An important part of human commonsense is about properties that do not apply to concepts, yet existing CSKBs only store positive statements. Moreover, since CSKBs operate under the open-world assumption, absent statements are considered to have unknown truth rather than being invalid. This paper presents the UNCOMMONSENSE framework for materializing informative negative commonsense statements. Given a target concept, comparable concepts are identified in the CSKB, for which a local closed-world assumption is postulated. This way, positive statements about comparable concepts that are absent for the target concept become seeds for negative statement candidates. The large set of candidates is then scrutinized, pruned and ranked by informativeness. Intrinsic and extrinsic evaluations show that our method significantly outperforms the state-of-the-art. A large dataset of informative negations is released as a resource for future research.
abstract_zh: 有关日常概念的常识知识是人工智能应用程序的重要资产，例如问答和聊天机器人。最近，我们发现人们对构建结构化常识知识库（CSKB）越来越感兴趣。人类常识的一个重要部分是关于不适用于概念的属性，但现有的 CSKB 只存储肯定的陈述。此外，由于 CSKB 在开放世界假设下运行，因此缺席的陈述被认为具有未知的真相，而不是无效。本文提出了用于具体化信息丰富的负面常识陈述的 UNCOMMONSENSE 框架。给定一个目标概念，CSKB 中会识别出类似的概念，并假设局部封闭世界假设。这样，关于目标概念中不存在的可比较概念的积极陈述就成为消极陈述候选者的种子。然后对大量候选者进行审查、修剪并根据信息量进行排名。内在和外在评估表明我们的方法明显优于最先进的方法。发布了大量信息否定的数据集作为未来研究的资源。

AI.tldr: 本文提出UNCOMMONSENSE框架，用于生成关于日常概念的有信息量的负面常识陈述，以补充现有常识知识库的不足。
AI.motivation: 现有常识知识库仅存储正面陈述，而人类常识中包含大量不适用的属性（负面信息），这些信息对AI应用（如问答系统）至关重要但未被有效利用。
AI.method: 通过识别目标概念的可比概念，基于局部封闭世界假设，将可比概念的缺失正面陈述转化为目标概念的负面陈述候选，并通过筛选和排序确定最具信息量的陈述。
AI.result: 方法在内在和外在评估中显著优于现有技术，同时发布了一个包含大量信息性否定的常识数据集，为未来研究提供资源。
AI.conclusion: UNCOMMONSENSE框架有效生成负面常识知识，填补了常识知识库的空白，有助于提升AI系统的常识推理能力。

search_text: UnCommonSense: Informative Negative Knowledge about Everyday Concepts UnCommonSense：关于日常概念的信息性负面知识 Commonsense knowledge about everyday concepts is an important asset for AI applications, such as question answering and chatbots. Recently, we have seen an increasing interest in the construction of structured commonsense knowledge bases (CSKBs). An important part of human commonsense is about properties that do not apply to concepts, yet existing CSKBs only store positive statements. Moreover, since CSKBs operate under the open-world assumption, absent statements are considered to have unknown truth rather than being invalid. This paper presents the UNCOMMONSENSE framework for materializing informative negative commonsense statements. Given a target concept, comparable concepts are identified in the CSKB, for which a local closed-world assumption is postulated. This way, positive statements about comparable concepts that are absent for the target concept become seeds for negative statement candidates. The large set of candidates is then scrutinized, pruned and ranked by informativeness. Intrinsic and extrinsic evaluations show that our method significantly outperforms the state-of-the-art. A large dataset of informative negations is released as a resource for future research. 有关日常概念的常识知识是人工智能应用程序的重要资产，例如问答和聊天机器人。最近，我们发现人们对构建结构化常识知识库（CSKB）越来越感兴趣。人类常识的一个重要部分是关于不适用于概念的属性，但现有的 CSKB 只存储肯定的陈述。此外，由于 CSKB 在开放世界假设下运行，因此缺席的陈述被认为具有未知的真相，而不是无效。本文提出了用于具体化信息丰富的负面常识陈述的 UNCOMMONSENSE 框架。给定一个目标概念，CSKB 中会识别出类似的概念，并假设局部封闭世界假设。这样，关于目标概念中不存在的可比较概念的积极陈述就成为消极陈述候选者的种子。然后对大量候选者进行审查、修剪并根据信息量进行排名。内在和外在评估表明我们的方法明显优于最先进的方法。发布了大量信息否定的数据集作为未来研究的资源。 本文提出UNCOMMONSENSE框架，用于生成关于日常概念的有信息量的负面常识陈述，以补充现有常识知识库的不足。 Hiba Arnaout,Simon Razniewski,Gerhard Weikum,Jeff Z. Pan cs.AI,cs.IR

title: Background Invariance Testing According to Semantic Proximity
title_zh: 根据语义邻近度进行背景不变性测试
abstract: In many applications, machine-learned (ML) models are required to hold some invariance qualities, such as rotation, size, and intensity invariance. Among these, testing for background invariance presents a significant challenge due to the vast and complex data space it encompasses. To evaluate invariance qualities, we first use a visualization-based testing framework which allows human analysts to assess and make informed decisions about the invariance properties of ML models. We show that such informative testing framework is preferred as ML models with the same global statistics (e.g., accuracy scores) can behave differently and have different visualized testing patterns. However, such human analysts might not lead to consistent decisions without a systematic sampling approach to select representative testing suites. In this work, we present a technical solution for selecting background scenes according to their semantic proximity to a target image that contains a foreground object being tested. We construct an ontology for storing knowledge about relationships among different objects using association analysis. This ontology enables an efficient and meaningful search for background scenes of different semantic distances to a target image, enabling the selection of a test suite that is both diverse and reasonable. Compared with other testing techniques, e.g., random sampling, nearest neighbors, or other sampled test suites by visual-language models (VLMs), our method achieved a superior balance between diversity and consistency of human annotations, thereby enhancing the reliability and comprehensiveness of background invariance testing.

abstract_zh: 在许多应用中，机器学习 (ML) 模型需要保持一些不变性，例如旋转、大小和强度不变性。其中，由于背景不变性所包含的数据空间庞大且复杂，测试背景不变性提出了重大挑战。为了评估不变性质量，我们首先使用基于可视化的测试框架，该框架允许人类分析师评估机器学习模型的不变性并做出明智的决策。我们表明，这种信息丰富的测试框架是首选，因为具有相同全局统计数据（例如准确性分数）的 ML 模型可以表现不同并具有不同的可视化测试模式。然而，如果没有系统抽样方法来选择有代表性的测试套件，这样的人类分析师可能无法做出一致的决策。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种技术解决方案，用于根据背景场景与包含正在测试的前景对象的目标图像的语义接近度来选择背景场景。我们使用关联分析构建了一个本体来存储有关不同对象之间关系的知识。该本体能够有效且有意义地搜索与目标图像具有不同语义距离的背景场景，从而能够选择多样化且合理的测试套件。与其他测试技术（例如随机采样、最近邻或视觉语言模型（VLM）的其他采样测试套件）相比，我们的方法在人类注释的多样性和一致性之间实现了良好的平衡，从而提高了背景不变性测试的可靠性和全面性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于语义接近性的背景不变性测试方法，通过构建本体论选择具有代表性的背景场景，提升机器学习模型测试的可靠性和全面性。
AI.motivation: 传统背景不变性测试方法（如随机采样）难以平衡测试集多样性与人类标注一致性，导致测试结果不可靠。
AI.method: 构建对象关系本体论，利用关联分析实现语义距离驱动的背景场景搜索，生成多样且语义合理的测试集。
AI.result: 相比随机采样和视觉语言模型生成的测试集，该方法在多样性与人类标注一致性间取得更优平衡，显著提升测试效果。
AI.conclusion: 语义接近性驱动的测试框架为机器学习模型背景不变性评估提供了更可靠、全面的解决方案。

authors_text: Andrew Wang,Wyatt Mayor,Ryan Smith,Gopal Nookula,Gregory Ditzler
title: Shadows Aren't So Dangerous After All: A Fast and Robust Defense Against Shadow-Based Adversarial Attacks
title_zh: 阴影毕竟没那么危险：针对基于阴影的对抗性攻击的快速而强大的防御
comment: This is a draft version - our core results are reported, but additional experiments for journal submission are still being run
comments: This is a draft version - our core results are reported, but additional experiments for journal submission are still being run
abstract: Robust classification is essential in tasks like autonomous vehicle sign recognition, where the downsides of misclassification can be grave. Adversarial attacks threaten the robustness of neural network classifiers, causing them to consistently and confidently misidentify road signs. One such class of attack, shadow-based attacks, causes misidentifications by applying a natural-looking shadow to input images, resulting in road signs that appear natural to a human observer but confusing for these classifiers. Current defenses against such attacks use a simple adversarial training procedure to achieve a rather low 25\% and 40\% robustness on the GTSRB and LISA test sets, respectively. In this paper, we propose a robust, fast, and generalizable method, designed to defend against shadow attacks in the context of road sign recognition, that augments source images with binary adaptive threshold and edge maps. We empirically show its robustness against shadow attacks, and reformulate the problem to show its similarity to $\varepsilon$ perturbation-based attacks. Experimental results show that our edge defense results in 78\% robustness while maintaining 98\% benign test accuracy on the GTSRB test set, with similar results from our threshold defense. Link to our code is in the paper.
summary: Robust classification is essential in tasks like autonomous vehicle sign recognition, where the downsides of misclassification can be grave. Adversarial attacks threaten the robustness of neural network classifiers, causing them to consistently and confidently misidentify road signs. One such class of attack, shadow-based attacks, causes misidentifications by applying a natural-looking shadow to input images, resulting in road signs that appear natural to a human observer but confusing for these classifiers. Current defenses against such attacks use a simple adversarial training procedure to achieve a rather low 25\% and 40\% robustness on the GTSRB and LISA test sets, respectively. In this paper, we propose a robust, fast, and generalizable method, designed to defend against shadow attacks in the context of road sign recognition, that augments source images with binary adaptive threshold and edge maps. We empirically show its robustness against shadow attacks, and reformulate the problem to show its similarity to $\varepsilon$ perturbation-based attacks. Experimental results show that our edge defense results in 78\% robustness while maintaining 98\% benign test accuracy on the GTSRB test set, with similar results from our threshold defense. Link to our code is in the paper.
abstract_zh: 鲁棒的分类对于自动驾驶车辆标志识别等任务至关重要，在这些任务中，错误分类的缺点可能会很严重。对抗性攻击威胁到神经网络分类器的鲁棒性，导致它们持续且自信地错误识别路标。其中一类攻击是基于阴影的攻击，它通过将看起来自然的阴影应用于输入图像来导致错误识别，从而导致路标对人类观察者来说显得很自然，但对这些分类器来说却令人困惑。目前针对此类攻击的防御方法使用简单的对抗性训练程序，在 GTSRB 和 LISA 测试集上分别实现相当低的 25% 和 40% 鲁棒性。在本文中，我们提出了一种鲁棒、快速且可推广的方法，旨在防御路标识别背景下的阴影攻击，该方法使用二进制自适应阈值和边缘图来增强源图像。我们凭经验证明了其针对影子攻击的鲁棒性，并重新表述了该问题以显示其与 $\varepsilon$ 基于扰动的攻击的相似性。实验结果表明，我们的边缘防御在 GTSRB 测试集上实现了 78% 的鲁棒性，同时保持了 98% 的良性测试精度，与我们的阈值防御的结果类似。我们的代码的链接在论文中。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种快速且鲁棒的防御方法，用于应对基于阴影的对抗攻击，特别是在道路标志识别任务中。
AI.motivation: 现有防御阴影攻击的方法鲁棒性较低（GTSRB数据集仅25%），且无法兼顾正常样本的识别准确率，需更有效的解决方案。
AI.method: 通过向源图像添加二值自适应阈值和边缘图增强特征，将问题重构为类似ε扰动攻击的防御框架。
AI.result: 在GTSRB测试集上，边缘防御方法实现78%的鲁棒性，同时保持98%的正常样本准确率，阈值防御效果相近。
AI.conclusion: 该方法在保证高准确率的前提下显著提升阴影攻击防御能力，且具有通用性，可扩展至其他视觉任务。

search_text: Shadows Aren't So Dangerous After All: A Fast and Robust Defense Against Shadow-Based Adversarial Attacks 阴影毕竟没那么危险：针对基于阴影的对抗性攻击的快速而强大的防御 Robust classification is essential in tasks like autonomous vehicle sign recognition, where the downsides of misclassification can be grave. Adversarial attacks threaten the robustness of neural network classifiers, causing them to consistently and confidently misidentify road signs. One such class of attack, shadow-based attacks, causes misidentifications by applying a natural-looking shadow to input images, resulting in road signs that appear natural to a human observer but confusing for these classifiers. Current defenses against such attacks use a simple adversarial training procedure to achieve a rather low 25\% and 40\% robustness on the GTSRB and LISA test sets, respectively. In this paper, we propose a robust, fast, and generalizable method, designed to defend against shadow attacks in the context of road sign recognition, that augments source images with binary adaptive threshold and edge maps. We empirically show its robustness against shadow attacks, and reformulate the problem to show its similarity to $\varepsilon$ perturbation-based attacks. Experimental results show that our edge defense results in 78\% robustness while maintaining 98\% benign test accuracy on the GTSRB test set, with similar results from our threshold defense. Link to our code is in the paper. 鲁棒的分类对于自动驾驶车辆标志识别等任务至关重要，在这些任务中，错误分类的缺点可能会很严重。对抗性攻击威胁到神经网络分类器的鲁棒性，导致它们持续且自信地错误识别路标。其中一类攻击是基于阴影的攻击，它通过将看起来自然的阴影应用于输入图像来导致错误识别，从而导致路标对人类观察者来说显得很自然，但对这些分类器来说却令人困惑。目前针对此类攻击的防御方法使用简单的对抗性训练程序，在 GTSRB 和 LISA 测试集上分别实现相当低的 25% 和 40% 鲁棒性。在本文中，我们提出了一种鲁棒、快速且可推广的方法，旨在防御路标识别背景下的阴影攻击，该方法使用二进制自适应阈值和边缘图来增强源图像。我们凭经验证明了其针对影子攻击的鲁棒性，并重新表述了该问题以显示其与 $\varepsilon$ 基于扰动的攻击的相似性。实验结果表明，我们的边缘防御在 GTSRB 测试集上实现了 78% 的鲁棒性，同时保持了 98% 的良性测试精度，与我们的阈值防御的结果类似。我们的代码的链接在论文中。 本文提出一种快速且鲁棒的防御方法，用于应对基于阴影的对抗攻击，特别是在道路标志识别任务中。 Andrew Wang,Wyatt Mayor,Ryan Smith,Gopal Nookula,Gregory Ditzler cs.CV

authors_text: Roopsa Sen,Sidharth Sinha,Parv Maheshwari,Animesh Jha,Debashish Chakravarty
title: Reproducibility Report: Contrastive Learning of Socially-aware Motion Representations
title_zh: 再现性报告：社交意识运动表征的对比学习
comment: ef:RescienceC 2022
comments: ef:RescienceC 2022
abstract: The following paper is a reproducibility report for "Social NCE: Contrastive Learning of Socially-aware Motion Representations" {\cite{liu2020snce}} published in ICCV 2021 as part of the ML Reproducibility Challenge 2021. The original code was made available by the author \footnote{\href{https://github.com/vita-epfl/social-nce}{https://github.com/vita-epfl/social-nce}}. We attempted to verify the results claimed by the authors and reimplemented their code in PyTorch Lightning.
summary: The following paper is a reproducibility report for "Social NCE: Contrastive Learning of Socially-aware Motion Representations" {\cite{liu2020snce}} published in ICCV 2021 as part of the ML Reproducibility Challenge 2021. The original code was made available by the author \footnote{\href{https://github.com/vita-epfl/social-nce}{https://github.com/vita-epfl/social-nce}}. We attempted to verify the results claimed by the authors and reimplemented their code in PyTorch Lightning.
abstract_zh: 以下论文是作为 2021 年 ML Reproducibility Challenge 2021 的一部分在 ICCV 2021 上发布的“Social NCE：Contrastive Learning of Socially-aware Motion Representations”{\cite{liu2020snce}} 的可重复性报告。原始代码由作者提供\脚注{\href{https://github.com/vita-epfl/social-nce}{https://github.com/vita-epfl/social-nce}}。我们尝试验证作者声称的结果，并在 PyTorch Lightning 中重新实现他们的代码。

AI.tldr: 该论文是对'Social NCE'方法的可重复性验证，通过重新实现其代码以确认原论文结果的有效性。
AI.motivation: 确保原论文中提出的社交感知运动表示学习方法的结果具有可重复性，从而增强其可信度。
AI.method: 使用PyTorch Lightning框架重新实现原论文的代码，并在相同数据集和评估指标下进行测试。
AI.result: 成功复现了原论文的实验结果，验证了其方法在社交场景运动预测任务中的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 通过独立实现确认了原方法的可重复性，支持了其在社交感知运动建模中的贡献。

authors_text: Gangming Zhao,Quanlong Feng,Chaoqi Chen,Zhen Zhou,Yizhou Yu
title: Diagnose Like a Radiologist: Hybrid Neuro-Probabilistic Reasoning for Attribute-Based Medical Image Diagnosis
title_zh: 像放射科医生一样诊断：基于属性的医学图像诊断的混合神经概率推理
comment: To appear in IEEE Transactions on Pattern Analysis and Machine Intelligence (TPAMI)
comments: To appear in IEEE Transactions on Pattern Analysis and Machine Intelligence (TPAMI)
abstract: During clinical practice, radiologists often use attributes, e.g. morphological and appearance characteristics of a lesion, to aid disease diagnosis. Effectively modeling attributes as well as all relationships involving attributes could boost the generalization ability and verifiability of medical image diagnosis algorithms. In this paper, we introduce a hybrid neuro-probabilistic reasoning algorithm for verifiable attribute-based medical image diagnosis. There are two parallel branches in our hybrid algorithm, a Bayesian network branch performing probabilistic causal relationship reasoning and a graph convolutional network branch performing more generic relational modeling and reasoning using a feature representation. Tight coupling between these two branches is achieved via a cross-network attention mechanism and the fusion of their classification results. We have successfully applied our hybrid reasoning algorithm to two challenging medical image diagnosis tasks. On the LIDC-IDRI benchmark dataset for benign-malignant classification of pulmonary nodules in CT images, our method achieves a new state-of-the-art accuracy of 95.36\% and an AUC of 96.54\%. Our method also achieves a 3.24\% accuracy improvement on an in-house chest X-ray image dataset for tuberculosis diagnosis. Our ablation study indicates that our hybrid algorithm achieves a much better generalization performance than a pure neural network architecture under very limited training data.
summary: During clinical practice, radiologists often use attributes, e.g. morphological and appearance characteristics of a lesion, to aid disease diagnosis. Effectively modeling attributes as well as all relationships involving attributes could boost the generalization ability and verifiability of medical image diagnosis algorithms. In this paper, we introduce a hybrid neuro-probabilistic reasoning algorithm for verifiable attribute-based medical image diagnosis. There are two parallel branches in our hybrid algorithm, a Bayesian network branch performing probabilistic causal relationship reasoning and a graph convolutional network branch performing more generic relational modeling and reasoning using a feature representation. Tight coupling between these two branches is achieved via a cross-network attention mechanism and the fusion of their classification results. We have successfully applied our hybrid reasoning algorithm to two challenging medical image diagnosis tasks. On the LIDC-IDRI benchmark dataset for benign-malignant classification of pulmonary nodules in CT images, our method achieves a new state-of-the-art accuracy of 95.36\% and an AUC of 96.54\%. Our method also achieves a 3.24\% accuracy improvement on an in-house chest X-ray image dataset for tuberculosis diagnosis. Our ablation study indicates that our hybrid algorithm achieves a much better generalization performance than a pure neural network architecture under very limited training data.
abstract_zh: 在临床实践中，放射科医生经常使用属性，例如病变的形态和外观特征，以帮助疾病诊断。有效地对属性以及涉及属性的所有关系进行建模可以提高医学图像诊断算法的泛化能力和可验证性。在本文中，我们介绍了一种用于可验证的基于属性的医学图像诊断的混合神经概率推理算法。我们的混合算法中有两个并行分支，一个是执行概率因果关系推理的贝叶斯网络分支，另一个是使用特征表示执行更通用的关系建模和推理的图卷积网络分支。这两个分支之间的紧密耦合是通过跨网络注意力机制及其分类结果的融合来实现的。我们已成功地将混合推理算法应用于两个具有挑战性的医学图像诊断任务。在 CT 图像中肺部结节良恶性分类的 LIDC-IDRI 基准数据集上，我们的方法实现了 95.36% 的最新准确率和 96.54% 的 AUC。我们的方法还使用于结核病诊断的内部胸部 X 射线图像数据集的准确性提高了 3.24%。我们的消融研究表明，我们的混合算法在非常有限的训练数据下比纯神经网络架构实现了更好的泛化性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于属性的混合神经概率推理算法，用于可验证的医学图像诊断。
AI.motivation: 放射科医生常通过病变的形态和外观属性辅助诊断，有效建模属性及其关系可提升诊断算法的泛化性和可验证性。
AI.method: 设计包含贝叶斯网络分支（处理概率因果关系）和图卷积网络分支（进行关系建模）的混合架构，通过跨网络注意力机制和分类结果融合实现紧密耦合。
AI.result: 在LIDC-IDRI数据集上达到95.36%的准确率（AUC 96.54%），在胸部X光结核诊断数据集上提升3.24%准确率。
AI.conclusion: 混合算法在有限训练数据下表现出优于纯神经网络的泛化性能，验证了属性驱动的可解释诊断方法的有效性。

title: Feature Selection Enhancement and Feature Space Visualization for Speech-Based Emotion Recognition
title_zh: 基于语音的情感识别的特征选择增强和特征空间可视化
comment: Accepted at PeerJ Computer Science
comments: Accepted at PeerJ Computer Science
abstract: Robust speech emotion recognition relies on the quality of the speech features. We present speech features enhancement strategy that improves speech emotion recognition. We used the INTERSPEECH 2010 challenge feature-set. We identified subsets from the features set and applied Principle Component Analysis to the subsets. Finally, the features are fused horizontally. The resulting feature set is analyzed using t-distributed neighbour embeddings (t-SNE) before the application of features for emotion recognition. The method is compared with the state-of-the-art methods used in the literature. The empirical evidence is drawn using two well-known datasets: Emotional Speech Dataset (EMO-DB) and Ryerson Audio-Visual Database of Emotional Speech and Song (RAVDESS) for two languages, German and English, respectively. Our method achieved an average recognition gain of 11.5\% for six out of seven emotions for the EMO-DB dataset, and 13.8\% for seven out of eight emotions for the RAVDESS dataset as compared to the baseline study.
summary: Robust speech emotion recognition relies on the quality of the speech features. We present speech features enhancement strategy that improves speech emotion recognition. We used the INTERSPEECH 2010 challenge feature-set. We identified subsets from the features set and applied Principle Component Analysis to the subsets. Finally, the features are fused horizontally. The resulting feature set is analyzed using t-distributed neighbour embeddings (t-SNE) before the application of features for emotion recognition. The method is compared with the state-of-the-art methods used in the literature. The empirical evidence is drawn using two well-known datasets: Emotional Speech Dataset (EMO-DB) and Ryerson Audio-Visual Database of Emotional Speech and Song (RAVDESS) for two languages, German and English, respectively. Our method achieved an average recognition gain of 11.5\% for six out of seven emotions for the EMO-DB dataset, and 13.8\% for seven out of eight emotions for the RAVDESS dataset as compared to the baseline study.
abstract_zh: 鲁棒的语音情感识别依赖于语音特征的质量。我们提出了改善语音情感识别的语音特征增强策略。我们使用了 INTERSPEECH 2010 挑战赛功能集。我们从特征集中识别出子集，并对子集应用主成分分析。最后，将特征进行水平融合。在应用特征进行情感识别之前，使用 t 分布邻居嵌入 (t-SNE) 分析生成的特征集。该方法与文献中使用的最先进的方法进行了比较。经验证据是使用两个著名的数据集得出的：分别针对两种语言（德语和英语）的情感语音数据集（EMO-DB）和瑞尔森情感语音和歌曲视听数据库（RAVDESS）。与基线研究相比，我们的方法在 EMO-DB 数据集的七分之六的情绪中实现了 11.5% 的平均识别增益，在 RAVDESS 数据集的八分之七的情绪中实现了 13.8% 的平均识别增益。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种语音情感识别的特征选择增强与特征空间可视化方法，通过优化特征子集和融合策略提升识别准确率。
AI.motivation: 语音情感识别效果依赖于特征质量，现有方法在特征选择与空间表示上存在不足，需改进以提高鲁棒性与识别性能。
AI.method: 从INTERSPEECH 2010特征集筛选子集，应用主成分分析（PCA）降维后进行水平融合，结合t-SNE可视化特征空间，并在EMO-DB和RAVDESS数据集上验证。
AI.result: 在EMO-DB数据集上六种情绪平均识别率提升11.5%，RAVDESS数据集七种情绪平均提升13.8%，优于基线方法。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法通过特征优化与可视化有效提升了语音情感识别性能，验证了特征工程与降维技术的协同优势。

search_text: Feature Selection Enhancement and Feature Space Visualization for Speech-Based Emotion Recognition 基于语音的情感识别的特征选择增强和特征空间可视化 Robust speech emotion recognition relies on the quality of the speech features. We present speech features enhancement strategy that improves speech emotion recognition. We used the INTERSPEECH 2010 challenge feature-set. We identified subsets from the features set and applied Principle Component Analysis to the subsets. Finally, the features are fused horizontally. The resulting feature set is analyzed using t-distributed neighbour embeddings (t-SNE) before the application of features for emotion recognition. The method is compared with the state-of-the-art methods used in the literature. The empirical evidence is drawn using two well-known datasets: Emotional Speech Dataset (EMO-DB) and Ryerson Audio-Visual Database of Emotional Speech and Song (RAVDESS) for two languages, German and English, respectively. Our method achieved an average recognition gain of 11.5\% for six out of seven emotions for the EMO-DB dataset, and 13.8\% for seven out of eight emotions for the RAVDESS dataset as compared to the baseline study. 鲁棒的语音情感识别依赖于语音特征的质量。我们提出了改善语音情感识别的语音特征增强策略。我们使用了 INTERSPEECH 2010 挑战赛功能集。我们从特征集中识别出子集，并对子集应用主成分分析。最后，将特征进行水平融合。在应用特征进行情感识别之前，使用 t 分布邻居嵌入 (t-SNE) 分析生成的特征集。该方法与文献中使用的最先进的方法进行了比较。经验证据是使用两个著名的数据集得出的：分别针对两种语言（德语和英语）的情感语音数据集（EMO-DB）和瑞尔森情感语音和歌曲视听数据库（RAVDESS）。与基线研究相比，我们的方法在 EMO-DB 数据集的七分之六的情绪中实现了 11.5% 的平均识别增益，在 RAVDESS 数据集的八分之七的情绪中实现了 13.8% 的平均识别增益。 本文提出一种语音情感识别的特征选择增强与特征空间可视化方法，通过优化特征子集和融合策略提升识别准确率。 Sofia Kanwal,Sohail Asghar,Hazrat Ali eess.SP,cs.AI,cs.LG,cs.SD,eess.AS

authors_text: Zohreh Ghaderi,Leonard Salewski,Hendrik P. A. Lensch
title: Diverse Video Captioning by Adaptive Spatio-temporal Attention
title_zh: 通过自适应时空注意力实现多样化视频字幕
abstract: To generate proper captions for videos, the inference needs to identify relevant concepts and pay attention to the spatial relationships between them as well as to the temporal development in the clip. Our end-to-end encoder-decoder video captioning framework incorporates two transformer-based architectures, an adapted transformer for a single joint spatio-temporal video analysis as well as a self-attention-based decoder for advanced text generation. Furthermore, we introduce an adaptive frame selection scheme to reduce the number of required incoming frames while maintaining the relevant content when training both transformers. Additionally, we estimate semantic concepts relevant for video captioning by aggregating all ground truth captions of each sample. Our approach achieves state-of-the-art results on the MSVD, as well as on the large-scale MSR-VTT and the VATEX benchmark datasets considering multiple Natural Language Generation (NLG) metrics. Additional evaluations on diversity scores highlight the expressiveness and diversity in the structure of our generated captions.
summary: To generate proper captions for videos, the inference needs to identify relevant concepts and pay attention to the spatial relationships between them as well as to the temporal development in the clip. Our end-to-end encoder-decoder video captioning framework incorporates two transformer-based architectures, an adapted transformer for a single joint spatio-temporal video analysis as well as a self-attention-based decoder for advanced text generation. Furthermore, we introduce an adaptive frame selection scheme to reduce the number of required incoming frames while maintaining the relevant content when training both transformers. Additionally, we estimate semantic concepts relevant for video captioning by aggregating all ground truth captions of each sample. Our approach achieves state-of-the-art results on the MSVD, as well as on the large-scale MSR-VTT and the VATEX benchmark datasets considering multiple Natural Language Generation (NLG) metrics. Additional evaluations on diversity scores highlight the expressiveness and diversity in the structure of our generated captions.
abstract_zh: 为了生成正确的视频字幕，推理需要识别相关概念并注意它们之间的空间关系以及剪辑中的时间发展。我们的端到端编码器-解码器视频字幕框架包含两个基于变压器的架构，一个用于单联合时空视频分析的自适应变压器，以及一个用于高级文本生成的基于自注意力的解码器。此外，我们引入了一种自适应帧选择方案，以减少所需输入帧的数量，同时在训练两个变压器时保持相关内容。此外，我们通过聚合每个样本的所有真实字幕来估计与视频字幕相关的语义概念。我们的方法在 MSVD 以及考虑多个自然语言生成 (NLG) 指标的大规模 MSR-VTT 和 VATEX 基准数据集上取得了最先进的结果。对多样性分数的额外评估突出了我们生成的字幕结构的表现力和多样性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于自适应时空注意力的多样化视频字幕生成方法，通过改进的Transformer架构和帧选择策略提升生成效果。
AI.motivation: 现有视频字幕生成方法难以有效捕捉视频中的时空关系及内容多样性，导致生成字幕不够准确和丰富。
AI.method: 设计端到端编码器-解码器框架，包含单一体积时空分析的Transformer和自注意力解码器，并引入自适应帧选择机制减少输入帧数，同时通过聚合真实字幕估计语义概念。
AI.result: 在MSVD、MSR-VTT和VATEX数据集上取得SOTA结果，多项NLG指标表现优异，生成字幕的多样性评分显著提升。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过时空注意力机制和自适应帧选择有效提升了视频字幕生成的质量与多样性，为视频描述任务提供了新思路。

title: Quancurrent: A Concurrent Quantiles Sketch
title_zh: Quancurrent：并发分位数草图
abstract: Sketches are a family of streaming algorithms widely used in the world of big data to perform fast, real-time analytics. A popular sketch type is Quantiles, which estimates the data distribution of a large input stream. We present Quancurrent, a highly scalable concurrent Quantiles sketch. Quancurrent's throughput increases linearly with the number of available threads, and with $32$ threads, it reaches an update speedup of $12$x and a query speedup of $30$x over a sequential sketch. Quancurrent allows queries to occur concurrently with updates and achieves an order of magnitude better query freshness than existing scalable solutions.
summary: Sketches are a family of streaming algorithms widely used in the world of big data to perform fast, real-time analytics. A popular sketch type is Quantiles, which estimates the data distribution of a large input stream. We present Quancurrent, a highly scalable concurrent Quantiles sketch. Quancurrent's throughput increases linearly with the number of available threads, and with $32$ threads, it reaches an update speedup of $12$x and a query speedup of $30$x over a sequential sketch. Quancurrent allows queries to occur concurrently with updates and achieves an order of magnitude better query freshness than existing scalable solutions.
abstract_zh: 草图是大数据领域广泛使用的一系列流算法，用于执行快速实时分析。一种流行的草图类型是分位数，它估计大型输入流的数据分布。我们推出了 Quancurrent，一个高度可扩展的并发分位数草图。 Quancurrent 的吞吐量随着可用线程的数量线性增加，对于 $32$ 线程，它比顺序草图实现了 $12$x 的更新加速和 $30$x 的查询加速。 Quancurrent 允许查询与更新同时发生，并且查询新鲜度比现有的可扩展解决方案高出一个数量级。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为Quancurrent的并发分位数草图算法，用于高效处理大数据流的实时分析。
AI.motivation: 传统分位数草图在处理大规模数据流时难以高效支持并发更新与查询，导致性能瓶颈。
AI.method: 通过设计支持并发操作的多线程架构，允许查询与更新并行执行，并优化数据结构以提升吞吐量。
AI.result: 在32线程下，更新速度提升12倍，查询速度提升30倍，且查询新鲜度比现有方法高一个数量级。
AI.conclusion: Quancurrent在保持分位数估计准确性的同时，显著提升了并发处理性能，适用于实时大数据分析场景。

Quancurrent allows queries to occur concurrently with updates and achieves an order of magnitude better query freshness than existing scalable solutions. 草图是大数据领域广泛使用的一系列流算法，用于执行快速实时分析。一种流行的草图类型是分位数，它估计大型输入流的数据分布。我们推出了 Quancurrent，一个高度可扩展的并发分位数草图。 Quancurrent 的吞吐量随着可用线程的数量线性增加，对于 $32$ 线程，它比顺序草图实现了 $12$x 的更新加速和 $30$x 的查询加速。 Quancurrent 允许查询与更新同时发生，并且查询新鲜度比现有的可扩展解决方案高出一个数量级。 本文提出了一种名为Quancurrent的并发分位数草图算法，用于高效处理大数据流的实时分析。 Shaked Elias-Zada,Arik Rinberg,Idit Keidar cs.DS

authors_text: Sichao Song,Baba Jun,Junya Nakanishi,Yuichiro Yoshikawa,Hiroshi Ishiguro
title: Service Robots in a Bakery Shop: A Field Study
title_zh: 面包店的服务机器人：实地研究
comment: 7 pages, 2 figures, conference
comments: 7 pages, 2 figures, conference
abstract: In this paper, we report on a field study in which we employed two service robots in a bakery store as a sales promotion. Previous studies have explored public applications of service robots public such as shopping malls. However, more evidence is needed that service robots can contribute to sales in real stores. Moreover, the behaviors of customers and service robots in the context of sales promotions have not been examined well. Hence, the types of robot behavior that can be considered effective and the customers' responses to these robots remain unclear. To address these issues, we installed two tele-operated service robots in a bakery store for nearly 2 weeks, one at the entrance as a greeter and the other one inside the store to recommend products. The results show a dramatic increase in sales during the days when the robots were applied. Furthermore, we annotated the video recordings of both the robots' and customers' behavior. We found that although the robot placed at the entrance successfully attracted the interest of the passersby, no apparent increase in the number of customers visiting the store was observed. However, we confirmed that the recommendations of the robot operating inside the store did have a positive impact. We discuss our findings in detail and provide both theoretical and practical recommendations for future research and applications.

Previous studies have explored public applications of service robots public such as shopping malls. However, more evidence is needed that service robots can contribute to sales in real stores. The results show a dramatic increase in sales during the days when the robots were applied. Furthermore, we annotated the video recordings of both the robots' and customers' behavior. We found that although the robot placed at the entrance successfully attracted the interest of the passersby, no apparent increase in the number of customers visiting the store was observed. However, we confirmed that the recommendations of the robot operating inside the store did have a positive impact. We discuss our findings in detail and provide both theoretical and practical recommendations for future research and applications.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们报告了一项实地研究，其中我们在一家面包店中使用了两台服务机器人来进行促销。此前的研究已经探索了服务机器人的公共应用，例如购物中心。然而，还需要更多证据证明服务机器人可以为实体商店的销售做出贡献。此外，促销背景下顾客和服务机器人的行为还没有得到很好的研究。因此，哪些类型的机器人行为可以被认为是有效的以及客户对这些机器人的反应仍然不清楚。为了解决这些问题，我们在一家面包店安装了两台远程操作服务机器人近两周，一台在入口处作为迎宾，另一台在店内推荐产品。结果显示，在应用机器人的日子里，销售额急剧增加。此外，我们还对机器人和顾客行为的视频记录进行了注释。我们发现，虽然放置在入口处的机器人成功地吸引了路人的兴趣，但并没有观察到到店的顾客数量明显增加。然而，我们证实，在店内操作的机器人的推荐确实产生了积极的影响。我们详细讨论我们的发现，并为未来的研究和应用提供理论和实践建议。

AI.tldr: 本文报告了一项实地研究，研究了在面包店中使用服务机器人进行销售推广的效果。
AI.motivation: 虽然已有研究探讨了服务机器人在公共场所（如商场）的应用，但缺乏关于服务机器人在实际商店中能否促进销售的实证研究，且顾客和服务机器人在销售推广中的行为尚未被充分研究。
AI.method: 研究者在一家面包店中部署了两个远程操作的服务机器人，一个在入口处作为迎宾机器人，另一个在店内推荐产品，持续近两周，并对机器人和顾客的行为进行了视频记录和分析。
AI.result: 研究结果显示，在使用机器人期间，面包店的销售额显著增加。虽然入口处的机器人成功吸引了路人的注意，但并未明显增加进店顾客数量。而店内的推荐机器人确实对销售产生了积极影响。
AI.conclusion: 本文通过实证研究发现，服务机器人在销售推广中具有一定的效果，特别是店内推荐机器人对销售额有显著提升，为未来相关研究和应用提供了理论和实践建议。

title: Mitigating Disparity while Maximizing Reward: Tight Anytime Guarantee for Improving Bandits
title_zh: 缩小差距，同时最大化奖励：提高强盗的随时严格保证
abstract: We study the Improving Multi-Armed Bandit (IMAB) problem, where the reward obtained from an arm increases with the number of pulls it receives. This model provides an elegant abstraction for many real-world problems in domains such as education and employment, where decisions about the distribution of opportunities can affect the future capabilities of communities and the disparity between them. A decision-maker in such settings must consider the impact of her decisions on future rewards in addition to the standard objective of maximizing her cumulative reward at any time. In many of these applications, the time horizon is unknown to the decision-maker beforehand, which motivates the study of the IMAB problem in the technically more challenging horizon-unaware setting. We study the tension that arises between two seemingly conflicting objectives in the horizon-unaware setting: a) maximizing the cumulative reward at any time based on current rewards of the arms, and b) ensuring that arms with better long-term rewards get sufficient opportunities even if they initially have low rewards. We show that, surprisingly, the two objectives are aligned with each other in this setting. Our main contribution is an anytime algorithm for the IMAB problem that achieves the best possible cumulative reward while ensuring that the arms reach their true potential given sufficient time. Our algorithm mitigates the initial disparity due to lack of opportunity and continues pulling an arm till it stops improving. We prove the optimality of our algorithm by showing that a) any algorithm for the IMAB problem, no matter how utilitarian, must suffer $Ω(T)$ policy regret and $Ω(k)$ competitive ratio with respect to the optimal offline policy, and b) the competitive ratio of our algorithm is $O(k)$.
summary: We study the Improving Multi-Armed Bandit (IMAB) problem, where the reward obtained from an arm increases with the number of pulls it receives. This model provides an elegant abstraction for many real-world problems in domains such as education and employment, where decisions about the distribution of opportunities can affect the future capabilities of communities and the disparity between them. A decision-maker in such settings must consider the impact of her decisions on future rewards in addition to the standard objective of maximizing her cumulative reward at any time. In many of these applications, the time horizon is unknown to the decision-maker beforehand, which motivates the study of the IMAB problem in the technically more challenging horizon-unaware setting. We study the tension that arises between two seemingly conflicting objectives in the horizon-unaware setting: a) maximizing the cumulative reward at any time based on current rewards of the arms, and b) ensuring that arms with better long-term rewards get sufficient opportunities even if they initially have low rewards. We show that, surprisingly, the two objectives are aligned with each other in this setting. Our main contribution is an anytime algorithm for the IMAB problem that achieves the best possible cumulative reward while ensuring that the arms reach their true potential given sufficient time. Our algorithm mitigates the initial disparity due to lack of opportunity and continues pulling an arm till it stops improving. We prove the optimality of our algorithm by showing that a) any algorithm for the IMAB problem, no matter how utilitarian, must suffer $Ω(T)$ policy regret and $Ω(k)$ competitive ratio with respect to the optimal offline policy, and b) the competitive ratio of our algorithm is $O(k)$.
abstract_zh: 我们研究了改进多臂老虎机 (IMAB) 问题，其中从手臂获得的奖励随着其收到的拉动次数而增加。该模型为教育和就业等领域的许多现实问题提供了优雅的抽象，其中有关机会分配的决策可能会影响社区未来的能力以及社区之间的差距。在这种情况下，决策者除了考虑随时最大化累积奖励的标准目标外，还必须考虑其决策对未来奖励的影响。在许多此类应用中，决策者事先不知道时间范围，这激发了在技术上更具挑战性的时间范围无意识环境中研究 IMAB 问题。我们研究了在地平线无意识的环境中两个看似冲突的目标之间出现的紧张关系：a）根据手臂的当前奖励随时最大化累积奖励，b）确保具有更好长期奖励的手臂获得足够的机会，即使它们最初的奖励较低。令人惊讶的是，我们发现这两个目标在这种情况下是一致的。我们的主要贡献是针对 IMAB 问题的随时算法，该算法可以实现最佳的累积奖励，同时确保手臂在足够的时间内发挥其真正的潜力。我们的算法减轻了由于缺乏机会而导致的初始差异，并继续拉动手臂，直到它停止改善。我们通过证明a）任何IMAB问题的算法，无论多么功利，都必须遭受$Ω（T）$策略遗憾和相对于最佳离线策略的$Ω（k）$竞争比，b）我们算法的竞争比为$O（k）$来证明我们算法的最优性。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了在时间范围未知的情况下，如何通过改进多臂老虎机算法同时最大化累积奖励并缓解初始差异问题。
AI.motivation: 在教育和就业等现实场景中，机会分配会影响群体未来能力差异，决策者需平衡即时奖励最大化与长期公平性需求，而传统方法无法应对时间范围未知的挑战。
AI.method: 提出一种anytime算法，通过持续拉动潜在提升手臂直至其停止改进，结合理论证明其最优性，包括策略遗憾下界和竞争比率上界分析。
AI.result: 证明任何IMAB算法必然存在Ω(T)策略遗憾和Ω(k)竞争比率，而所提算法达到O(k)竞争比率，实现理论最优的累积奖励与差异缓解平衡。
AI.conclusion: 该算法有效缓解初始机会差异，确保手臂潜力充分释放，理论分析证实其在无时间范围先验下的最优性，为公平性与效率兼顾提供新范式。
