This model provides an elegant abstraction for many real-world problems in domains such as education and employment, where decisions about the distribution of opportunities can affect the future capabilities of communities and the disparity between them. A decision-maker in such settings must consider the impact of her decisions on future rewards in addition to the standard objective of maximizing her cumulative reward at any time. In many of these applications, the time horizon is unknown to the decision-maker beforehand, which motivates the study of the IMAB problem in the technically more challenging horizon-unaware setting. We study the tension that arises between two seemingly conflicting objectives in the horizon-unaware setting: a) maximizing the cumulative reward at any time based on current rewards of the arms, and b) ensuring that arms with better long-term rewards get sufficient opportunities even if they initially have low rewards. We show that, surprisingly, the two objectives are aligned with each other in this setting. Our main contribution is an anytime algorithm for the IMAB problem that achieves the best possible cumulative reward while ensuring that the arms reach their true potential given sufficient time. Our algorithm mitigates the initial disparity due to lack of opportunity and continues pulling an arm till it stops improving. We prove the optimality of our algorithm by showing that a) any algorithm for the IMAB problem, no matter how utilitarian, must suffer $Ω(T)$ policy regret and $Ω(k)$ competitive ratio with respect to the optimal offline policy, and b) the competitive ratio of our algorithm is $O(k)$. 我们研究了改进多臂老虎机 (IMAB) 问题，其中从手臂获得的奖励随着其收到的拉动次数而增加。该模型为教育和就业等领域的许多现实问题提供了优雅的抽象，其中有关机会分配的决策可能会影响社区未来的能力以及社区之间的差距。在这种情况下，决策者除了考虑随时最大化累积奖励的标准目标外，还必须考虑其决策对未来奖励的影响。在许多此类应用中，决策者事先不知道时间范围，这激发了在技术上更具挑战性的时间范围无意识环境中研究 IMAB 问题。我们研究了在地平线无意识的环境中两个看似冲突的目标之间出现的紧张关系：a）根据手臂的当前奖励随时最大化累积奖励，b）确保具有更好长期奖励的手臂获得足够的机会，即使它们最初的奖励较低。令人惊讶的是，我们发现这两个目标在这种情况下是一致的。我们的主要贡献是针对 IMAB 问题的随时算法，该算法可以实现最佳的累积奖励，同时确保手臂在足够的时间内发挥其真正的潜力。我们的算法减轻了由于缺乏机会而导致的初始差异，并继续拉动手臂，直到它停止改善。我们通过证明a）任何IMAB问题的算法，无论多么功利，都必须遭受$Ω（T）$策略遗憾和相对于最佳离线策略的$Ω（k）$竞争比，b）我们算法的竞争比为$O（k）$来证明我们算法的最优性。 本文研究了在时间范围未知的情况下，如何通过改进多臂老虎机算法同时最大化累积奖励并缓解初始差异问题。 Vishakha Patil,Vineet Nair,Ganesh Ghalme,Arindam Khan cs.LG,cs.AI

title: A General Purpose Exact Solution Method for Mixed Integer Concave Minimization Problems
title_zh: 混合整数凹最小化问题的通用精确解法
comment: 10 figures, 12 tables, 32 pages
comments: 10 figures, 12 tables, 32 pages
abstract: In this article, we discuss an exact algorithm for solving mixed integer concave minimization problems. A piecewise inner-approximation of the concave function is achieved using an auxiliary linear program that leads to a bilevel program, which provides a lower bound to the original problem. The bilevel program is reduced to a single level formulation with the help of Karush-Kuhn-Tucker (KKT) conditions. Incorporating the KKT conditions lead to complementary slackness conditions that are linearized using BigM, for which we identify a tight value for general problems. Multiple bilevel programs, when solved over iterations, guarantee convergence to the exact optimum of the original problem. Though the algorithm is general and can be applied to any optimization problem with concave function(s), in this paper, we solve two common classes of operations and supply chain problems; namely, the concave knapsack problem, and the concave production-transportation problem. The computational experiments indicate that our proposed approach outperforms the customized methods that have been used in the literature to solve the two classes of problems by an order of magnitude in most of the test cases.
summary: In this article, we discuss an exact algorithm for solving mixed integer concave minimization problems. A piecewise inner-approximation of the concave function is achieved using an auxiliary linear program that leads to a bilevel program, which provides a lower bound to the original problem. The bilevel program is reduced to a single level formulation with the help of Karush-Kuhn-Tucker (KKT) conditions. Incorporating the KKT conditions lead to complementary slackness conditions that are linearized using BigM, for which we identify a tight value for general problems. Multiple bilevel programs, when solved over iterations, guarantee convergence to the exact optimum of the original problem. Though the algorithm is general and can be applied to any optimization problem with concave function(s), in this paper, we solve two common classes of operations and supply chain problems; namely, the concave knapsack problem, and the concave production-transportation problem. The computational experiments indicate that our proposed approach outperforms the customized methods that have been used in the literature to solve the two classes of problems by an order of magnitude in most of the test cases.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们讨论解决混合整数凹最小化问题的精确算法。使用辅助线性程序实现凹函数的分段内部逼近，该辅助线性程序产生双层程序，该程序为原始问题提供了下界。在 Karush-Kuhn-Tucker (KKT) 条件的帮助下，双层程序被简化为单层公式。结合 KKT 条件会产生使用 BigM 线性化的互补松弛条件，为此我们确定了一般问题的严格值。当通过迭代求解时，多个双层程序可以保证收敛到原始问题的精确最优值。尽管该算法是通用的并且可以应用于任何具有凹函数的优化问题，但在本文中，我们解决了两类常见的操作和供应链问题；即凹背包问题和凹生产运输问题。计算实验表明，在大多数测试用例中，我们提出的方法比文献中用于解决这两类问题的定制方法要好一个数量级。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种通用精确算法用于求解混合整数凹最小化问题，并应用于两类供应链优化问题。
AI.motivation: 现有针对凹函数优化问题的定制化方法存在效率不足，需开发更通用且高效的求解框架。
AI.method: 通过辅助线性规划构建凹函数分段内逼近，转化为双层规划并利用KKT条件转化为单层模型，结合BigM方法线性化互补松弛条件，迭代求解保证收敛。
AI.result: 计算实验表明该方法在两类问题上较现有方法平均快10倍，且具有通用性。
AI.conclusion: 提出的算法为解决混合整数凹优化问题提供了高效通用的求解框架，具有实际应用价值。

authors_text: Qiucheng Miao,Chuanfu Xu,Jun Zhan,Dong Zhu,Chengkun Wu
title: An Unsupervised Short- and Long-Term Mask Representation for Multivariate Time Series Anomaly Detection
title_zh: 用于多元时间序列异常检测的无监督短期和长期掩模表示
abstract: Anomaly detection of multivariate time series is meaningful for system behavior monitoring. This paper proposes an anomaly detection method based on unsupervised Short- and Long-term Mask Representation learning (SLMR). The main idea is to extract short-term local dependency patterns and long-term global trend patterns of the multivariate time series by using multi-scale residual dilated convolution and Gated Recurrent Unit(GRU) respectively. Furthermore, our approach can comprehend temporal contexts and feature correlations by combining spatial-temporal masked self-supervised representation learning and sequence split. It considers the importance of features is different, and we introduce the attention mechanism to adjust the contribution of each feature. Finally, a forecasting-based model and a reconstruction-based model are integrated to focus on single timestamp prediction and latent representation of time series. Experiments show that the performance of our method outperforms other state-of-the-art models on three real-world datasets. Further analysis shows that our method is good at interpretability.
summary: Anomaly detection of multivariate time series is meaningful for system behavior monitoring. This paper proposes an anomaly detection method based on unsupervised Short- and Long-term Mask Representation learning (SLMR). The main idea is to extract short-term local dependency patterns and long-term global trend patterns of the multivariate time series by using multi-scale residual dilated convolution and Gated Recurrent Unit(GRU) respectively. Furthermore, our approach can comprehend temporal contexts and feature correlations by combining spatial-temporal masked self-supervised representation learning and sequence split. It considers the importance of features is different, and we introduce the attention mechanism to adjust the contribution of each feature. Finally, a forecasting-based model and a reconstruction-based model are integrated to focus on single timestamp prediction and latent representation of time series. Experiments show that the performance of our method outperforms other state-of-the-art models on three real-world datasets. Further analysis shows that our method is good at interpretability.
abstract_zh: 多元时间序列的异常检测对于系统行为监控具有重要意义。本文提出了一种基于无监督短期和长期掩模表示学习（SLMR）的异常检测方法。主要思想是分别使用多尺度残差扩张卷积和门控循环单元（GRU）来提取多元时间序列的短期局部依赖模式和长期全局趋势模式。此外，我们的方法可以通过结合时空屏蔽自监督表示学习和序列分割来理解时间上下文和特征相关性。它考虑到特征的重要性不同，我们引入注意力机制来调整每个特征的贡献。最后，集成了基于预测的模型和基于重建的模型，重点关注单个时间戳预测和时间序列的潜在表示。实验表明，我们的方法在三个真实数据集上的性能优于其他最先进的模型。进一步分析表明我们的方法具有良好的可解释性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于无监督短长期掩码表示学习（SLMR）的多变量时间序列异常检测方法。
AI.motivation: 现有方法难以同时捕捉多变量时间序列的短期局部依赖模式和长期全局趋势模式，且未充分考虑特征重要性差异。
AI.method: 采用多尺度残差扩张卷积提取短期模式，GRU捕捉长期趋势，结合时空掩码自监督学习与序列分割，并引入注意力机制调整特征贡献，集成预测与重建模型。
AI.result: 在三个真实数据集上优于其他先进模型，且具有良好的可解释性。
AI.conclusion: SLMR方法通过融合时空特征与注意力机制，有效提升了多变量时间序列异常检测的性能与可解释性。

authors_text: Wei Zhang,Jason K. Wong,Xumeng Wang,Youcheng Gong,Rongchen Zhu,Kai Liu,Zihan Yan,Siwei Tan,Huamin Qu,Siming Chen,Wei Chen
title: CohortVA: A Visual Analytic System for Interactive Exploration of Cohorts based on Historical Data
title_zh: CohortVA：基于历史数据的群组交互式探索的视觉分析系统
abstract: In history research, cohort analysis seeks to identify social structures and figure mobilities by studying the group-based behavior of historical figures. Prior works mainly employ automatic data mining approaches, lacking effective visual explanation. In this paper, we present CohortVA, an interactive visual analytic approach that enables historians to incorporate expertise and insight into the iterative exploration process. The kernel of CohortVA is a novel identification model that generates candidate cohorts and constructs cohort features by means of pre-built knowledge graphs constructed from large-scale history databases. We propose a set of coordinated views to illustrate identified cohorts and features coupled with historical events and figure profiles. Two case studies and interviews with historians demonstrate that CohortVA can greatly enhance the capabilities of cohort identifications, figure authentications, and hypothesis generation.
summary: In history research, cohort analysis seeks to identify social structures and figure mobilities by studying the group-based behavior of historical figures. Prior works mainly employ automatic data mining approaches, lacking effective visual explanation. In this paper, we present CohortVA, an interactive visual analytic approach that enables historians to incorporate expertise and insight into the iterative exploration process. The kernel of CohortVA is a novel identification model that generates candidate cohorts and constructs cohort features by means of pre-built knowledge graphs constructed from large-scale history databases. We propose a set of coordinated views to illustrate identified cohorts and features coupled with historical events and figure profiles. Two case studies and interviews with historians demonstrate that CohortVA can greatly enhance the capabilities of cohort identifications, figure authentications, and hypothesis generation.
abstract_zh: 在历史研究中，群体分析旨在通过研究历史人物的群体行为来识别社会结构和人物流动性。先前的工作主要采用自动数据挖掘方法，缺乏有效的视觉解释。在本文中，我们提出了 CohortVA，一种交互式视觉分析方法，使历史学家能够将专业知识和洞察力融入迭代探索过程中。 CohortVA的核心是一种新颖的识别模型，它通过从大规模历史数据库构建的预先构建的知识图来生成候选队列并构建队列特征。我们提出了一组协调的视图来说明已识别的群体和特征以及历史事件和人物概况。两个案例研究和历史学家访谈表明，CohortVA 可以极大地增强队列识别、数字验证和假设生成的能力。

AI.tldr: 开发CohortVA系统，通过交互式可视化方法辅助历史学家基于历史数据进行群体分析。
AI.motivation: 传统历史研究中队列分析依赖自动数据挖掘，缺乏直观的可视化解释，难以融入专家知识。
AI.method: 构建基于大规模历史数据库的知识图谱，生成候选队列并提取特征，结合协调视图展示群体与历史事件关联。
AI.result: 案例研究与专家访谈验证系统能有效提升队列识别、人物验证及假设生成能力。

search_text: CohortVA: A Visual Analytic System for Interactive Exploration of Cohorts based on Historical Data CohortVA：基于历史数据的群组交互式探索的视觉分析系统 In history research, cohort analysis seeks to identify social structures and figure mobilities by studying the group-based behavior of historical figures. Prior works mainly employ automatic data mining approaches, lacking effective visual explanation. In this paper, we present CohortVA, an interactive visual analytic approach that enables historians to incorporate expertise and insight into the iterative exploration process. The kernel of CohortVA is a novel identification model that generates candidate cohorts and constructs cohort features by means of pre-built knowledge graphs constructed from large-scale history databases. We propose a set of coordinated views to illustrate identified cohorts and features coupled with historical events and figure profiles. Two case studies and interviews with historians demonstrate that CohortVA can greatly enhance the capabilities of cohort identifications, figure authentications, and hypothesis generation. 在历史研究中，群体分析旨在通过研究历史人物的群体行为来识别社会结构和人物流动性。先前的工作主要采用自动数据挖掘方法，缺乏有效的视觉解释。在本文中，我们提出了 CohortVA，一种交互式视觉分析方法，使历史学家能够将专业知识和洞察力融入迭代探索过程中。 CohortVA的核心是一种新颖的识别模型，它通过从大规模历史数据库构建的预先构建的知识图来生成候选队列并构建队列特征。我们提出了一组协调的视图来说明已识别的群体和特征以及历史事件和人物概况。两个案例研究和历史学家访谈表明，CohortVA 可以极大地增强队列识别、数字验证和假设生成的能力。 开发CohortVA系统，通过交互式可视化方法辅助历史学家基于历史数据进行群体分析。 Wei Zhang,Jason K. Wong,Xumeng Wang,Youcheng Gong,Rongchen Zhu,Kai Liu,Zihan Yan,Siwei Tan,Huamin Qu,Siming Chen,Wei Chen cs.HC

title: Computing a Feedback Arc Set Using PageRank
title_zh: 使用 PageRank 计算反馈弧集
comment: Appears in the Proceedings of the 30th International Symposium on Graph Drawing and Network Visualization (GD 2022)
comments: Appears in the Proceedings of the 30th International Symposium on Graph Drawing and Network Visualization (GD 2022)
abstract: We present a new heuristic algorithm for computing a minimum Feedback Arc Set in directed graphs. The new technique produces solutions that are better than the ones produced by the best previously known heuristics, often reducing the FAS size by more than 50%. It is based on computing the PageRank score of the nodes of the directed line graph of the input directed graph. Although the time required by our heuristic is heavily influenced by the size of the produced line graph, our experimental results show that it runs very fast even for very large graphs used in graph drawing.
summary: We present a new heuristic algorithm for computing a minimum Feedback Arc Set in directed graphs. The new technique produces solutions that are better than the ones produced by the best previously known heuristics, often reducing the FAS size by more than 50%. It is based on computing the PageRank score of the nodes of the directed line graph of the input directed graph. Although the time required by our heuristic is heavily influenced by the size of the produced line graph, our experimental results show that it runs very fast even for very large graphs used in graph drawing.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种新的启发式算法，用于计算有向图中的最小反馈弧集。新技术产生的解决方案比先前已知的最佳启发式方法产生的解决方案更好，通常可以将 FAS 大小减少 50% 以上。它基于计算输入有向图的有向线图的节点的PageRank分数。尽管我们的启发式所需的时间很大程度上受到生成的线图大小的影响，但我们的实验结果表明，即使对于图形绘制中使用的非常大的图形，它也运行得非常快。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于PageRank的新启发式算法，用于计算有向图的最小反馈弧集（FAS）。
AI.motivation: 现有计算反馈弧集的启发式算法效果有限，难以有效减少FAS规模，因此需要更高效的解决方案。
AI.method: 将输入有向图转换为有向线图，计算其节点的PageRank分数，并根据分数选择高得分节点构成FAS。
AI.result: 实验表明，该方法在保持快速运行的同时，能将FAS规模减少超过50%，优于现有最佳启发式算法。
AI.conclusion: 基于PageRank的启发式方法在求解反馈弧集问题上具有显著优势，尤其适用于大规模图的场景。

title: Shift Variance in Scene Text Detection
title_zh: 场景文本检测中的平移方差
comment: Accepted at the ECCV 2022 Text in Everything workshop
comments: Accepted at the ECCV 2022 Text in Everything workshop
abstract: Theory of convolutional neural networks suggests the property of shift equivariance, i.e., that a shifted input causes an equally shifted output. In practice, however, this is not always the case. This poses a great problem for scene text detection for which a consistent spatial response is crucial, irrespective of the position of the text in the scene. Using a simple synthetic experiment, we demonstrate the inherent shift variance of a state-of-the-art fully convolutional text detector. Furthermore, using the same experimental setting, we show how small architectural changes can lead to an improved shift equivariance and less variation of the detector output. We validate the synthetic results using a real-world training schedule on the text detection network. To quantify the amount of shift variability, we propose a metric based on well-established text detection benchmarks. While the proposed architectural changes are not able to fully recover shift equivariance, adding smoothing filters can substantially improve shift consistency on common text datasets. Considering the potentially large impact of small shifts, we propose to extend the commonly used text detection metrics by the metric described in this work, in order to be able to quantify the consistency of text detectors.
summary: Theory of convolutional neural networks suggests the property of shift equivariance, i.e., that a shifted input causes an equally shifted output. In practice, however, this is not always the case. This poses a great problem for scene text detection for which a consistent spatial response is crucial, irrespective of the position of the text in the scene. Using a simple synthetic experiment, we demonstrate the inherent shift variance of a state-of-the-art fully convolutional text detector. Furthermore, using the same experimental setting, we show how small architectural changes can lead to an improved shift equivariance and less variation of the detector output. We validate the synthetic results using a real-world training schedule on the text detection network. To quantify the amount of shift variability, we propose a metric based on well-established text detection benchmarks. While the proposed architectural changes are not able to fully recover shift equivariance, adding smoothing filters can substantially improve shift consistency on common text datasets. Considering the potentially large impact of small shifts, we propose to extend the commonly used text detection metrics by the metric described in this work, in order to be able to quantify the consistency of text detectors.
abstract_zh: 卷积神经网络的理论提出了平移等方差的性质，即平移的输入会导致同样平移的输出。但实际上，情况并非总是如此。这给场景文本检测带来了一个很大的问题，对于场景文本检测来说，无论文本在场景中的位置如何，一致的空间响应都是至关重要的。使用简单的综合实验，我们证明了最先进的全卷积文本检测器的固有移位方差。此外，使用相同的实验设置，我们展示了微小的架构变化如何能够改善移位等方差并减少探测器输出的变化。我们使用文本检测网络上的真实训练计划来验证合成结果。为了量化变化的量，我们提出了一个基于完善的文本检测基准的指标。虽然所提出的架构更改无法完全恢复平移等方差，但添加平滑滤波器可以显着提高常见文本数据集的平移一致性。考虑到小变化的潜在巨大影响，我们建议通过本工作中描述的指标扩展常用的文本检测指标，以便能够量化文本检测器的一致性。

AI.tldr: 研究场景文本检测中的位移方差问题，提出改进方法以提高检测器的空间一致性。
AI.motivation: 卷积神经网络理论上具有位移等变性，但实际应用中场景文本检测器对文本位置敏感，导致输出不一致，影响检测性能。
AI.method: 通过合成实验验证检测器的位移方差特性，设计架构改进方案并引入平滑滤波器，结合真实数据训练验证，提出基于基准指标的位移一致性量化指标。
AI.result: 架构改进与平滑滤波器显著降低检测输出方差，新指标有效衡量检测器一致性，但无法完全恢复理论上的位移等变性。
AI.conclusion: 位移方差是场景文本检测的关键问题，需通过架构优化与改进评估指标提升检测稳定性，建议将新指标纳入主流检测评估体系。

authors_text: Xiaogang Peng,Yaodi Shen,Haoran Wang,Binling Nie,Yigang Wang,Zizhao Wu
title: SoMoFormer: Social-Aware Motion Transformer for Multi-Person Motion Prediction
title_zh: SoMoFormer：用于多人运动预测的社交感知运动变压器
abstract: Multi-person motion prediction remains a challenging problem, especially in the joint representation learning of individual motion and social interactions. Most prior methods only involve learning local pose dynamics for individual motion (without global body trajectory) and also struggle to capture complex interaction dependencies for social interactions. In this paper, we propose a novel Social-Aware Motion Transformer (SoMoFormer) to effectively model individual motion and social interactions in a joint manner. Specifically, SoMoFormer extracts motion features from sub-sequences in displacement trajectory space to effectively learn both local and global pose dynamics for each individual. In addition, we devise a novel social-aware motion attention mechanism in SoMoFormer to further optimize dynamics representations and capture interaction dependencies simultaneously via motion similarity calculation across time and social dimensions. On both short- and long-term horizons, we empirically evaluate our framework on multi-person motion datasets and demonstrate that our method greatly outperforms state-of-the-art methods of single- and multi-person motion prediction. Code will be made publicly available upon acceptance.
summary: Multi-person motion prediction remains a challenging problem, especially in the joint representation learning of individual motion and social interactions. Most prior methods only involve learning local pose dynamics for individual motion (without global body trajectory) and also struggle to capture complex interaction dependencies for social interactions. In this paper, we propose a novel Social-Aware Motion Transformer (SoMoFormer) to effectively model individual motion and social interactions in a joint manner. Specifically, SoMoFormer extracts motion features from sub-sequences in displacement trajectory space to effectively learn both local and global pose dynamics for each individual. In addition, we devise a novel social-aware motion attention mechanism in SoMoFormer to further optimize dynamics representations and capture interaction dependencies simultaneously via motion similarity calculation across time and social dimensions. On both short- and long-term horizons, we empirically evaluate our framework on multi-person motion datasets and demonstrate that our method greatly outperforms state-of-the-art methods of single- and multi-person motion prediction. Code will be made publicly available upon acceptance.
abstract_zh: 多人运动预测仍然是一个具有挑战性的问题，特别是在个体运动和社交交互的联合表示学习中。大多数现有方法仅涉及学习个体运动的局部姿势动力学（没有全局身体轨迹），并且还难以捕获社交交互的复杂交互依赖性。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的社交感知运动变压器（SoMoFormer），以联合方式有效地模拟个人运动和社交互动。具体来说，SoMoFormer 从位移轨迹空间中的子序列中提取运动特征，以有效地学习每个个体的局部和全局姿态动力学。此外，我们在 SoMoFormer 中设计了一种新颖的社交感知运动注意机制，以进一步优化动态表示并通过跨时间和社交维度的运动相似性计算同时捕获交互依赖性。从短期和长期的角度来看，我们在多人运动数据集上凭经验评估了我们的框架，并证明我们的方法大大优于单人和多人运动预测的最先进方法。代码将在接受后公开发布。

AI.tldr: 本文提出SoMoFormer模型，通过联合建模个体运动与社交交互，解决多人运动预测问题。
AI.motivation: 现有方法难以同时捕捉个体局部姿态动态与全局社交交互依赖，导致多人运动预测效果受限。
AI.method: 设计Social-Aware Motion Transformer，通过位移轨迹空间提取运动特征，并引入跨时空社交注意力机制建模交互关系。
AI.result: 在多个数据集的短期和长期预测任务中，SoMoFormer显著优于现有单人及多人运动预测方法。
AI.conclusion: SoMoFormer通过联合建模个体动力学与社交依赖，有效提升多人运动预测性能，代码将公开发布。

search_text: SoMoFormer: Social-Aware Motion Transformer for Multi-Person Motion Prediction SoMoFormer：用于多人运动预测的社交感知运动变压器 Multi-person motion prediction remains a challenging problem, especially in the joint representation learning of individual motion and social interactions. Most prior methods only involve learning local pose dynamics for individual motion (without global body trajectory) and also struggle to capture complex interaction dependencies for social interactions. In this paper, we propose a novel Social-Aware Motion Transformer (SoMoFormer) to effectively model individual motion and social interactions in a joint manner. Specifically, SoMoFormer extracts motion features from sub-sequences in displacement trajectory space to effectively learn both local and global pose dynamics for each individual. In addition, we devise a novel social-aware motion attention mechanism in SoMoFormer to further optimize dynamics representations and capture interaction dependencies simultaneously via motion similarity calculation across time and social dimensions. On both short- and long-term horizons, we empirically evaluate our framework on multi-person motion datasets and demonstrate that our method greatly outperforms state-of-the-art methods of single- and multi-person motion prediction. Code will be made publicly available upon acceptance. 多人运动预测仍然是一个具有挑战性的问题，特别是在个体运动和社交交互的联合表示学习中。大多数现有方法仅涉及学习个体运动的局部姿势动力学（没有全局身体轨迹），并且还难以捕获社交交互的复杂交互依赖性。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的社交感知运动变压器（SoMoFormer），以联合方式有效地模拟个人运动和社交互动。具体来说，SoMoFormer 从位移轨迹空间中的子序列中提取运动特征，以有效地学习每个个体的局部和全局姿态动力学。此外，我们在 SoMoFormer 中设计了一种新颖的社交感知运动注意机制，以进一步优化动态表示并通过跨时间和社交维度的运动相似性计算同时捕获交互依赖性。从短期和长期的角度来看，我们在多人运动数据集上凭经验评估了我们的框架，并证明我们的方法大大优于单人和多人运动预测的最先进方法。代码将在接受后公开发布。 本文提出SoMoFormer模型，通过联合建模个体运动与社交交互，解决多人运动预测问题。 Xiaogang Peng,Yaodi Shen,Haoran Wang,Binling Nie,Yigang Wang,Zizhao Wu cs.CV

authors_text: Mun Seng Phoon,Philipp S. Schmitt,Georg v. Wichert
title: Constraint-based Task Specification and Trajectory Optimization for Sequential Manipulation
title_zh: 基于约束的顺序操作任务规范和轨迹优化
comment: Accepted for publication at the 2022 IEEE/RSJ International Conference on Intelligent Robots and Systems (IROS 2022)
comments: Accepted for publication at the 2022 IEEE/RSJ International Conference on Intelligent Robots and Systems (IROS 2022)
abstract: To economically deploy robotic manipulators the programming and execution of robot motions must be swift. To this end, we propose a novel, constraint-based method to intuitively specify sequential manipulation tasks and to compute time-optimal robot motions for such a task specification. Our approach follows the ideas of constraint-based task specification by aiming for a minimal and object-centric task description that is largely independent of the underlying robot kinematics. We transform this task description into a non-linear optimization problem. By solving this problem we obtain a (locally) time-optimal robot motion, not just for a single motion, but for an entire manipulation sequence. We demonstrate the capabilities of our approach in a series of experiments involving five distinct robot models, including a highly redundant mobile manipulator.
summary: To economically deploy robotic manipulators the programming and execution of robot motions must be swift. To this end, we propose a novel, constraint-based method to intuitively specify sequential manipulation tasks and to compute time-optimal robot motions for such a task specification. Our approach follows the ideas of constraint-based task specification by aiming for a minimal and object-centric task description that is largely independent of the underlying robot kinematics. We transform this task description into a non-linear optimization problem. By solving this problem we obtain a (locally) time-optimal robot motion, not just for a single motion, but for an entire manipulation sequence. We demonstrate the capabilities of our approach in a series of experiments involving five distinct robot models, including a highly redundant mobile manipulator.
abstract_zh: 为了经济地部署机器人操纵器，机器人运动的编程和执行必须快速。为此，我们提出了一种新颖的基于约束的方法来直观地指定顺序操作任务并计算此类任务规范的时间最优机器人运动。我们的方法遵循基于约束的任务规范的思想，旨在实现最小且以对象为中心的任务描述，该描述在很大程度上独立于底层机器人运动学。我们将此任务描述转化为非线性优化问题。通过解决这个问题，我们获得了（局部）时间最优的机器人运动，不仅针对单个运动，而且针对整个操作序列。我们在涉及五个不同机器人模型（包括高度冗余的移动机械手）的一系列实验中展示了我们的方法的功能。

AI.tldr: 提出一种基于约束的方法，用于直观指定顺序操作任务并计算时间最优的机器人运动轨迹。
AI.motivation: 为了高效部署机械臂，需快速编程和执行机器人运动，传统方法可能依赖复杂运动学，难以直观指定任务。
AI.method: 通过约束基于任务描述，转化为非线性优化问题，求解得到局部时间最优的机器人运动序列。
AI.result: 在五种不同机器人模型上验证，包括高度冗余机械臂，证明方法的有效性和适用性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法能有效生成时间最优的顺序操作轨迹，适用于多种机器人模型，具有广泛的应用潜力。

To this end, we propose a novel, constraint-based method to intuitively specify sequential manipulation tasks and to compute time-optimal robot motions for such a task specification. Our approach follows the ideas of constraint-based task specification by aiming for a minimal and object-centric task description that is largely independent of the underlying robot kinematics. By solving this problem we obtain a (locally) time-optimal robot motion, not just for a single motion, but for an entire manipulation sequence. authors_text: Eva Schnider,Antal Huck,Mireille Toranelli,Georg Rauter,Azhar Zam,Magdalena Müller-Gerbl,Philippe Cattin
title: Ensemble uncertainty as a criterion for dataset expansion in distinct bone segmentation from upper-body CT images
title_zh: 集合不确定性作为上身 CT 图像不同骨分割数据集扩展的标准
abstract: Purpose: The localisation and segmentation of individual bones is an important preprocessing step in many planning and navigation applications. It is, however, a time-consuming and repetitive task if done manually. This is true not only for clinical practice but also for the acquisition of training data. We therefore not only present an end-to-end learnt algorithm that is capable of segmenting 125 distinct bones in an upper-body CT, but also provide an ensemble-based uncertainty measure that helps to single out scans to enlarge the training dataset with. Methods We create fully automated end-to-end learnt segmentations using a neural network architecture inspired by the 3D-Unet and fully supervised training. The results are improved using ensembles and inference-time augmentation. We examine the relationship of ensemble-uncertainty to an unlabelled scan's prospective usefulness as part of the training dataset. Results: Our methods are evaluated on an in-house dataset of 16 upper-body CT scans with a resolution of \SI{2}{\milli\meter} per dimension. Taking into account all 125 bones in our label set, our most successful ensemble achieves a median dice score coefficient of 0.83. We find a lack of correlation between a scan's ensemble uncertainty and its prospective influence on the accuracies achieved within an enlarged training set. At the same time, we show that the ensemble uncertainty correlates to the number of voxels that need manual correction after an initial automated segmentation, thus minimising the time required to finalise a new ground truth segmentation. Conclusion: In combination, scans with low ensemble uncertainty need less annotator time while yielding similar future DSC improvements. They are thus ideal candidates to enlarge a training set for upper-body distinct bone segmentation from CT scans. }
summary: Purpose: The localisation and segmentation of individual bones is an important preprocessing step in many planning and navigation applications. It is, however, a time-consuming and repetitive task if done manually. This is true not only for clinical practice but also for the acquisition of training data. We therefore not only present an end-to-end learnt algorithm that is capable of segmenting 125 distinct bones in an upper-body CT, but also provide an ensemble-based uncertainty measure that helps to single out scans to enlarge the training dataset with. Methods We create fully automated end-to-end learnt segmentations using a neural network architecture inspired by the 3D-Unet and fully supervised training. The results are improved using ensembles and inference-time augmentation. We examine the relationship of ensemble-uncertainty to an unlabelled scan's prospective usefulness as part of the training dataset. Results: Our methods are evaluated on an in-house dataset of 16 upper-body CT scans with a resolution of \SI{2}{\milli\meter} per dimension. Taking into account all 125 bones in our label set, our most successful ensemble achieves a median dice score coefficient of 0.83. We find a lack of correlation between a scan's ensemble uncertainty and its prospective influence on the accuracies achieved within an enlarged training set. At the same time, we show that the ensemble uncertainty correlates to the number of voxels that need manual correction after an initial automated segmentation, thus minimising the time required to finalise a new ground truth segmentation. Conclusion: In combination, scans with low ensemble uncertainty need less annotator time while yielding similar future DSC improvements. They are thus ideal candidates to enlarge a training set for upper-body distinct bone segmentation from CT scans. }
abstract_zh: 目的：单个骨骼的定位和分割是许多规划和导航应用中的重要预处理步骤。然而，如果手动完成，这是一项耗时且重复的任务。这不仅适用于临床实践，也适用于训练数据的获取。因此，我们不仅提出了一种能够在上半身 CT 中分割 125 个不同骨骼的端到端学习算法，而且还提供了一种基于集合的不确定性测量，有助于挑选出扫描以扩大训练数据集。方法我们使用受 3D-Unet 和完全监督训练启发的神经网络架构创建全自动的端到端学习分割。使用集成和推理时间增强来改进结果。我们检查集合不确定性与作为训练数据集一部分的未标记扫描的预期有用性之间的关系。结果：我们的方法在 16 个上半身 CT 扫描的内部数据集上进行评估，每个维度的分辨率为 \SI{2}{\milli\meter}。考虑到我们标签集中的所有 125 个骨骼，我们最成功的集成实现了 0.83 的中值骰子得分系数。我们发现扫描的整体不确定性与其对扩大的训练集内实现的精度的预期影响之间缺乏相关性。同时，我们表明，整体不确定性与初始自动分割后需要手动校正的体素数量相关，从而最大限度地减少完成新的地面实况分割所需的时间。结论：结合起来，具有低整体不确定性的扫描需要更少的注释器时间，同时产生类似的未来 DSC 改进。因此，它们是扩大 CT 扫描上身不同骨分割训练集的理想候选者。 }

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于集成不确定性的方法，用于选择CT扫描数据以扩展上半身骨骼分割的训练集，并开发了端到端的自动分割算法。
AI.motivation: 手动分割上半身CT图像中的骨骼耗时且重复，且训练数据获取困难，需自动化方法及有效数据扩展策略。
AI.method: 采用类似3D-Unet的神经网络架构进行全监督训练，结合集成学习与推理时数据增强，并通过集成不确定性评估未标记扫描的潜在数据价值。
AI.result: 在16例CT数据集上，最佳集成模型达到0.83的中位数Dice系数，但发现集成不确定性与训练集扩展后的准确率提升无关，却与手动修正所需体素数相关。
AI.conclusion: 低不确定性扫描可减少标注时间且提供相似性能提升，是扩展训练集的理想候选。

conclusion: 低不确定性扫描可减少标注时间且提供相似性能提升，是扩展训练集的理想候选。
search_text: Ensemble uncertainty as a criterion for dataset expansion in distinct bone segmentation from upper-body CT images 集合不确定性作为上身 CT 图像不同骨分割数据集扩展的标准 Purpose: The localisation and segmentation of individual bones is an important preprocessing step in many planning and navigation applications. It is, however, a time-consuming and repetitive task if done manually. This is true not only for clinical practice but also for the acquisition of training data. We therefore not only present an end-to-end learnt algorithm that is capable of segmenting 125 distinct bones in an upper-body CT, but also provide an ensemble-based uncertainty measure that helps to single out scans to enlarge the training dataset with. Methods We create fully automated end-to-end learnt segmentations using a neural network architecture inspired by the 3D-Unet and fully supervised training. The results are improved using ensembles and inference-time augmentation. We examine the relationship of ensemble-uncertainty to an unlabelled scan's prospective usefulness as part of the training dataset. Results: Our methods are evaluated on an in-house dataset of 16 upper-body CT scans with a resolution of \SI{2}{\milli\meter} per dimension. Taking into account all 125 bones in our label set, our most successful ensemble achieves a median dice score coefficient of 0.83. We find a lack of correlation between a scan's ensemble uncertainty and its prospective influence on the accuracies achieved within an enlarged training set. At the same time, we show that the ensemble uncertainty correlates to the number of voxels that need manual correction after an initial automated segmentation, thus minimising the time required to finalise a new ground truth segmentation. Conclusion: In combination, scans with low ensemble uncertainty need less annotator time while yielding similar future DSC improvements. They are thus ideal candidates to enlarge a training set for upper-body distinct bone segmentation from CT scans. } 目的：单个骨骼的定位和分割是许多规划和导航应用中的重要预处理步骤。然而，如果手动完成，这是一项耗时且重复的任务。这不仅适用于临床实践，也适用于训练数据的获取。因此，我们不仅提出了一种能够在上半身 CT 中分割 125 个不同骨骼的端到端学习算法，而且还提供了一种基于集合的不确定性测量，有助于挑选出扫描以扩大训练数据集。方法我们使用受 3D-Unet 和完全监督训练启发的神经网络架构创建全自动的端到端学习分割。使用集成和推理时间增强来改进结果。我们检查集合不确定性与作为训练数据集一部分的未标记扫描的预期有用性之间的关系。结果：我们的方法在 16 个上半身 CT 扫描的内部数据集上进行评估，每个维度的分辨率为 \SI{2}{\milli\meter}。考虑到我们标签集中的所有 125 个骨骼，我们最成功的集成实现了 0.83 的中值骰子得分系数。我们发现扫描的整体不确定性与其对扩大的训练集内实现的精度的预期影响之间缺乏相关性。同时，我们表明，整体不确定性与初始自动分割后需要手动校正的体素数量相关，从而最大限度地减少完成新的地面实况分割所需的时间。结论：结合起来，具有低整体不确定性的扫描需要更少的注释器时间，同时产生类似的未来 DSC 改进。因此，它们是扩大 CT 扫描上身不同骨分割训练集的理想候选者。 } 本文提出一种基于集成不确定性的方法，用于选择CT扫描数据以扩展上半身骨骼分割的训练集，并开发了端到端的自动分割算法。 Eva Schnider,Antal Huck,Mireille Toranelli,Georg Rauter,Azhar Zam,Magdalena Müller-Gerbl,Philippe Cattin eess.IV,cs.CV

authors_text: Mohammed Saeed,Nicolas Traub,Maelle Nicolas,Gianluca Demartini,Paolo Papotti
title: Crowdsourced Fact-Checking at Twitter: How Does the Crowd Compare With Experts?
title_zh: Twitter 的众包事实核查：大众与专家相比如何？
comment: ef:Proceedings of the 31st ACM International Conference on Information and Knowledge Management (CIKM 2022)
comments: ef:Proceedings of the 31st ACM International Conference on Information and Knowledge Management (CIKM 2022)
abstract: Fact-checking is one of the effective solutions in fighting online misinformation. However, traditional fact-checking is a process requiring scarce expert human resources, and thus does not scale well on social media because of the continuous flow of new content to be checked. Methods based on crowdsourcing have been proposed to tackle this challenge, as they can scale with a smaller cost, but, while they have shown to be feasible, have always been studied in controlled environments. In this work, we study the first large-scale effort of crowdsourced fact-checking deployed in practice, started by Twitter with the Birdwatch program. Our analysis shows that crowdsourcing may be an effective fact-checking strategy in some settings, even comparable to results obtained by human experts, but does not lead to consistent, actionable results in others. We processed 11.9k tweets verified by the Birdwatch program and report empirical evidence of i) differences in how the crowd and experts select content to be fact-checked, ii) how the crowd and the experts retrieve different resources to fact-check, and iii) the edge the crowd shows in fact-checking scalability and efficiency as compared to expert checkers.
summary: Fact-checking is one of the effective solutions in fighting online misinformation. However, traditional fact-checking is a process requiring scarce expert human resources, and thus does not scale well on social media because of the continuous flow of new content to be checked. Methods based on crowdsourcing have been proposed to tackle this challenge, as they can scale with a smaller cost, but, while they have shown to be feasible, have always been studied in controlled environments. In this work, we study the first large-scale effort of crowdsourced fact-checking deployed in practice, started by Twitter with the Birdwatch program. Our analysis shows that crowdsourcing may be an effective fact-checking strategy in some settings, even comparable to results obtained by human experts, but does not lead to consistent, actionable results in others. We processed 11.9k tweets verified by the Birdwatch program and report empirical evidence of i) differences in how the crowd and experts select content to be fact-checked, ii) how the crowd and the experts retrieve different resources to fact-check, and iii) the edge the crowd shows in fact-checking scalability and efficiency as compared to expert checkers.
abstract_zh: 事实核查是打击网络虚假信息的有效解决方案之一。然而，传统的事实核查是一个需要稀缺专家人力资源的过程，因此由于需要核查的新内容不断流动，因此在社交媒体上无法很好地扩展。人们提出了基于众包的方法来应对这一挑战，因为它们可以以较小的成本进行扩展，但是，虽然它们已被证明是可行的，但始终是在受控环境中进行研究。在这项工作中，我们研究了 Twitter 的 Birdwatch 项目在实践中部署的第一个大规模众包事实核查工作。我们的分析表明，在某些情况下，众包可能是一种有效的事实核查策略，甚至可以与人类专家获得的结果相媲美，但在其他情况下却无法产生一致的、可操作的结果。我们处理了 Birdwatch 程序验证的 11,900 条推文，并报告了以下方面的经验证据：i) 人群和专家如何选择要进行事实检查的内容的差异，ii) 人群和专家如何检索不同的资源进行事实检查，以及 iii) 与专家检查人员相比，人群在事实检查可扩展性和效率方面表现出的优势。

AI.tldr: 该论文研究了Twitter通过Birdwatch项目进行的众包事实核查效果，并与专家事实核查结果进行对比分析。
AI.motivation: 传统事实核查依赖稀缺专家资源难以应对社交媒体海量内容，而众包方法虽具扩展性但缺乏实际部署验证。本文旨在评估众包事实核查在真实场景中的有效性。
AI.method: 分析Twitter Birdwatch项目验证的11.9万条推文，对比众包群体与专家在内容选择、信息来源使用及核查效率上的差异。
AI.result: 发现众包在可扩展性和效率上优于专家，但在内容筛选标准和信息来源可靠性上存在差异，且无法保证一致性的可操作结果。
AI.conclusion: 众包事实核查在特定场景下可作为专家的补充方案，但其结果一致性与权威性仍需进一步优化。

search_text: Crowdsourced Fact-Checking at Twitter: How Does the Crowd Compare With Experts? Twitter 的众包事实核查：大众与专家相比如何？ Fact-checking is one of the effective solutions in fighting online misinformation. However, traditional fact-checking is a process requiring scarce expert human resources, and thus does not scale well on social media because of the continuous flow of new content to be checked. Methods based on crowdsourcing have been proposed to tackle this challenge, as they can scale with a smaller cost, but, while they have shown to be feasible, have always been studied in controlled environments. In this work, we study the first large-scale effort of crowdsourced fact-checking deployed in practice, started by Twitter with the Birdwatch program. Our analysis shows that crowdsourcing may be an effective fact-checking strategy in some settings, even comparable to results obtained by human experts, but does not lead to consistent, actionable results in others. We processed 11.9k tweets verified by the Birdwatch program and report empirical evidence of i) differences in how the crowd and experts select content to be fact-checked, ii) how the crowd and the experts retrieve different resources to fact-check, and iii) the edge the crowd shows in fact-checking scalability and efficiency as compared to expert checkers. 事实核查是打击网络虚假信息的有效解决方案之一。然而，传统的事实核查是一个需要稀缺专家人力资源的过程，因此由于需要核查的新内容不断流动，因此在社交媒体上无法很好地扩展。人们提出了基于众包的方法来应对这一挑战，因为它们可以以较小的成本进行扩展，但是，虽然它们已被证明是可行的，但始终是在受控环境中进行研究。在这项工作中，我们研究了 Twitter 的 Birdwatch 项目在实践中部署的第一个大规模众包事实核查工作。我们的分析表明，在某些情况下，众包可能是一种有效的事实核查策略，甚至可以与人类专家获得的结果相媲美，但在其他情况下却无法产生一致的、可操作的结果。我们处理了 Birdwatch 程序验证的 11,900 条推文，并报告了以下方面的经验证据：i) 人群和专家如何选择要进行事实检查的内容的差异，ii) 人群和专家如何检索不同的资源进行事实检查，以及 iii) 与专家检查人员相比，人群在事实检查可扩展性和效率方面表现出的优势。 该论文研究了Twitter通过Birdwatch项目进行的众包事实核查效果，并与专家事实核查结果进行对比分析。 Mohammed Saeed,Nicolas Traub,Maelle Nicolas,Gianluca Demartini,Paolo Papotti cs.IR,cs.AI,cs.DB

title: Booster-SHOT: Boosting Stacked Homography Transformations for Multiview Pedestrian Detection with Attention
title_zh: Booster-SHOT：增强堆叠单应变换以进行多视图行人检测
comment: Arxiv preprint
comments: Arxiv preprint
abstract: Improving multi-view aggregation is integral for multi-view pedestrian detection, which aims to obtain a bird's-eye-view pedestrian occupancy map from images captured through a set of calibrated cameras. Inspired by the success of attention modules for deep neural networks, we first propose a Homography Attention Module (HAM) which is shown to boost the performance of existing end-to-end multiview detection approaches by utilizing a novel channel gate and spatial gate. Additionally, we propose Booster-SHOT, an end-to-end convolutional approach to multiview pedestrian detection incorporating our proposed HAM as well as elements from previous approaches such as view-coherent augmentation or stacked homography transformations. Booster-SHOT achieves 92.9% and 94.2% for MODA on Wildtrack and MultiviewX respectively, outperforming the state-of-the-art by 1.4% on Wildtrack and 0.5% on MultiviewX, achieving state-of-the-art performance overall for standard evaluation metrics used in multi-view pedestrian detection.
summary: Improving multi-view aggregation is integral for multi-view pedestrian detection, which aims to obtain a bird's-eye-view pedestrian occupancy map from images captured through a set of calibrated cameras. Inspired by the success of attention modules for deep neural networks, we first propose a Homography Attention Module (HAM) which is shown to boost the performance of existing end-to-end multiview detection approaches by utilizing a novel channel gate and spatial gate. Additionally, we propose Booster-SHOT, an end-to-end convolutional approach to multiview pedestrian detection incorporating our proposed HAM as well as elements from previous approaches such as view-coherent augmentation or stacked homography transformations. Booster-SHOT achieves 92.9% and 94.2% for MODA on Wildtrack and MultiviewX respectively, outperforming the state-of-the-art by 1.4% on Wildtrack and 0.5% on MultiviewX, achieving state-of-the-art performance overall for standard evaluation metrics used in multi-view pedestrian detection.
abstract_zh: 改进多视图聚合是多视图行人检测不可或缺的一部分，其目的是从通过一组校准相机捕获的图像中获得鸟瞰行人占用图。受深度神经网络注意力模块成功的启发，我们首先提出了单应性注意力模块（HAM），该模块被证明可以通过利用新型通道门和空间门来提高现有端到端多视图检测方法的性能。此外，我们提出了 Booster-SHOT，这是一种用于多视图行人检测的端到端卷积方法，结合了我们提出的 HAM 以及之前方法中的元素，例如视图相干增强或堆叠单应性变换。 Booster-SHOT 在 Wildtrack 和 MultiviewX 上的 MODA 分别达到了 92.9% 和 94.2%，在 Wildtrack 上比最先进的技术高出 1.4%，在 MultiviewX 上比最先进的技术高出 0.5%，在多视图行人检测中使用的标准评估指标方面总体上实现了最先进的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合注意力机制的多视图行人检测方法Booster-SHOT，通过改进堆叠同态变换提升多视角信息聚合效果。
AI.motivation: 多视图行人检测中现有方法对多视角信息的聚合能力不足，而注意力机制能有效捕捉关键特征，因此需设计新型注意力模块提升性能。
AI.method: 提出同态注意力模块（HAM）包含通道门控与空间门控，结合堆叠同态变换和视图增强技术，构建端到端卷积检测框架Booster-SHOT。
AI.result: 在Wildtrack和MultiviewX数据集上分别达到92.9%和94.2%的MODA指标，较现有最优方法提升1.4%和0.5%。
AI.conclusion: Booster-SHOT通过注意力机制优化多视图特征融合，在标准评估指标上达到SOTA性能，验证了方法的有效性。

Inspired by the success of attention modules for deep neural networks, we first propose a Homography Attention Module (HAM) which is shown to boost the performance of existing end-to-end multiview detection approaches by utilizing a novel channel gate and spatial gate. Additionally, we propose Booster-SHOT, an end-to-end convolutional approach to multiview pedestrian detection incorporating our proposed HAM as well as elements from previous approaches such as view-coherent augmentation or stacked homography transformations. Booster-SHOT achieves 92.9% and 94.2% for MODA on Wildtrack and MultiviewX respectively, outperforming the state-of-the-art by 1.4% on Wildtrack and 0.5% on MultiviewX, achieving state-of-the-art performance overall for standard evaluation metrics used in multi-view pedestrian detection. 改进多视图聚合是多视图行人检测不可或缺的一部分，其目的是从通过一组校准相机捕获的图像中获得鸟瞰行人占用图。受深度神经网络注意力模块成功的启发，我们首先提出了单应性注意力模块（HAM），该模块被证明可以通过利用新型通道门和空间门来提高现有端到端多视图检测方法的性能。此外，我们提出了 Booster-SHOT，这是一种用于多视图行人检测的端到端卷积方法，结合了我们提出的 HAM 以及之前方法中的元素，例如视图相干增强或堆叠单应性变换。 Booster-SHOT 在 Wildtrack 和 MultiviewX 上的 MODA 分别达到了 92.9% 和 94.2%，在 Wildtrack 上比最先进的技术高出 1.4%，在 MultiviewX 上比最先进的技术高出 0.5%，在多视图行人检测中使用的标准评估指标方面总体上实现了最先进的性能。 本文提出一种结合注意力机制的多视图行人检测方法Booster-SHOT，通过改进堆叠同态变换提升多视角信息聚合效果。 Jinwoo Hwang,Philipp Benz,Tae-hoon Kim cs.CV

title: Towards Efficient Capsule Networks
title_zh: 迈向高效的胶囊网络
comment: Accepted at ICIP 2022 Special Session SCENA: Simplification, Compression and Efficiency with Neural networks and Artificial intelligence
comments: Accepted at ICIP 2022 Special Session SCENA: Simplification, Compression and Efficiency with Neural networks and Artificial intelligence
abstract: From the moment Neural Networks dominated the scene for image processing, the computational complexity needed to solve the targeted tasks skyrocketed: against such an unsustainable trend, many strategies have been developed, ambitiously targeting performance's preservation. Promoting sparse topologies, for example, allows the deployment of deep neural networks models on embedded, resource-constrained devices. Recently, Capsule Networks were introduced to enhance explainability of a model, where each capsule is an explicit representation of an object or its parts. These models show promising results on toy datasets, but their low scalability prevents deployment on more complex tasks. In this work, we explore sparsity besides capsule representations to improve their computational efficiency by reducing the number of capsules. We show how pruning with Capsule Network achieves high generalization with less memory requirements, computational effort, and inference and training time.
summary: From the moment Neural Networks dominated the scene for image processing, the computational complexity needed to solve the targeted tasks skyrocketed: against such an unsustainable trend, many strategies have been developed, ambitiously targeting performance's preservation. Promoting sparse topologies, for example, allows the deployment of deep neural networks models on embedded, resource-constrained devices. Recently, Capsule Networks were introduced to enhance explainability of a model, where each capsule is an explicit representation of an object or its parts. These models show promising results on toy datasets, but their low scalability prevents deployment on more complex tasks. In this work, we explore sparsity besides capsule representations to improve their computational efficiency by reducing the number of capsules. We show how pruning with Capsule Network achieves high generalization with less memory requirements, computational effort, and inference and training time.
abstract_zh: 从神经网络在图像处理领域占据主导地位的那一刻起，解决目标任务所需的计算复杂性就急剧上升：针对这种不可持续的趋势，人们开发了许多策略，雄心勃勃地致力于保持性能。例如，推广稀疏拓扑允许在嵌入式、资源受限的设备上部署深度神经网络模型。最近，胶囊网络被引入以增强模型的可解释性，其中每个胶囊都是对象或其部分的显式表示。这些模型在玩具数据集上显示出有希望的结果，但它们的可扩展性较低，无法部署到更复杂的任务上。在这项工作中，我们探索了胶囊表示之外的稀疏性，以通过减少胶囊的数量来提高计算效率。我们展示了胶囊网络的剪枝如何以更少的内存需求、计算量以及推理和训练时间实现高度泛化。

AI.tldr: 本文通过引入稀疏性优化胶囊网络，减少胶囊数量以提升计算效率，解决其可扩展性问题。
AI.motivation: 传统神经网络计算复杂度高，而胶囊网络虽具可解释性但扩展性差，需寻求高效方案以适应复杂任务。
AI.method: 结合稀疏性与胶囊表示，采用剪枝技术减少胶囊数量，降低内存和计算需求。
AI.result: 剪枝后的胶囊网络在保持高泛化能力的同时，显著减少内存占用、计算量及训练推理时间。
AI.conclusion: 通过稀疏性优化，胶囊网络的计算效率得以提升，为复杂任务部署提供了可行方案。

title: Improving Post-Processing of Audio Event Detectors Using Reinforcement Learning
title_zh: 使用强化学习改进音频事件检测器的后处理
comment: Published on IEEE Access journal, Volume 10, 2022
comments: Published on IEEE Access journal, Volume 10, 2022
abstract: We apply post-processing to the class probability distribution outputs of audio event classification models and employ reinforcement learning to jointly discover the optimal parameters for various stages of a post-processing stack, such as the classification thresholds and the kernel sizes of median filtering algorithms used to smooth out model predictions. To achieve this we define a reinforcement learning environment where: 1) a state is the class probability distribution provided by the model for a given audio sample, 2) an action is the choice of a candidate optimal value for each parameter of the post-processing stack, 3) the reward is based on the classification accuracy metric we aim to optimize, which is the audio event-based macro F1-score in our case. We apply our post-processing to the class probability distribution outputs of two audio event classification models submitted to the DCASE Task4 2020 challenge. We find that by using reinforcement learning to discover the optimal per-class parameters for the post-processing stack that is applied to the outputs of audio event classification models, we can improve the audio event-based macro F1-score (the main metric used in the DCASE challenge to compare audio event classification accuracy) by 4-5% compared to using the same post-processing stack with manually tuned parameters.
summary: We apply post-processing to the class probability distribution outputs of audio event classification models and employ reinforcement learning to jointly discover the optimal parameters for various stages of a post-processing stack, such as the classification thresholds and the kernel sizes of median filtering algorithms used to smooth out model predictions. To achieve this we define a reinforcement learning environment where: 1) a state is the class probability distribution provided by the model for a given audio sample, 2) an action is the choice of a candidate optimal value for each parameter of the post-processing stack, 3) the reward is based on the classification accuracy metric we aim to optimize, which is the audio event-based macro F1-score in our case. We apply our post-processing to the class probability distribution outputs of two audio event classification models submitted to the DCASE Task4 2020 challenge. We find that by using reinforcement learning to discover the optimal per-class parameters for the post-processing stack that is applied to the outputs of audio event classification models, we can improve the audio event-based macro F1-score (the main metric used in the DCASE challenge to compare audio event classification accuracy) by 4-5% compared to using the same post-processing stack with manually tuned parameters.
abstract_zh: 我们将后处理应用于音频事件分类模型的类概率分布输出，并采用强化学习来共同发现后处理堆栈各个阶段的最佳参数，例如用于平滑模型预测的中值滤波算法的分类阈值和内核大小。为了实现这一目标，我们定义了一个强化学习环境，其中：1）状态是模型为给定音频样本提供的类概率分布，2）动作是为后处理堆栈的每个参数选择候选最佳值，3）奖励基于我们旨在优化的分类准确性指标，在我们的例子中是基于音频事件的宏 F1 分数。我们将后处理应用于提交给 DCASE Task4 2020 挑战赛的两个音频事件分类模型的类概率分布输出。我们发现，通过使用强化学习来发现应用于音频事件分类模型输出的后处理堆栈的最佳每类参数，与使用具有手动调整参数的相同后处理堆栈相比，我们可以将基于音频事件的宏 F1 分数（DCASE 挑战中用于比较音频事件分类准确性的主要指标）提高 4-5%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出使用强化学习优化音频事件检测模型的后处理参数，以提高分类性能。
AI.motivation: 音频事件分类模型的后处理参数通常需要手动调整，效率低且效果有限，因此需要一种自动化的方法来优化这些参数。
AI.method: 本文构建了一个强化学习环境，将模型输出的类别概率分布作为状态，参数选择作为动作，分类准确率（宏F1分数）作为奖励，以联合优化后处理栈中的多个参数。
AI.result: 实验表明，使用强化学习优化的后处理方法相比手动调整的参数，能够将音频事件分类的宏F1分数提高4-5%。
AI.conclusion: 强化学习能够有效自动优化音频事件分类模型的后处理参数，从而显著提升分类性能。

authors_text: Soumava Paul,Titir Dutta,Aheli Saha,Abhishek Samanta,Soma Biswas
title: Test-time Training for Data-efficient UCDR
title_zh: 数据高效 UCDR 的测试时培训
comment: 9 pages, 1 figure, 4 tables
comments: 9 pages, 1 figure, 4 tables
abstract: Image retrieval under generalized test scenarios has gained significant momentum in literature, and the recently proposed protocol of Universal Cross-domain Retrieval is a pioneer in this direction. A common practice in any such generalized classification or retrieval algorithm is to exploit samples from many domains during training to learn a domain-invariant representation of data. Such criterion is often restrictive, and thus in this work, for the first time, we explore the generalized retrieval problem in a data-efficient manner. Specifically, we aim to generalize any pre-trained cross-domain retrieval network towards any unknown query domain/category, by means of adapting the model on the test data leveraging self-supervised learning techniques. Toward that goal, we explored different self-supervised loss functions~(for example, RotNet, JigSaw, Barlow Twins, etc.) and analyze their effectiveness for the same. Extensive experiments demonstrate the proposed approach is simple, easy to implement, and effective in handling data-efficient UCDR.
summary: Image retrieval under generalized test scenarios has gained significant momentum in literature, and the recently proposed protocol of Universal Cross-domain Retrieval is a pioneer in this direction. A common practice in any such generalized classification or retrieval algorithm is to exploit samples from many domains during training to learn a domain-invariant representation of data. Such criterion is often restrictive, and thus in this work, for the first time, we explore the generalized retrieval problem in a data-efficient manner. Specifically, we aim to generalize any pre-trained cross-domain retrieval network towards any unknown query domain/category, by means of adapting the model on the test data leveraging self-supervised learning techniques. Toward that goal, we explored different self-supervised loss functions~(for example, RotNet, JigSaw, Barlow Twins, etc.) and analyze their effectiveness for the same. Extensive experiments demonstrate the proposed approach is simple, easy to implement, and effective in handling data-efficient UCDR.
abstract_zh: 广义测试场景下的图像检索在文献中获得了巨大的发展势头，最近提出的通用跨域检索协议是这个方向的先驱。任何此类广义分类或检索算法的常见做法是在训练期间利用来自多个领域的样本来学习数据的领域不变表示。这样的标准通常是有限制性的，因此在这项工作中，我们第一次以数据有效的方式探索广义检索问题。具体来说，我们的目标是通过利用自监督学习技术在测试数据上调整模型，将任何预训练的跨域检索网络推广到任何未知的查询域/类别。为了这个目标，我们探索了不同的自监督损失函数~（例如，RotNet、JigSaw、Barlow Twins 等）并分析了它们的有效性。大量实验表明，所提出的方法简单、易于实现，并且能够有效处理数据高效的 UCDR。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种数据高效的通用跨域检索（UCDR）方法，通过测试时训练和自监督学习技术，使预训练模型能够适应未知查询域/类别。
AI.motivation: 传统跨域检索方法依赖大量训练域数据，限制了实际应用。本文旨在探索无需额外训练数据、仅利用测试数据进行模型适配的数据高效解决方案。
AI.method: 在测试阶段采用自监督学习技术（如RotNet、JigSaw、Barlow Twins等损失函数）对预训练模型进行微调，实现对未知域的适应。
AI.result: 实验表明，该方法在保持简单性和易实现性的同时，有效提升了数据高效场景下的跨域检索性能。
AI.conclusion: 测试时训练结合自监督学习为数据受限的通用跨域检索提供了新思路，验证了该范式在实际应用中的有效性。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出了一种数据高效的通用跨域检索（UCDR）方法，通过测试时训练和自监督学习技术，使预训练模型能够适应未知查询域/类别。

search_text: Test-time Training for Data-efficient UCDR 数据高效 UCDR 的测试时培训 Image retrieval under generalized test scenarios has gained significant momentum in literature, and the recently proposed protocol of Universal Cross-domain Retrieval is a pioneer in this direction. A common practice in any such generalized classification or retrieval algorithm is to exploit samples from many domains during training to learn a domain-invariant representation of data. Such criterion is often restrictive, and thus in this work, for the first time, we explore the generalized retrieval problem in a data-efficient manner. Specifically, we aim to generalize any pre-trained cross-domain retrieval network towards any unknown query domain/category, by means of adapting the model on the test data leveraging self-supervised learning techniques. Toward that goal, we explored different self-supervised loss functions~(for example, RotNet, JigSaw, Barlow Twins, etc.) and analyze their effectiveness for the same. Extensive experiments demonstrate the proposed approach is simple, easy to implement, and effective in handling data-efficient UCDR. 广义测试场景下的图像检索在文献中获得了巨大的发展势头，最近提出的通用跨域检索协议是这个方向的先驱。任何此类广义分类或检索算法的常见做法是在训练期间利用来自多个领域的样本来学习数据的领域不变表示。这样的标准通常是有限制性的，因此在这项工作中，我们第一次以数据有效的方式探索广义检索问题。具体来说，我们的目标是通过利用自监督学习技术在测试数据上调整模型，将任何预训练的跨域检索网络推广到任何未知的查询域/类别。为了这个目标，我们探索了不同的自监督损失函数~（例如，RotNet、JigSaw、Barlow Twins 等）并分析了它们的有效性。大量实验表明，所提出的方法简单、易于实现，并且能够有效处理数据高效的 UCDR。 本文提出了一种数据高效的通用跨域检索（UCDR）方法，通过测试时训练和自监督学习技术，使预训练模型能够适应未知查询域/类别。 Soumava Paul,Titir Dutta,Aheli Saha,Abhishek Samanta,Soma Biswas cs.CV

title: EAA-Net: Rethinking the Autoencoder Architecture with Intra-class Features for Medical Image Segmentation
title_zh: EAA-Net：重新思考具有类内特征的医学图像分割自动编码器架构
abstract: Automatic image segmentation technology is critical to the visual analysis. The autoencoder architecture has satisfying performance in various image segmentation tasks. However, autoencoders based on convolutional neural networks (CNN) seem to encounter a bottleneck in improving the accuracy of semantic segmentation. Increasing the inter-class distance between foreground and background is an inherent characteristic of the segmentation network. However, segmentation networks pay too much attention to the main visual difference between foreground and background, and ignores the detailed edge information, which leads to a reduction in the accuracy of edge segmentation. In this paper, we propose a light-weight end-to-end segmentation framework based on multi-task learning, termed Edge Attention autoencoder Network (EAA-Net), to improve edge segmentation ability. Our approach not only utilizes the segmentation network to obtain inter-class features, but also applies the reconstruction network to extract intra-class features among the foregrounds. We further design a intra-class and inter-class features fusion module -- I2 fusion module. The I2 fusion module is used to merge intra-class and inter-class features, and use a soft attention mechanism to remove invalid background information. Experimental results show that our method performs well in medical image segmentation tasks. EAA-Net is easy to implement and has small calculation cost.
summary: Automatic image segmentation technology is critical to the visual analysis. The autoencoder architecture has satisfying performance in various image segmentation tasks. However, autoencoders based on convolutional neural networks (CNN) seem to encounter a bottleneck in improving the accuracy of semantic segmentation. Increasing the inter-class distance between foreground and background is an inherent characteristic of the segmentation network. However, segmentation networks pay too much attention to the main visual difference between foreground and background, and ignores the detailed edge information, which leads to a reduction in the accuracy of edge segmentation. In this paper, we propose a light-weight end-to-end segmentation framework based on multi-task learning, termed Edge Attention autoencoder Network (EAA-Net), to improve edge segmentation ability. Our approach not only utilizes the segmentation network to obtain inter-class features, but also applies the reconstruction network to extract intra-class features among the foregrounds. We further design a intra-class and inter-class features fusion module -- I2 fusion module. The I2 fusion module is used to merge intra-class and inter-class features, and use a soft attention mechanism to remove invalid background information. Experimental results show that our method performs well in medical image segmentation tasks. EAA-Net is easy to implement and has small calculation cost.
abstract_zh: 自动图像分割技术对于视觉分析至关重要。自动编码器架构在各种图像分割任务中具有令人满意的性能。然而，基于卷积神经网络（CNN）的自动编码器在提高语义分割的准确性方面似乎遇到了瓶颈。增加前景和背景之间的类间距离是分割网络的固有特征。然而，分割网络过多关注前景和背景之间的主要视觉差异，而忽略了详细的边缘信息，导致边缘分割的准确性降低。在本文中，我们提出了一种基于多任务学习的轻量级端到端分割框架，称为边缘注意自动编码器网络（EAA-Net），以提高边缘分割能力。我们的方法不仅利用分割网络来获取类间特征，还利用重建网络来提取前景中的类内特征。我们进一步设计了一个类内和类间特征融合模块——I2融合模块。 I2融合模块用于合并类内和类间特征，并使用软注意力机制去除无效的背景信息。实验结果表明，我们的方法在医学图像分割任务中表现良好。 EAA-Net易于实现，计算成本小。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种轻量级端到端分割框架EAA-Net，通过结合类间与类内特征提升医学图像边缘分割精度。
AI.motivation: 现有分割网络过度关注前景背景主视觉差异，忽略细节边缘信息，导致边缘分割准确性不足。
AI.method: 设计EAA-Net框架，融合分割网络提取的类间特征与重建网络提取的类内特征，通过I2融合模块和软注意力机制优化边缘信息。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法在医学图像分割任务中表现优异，计算成本低且易于实现。
AI.conclusion: EAA-Net通过有效融合类间类内特征，显著提升医学图像边缘分割性能，具有实际应用价值。

authors_text: Husheng Han,Xing Hu,Kaidi Xu,Pucheng Dang,Ying Wang,Yongwei Zhao,Zidong Du,Qi Guo,Yanzhi Yang,Tianshi Chen
title: Real-Time Robust Video Object Detection System Against Physical-World Adversarial Attacks
title_zh: 针对物理世界对抗攻击的实时鲁棒视频对象检测系统
abstract: DNN-based video object detection (VOD) powers autonomous driving and video surveillance industries with rising importance and promising opportunities. However, adversarial patch attack yields huge concern in live vision tasks because of its practicality, feasibility, and powerful attack effectiveness. This work proposes Themis, a software/hardware system to defend against adversarial patches for real-time robust video object detection. We observe that adversarial patches exhibit extremely localized superficial feature importance in a small region with non-robust predictions, and thus propose the adversarial region detection algorithm for adversarial effect elimination. Themis also proposes a systematic design to efficiently support the algorithm by eliminating redundant computations and memory traffics. Experimental results show that the proposed methodology can effectively recover the system from the adversarial attack with negligible hardware overhead.
summary: DNN-based video object detection (VOD) powers autonomous driving and video surveillance industries with rising importance and promising opportunities. However, adversarial patch attack yields huge concern in live vision tasks because of its practicality, feasibility, and powerful attack effectiveness. This work proposes Themis, a software/hardware system to defend against adversarial patches for real-time robust video object detection. We observe that adversarial patches exhibit extremely localized superficial feature importance in a small region with non-robust predictions, and thus propose the adversarial region detection algorithm for adversarial effect elimination. Themis also proposes a systematic design to efficiently support the algorithm by eliminating redundant computations and memory traffics. Experimental results show that the proposed methodology can effectively recover the system from the adversarial attack with negligible hardware overhead.
abstract_zh: 基于 DNN 的视频对象检测 (VOD) 为自动驾驶和视频监控行业提供了日益重要的重要性和广阔的机遇。然而，对抗性补丁攻击因其实用性、可行性和强大的攻击效力而在实时视觉任务中引起了极大的关注。这项工作提出了 Themis，这是一种软件/硬件系统，用于防御对抗性补丁，以实现实时鲁棒的视频对象检测。我们观察到，对抗性补丁在具有非鲁棒预测的小区域中表现出极其局部化的表面特征重要性，因此提出了用于消除对抗性效应的对抗性区域检测算法。 Themis 还提出了一种系统设计，通过消除冗余计算和内存流量来有效支持算法。实验结果表明，所提出的方法可以有效地将系统从对抗性攻击中恢复，并且硬件开销可以忽略不计。

AI.tldr: 本文提出Themis系统，用于实时防御物理世界对抗性贴片攻击的视频目标检测。
AI.motivation: 基于深度神经网络的视频目标检测系统在自动驾驶等关键领域面临对抗性贴片攻击的严重威胁，现有方法难以兼顾实时性与防御效果。
AI.method: 通过检测对抗性区域的局部特征重要性，结合算法优化消除冗余计算与内存流量，实现高效防御。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法能有效消除对抗攻击影响，且硬件开销可忽略不计。
AI.conclusion: Themis为实时视频目标检测提供了兼具效率与鲁棒性的对抗防御解决方案。

We observe that adversarial patches exhibit extremely localized superficial feature importance in a small region with non-robust predictions, and thus propose the adversarial region detection algorithm for adversarial effect elimination. Themis also proposes a systematic design to efficiently support the algorithm by eliminating redundant computations and memory traffics. Experimental results show that the proposed methodology can effectively recover the system from the adversarial attack with negligible hardware overhead. 基于 DNN 的视频对象检测 (VOD) 为自动驾驶和视频监控行业提供了日益重要的重要性和广阔的机遇。然而，对抗性补丁攻击因其实用性、可行性和强大的攻击效力而在实时视觉任务中引起了极大的关注。这项工作提出了 Themis，这是一种软件/硬件系统，用于防御对抗性补丁，以实现实时鲁棒的视频对象检测。我们观察到，对抗性补丁在具有非鲁棒预测的小区域中表现出极其局部化的表面特征重要性，因此提出了用于消除对抗性效应的对抗性区域检测算法。 Themis 还提出了一种系统设计，通过消除冗余计算和内存流量来有效支持算法。实验结果表明，所提出的方法可以有效地将系统从对抗性攻击中恢复，并且硬件开销可以忽略不计。 本文提出Themis系统，用于实时防御物理世界对抗性贴片攻击的视频目标检测。 Husheng Han,Xing Hu,Kaidi Xu,Pucheng Dang,Ying Wang,Yongwei Zhao,Zidong Du,Qi Guo,Yanzhi Yang,Tianshi Chen cs.CV,cs.AR,cs.CR,cs.LG

title: Exploration, Path Planning with Obstacle and Collision Avoidance in a Dynamic Environment
title_zh: 动态环境中的探索、障碍物路径规划和碰撞避免
abstract: If we give a robot the task of moving an object from its current position to another location in an unknown environment, the robot must explore the map, identify all types of obstacles, and then determine the best route to complete the task. We proposed a mathematical model to find an optimal path planning that avoids collisions with all static and moving obstacles and has the minimum completion time and the minimum distance traveled. In this model, the bounding box around obstacles and robots is not considered, so the robot can move very close to the obstacles without colliding with them. We considered two types of obstacles: deterministic, which include all static obstacles such as walls that do not move and all moving obstacles whose movements have a fixed pattern, and non-deterministic, which include all obstacles whose movements can occur in any direction with some probability distribution at any time. We also consider the acceleration and deceleration of the robot to improve collision avoidance.
summary: If we give a robot the task of moving an object from its current position to another location in an unknown environment, the robot must explore the map, identify all types of obstacles, and then determine the best route to complete the task. We proposed a mathematical model to find an optimal path planning that avoids collisions with all static and moving obstacles and has the minimum completion time and the minimum distance traveled. In this model, the bounding box around obstacles and robots is not considered, so the robot can move very close to the obstacles without colliding with them. We considered two types of obstacles: deterministic, which include all static obstacles such as walls that do not move and all moving obstacles whose movements have a fixed pattern, and non-deterministic, which include all obstacles whose movements can occur in any direction with some probability distribution at any time. We also consider the acceleration and deceleration of the robot to improve collision avoidance.
abstract_zh: 如果我们给机器人一个在未知环境中将物体从当前位置移动到另一个位置的任务，机器人必须探索地图，识别所有类型的障碍物，然后确定完成任务的最佳路线。我们提出了一个数学模型来寻找最佳路径规划，避免与所有静态和移动障碍物发生碰撞，并具有最短的完成时间和最短的行驶距离。在该模型中，不考虑障碍物和机器人周围的边界框，因此机器人可以非常靠近障碍物而不会与障碍物发生碰撞。我们考虑了两种类型的障碍物：确定性障碍物，包括所有静态障碍物，例如不移动的墙壁和所有运动具有固定模式的移动障碍物；非确定性障碍物，包括所有在任何时间都可以以某种概率分布在任何方向上发生运动的障碍物。我们还考虑机器人的加速和减速，以提高避免碰撞的能力。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了在未知动态环境中，机器人如何通过探索和路径规划实现避障并高效移动物体。
AI.motivation: 现有路径规划方法难以同时处理静态和动态障碍物，且在复杂环境中易发生碰撞或效率低下。
AI.method: 提出数学模型，忽略障碍物与机器人的边界框，区分确定性与非确定性障碍物，并考虑机器人加减速以优化路径。
AI.result: 模型能生成最小化时间和距离的路径，有效避免静态和动态障碍物碰撞，提升机器人移动效率。
AI.conclusion: 该方法在动态环境中实现了高效、安全的路径规划，适用于复杂障碍物场景的机器人导航。

authors_text: Indu Joshi,Marcel Grimmer,Christian Rathgeb,Christoph Busch,Francois Bremond,Antitza Dantcheva
title: Synthetic Data in Human Analysis: A Survey
title_zh: 人体分析中的综合数据：调查
abstract: Deep neural networks have become prevalent in human analysis, boosting the performance of applications, such as biometric recognition, action recognition, as well as person re-identification. However, the performance of such networks scales with the available training data. In human analysis, the demand for large-scale datasets poses a severe challenge, as data collection is tedious, time-expensive, costly and must comply with data protection laws. Current research investigates the generation of \textit{synthetic data} as an efficient and privacy-ensuring alternative to collecting real data in the field. This survey introduces the basic definitions and methodologies, essential when generating and employing synthetic data for human analysis. We conduct a survey that summarises current state-of-the-art methods and the main benefits of using synthetic data. We also provide an overview of publicly available synthetic datasets and generation models. Finally, we discuss limitations, as well as open research problems in this field. This survey is intended for researchers and practitioners in the field of human analysis.
summary: Deep neural networks have become prevalent in human analysis, boosting the performance of applications, such as biometric recognition, action recognition, as well as person re-identification. However, the performance of such networks scales with the available training data. In human analysis, the demand for large-scale datasets poses a severe challenge, as data collection is tedious, time-expensive, costly and must comply with data protection laws. Current research investigates the generation of \textit{synthetic data} as an efficient and privacy-ensuring alternative to collecting real data in the field. This survey introduces the basic definitions and methodologies, essential when generating and employing synthetic data for human analysis. We conduct a survey that summarises current state-of-the-art methods and the main benefits of using synthetic data. We also provide an overview of publicly available synthetic datasets and generation models. Finally, we discuss limitations, as well as open research problems in this field. This survey is intended for researchers and practitioners in the field of human analysis.
abstract_zh: 深度神经网络在人体分析中已变得普遍，提高了生物特征识别、动作识别以及人员重新识别等应用的性能。然而，此类网络的性能随着可用的训练数据而变化。在人类分析中，对大规模数据集的需求提出了严峻的挑战，因为数据收集繁琐、耗时、成本高昂，并且必须遵守数据保护法。当前的研究调查了 \textit{合成数据} 的生成，作为在现场收集真实数据的有效且保护隐私的替代方案。这项调查介绍了生成和使用合成数据进行人类分析时必不可少的基本定义和方法。我们进行了一项调查，总结了当前最先进的方法以及使用合成数据的主要好处。我们还提供了公开可用的合成数据集和生成模型的概述。最后，我们讨论该领域的局限性以及开放的研究问题。这项调查面向人类分析领域的研究人员和从业者。

AI.tldr: 本文综述了合成数据在人类分析中的应用，包括其定义、方法、数据集和生成模型。
AI.motivation: 深度神经网络在人类分析中的应用需要大量数据，但真实数据的收集面临诸多挑战，因此需要寻找高效且隐私保护的替代方案。
AI.method: 本文通过总结当前最先进的方法，概述了公开的合成数据集和生成模型，并讨论了该领域的局限性和开放性问题。
AI.result: 本文提供了合成数据在人类分析中的基本定义、方法、数据集和生成模型的全面概述，并指出了当前研究的不足和未来的研究方向。
AI.conclusion: 合成数据为人类分析提供了一种高效的解决方案，但仍需进一步研究以解决其局限性和开放性问题。

authors_text: Keong Hun Choi,Jin Woo Kim,Yao Wang,Jong Eun Ha
title: Improved Image Classification with Token Fusion
title_zh: 通过令牌融合改进图像分类
abstract: In this paper, we propose a method using the fusion of CNN and transformer structure to improve image classification performance. In the case of CNN, information about a local area on an image can be extracted well, but there is a limit to the extraction of global information. On the other hand, the transformer has an advantage in relatively global extraction, but has a disadvantage in that it requires a lot of memory for local feature value extraction. In the case of an image, it is converted into a feature map through CNN, and each feature map's pixel is considered a token. At the same time, the image is divided into patch areas and then fused with the transformer method that views them as tokens. For the fusion of tokens with two different characteristics, we propose three methods: (1) late token fusion with parallel structure, (2) early token fusion, (3) token fusion in a layer by layer. In an experiment using ImageNet 1k, the proposed method shows the best classification performance.
summary: In this paper, we propose a method using the fusion of CNN and transformer structure to improve image classification performance. In the case of CNN, information about a local area on an image can be extracted well, but there is a limit to the extraction of global information. On the other hand, the transformer has an advantage in relatively global extraction, but has a disadvantage in that it requires a lot of memory for local feature value extraction. In the case of an image, it is converted into a feature map through CNN, and each feature map's pixel is considered a token. At the same time, the image is divided into patch areas and then fused with the transformer method that views them as tokens. For the fusion of tokens with two different characteristics, we propose three methods: (1) late token fusion with parallel structure, (2) early token fusion, (3) token fusion in a layer by layer. In an experiment using ImageNet 1k, the proposed method shows the best classification performance.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们提出了一种利用 CNN 和 Transformer 结构融合来提高图像分类性能的方法。就CNN而言，可以很好地提取图像上局部区域的信息，但全局信息的提取存在限制。另一方面，Transformer 在相对全局提取方面具有优势，但缺点是需要大量内存用于局部特征值提取。以图像为例，通过CNN将其转换为特征图，每个特征图的像素被视为一个标记。同时，图像被分成块区域，然后与将它们视为标记的变换器方法融合。对于具有两种不同特征的令牌融合，我们提出了三种方法：（1）并行结构的后期令牌融合，（2）早期令牌融合，（3）逐层令牌融合。在使用 ImageNet 1k 的实验中，所提出的方法显示出最佳的分类性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种结合CNN和Transformer结构的图像分类方法，以提高分类性能。
AI.motivation: CNN擅长提取局部信息，但难以获取全局信息；Transformer擅长全局信息提取，但对局部特征提取需要大量内存。因此，本文旨在结合两者的优势，以提高图像分类性能。
AI.method: 将图像通过CNN转换为特征图，每个像素视为一个token；同时将图像划分为patch区域，并将其视为token。提出三种token融合方法：(1) 并行结构的晚期token融合，(2) 早期token融合，(3) 层层token融合。
AI.result: 在ImageNet 1k数据集上的实验表明，所提出的方法在分类性能上表现最佳。
AI.conclusion: 通过融合CNN和Transformer结构的优势，本文提出的方法有效提升了图像分类性能。

ai_content_json.method: 将图像通过CNN转换为特征图，每个像素视为一个token；同时将图像划分为patch区域，并将其视为token。提出三种token融合方法：(1) 并行结构的晚期token融合，(2) 早期token融合，(3) 层层token融合。
ai_content_json.result: 在ImageNet 1k数据集上的实验表明，所提出的方法在分类性能上表现最佳。
ai_content_json.conclusion: 通过融合CNN和Transformer结构的优势，本文提出的方法有效提升了图像分类性能。

search_text: Improved Image Classification with Token Fusion 通过令牌融合改进图像分类 In this paper, we propose a method using the fusion of CNN and transformer structure to improve image classification performance. In the case of CNN, information about a local area on an image can be extracted well, but there is a limit to the extraction of global information. On the other hand, the transformer has an advantage in relatively global extraction, but has a disadvantage in that it requires a lot of memory for local feature value extraction. In the case of an image, it is converted into a feature map through CNN, and each feature map's pixel is considered a token. At the same time, the image is divided into patch areas and then fused with the transformer method that views them as tokens. For the fusion of tokens with two different characteristics, we propose three methods: (1) late token fusion with parallel structure, (2) early token fusion, (3) token fusion in a layer by layer. In an experiment using ImageNet 1k, the proposed method shows the best classification performance. 在本文中，我们提出了一种利用 CNN 和 Transformer 结构融合来提高图像分类性能的方法。就CNN而言，可以很好地提取图像上局部区域的信息，但全局信息的提取存在限制。另一方面，Transformer 在相对全局提取方面具有优势，但缺点是需要大量内存用于局部特征值提取。以图像为例，通过CNN将其转换为特征图，每个特征图的像素被视为一个标记。同时，图像被分成块区域，然后与将它们视为标记的变换器方法融合。对于具有两种不同特征的令牌融合，我们提出了三种方法：（1）并行结构的后期令牌融合，（2）早期令牌融合，（3）逐层令牌融合。在使用 ImageNet 1k 的实验中，所提出的方法显示出最佳的分类性能。 本文提出了一种结合CNN和Transformer结构的图像分类方法，以提高分类性能。 Keong Hun Choi,Jin Woo Kim,Yao Wang,Jong Eun Ha cs.CV,cs.AI

title: A Physics-informed Deep Learning Approach for Minimum Effort Stochastic Control of Colloidal Self-Assembly
title_zh: 一种基于物理的深度学习方法，用于胶体自组装的最小努力随机控制
abstract: We propose formulating the finite-horizon stochastic optimal control problem for colloidal self-assembly in the space of probability density functions (PDFs) of the underlying state variables (namely, order parameters). The control objective is formulated in terms of steering the state PDFs from a prescribed initial probability measure towards a prescribed terminal probability measure with minimum control effort. For specificity, we use a univariate stochastic state model from the literature. Both the analysis and the computational steps for control synthesis as developed in this paper generalize for multivariate stochastic state dynamics given by generic nonlinear in state and non-affine in control models. We derive the conditions of optimality for the associated optimal control problem. This derivation yields a system of three coupled partial differential equations together with the boundary conditions at the initial and terminal times. The resulting system is a generalized instance of the so-called Schrödinger bridge problem. We then determine the optimal control policy by training a physics-informed deep neural network, where the "physics" are the derived conditions of optimality. The performance of the proposed solution is demonstrated via numerical simulations on a benchmark colloidal self-assembly problem.
summary: We propose formulating the finite-horizon stochastic optimal control problem for colloidal self-assembly in the space of probability density functions (PDFs) of the underlying state variables (namely, order parameters). The control objective is formulated in terms of steering the state PDFs from a prescribed initial probability measure towards a prescribed terminal probability measure with minimum control effort. For specificity, we use a univariate stochastic state model from the literature. Both the analysis and the computational steps for control synthesis as developed in this paper generalize for multivariate stochastic state dynamics given by generic nonlinear in state and non-affine in control models. We derive the conditions of optimality for the associated optimal control problem. This derivation yields a system of three coupled partial differential equations together with the boundary conditions at the initial and terminal times. The resulting system is a generalized instance of the so-called Schrödinger bridge problem. We then determine the optimal control policy by training a physics-informed deep neural network, where the "physics" are the derived conditions of optimality. The performance of the proposed solution is demonstrated via numerical simulations on a benchmark colloidal self-assembly problem.
abstract_zh: 我们建议在基础状态变量（即顺序参数）的概率密度函数（PDF）空间中制定胶体自组装的有限范围随机最优控制问题。控制目标是根据以最小的控制努力将状态PDF从规定的初始概率测量转向规定的终端概率测量来制定的。为了具体起见，我们使用文献中的单变量随机状态模型。本文开发的控制综合的分析和计算步骤都推广到由一般非线性状态和非仿射控制模型给出的多元随机状态动力学。我们推导出相关最优控制问题的最优性条件。该推导产生了三个耦合偏微分方程组以及初始和终止时间的边界条件。由此产生的系统是所谓的薛定谔桥问题的广义实例。然后，我们通过训练基于物理的深度神经网络来确定最优控制策略，其中“物理”是最优性的导出条件。通过对基准胶体自组装问题的数值模拟证明了所提出解决方案的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于概率密度函数空间的物理信息深度学习方法，用于解决胶体自组装过程中的最小控制努力随机控制问题。
AI.motivation: 胶体自组装过程受随机因素影响显著，传统控制方法难以在复杂动态中实现最小控制努力的精准调控。
AI.method: 通过推导随机最优控制问题的最优条件，建立耦合偏微分方程系统，并利用物理信息神经网络学习该系统的最优控制策略。
AI.result: 在基准胶体自组装问题的数值模拟中验证了该方法的有效性，成功实现了概率密度函数的最优演化控制。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为处理非线性、非仿射控制模型的随机控制问题提供了通用框架，推动了物理信息深度学习在复杂系统控制中的应用。
